skills.name: Abyssal Echoes
skills.description: A nova that echoes from up to 8 enemies it reaches and applies abyssal decay. Enemies with abyssal decay take void damage over time for 5 seconds, if they take a hit all the damage from abyssal decay is dealt to them immediately.
skills.altText:
Abyssal decay deals a total of 100 void damage over its duration, with added spell damage applied at 100% effectiveness each second.

Abyssal Echoes cannot apply other on hit effects on hit.

nodes.name: Abyssal Echoes
nodes.loreText: One day all that will be left of us will be echoes in the abyss

nodes.name: Vorpal Reverberation
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay deals additional spell void damage.
nodes.altText: This applies to the initial hit if you have the {Potent Corruption} node.

nodes.name: Rippling Corrosion
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes' initial burst shreds enemy armor.

nodes.name: Tides of Rust
nodes.description: Armor shred applied by Abyssal Decay has increased effect.

nodes.name: Time Compression
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes no longer has a cooldown, but costs more mana.

nodes.name: Abyssal Dispersion
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes costs less mana.

nodes.name: Nether Breach
nodes.description: Directly using Abyssal Echoes has a chance to cast a {Void Rift} from each nearby {Devouring Orb}.

nodes.name: Dark Torrent
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes can now be cast at the target location.

nodes.name: Turbulence
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay has increased duration.

nodes.name: Myopia
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay now blinds enemies.

nodes.name: Fragility
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay causes enemies to have reduced physical resistance, but it is no longer consumed when the enemy is hit.

nodes.name: Crumbling
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay causes enemies to take increased damage over time.

nodes.name: Impair the Weak
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay now deals damage when the enemy is hit, rather than over time. Each hit deals a portion of the full damage Abyssal Decay would have dealt over its full duration. This damage still counts .

stats.statName: DoT -> Damage To Enemy On Hit

nodes.name: Embrace the Darkness
nodes.description: Directly using Abyssal Echoes grants you {Nether Coating} for 5 seconds, granting you increased attack speed with your melee and throwing attacks and causing you to deal more damage to blinded enemies.

nodes.name: Abyssal Tendrils
nodes.description: {Nether Coating} also grants you a chance to inflict {Time Rot} on hit.

nodes.name: Sanguine Eruption
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes' initial burst consumes all stacks of bleed on the enemy, causing their damage to be dealt instantly.

nodes.name: Crippling Waves
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes' initial burst slows enemies.

nodes.name: Freedom of Movement
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay causes Enemies that would apply {Slow} to instead instead grant their target {Haste} for 1 second.

nodes.name: Void Supremacy
nodes.description: After casting Abyssal Echoes your next {Erasing Strike} and {Void Cleave} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to slowed enemies.

nodes.name: Deep Expanse
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes affects a larger area.

nodes.name: Fiery Chasm
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes' initial burst has a chance to ignite enemies.

nodes.name: Potent Corruption
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes' initial burst now hits and deals spell void damage, but no longer inflicts Abyssal Decay.

nodes.name: Void Purifier
nodes.description:
Spell void damage from {Potent Corruption}, {Vorpal Reverberation} and attribute scaling is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to void damage.

Abyssal Echoes' initial burst now also heals you and your allies and nodes on this tree that grant more damage also grant more healing.

nodes.name: Heavenly Gift
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes' damage now scales with attunement rather than vitality, and its healing effectiveness is also increased by attunement.

nodes.name: Vorpal Explosion
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but no longer chains.

nodes.name: Spreading Chaos
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay now spreads to several nearby enemies after 1 second.

nodes.name: Overwhelming Doom
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay spreads to enemies further away and can spread to more enemies when it spreads.

nodes.name: Shrieking Echoes
nodes.description: {Abyssal Rifts} cast additional Abyssal Echoes.

nodes.name: Screaming Rifts
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes now creates an {Abyssal Rift} at the target location that casts Abyssal Echoes for you 3 times at its location before expiring.

nodes.name: Corrupting Harness
nodes.description:
Abyssal Echoes can chain additional times. 

This effect is tripled for echoed casts.

nodes.name: Resounding Abyss
nodes.description: Echoed casts deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

skills.name: Acid Flask
skills.description: Throw a flask of acid that explodes dealing physical damage on impact, poisoning enemies and reducing their armor.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 125% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Corrosive
nodes.description: Acid Flask deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Elixir of Speed
nodes.description: Acid Flask has a chance to grant {Haste} on use for a short duration.

nodes.name: Toxic Salvo
nodes.description:
You now throw 3 Acid Flasks in a line, but Acid Flask costs more mana.

Enemies can only be hit by one flask per throw.

nodes.name: Barrage
nodes.description: You now throw Acid Flasks in a fan in front of you instead of a line. Flasks travel faster.

nodes.name: Tempered Glass
nodes.description: Acid Flask has a chance to shred enemy armor.

nodes.name: Poison Pools
nodes.description:
Acid Flask leaves behind a {Poison Pool} for 4 seconds that poison enemies that stand in it and adds a 2 second cooldown per flask thrown.

You can have a maximum of 4 {Poison Pools} active at once.
nodes.altText: {Poison Pool} applies a stack of poison to enemies standing in it each second.

nodes.name: Hydrochloric Acid
nodes.description: You have a chance to poison enemies while standing in your {Poison Pools}.

nodes.name: Lingering Toxicity
nodes.description: {Poison Pools} last longer.
nodes.altText: {Poison Pool} applies a stack of poison to enemies standing in it each second.

nodes.name: Explosive Flask
nodes.description:
Acid Flask's base damage is converted to fire damage and its hits deal significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Acid Flask can no longer apply poison or create poison pools.

stats.statName: No Poison Chance or Poison Pools

nodes.name: Smoulder
nodes.description: Converts Armor Shred from all sources that Acid Flask would apply to Fire Resistance Shred.

nodes.name: Cluster Bomb
nodes.description: When Acid Flask is thrown directly it causes 3 smaller explosions around the impact location dealing fire damage on hit, but it costs more mana.

nodes.name: Blinding Mixture
nodes.description: Acid Flask has a chance to blind enemies hit for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Contamination
nodes.description: Acid Flask has a chance to shred enemy poison resistance on hit.

nodes.name: Caustic Concoction
nodes.description: Acid Flask has additional chance to poison enemies on hit.

nodes.name: Debilitate
nodes.description: Acid Flask has a chance to apply {Frailty} to enemies hit, causing them to deal less damage.

nodes.name: Lasting Sickness
nodes.description: Acid Flask has increased poison duration.

nodes.name: Quick Draw
nodes.description: Acid Flask has increased throwing speed.

nodes.name: Castigate
nodes.description:
You have a chance to drop an Acid Flask at your feet when an enemy hits you. 

This effect has a 5 second cooldown.

stats.statName: Chance to Drop Flask When Hit

nodes.name: Alchemical Proficiency
nodes.description: Acid Flask costs less mana.

nodes.name: Hindering Mixture
nodes.description: Acid Flask has a chance to slow enemies on hit. Slow caused by Acid Flask lasts longer.

nodes.name: Firebomb Cocktail
nodes.description: Acid Flask deals additional throwing fire damage.

nodes.name: Flammable Concoction
nodes.description: Acid Flask has a chance to ignite enemies.

nodes.name: Piercing Debris
nodes.description: Acid Flask has increased citical strike chance and critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Splash Zone
nodes.description: Acid Flask deals damage in a larger area.
nodes.altText: This does not affect {Cluster Bomb}.

nodes.name: Lightweight
nodes.description: Acid Flask travels faster.

nodes.name: Knowledge of Immunity
nodes.description: Acid Flask penetrates poison resistance based on your own uncapped Poison Resistance
nodes.altText:
This scales off of uncapped poison resistance, so gaining more poison resistance above the normal 75% cap will continue to increase its effect.

If you have Explosive Flask this node grants fire penetration instead and scales with your Fire Resistance instead of Poison Resistance.

stats.statName: Poison Penetration per 5% Uncapped Poison Resistance

nodes.name: Amatoxic Pools
nodes.description: {Poison Pools} have a chance to inflict enemies with {Efficacious Toxin} each second, causing them to take increased damage over time.

nodes.name: Alchemist's Gift
nodes.description:
Acid Flask is now thrown .

You can have a maximum of 6 Acid Flask Traps active at once.

skills.name: Aerial Assault
skills.description: You leap towards the target and your {Falcon} dives to catch you and momentarily carry you further, before it flies up and unleashes a {Wing Burst} at the target location.
skills.altText: The Wing Burst deals physical throwing damage and scales with your Falcon's stats.

nodes.name: Avian Hunter
nodes.description: Aerial Assault deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: Featherstorm
nodes.description: After the initial {Wing Burst} your Falcon continues releasing {Featherstorm} at the target location for 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Domain of the Huntress
nodes.description:
{Featherstorm} now has a chance to slow enemies inside its area each second. 

Additionally, you and your allies have additional dodge rating while inside the area.

stats.statName: Dodge Rating per Dex inside Feather Storm

nodes.name: Shaded Wingspan
nodes.description: If there is a boss or rare enemy nearby Aerial Assault now also creates a {Shadow Falcon} to use {Featherstorm} against it.

nodes.name: Storm on the Horizon
nodes.description: Aerial Assault no longer moves you. Additionally, it deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and it no longer has a minimum range.

nodes.name: Razorblade Plume
nodes.description: {Featherstorm} lasts longer and deals more direct damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per second it has been active.
nodes.altText: Direct damage modifiers do not affect damage of ailments from Featherstorm.

stats.statName: Feather Storm Damage Bonus Per Second

nodes.name: Darkwing Fall
nodes.description: {Featherstorm} now has a chance each second to drop a {Black Arrow}.

nodes.name: Pitohui
nodes.description:
{Featherstorms'} base physical damage over time is converted to poison. Consequently this damage scales with increases to poison damage, but not increases to physical damage.

A portion of your global poison chance on hit now applies {Featherstorm}.

Swaps {Featherstorms'} {Physical} tag for a {Poison} tag.

nodes.name: Skyward Swoop
nodes.description: A portion of Aerial Assault's cooldown is recovered when your Falcon hits an enemy.

stats.statName: Remaining Cooldown Recovered On Falcon Hit

nodes.name: Treacherous Pursuit
nodes.description: Using Aerial Assault now also drops {Caltrops} at your location.

nodes.name: Vengeful Nails
nodes.description: {Caltrops} from all sources have a chance to slow on hit, and deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Spikefield
nodes.description: You now drop additional {Caltrops} halfway through Aerial Assault's movement if you traveled at least 6 meters.

nodes.name: Rending Barbs
nodes.description:
{Caltrops'} hits from all sources has a chance to cause enemies to bleed. 

Additionally, when an enemy walks over your {Caltrops} your Falcon's hits gain additional bleed chance per 4 Dexterity for 4 seconds, and this can stack an unlimited number of times.

stats.statName: Falcon Bleed Chance per 4 Dex with Buff

nodes.name: Refreshing Resolve
nodes.description: Directly using Aerial Assault recovers a portion of your missing mana.

nodes.name: Coordinated Assault
nodes.description: Directly using Aerial Assault recovers a portion of the remaining cooldown of {Falconry} and {Dive Bomb} per 10 maximum mana you have.

nodes.name: Healing Gust
nodes.description: Directly using Aerial Assault recovers a portion of your missing health.

nodes.name: Gustborne Guard
nodes.description: The health gain from the {Healing Gust} node is converted to ward.

nodes.name: Aerial Prowess
nodes.description:
For the next 8 seconds after using Aerial Assault, critical strikes dealt by you or your {Falcon} grant you a stack of {Aerial Prowess} up to a maximum.

When you next use Aerial Assault it consumes all stacks to restore health per stack and deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack.

nodes.name: Wind Rider
nodes.description:
You have more global dodge rating (multiplicative with other modifiers) while traveling.

Additionally, each hit you dodge while traveling grants you a stack of {Aerial Prowess}.

nodes.name: Torrent of Talons
nodes.description: Aerial Assault now has a chance to grant you {Aerial Prowess} stacks on non-critical strikes and when you kill an enemy.

nodes.name: Falcon's Havoc
nodes.description: Consuming stacks of {Aerial Assault} now grants you {Haste} and Frenzy for a short duration per stack consumed.

nodes.name: Terrorwings
nodes.description: Directly using {Ballista,} {Explosive Trap} or {Dive Bomb} now also consumes your stacks of {Aerial Prowess}, applying the damage bonus to the ability that consumed them.

stats.statName: Aerial Prowess applies to other Abilities

nodes.name: Covering Fire
nodes.description: The {Wing Burst's} hits apply frailty.

nodes.name: Tactician
nodes.description: After landing, all your active {Ballistas} prioritize targets around you and deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per Intelligence .

nodes.name: Predator's Cascade
nodes.description: The {Wing Burst} deals damage in a larger area.
nodes.altText: This effect also applies to {Featherstorm}.

nodes.name: Ambush
nodes.description: The {Wing Burst} deals more direct damage to enemies on high health.
nodes.altText:
Direct damage modifiers do not affect damage of ailments and subskills from Aerial Assault.

This direct damage modifier does affect {Featherstorm}.

nodes.name: Slayer of big Prey
nodes.description: The damage bonus from {Ambush} always applies against bosses and rare enemies, regardless of their health.

stats.statName: Damage bonus always applies to bosses and rares

nodes.name: Umbral Remnants
nodes.description: When the {Wing Burst} kills an enemy and you have 3 or fewer active {Shadows} it creates a {Shadow} at that enemy's location.
nodes.altText: This effect also applies to {Featherstorm}.

stats.statName: Shadow Falcon on Feather Burst Kill

nodes.name: Projectile Training
nodes.description: A portion of your added, increased and more throwing damage modifiers now apply to the {Wing Burst}.
nodes.altText: This effect also applies to {Featherstorm}.

nodes.name: Twilight Strike
nodes.description: The {Wing Burst} now also includes a few {Umbral Blades} that your Falcon throws for you.

nodes.name: Plumed Daggers
nodes.description: The {Umbral Blades'} hits from the {Twilight Strike} node now inflict {Shadow Daggers}.

stats.statName: Shadow Dagger on Umbral Blade hits

skills.name: Anomaly
skills.description: Combo skill that first sends enemies forward in time by 5 seconds. Reactivate the skill to bring those enemies back to your timeline early.
skills.altText: Bosses are only sent forward by a millisecond, causing return effects to occur immediately without them visually disappearing.

skills.name: Anomaly
skills.description: Brings enemies that were sent forward back to your time.

nodes.name: Emission
nodes.description: Anomaly hits enemies in a larger area.

nodes.name: Red Shift
nodes.description: Anomaly lasts longer.

nodes.name: Borrowed Time
nodes.description: Anomaly is cast instantly, but Anomaly has a longer cooldown.

nodes.name: Time Wave
nodes.description: When enemies return to the present a {Time Wave} is released, a spell dealing void damage to nearby enemies.

stats.statName: Time Wave Cast On Enemy Return

nodes.name: Temporal Expanse
nodes.description: {Time Wave} deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area, and increases to Anomaly's area also affect Time Wave.

nodes.name: Tides of Time
nodes.description: An additional {Time Wave} is released when you cast Anomaly.

nodes.name: Anticipation
nodes.description: Anomaly has a shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: Reflection
nodes.description: {Future Strike} is applied to all enemies hit by Anomaly.

nodes.name: Resonate
nodes.description: {Future Strikes} applied by Anomaly have additional Void Penetration

nodes.name: Quicksand
nodes.description: When enemies return to the present, all damaging ailments currently applied to them apply faster.
nodes.altText: This affects the duration of ailments, not damage.

nodes.name: Cycle of Decay
nodes.description: When enemies return to the present, the duration of damaging ailments applied to them is reset.

nodes.name: Void Touched
nodes.description: Enemies hit by Anomaly are afflicted with {Time Rot} when they return.

nodes.name: Exacerbate
nodes.description: {Time Rot} inflicted by Anomaly lasts longer and has additional Void Penetration

nodes.name: Mark of Rot
nodes.description: When enemies return to the present, they take increased void damage for a duration.

nodes.name: Voidfire
nodes.description: Anomaly now applies Ignite instead of Time Rot. Modifiers to Time Rot apply to Ignite instead.

nodes.name: Hour of Flame
nodes.description: Anomaly applies additional stacks of ignite.

nodes.name: Time Bubble
nodes.description: Anomaly leaves behind a {Time Bubble} for 5 seconds, which slows enemies and shreds their void resistance.

stats.statName: Void Res Shred Stacks per Second

nodes.name: Decimation
nodes.description: {Time Bubble} grants you and your allies increased critical strike chance while in its area.

nodes.name: Temporal Mastery
nodes.description: {Time Bubble} lasts longer.

nodes.name: Time Lord
nodes.description: {Time Bubble} is now cast on yourself and moves with you, but Anomaly costs more mana.

stats.statName: Time Bubble Is Cast On You

nodes.name: Manipulation
nodes.description: {Time Bubble} grants you and your allies increased attack and cast speed while in its area.

nodes.name: Swiftrest
nodes.description: {Time Bubble} grants you and your allies increased cooldown recovery speed while in its area.

nodes.name: Time Eater
nodes.description: {Time Bubble} grants you and your allies global health leech. This is doubled for void damage.

nodes.name: Void Maw
nodes.description: {Time Bubble} grants you and your allies increased health leech while in its area.

nodes.name: Immediacy
nodes.description: Anomaly no longer sends enemies foward in time. Effects that would be triggered when enemies return to the present are instead triggered immediately.

stats.statName: No Longer Sends Enemies Forward In Time

nodes.name: Time Lock
nodes.description:
When enemies return to the present they are afflicted by {Time Lock,} rendering them unable to move, attack, or cast spells for 2 seconds.

Anomaly costs more mana.
nodes.altText: Does not affect bosses.

nodes.name: Temporal Prison
nodes.description: {Time Lock} lasts longer.

nodes.name: Stasis
nodes.description: When enemies return to the present, enemies within the area of Anomaly's original cast are also time locked for 2 seconds.

stats.statName: Nearby Enemies Afflicted With Time Lock On Return

nodes.name: Lingering Memory
nodes.description: When allies or enemies exit {Time Bubble's} area of effect, effects caused or granted by Time Bubble persist for 2 seconds.

stats.statName: Time Bubble Effects Persist For 2 Seconds On Exit

skills.name: Armblade Slash
skills.description: Slash enemies in front of you with a fast combo ability.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness

skills.name: Armblade Slash
skills.description: Slash enemies in front of you with a fast combo ability.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness

skills.name: Assemble Abomination
skills.description:
Hold ability key to channel to absorb your Wraiths, Summoned Skeletons, Skeletal Mages, Golems, and Volatile Zombies in an area. When you release, summon a single hulking abomination with added health and more damage per minion absorbed.

The abomination remembers the minions absorbed to create it and will rapidly devour those minions to restore 10% of its maximum health.
skills.altText:
Abomination gains health equal to the max health of minions consumed and 5% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per minion consumed (up to 20 minions).
All minions of the same type are devoured if any one of them are absorbed. For example, Skeleton Warriors, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Archers are the same type of Summoned Skeleton.

nodes.name: Assemble Abomination
nodes.description: Hold ability key to channel to increase the area. When you release, combine all of your minions in the area into a single hulking abomination with states based on which minions are consumed.

nodes.name: Hulking Mass
nodes.description: Your abomination has more health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Unholy Command
nodes.description:
Your abomination grants additional armor to nearby minions for each minion it consumed.

When your abomination dies this effect is also granted to your minions by its corpse.

nodes.name: Devour
nodes.description:
You no longer channel to summon your abomination. Instead it consumes your nearest 5 minions to be summoned.

Assemble Abomination costs more mana.

nodes.name: Shattered Limbs
nodes.description: Your abomination has increased critical strike chance, but can no longer regenerate health or consume Bone Golems.
nodes.altText: The Abomination can still recover health by methods other than health regen.

nodes.name: Spoils of War
nodes.description: If a Skeleton Warrior, Rogue or Vanguard is consumed, your abomination is granted the ability to {Double Strike,} and the first attack causes enemies to bleed.

stats.statName: Double Strike Gained on Melee Skeleton Consumption

nodes.name: Flesh and Blood
nodes.description: Your abomination's melee hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but can no longer consume Skeletal Mages.

nodes.name: Age of Undeath
nodes.description: You can now only consume minions from the {Summon Skeletons} and {Summon Skeletal Mages} skills to create the Abomination. However the Abomination does not start to decay until you control 6 or more such minions at the same time.
nodes.altText:
If you drop below 6 Skeletons and Skeletal Mages, the health decay does not stop.

If your maximum number of skeletons or skeletal mages is reduced by respeccing or other methods while you have an active Abomination it will start decaying.

stats.statName: Can only Consume Skeletons and Skeletal Mages
No decay until you have 6+ Skeletons or Skeletal Mages

nodes.name: Fractured End
nodes.description: When your abomination dies, it disassembles into a number of Skeleton Vanguards.
nodes.altText: Skeleton Vanguards are minions that deals melee physical damage using a spear.

nodes.name: Repugnant Presence
nodes.description: Your abomination reflects a percentage of damage to attackers and generates more threat, which increases the likelihood of enemies targeting it.

nodes.name: Domination
nodes.description: Your abomination deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: The Quick and the Dead
nodes.description: Your abomination deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but decays faster.

nodes.name: Imprisoned Horror
nodes.description: You abomination is impaled by bone spikes, granting it significantly increased damage, but is rendered immobile and drains health faster.

nodes.name: Consume
nodes.description: Your abomination's hits leech a portion of the damage they deal .

nodes.name: Unholy Reach
nodes.description: Your abomination's melee attacks deal damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Reap The Damned
nodes.description: If a {Wraith} is consumed, its melee attack is replaced with {Soul Reave}, which deals melee necrotic damage.

stats.statName: Soul Reave Gained On Wraith Consumption

nodes.name: Shattered Similacrum
nodes.description: If a {Golem} is consumed, your abomination uses {Stomp,} a melee attack that deals physical damage and has a high chance to stun enemies in a large area.

nodes.name: Meat Grinder
nodes.description:
Your abomination gains 10% increased damage when it kills an enemy. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

The abomination gains 2 stacks instead if the target is undead.

nodes.name: Stitched Flesh
nodes.description: Your abomination's health decays slower.

nodes.name: Cadaverous Carapace
nodes.description: Your abomination's health decays at half the rate, but your abomination deals less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Dead Eye
nodes.description: If a {Skeletal Archer} is absorbed, your abomination casts {Arrow Nova} every 4 seconds, a ranged ability that deals physical damage to enemies.

stats.statName: Arrow Nova Gained On Skeletal Archer Consumption

nodes.name: Horrific Volley
nodes.description: Your abomination's {Arrow Nova} fires more frequently and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Engorgement
nodes.description: Your abomination deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each minion consumed to create it (up to a maximum).

nodes.name: Epicurean
nodes.description: Your abomination deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each type of minion consumed to create it.
nodes.altText: If a minion has a different name, it's considered a different type of minion.

stats.statName: Damage Per Type Of Minion Consumed

nodes.name: Death in the Family
nodes.description: If you absorb at least five different types of minion, Assemble Abomination has increased attack and cast speed.
nodes.altText: If a minion has a different name, it's considered a different type of minion

stats.statName: Attack Speed When 5 Types Of Minions Consumed

nodes.name: Corrupt Palate
nodes.description: If a Skeletal Mage is consumed, your abomination can cast {Devouring Souls}.
nodes.altText: Devouring Souls is a necrotic spell that fires 5 projectiles by default and has a 6 second cooldown. On hit, enemies are afflicted with Possess, which deals necrotic damage over time for 1.5 seconds and cannot stack.

stats.statName: Devouring Souls Gained On Mage Consumption

nodes.name: Frightful Feast
nodes.description: Your abomination's {Devouring Souls} releases an additional soul for each Skeletal Mage that was consumed to summon your abomination.

nodes.name: A Violent End
nodes.description: Your abomination deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for 8 seconds after it has been summoned.

nodes.name: Bloated Corpse
nodes.description: If a {Volatile Zombie} is consumed, your Abomination gains an explosive {Tail Slam} ability.

stats.statName: Explosive Slam Attack Gained On Zombie Consumption

nodes.name: Rapacious Protection
nodes.description: Your abomination also gains the combined health of all consumed Bone Golems .

skills.name: Aura Of Decay
skills.description:
Toggles Aura of Decay, which poisons you every second, and leaves a trail of decay. Enemies near you or in the trail are poisoned four times a second, and your chance to poison on hit applies to each of these instances at 100% effectiveness.

While Aura of Decay is active you take 30% less poison damage. Additionally, you take 50% less damage from your own Aura of Decay.
skills.altText: Your chance to poison on hit does not increase the rate at which poison is applied to you.

nodes.name: Aura of Decay
nodes.loreText: All things eventually decay...

nodes.name: Rot Weaver
nodes.description: Aura of Decay applies poison and other ailments to enemies more frequently.

nodes.name: Icarian Poison
nodes.description: Aura of Decay applies poison and other ailments to enemies more frequently, but poison is applied to your self more and more frequently .

nodes.name: Unending Sickness
nodes.description: Poison and other ailments inflicted by Aura of Decay last longer. This does not include ailments that slow.

nodes.name: Mana Blight
nodes.description: Aura of Decay applies Poison and other ailments to enemies more frequently, but drains mana each second.

nodes.name: Poisoned Soul
nodes.description: Aura of Decay applies poison and other ailments to enemies more frequently, but also applies poison to yourself more frequently.

nodes.name: Seeping Wounds
nodes.description: Aura of Decay has a chance to cause enemies to bleed each second.

nodes.name: Decrepify
nodes.description:
Aura of Decay inflicts Armor Shred instead of Poison to you and enemies. 

Armor Shred inflicted by Aura of Decay has 100% increased effectiveness.

nodes.name: Corrosive Aura
nodes.description: Enemies affected by Aura of Decay have reduced armor.

nodes.name: Undertow
nodes.description: Aura of Decay has a chance to slow nearby enemies every second.

nodes.name: Putrid Bombs
nodes.description: While Aura of Decay is active, you leave behind a {Putrid Bomb} every 2 seconds. Putrid Bombs explode after a 2 second delay and Poison all enemies they hit.

nodes.name: Chill to the Bone
nodes.description: Aura of Decay has a chance to Chill nearby enemies every second.

nodes.name: Absence of Life
nodes.description: Allies within range are healed by Aura of Decay each second. Aura of Decay heals more health the less health you currently have.
nodes.altText: "Allies" includes you.

nodes.name: Plague Bearers
nodes.description: Minions within Aura of Decay’s area of effect have a chance to poison on hit, but are poisoned every second.

nodes.name: Infectious Bones
nodes.description: Minions within Aura of Decay’s area of effect deal more poison damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Loathing
nodes.description: While Aura of Decay is active, enemies have a chance to be {Marked for Death} when they hit you.

nodes.name: Feast of Souls
nodes.description: While Aura of Decay is active, you have a chance to cast {Soul Feast} when you are hit.
nodes.altText: Soul Feast is a spell that hits all cursed enemies, dealing necrotic damage to them, and drawing a fragment of each of their the souls back to you. The soul fragments each grant 5 ward when they reach you.

nodes.name: Growing Hunger
nodes.description: Your chance to cast {Soul Feast} when hit increases each time you fail to cast Soul Feast.

stats.statName: Soul Feast Chance Increase On Fail

nodes.name: Poison Skin
nodes.description: Enemies are inflicted with multiple stacks of Poison when they hit you, but you also gain poison stacks when hit.

nodes.name: Inoculation
nodes.description: You take less poison damage while Aura of Decay is active (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Vulnerability
nodes.description: Enemies within Aura of Decay’s area of effect have less Poison Resistance.
nodes.altText: This does not apply the {Poison Resistance Shred} ailment, but instead stacks additively with it.

nodes.name: Fume Weaver
nodes.description: You and Enemies within Aura of Decay’s area of effect have less poison resistance for each point of intelligence you have.

nodes.name: Poison Bolt
nodes.description: Aura of Decay fires a {Poison Bolt} that inflicts two stacks of poison on hit at the nearest enemy every 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Poison Barrage
nodes.description: Aura of Decay fires {Poison Bolts} more frequently.

nodes.name: Corruption
nodes.description: Enemies that die within Aura of Decay’s area of effect have a chance to emit a {Poison Nova}, which poisons all enemies it hits. This effect has a 5 second cooldown by default.

nodes.name: Death Bloom
nodes.description: {Poison Nova} has a shorter cooldown.
nodes.altText: {Poison Nova} poisons all enemies it hits. This effect has a 5 second cooldown by default.

nodes.name: Bubonic Aura
nodes.description: Aura of Decay has a chance to inflict nearby enemies with {Plague} each second.

nodes.name: Plague Rat
nodes.description: Aura of Decay affects a larger area.

nodes.name: Aura of Terror
nodes.description: Nearby enemies have a chance to be feared when you activate Aura of Decay.

nodes.name: Respite
nodes.description: You have additional posion resistance while in Aura of Decay and you have increased health regeneration if you have deactivated Aura of Decay recently (past 4 seconds).

stats.statName: Poison Resistance in Aura of Decay

nodes.name: Incipient Decay
nodes.description: When you activate Aura of Decay, you create a {Poison Nova} around yourself that poisons all enemies it hits. This effect has a 5 second cooldown.

skills.name: Avalanche
skills.description: Summon the might of winter and pummel your foes in ice and snow, unleashing a large boulder at the target followed by 10 smaller boulders around the area over 2 seconds.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied at 400% effectiveness. Each hit has a freeze rate of 80.
The large boulder deals 100% more damage and has 100% more area of effect (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

Increased Area for Area Skills stats apply to the area of the individual boulders, but not to the area in which they fall.

nodes.name: Avalanche
nodes.loreText: Wrath of the mountain

nodes.name: Mountain Peak
nodes.description: Avalanche forms a circle around you.

stats.statName: Avalanche Falls In A Circle Around You

nodes.name: Precision
nodes.description: Avalanche can now be targeted, but costs more mana to channel (or costs more mana to cast if it is not channelled).

nodes.name: Wild Path
nodes.description: Avalanche is no longer channelled, but Avalanche has a cooldown and costs much more mana to cast. Avalanche lasts 5 seconds when cast in this manner.

nodes.name: Naturaly Occuring
nodes.description: Avalanche costs less mana.

nodes.name: Hailstorm
nodes.description: Avalanche is now cast around you and follows your movement.

nodes.name: Unyielding Storm
nodes.description: Avalanche lasts longer.

nodes.name: Harsh Winter
nodes.description: Avalanche deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Rockfall
nodes.description: Avalanche's base cold damage is converted to physical damage, and freeze rate multiplier bonuses from this tree are converted to increased stun chance.
nodes.altText: If you have this and Frost, this node has no effect.

stats.statName: Freeze Rate Multiplier -> Increased Stun Chance

nodes.name: Heavy Snow
nodes.description: Avalanche hits have an increased chance to stun enemies.

nodes.name: Winter Buildup
nodes.description: Avalanche costs less mana to channel (or costs less mana to cast if it is not channelled).

nodes.name: Grounding
nodes.description: Avalanche hits deal more damage while you have at least one active totem

nodes.name: Storm Slide
nodes.description: While in range of a Storm Totem, Avalanche hits deal additional base lightning damage.

stats.statName: Base Lightning Damage In Range Of Storm Totem

nodes.name: Elemental Bond
nodes.description: Avalanche boulders have a chance to turn into a {Coldstone Elemental,} which is a melee minion that deals cold and physical damage and decays over time.

nodes.name: Intensity
nodes.description: Avalanche boulders fall faster.

nodes.name: Snow Storm
nodes.description: Avalanche boulders are created more frequently.

nodes.name: Pummeling
nodes.description: An enemy hit by 5 Avalanche boulders will cause a {Fissure} to open underneath them, dealing physical damage over 5 seconds to enemies who stand on it.
nodes.altText: Fissure lasts for 5 seconds, dealing physical damage to enemies who stand on it.

stats.statName: Fissure Created When 5 Boulders Hit The Same Enemy

nodes.name: Alpine Guide
nodes.description: When an Avalanche boulder critically strikes, it has a chance to drop another boulder at the same location. This summoned boulder cannot critically strike.

stats.statName: Chance To Summon Additional Boulder On Crit

nodes.name: Dead of Winter
nodes.description: Avalanche hits have an increased chance to freeze enemies.

nodes.name: Frost
nodes.description: Avalanche's base physical damage is converted to cold damage, and increased stun chance provided by this tree is converted to freeze rate multiplier.
nodes.altText: If you have this node and Rockfall, then the Rockfall node has no effect.

stats.statName: Increased Stun Chance -> Freeze Rate Multiplier

nodes.name: Frost Touch
nodes.description: Avalanche boulders have a chance to leave behind {Frozen Ground,} which chills all enemies who stand on it.

stats.statName: Chance For Boulder To Leave Behind Frozen Ground

nodes.name: Frosted Font
nodes.description: {Frozen Ground} affects a larger area.

nodes.name: Shatter Shot
nodes.description: Avalanche hits deal more damage to frozen enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: More Hit Damage Against Frozen Enemies

nodes.name: Explosive Impact
nodes.description: Avalanche boulders fall in a larger area, and each boulder has a larger area of impact.

nodes.name: Mountain's Fury
nodes.description: Avalanche boulders have a larger area of impact.

nodes.name: Unpredictability
nodes.description: Boulders fall in a larger area. This reduces your chance to hit single targets.

skills.name: Ballista
skills.description: Summons a ballista that fires bolts at nearby enemies.
skills.altText: Ballistae have 1000 base health and last 10 seconds by default. Enemies rarely target ballistas.

skills.name: Banner Rush
skills.description: Dash to your Banner. Cannot be used without a target.
skills.altText: Shares a cooldown with Lunge and Shield Rush.

skills.name: Bone Curse
skills.description: Apply a curse to enemies in an area for 8 seconds that causes physical damage when hit. The damage is tripled if you inflicted the hit yourself.
skills.altText:
Added spell damage applies at 20% effectiveness to each hit.

When the curse deals damage it counts as an additional hit, but cannot apply ailments from effects such as "chance to ignite on hit".

nodes.name: Bone Curse
nodes.description: Apply a curse to enemies in an area that causes spell physical damage when hit.

nodes.name: Iron Maiden
nodes.description: Bone Curse deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Brittle Bones
nodes.description:
Bone Curse deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and instantly kills enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

nodes.name: Ruptured Corpse
nodes.description: Enemies afflicted with Bone Curse have a chance to explode on death, dealing damage to nearby enemies, but Bone Curse costs more mana.

nodes.name: Entreat the Damned
nodes.description: Killing an enemy with Bone Curse has a chance to summon a Skeleton Vanguard, a minion that deals melee physical damage using a spear. You are limited to 3 Skeleton Vanguards by default.

nodes.name: Bone Eruption
nodes.description: Shortly after casting Bone Curse, it causes a {Bone Eruption} beneath the target area, causing enemies to take spell physical damage, but Bone Curse Costs more mana.

nodes.name: Acute Infliction
nodes.description: Bone Curse deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but falls off after a few hits.

nodes.name: Signet of Agony
nodes.description:
Bone Curse becomes a toggled aura which surrounds you, but it has reduced area and drains your mana over time. You are also inflicted with Bone Curse.

This is not compatible with the {Oppressive Gaze} and {Illusion of Pain} nodes.

nodes.name: Illusion of Pain
nodes.description:
Bone Curse falls off after only 1 hit, but it always crits and deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). Bone Curse now has a cooldown.

This is not compatible with the {Signet of Agony} node.
The duration of {Cursed Limbs} and {Cursed Ground} are significantly reduced.

stats.statName: Cursed Limbs and Cursed Ground duration

nodes.name: Defile Defenses
nodes.description: Bone Curse has a chance to reduce enemy armor.

nodes.name: Marrow Thief
nodes.description: If you kill an enemy affected by Bone Curse you have a chance to gain {Bone Armor} for a short duration, which grants armor and less damage taken (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Bone Feast
nodes.description:
When {Marrow Thief} triggers you are also healed. 

The healing scales with healing effectiveness.

nodes.name: Cloven Flesh
nodes.description: Bone Curse has a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Crimson Enlightenment
nodes.description: When Bone Curse times out, you cast {Rip Blood} on that enemy, a spell dealing physical damage.
nodes.altText: Rip Blood cast this way cannot apply Bone Curse, even if you have the {Cursed Limbs} node.

stats.statName: Rip Blood On Bone Curse Time Out

nodes.name: Cursed Ground
nodes.description: When you cast Bone Curse, it now also leaves behind {Cursed Ground} for a short duration. Enemies that walk into the Cursed Ground are afflicted with Bone Curse.

nodes.name: Conflation
nodes.description: Bone Curse affects a larger area.

nodes.name: Bone Prison
nodes.description:
When you directly cast Bone Curse you summon a {Bone Prison} around the target area, trapping enemies inside. Bone Prison lasts a long time, but can be attacked and destroyed.

Bone Curse has a significantly longer cooldown.
nodes.altText: The {Bone Prison} is considered a minion and is made up of several small sections, each with 500 base health.

nodes.name: Shattered Prison
nodes.description: Bone Curse has a significantly shorter cooldown, but {Bone Prison} now has gaps.

nodes.name: Ossify
nodes.description: {Bone Prison} has significantly more health.

nodes.name: Sigil of Mortality
nodes.description:
Bone Curse applies {Mark for Death} for 2 seconds, but costs more mana.

This effect overwrites {Mark for Death's} normal duration.

nodes.name: Reaper's Mark
nodes.description: {Mark for Death} lasts longer.

nodes.name: Misery
nodes.description: Bone Curse's base physical damage is converted to necrotic. Consequently this damage scales with increases to necrotic damage, but not increases to physical damage.

nodes.name: Oppressive Gaze
nodes.description:
Bone Curse deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but now only affects a single target. Bone Curse and Mark for Death have unlimited duration.

This is not compatible with the {Signet of Agony} node.

nodes.name: Crippling Anguish
nodes.description: Bone Curse slows enemies within its area of effect

nodes.name: Swift Release
nodes.description: Bone Curse deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but lingers for a shorter duration on enemies if not reapplied. The duration reduction only applies to Bone Curse applied by the aura.
nodes.altText: Does not affect the duration of Bone Curse on minions.

nodes.name: Cultist's Fervor
nodes.description: Bone Curse costs less mana and has increased cast speed.

nodes.name: Chilblains
nodes.description: Bone Curse has a chance to apply chill when the enemy is hit.

nodes.name: Bitter Winter
nodes.description: Adds a freeze rate to Bone Curse, granting it a chance to freeze enemies.

nodes.name: Merciless
nodes.description:
You may cast Bone Curse on your minions, which grants them more physical damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but also applies Bone Curse's negative effects. 

This effect lasts 4 seconds and does not stack.

nodes.name: Spiked Bones
nodes.description:
Casting Bone Curse on minions causes them to reflect a flat amount damage to attackers. 

This effect lasts 4 seconds and does not stack.

nodes.name: Barbed Construct
nodes.description: All minion buffs from Bone Curse have 200% increased effect on Bone Golems.

nodes.name: Cursed Limbs
nodes.description:
After directly casting Bone Curse, you also cast Bone Curse on hit for the next few seconds, but Bone Curse costs more mana.
This cast on hit effect can't occur more than once per second.
nodes.altText: Bone Curse cast this way does not consume mana, but can not grant Cursed Limbs.

stats.statName: Bone Curse On Hit After Direct Cast

skills.name: Chaos Bolts
skills.description: A barrage of chaotic projectiles which land in an area around the target. The explosions deal necrotic and fire damage in a small area.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness for each bolt.

nodes.name: Abrupt Chaos
nodes.description: Chaos Bolts has increased cast speed, and its projectiles travel faster.

nodes.name: Sanguine Reverie
nodes.description:
Chaos Bolts' base necrotic damage is converted to physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to necrotic damage.

Damned chance from all sources are converted to bleed chance for Chaos Bolts.

Swaps Chaos Bolts' {Necrotic} tag for a {Physical} tag.

nodes.name: Scatter
nodes.description: Chaos Bolts' hits now have a chance to fear enemies, but the projectiles target a wider area.

nodes.name: Condemned to Chaos
nodes.description: Chaos Bolts' hits have a chance to inflict enemies with damned.

nodes.name: Blood Tithe
nodes.description: Chaos Bolts costs less mana, but now consumes a portion of your current health and ward on cast.

nodes.name: A Grave for Two
nodes.description: Chaos Bolts deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) equal to a portion of your missing health.

nodes.name: The Gate
nodes.description:
Hitting your minions with Chaos Bolts grants them any damned, ignite, bleed or frostbite chance that Chaos Bolts gains from this tree.

This buff lasts 10 seconds, and does not stack.

stats.statName: Ailment Chances to Minions on Hit

nodes.name: The Burn
nodes.description:
Directly casting Chaos Bolts extends the duration of your active {Cthonic Fissures} and {Infernal Shades}. 

This effect has a 3 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Exult in Misery
nodes.description: Chaos Bolts' hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to damned, ignited, bleeding and frostbitten.
nodes.altText: Hitting enemies inflicted with multiple of these ailments, will cause the damage modifier to stack.

nodes.name: Mania in Flames
nodes.description: Chaos Bolts' hits have a chance to ignite enemies.

nodes.name: Call of Morditas
nodes.description:
Chaos Bolts' base fire damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to fire damage.

Ignite chance from all sources are converted to frostbite chance for Chaos Bolts.

Swaps Chaos Bolts' {Fire} tag for a {Cold} tag.

nodes.name: Chance of Snow
nodes.description: Chaos Bolts' hits have a chance to chill enemies. Additionally, Chaos Bolts' hits have a chance to deal double more (multiplicative with other modifiers) to chilled enemies.

stats.statName: Chance for Double Hit Damage against Chilled

nodes.name: Torment of the Red Tundra
nodes.description:
Chaos Bolts' hits have a higher chance to freeze enemies per 1% uncapped cold resistance.

Additionally, Chaos Bolts deals more physical damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 4% uncapped cold resistance.

stats.statName: Freeze Rate Multiplier per 1% Cold Res
Physical Damage over Time per 4% Cold Res

nodes.name: Pandemonium
nodes.description: Chaos Bolts explosions have a chance to deal damage in a much large area.

nodes.name: Cthonic Aurora
nodes.description: Chaos Bolts releases additional projectiles, but it has a higher mana cost.

nodes.name: Mana Anarchy
nodes.description: Chaos Bolts' projectiles have a chance to consume additional mana causing it to deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Revolution
nodes.description:
Whenever mana is consumed by the {Mana Anarchy} node, your minions gain additional spell damage based on your maximum mana and they also gain increased cast speed.

This buff lasts 13 seconds.

nodes.name: Chains of the Betrayer
nodes.description:
Chaos Bolts no longer shoots multiple projectiles, but now instead shoots one large projectile causing it to deal more damage (multiplicative with other multipliers) in a larger area. 

These effects scale with the amount of projectiles Chaos Bolts would have shot.

nodes.name: Volatile Kindling
nodes.description: Chaos Bolts' hitting one of your {Volatile Zombies} causes it to instantly explode. Zombies exploding this way deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

nodes.name: Sudden Putrescence
nodes.description: {Volatile Zombies} exploding from the {Volatile Kindling} node deal even more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area and poisons enemies.

nodes.name: Destructive Intensity
nodes.description:
Whenever you cast Chaos Bolts you gain a stack of {Destructive Intensity} up to a maximum.

Each stack reduces the target area and improves Chaos Bolts base critical strike chance.

If you go 2 seconds without gaining a stack, all stacks are lost.

nodes.name: Doom's Vindication
nodes.description: Chaos Bolts deals more damage and its hits deal more damage to {Cursed} enemies (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Reaper of Mayhem
nodes.description:
Chaos Bolts' hits have a chance per Dexterity to cause you to attack with {Harvest} from the location of enemies hit, hitting them and enemies around them.

This effect can occur a maximum of 3 times per second.

nodes.name: Devour the Damned
nodes.description: Chaos Bolts' hits against {Cursed} enemies regain health and mana.

nodes.name: Seed of Chaos
nodes.description:
Chaos Bolts' hits against {Cursed} enemies has a chance to cause you to recast Chaos Bolts from their location towards another nearby enemy, consuming a portion of its mana cost. 

The recast has a minimum range of 5 meters, and will not cast at enemies within that range.

nodes.name: Exacted Libation
nodes.description:
Chaos Bolts' hits have a chance per Intelligence to cast {Rip Blood} at target enemies.

This effect can occur a maximum of 2 times per second.

nodes.name: Cursed Blood
nodes.description: Chaos Bolts hits refreshes the duration of your {Curses} on them and grants you health per curse.

nodes.name: Another Affliction
nodes.description:
Chaos Bolts' hits against {Cursed} enemies casts {Bone Curse} at their location.

This effect has a 6 second cooldown.

skills.name: Chthonic Fissure
skills.description:
Opens an infernal fissure in the ground, dealing fire damage over time to enemies on top of it, as well as releasing {Spirits} from the fissure that seek nearby enemies. These spirits inflict enemies with {Torment}, a {Curse} that slows and deals necrotic damage over time.

Max 1 active fissure.
skills.altText:
Added damage for the {Fissure} applies at 120% effectiveness each second.

Added damage for the {Spirits} applies at 30% effectiveness.

{Torment} applies 18% less movement speed (multiplicative with other modifiers), deals 120 damage over 3 seconds and added damage applies at 200% effectiveness per second.

nodes.name: Fragile Crust
nodes.description:
Chthonic Fissure costs less mana and it refunds some of its mana cost if there is a cursed player, rare enemy or boss within 20 meters when you cast it.

This effect also works if you are Cursed.

nodes.name: Fell Fire
nodes.description: {Tormenting} an ignited enemy spreads all of your ignite stacks from it to a number of other enemies around it.
nodes.altText: Converted ailments are also spread.

nodes.name: Stygian Current
nodes.description: The Fissure releases {Spirits} more frequently.

nodes.name: Of Gloom and Flames
nodes.description: Chthonic Fissure now creates a secondary Fissure in the opposite direction that casts its own {Spirits}. Enemies can take damage from both Fissures if they stand on both, but Chthonic Fissure costs significantly more mana.

nodes.name: Chaotic Rupture
nodes.description:
{Spirits} now have a chance to be replaced by a cast of {Chaos Bolts} that consumes a portion of its mana cost and scales with your {Chaos Bolts} tree.

{Chaos Bolts} cast this way have a chance to have no additional projectiles.

stats.statName: Chance to replace Spirits with Chaos Bolts

nodes.name: Spirit Gale
nodes.description: When {Tormented} enemies die they have a chance to release the {Spirit} to inflict and {Torment} another enemy within 8 meters.

nodes.name: Severed Wards
nodes.description: The {Spirits'} hits shred enemy necrotic resistance.

nodes.name: Singed by Terror
nodes.description: The {Spirits'} hits shred enemy fire resistance.

nodes.name: Return Below
nodes.description: When {Spirits} {Torment} an enemy afflicted by an {Infernal Shade} they consume the Shade, causing it to instantly deal its remaining damage and increases all existing Chthonic Fissures' frequency of releasing {Spirits} up to a maximum.

stats.statName: Infernal Shade deals its Remaining Damage

nodes.name: Damned Waters
nodes.description: The {Spirits'} hits inflict enemies with {Damned}.

nodes.name: Grim Tide
nodes.description: Chthonic Fissure and ailments it inflicts deal more necrotic damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 1% Added Critical Strike Multiplier.
nodes.altText: This doesn't include the base 200% crit multi.

stats.statName: Necrotic Damage per 1% Added Crit Multi

nodes.name: Twisted Waves
nodes.description: {Torment} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 2% uncapped necrotic resistance.

nodes.name: Eradication
nodes.description:
Chthonic Fissure deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to rare enemies and bosses.

This effect is doubled if the enemy or you are cursed.

nodes.name: Beacon of Torment
nodes.description:
{Spirits} now target you instead of enemies, and whenever you are {Tormented} or {Torment's} duration on you is refreshed, you gain additional spell damage and Endurance Threshold.

This buff can stack and has the same duration as {Torment}, but persists if {Torment} is cleansed.

nodes.name: Grasp of the Undying
nodes.description: The Fissure deals more direct damage for each second it is active (multiplicative with other modifiers) and you leech a portion of the damage it does.
nodes.altText: Direct damage modifiers do not affect damage of ailments and subskills from Chthonic Fissure.

stats.statName: Fissure Direct Damage bonus per Second

nodes.name: The Sunderer's Domain
nodes.description:
You can now have additional Fissures active at a time, but {Spirits} are released less frequently.

If a Fissure is placed over an existing one, the new Fissure closes after 1 second.

nodes.name: Deepest Ravine
nodes.description: Chthonic Fissure deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but it no longer releases {Spirits}.

nodes.name: Rekindled Graves
nodes.description:
Fissures now cast {Volatile Zombies} every 2 seconds, but consumes mana equal to a portion of {Volatile Zombies} mana cost.

{Volatile Zombie} cast this way has a chance to not create multiple {Zombies} if it would otherwise.

nodes.name: Death from Below
nodes.description:
Chthonic Fissure deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This effect is doubled if you are cursed.

nodes.name: Pyrochasm
nodes.description: The Fissure's initial impact now hits enemies dealing spell fire damage, with added damage applying at 300% effectiveness for this hit.
nodes.altText: This hit can be converted to to physical by {Blood Gulch}, or to necrotic by {Valley of Defilement}.

nodes.name: Fissure of Wrath
nodes.description:
The Fissure's initial hit now deals additional spell damage with a higher chance to stun per 2% ignite chance.

This effects scales with bleed or poison if the Fissure is converted to physical or poison respectively.
nodes.altText: Ailment chance is counted before being converted.

stats.statName: Fissure Spell Damage per 2% Ignite Chance
Fissure Increased Stun Chance per 2% Ignite Chance

nodes.name: Forbidden Chasm
nodes.description: The Fissure's initial hit now Curse enemies with {Acid Skin}, which causes them to take poison damage over time and a chance to be critically struck by any hit.

nodes.name: Acidbane
nodes.description:
Your hits against enemies cursed by {Acid Skin} have additional base critical strike chance per 10% of your global increased poison damage.

This bonus critical strike chance is not affected by other critical strike chance modifiers.

stats.statName: Bonus Crit Chance per 10% Inc Poison Damage

nodes.name: Ash Cloud
nodes.description: The Fissure's initial impact now spreads all of your ignite stacks from the target to nearby enemies up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Chthonic Passage
nodes.description:
When directly casting Chthonic Fissure you now travel along the Fissure .

Chthonic Fissure gains the {Traversal} tag.

nodes.name: Mantle of Flames
nodes.description:
The Fissure gains a percentage of your global chance to ignite on hit . 

Additionally, the Fissure has a base chance to ignite enemies each second.
nodes.altText:
This effect still applies even if Chthonic Fissure is converted.

For example your global bleed chance will be converted to bleed chance per second with the {Blood Gulch} node.

stats.statName: Your Ignite Chance -> Ignite Chance per Second

nodes.name: Blood Gulch
nodes.description:
Chthonic Fissure's base fire damage is converted to physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to fire damage.

Ignite chance from all sources are converted to bleed chance per second for the Fissure.

Swaps Chthonic Fissures' {Fire} tag for a {Physical} tag.

nodes.name: Chronicles of Ruin
nodes.description: {Torment} lasts longer and any ignite, poison and bleed inflicted by Chthonic Fissure also last longer.

nodes.name: Tombgorger
nodes.description: {Torment} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to ignited, poisoned or bleeding enemies.

nodes.name: Valley of Defilement
nodes.description:
Chthonic Fissure's base fire damage over time is converted to poison. Consequently this damage scales with increases to poison damage, but not increases to fire damage.

Ignite chance from all sources is converted to poison chance per second for the Fissure.

Swaps Chthonic Fissures' {Fire} tag for a {Poison} tag.
nodes.altText: This has no effect if Chthonic Fissure is converted to Physical with the {Blood Gulch} node.

skills.name: Cinder Strike
skills.description: Melee or bow combo with three attacks. The first attack also creates a fiery explosion, damaging nearby enemies.
skills.altText:
The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 2 seconds without using Cinder Strike.

Added damage applies to the first attack at 200% effectiveness, and to the other attacks at 100% effectiveness.

skills.name: Cinder Strike
skills.description: Melee or bow combo with three attacks. The first attack also creates a fiery explosion, damaging nearby enemies.
skills.altText: The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 2 seconds without using Cinder Strike.

skills.name: Cinder Strike
skills.description: Melee or bow combo with three attacks. The first attack also creates a fiery explosion, damaging nearby enemies.
skills.altText:
The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 2 seconds without using Cinder Strike.

Added damage applies to the first attack at 200% effectiveness, and to the other attacks at 100% effectiveness.

skills.name: Cinder Strike
skills.description: Melee or bow combo with three attacks. The first attack also creates a fiery explosion, damaging nearby enemies.
skills.altText:
The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 2 seconds without using Cinder Strike.

Added damage applies to the first attack at 200% effectiveness, and to the other attacks at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Ignition
nodes.description: Cinder Strike has a chance to ignite enemies and ignites inflicted by the first attack have increased duration.

nodes.name: Soot and Ash
nodes.description: Cinder Strike has a chance to blind enemies while using a bow and a chance to apply {Frailty} to enemies while using a melee weapon.

nodes.name: Blast Wave
nodes.description: Cinder Strike's first attack deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

nodes.name: Overexertion
nodes.description: Cinder Strike now only has the first attack, but costs significantly more mana.

nodes.name: Eagerness
nodes.description: Cinder Strike's second and third attacks have increased attack speed.

nodes.name: Pocket Sand
nodes.description: Blind chance from all sources is converted to {Critical Vulnerability} chance for Cinder Strike.

nodes.name: Cauterize
nodes.description: Cinder Strike deals more critical strike damage. This bonus is doubled for the first attack.

nodes.name: Tireless
nodes.description: Cinder Strike costs less mana.

nodes.name: Flame Alchemist
nodes.description: Cinder Strike's first attack has a chance to throw a {Volatile Flask} at targets hit.
nodes.altText: {Volatile Flask} scales with increases to fire and throwing damage.

nodes.name: Explosive Impact
nodes.description: {Volatile Flask} deals more explosion damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Explosive Lash
nodes.description: Cinder Strike has a chance to cause an explosion on kill. This counts {Volatile Flask} explosion.

nodes.name: Incinerate
nodes.description: Cinder Strike hits deals additional fire damage for each ignited enemy you have hit recently up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Searing Blows
nodes.description: Cinder Strike's first attack has more critical strike chance (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of ignite on the target up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Fire Walker
nodes.description: Cinder Strike deals increased fire damage over time per point of Dexterity.

stats.statName: Fire Damage Over Time per Dex

nodes.name: Flammable Toxins
nodes.description: Poison chance from all sources is converted to ignite chance for Cinder Strike.

nodes.name: Oil Coating
nodes.description: If you use and hit at least one enemy with Cinder Strike you are granted {Oil Coating} granting you increased fire damage. This effect can stack and lasts 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Combustible
nodes.description:
If you have at least 3 stacks of {Oil Coating} you are granted additional fire penetration.

This effect is doubled for ignites inflicted by Cinder Strike.

nodes.name: Fire Eater
nodes.description: {Oil Coating} is limited to 5 stacks. If you would gain another stack you instead regain health and mana.

nodes.name: Elusive
nodes.description: You have additional chance to dodge and additional fire resistance per stack of {Oil Coating}.

nodes.name: Elemental Vulnerability
nodes.description: {Oil Coating} now grants you increased elemental damage rather than just fire damage.

nodes.name: Coated Darts
nodes.description: {Oil Coating} now also grants additional throwing fire damage.

nodes.name: Kindling
nodes.description: Cinder Strike has a chance to shred enemy fire resistance.

nodes.name: Burning Dagger
nodes.description: If you use and hit at least one enemy with Cinder Strike it consumes 8 mana granting you a {Burning Dagger} that circles you for a second before launching at the nearest enemy.
nodes.altText: {Burning Dagger} deals fire throwing damage and ignites the enemy.

nodes.name: Flaming Fury
nodes.description: {Burning Dagger} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and consumes less mana.

nodes.name: Firebreathing
nodes.description: You now also throw 5 {Burning Daggers} in a cone in front of you on Cinder Strike's first attack.

stats.statName: Burning Daggers Cone On First Attack

nodes.name: Umbral Conflagration
nodes.description: All your {Shadows} now also throw 5 {Burning Daggers} in a cone in front of them when you do. This consumes all active {Shadows}.

nodes.name: Inferno
nodes.description: Cinder Strike deals additional fire damage. This is doubled for the first attack.

skills.name: Create Shadow
skills.description:
Create a Shadow of yourself that persists for up to 5 seconds and will imitate your next Shadow Cascade, Shurikens, Umbral Blades, or Acid Flask.
Up to 3 Shadows can be active at once.

skills.name: Dancing Strikes
skills.description:
Requires dual wielding.

A series of fast dash attacks. Dancing Strikes' movement does not scale with attack speed, but it gains increased cooldown recovery speed and more damage equal to 50% of your total increased melee attack speed.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied to each attack at 150% effectiveness.

Your total increased melee attack speed includes the modifier from attack rate and generic increased attack speed stats. If your {Melee Attack Speed} is 1.5, then Dancing Strikes gains 25% increased cooldown recovery speed and 25% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

skills.name: Dancing Strikes
skills.description:
Requires dual wielding.

A series of fast dash attacks. Dancing Strikes' movement does not scale with attack speed, but it gains increased cooldown recovery speed and more damage equal to 50% of your total increased melee attack speed.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied to each attack at 150% effectiveness.

Your total increased melee attack speed includes the modifier from attack rate and generic increased attack speed stats. If your {Melee Attack Speed} is 1.5, then Dancing Strikes gains 25% increased cooldown recovery speed and 25% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

skills.name: Dancing Strikes
skills.description:
Requires dual wielding.

A series of fast dash attacks. Dancing Strikes' movement does not scale with attack speed, but it gains increased cooldown recovery speed and more damage equal to 50% of your total increased melee attack speed.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied to each attack at 150% effectiveness.

Your total increased melee attack speed includes the modifier from attack rate and generic increased attack speed stats. If your {Melee Attack Speed} is 1.5, then Dancing Strikes gains 25% increased cooldown recovery speed and 25% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

skills.name: Dancing Strikes
skills.description:
Requires dual wielding.

A series of fast dash attacks. Dancing Strikes' movement does not scale with attack speed, but it gains increased cooldown recovery speed and more damage equal to 50% of your total increased melee attack speed.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied to each attack at 150% effectiveness.

Your total increased melee attack speed includes the modifier from attack rate and generic increased attack speed stats. If your {Melee Attack Speed} is 1.5, then Dancing Strikes gains 25% increased cooldown recovery speed and 25% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

skills.name: Dark Quiver
skills.description:
Requires a bow.

Summons 7 Black Arrows that rain from the sky over 4 seconds, granting 100% increased damage to your next bow attack when retrieved.
skills.altText: You can hold up to 3 Black Arrows at once, but can only expend one at a time.

nodes.name: Dark Quiver
nodes.description:
Requires a bow.

Summons 7 {Black Arrows} which rain from the sky over 4 seconds, granting bonus damage to your next bow attack when retrieved.
nodes.altText: You cannot pick up a new {Black Arrow} until you've expended your current {Black Arrow}.

nodes.name: Scourge Quiver
nodes.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants increased damage over time to your next bow attack.

nodes.name: Crimson Quiver
nodes.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} grants you a stack of {Crimson Shroud} for a short duration, granting you bleed chance and less damage over time taken. This stacks up to 3 times for a short duration.

stats.statName: Damage Over Time Taken per Crimson Shroud

nodes.name: Rending Shots
nodes.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants a chance to shred enemy physical resistance to your next bow attack.

nodes.name: Mending
nodes.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} restores health.

nodes.name: Nightfall
nodes.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} grants you a stack of {Dusk Shroud} for 4 seconds, granting you glancing blow chance and dodge rating. This effect can stack.

nodes.name: Arrow of the Trickster
nodes.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} creates a {Shadow} at the arrow's location.
nodes.altText:
Shadows will repeat one skill you use before vanishing. Shadows can repeat Acid Flask, Shurikens or Shadow Cascade, and their damage scales with your damage stats. 

You can have 3 Shadows at once, and they will disappear after 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Quick Draw
nodes.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} grants you the Frenzy buff, granting you 20% increased attack and cast speed for a short duration.

nodes.name: Heavy Arrows
nodes.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants additional physical damage to your next bow attack.

nodes.name: Heartseeker
nodes.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants increased critical strike chance to your next bow attack.

nodes.name: Trueshot
nodes.description: Using a {Black Arrow} causes your next {Multishot} to pierce additional enemies (continue through targets they hit).

nodes.name: Fatal Barrage
nodes.description: Using a {Black Arrow} improves your next {Flurry's} base critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Archer's Focus
nodes.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to your next bow attack, but consume additional mana.

nodes.name: Fiery Vengeance
nodes.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} resets the combo of {Cinder Strike}.

nodes.name: Dragon Slayer
nodes.description: Using a {Black Arrow} causes your next {Cinder Strike} to instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).
nodes.altText: If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

nodes.name: Resolve
nodes.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} restores mana.

nodes.name: Umbral Resolution
nodes.description:
Using a {Black Arrow} consumes all active {Shadows} to grant your next bow attack more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per {Shadow} consumed.

Consuming at least 3 {Shadows} grants significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Lacerating Arrows
nodes.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants {Puncture} additional physical penetration and bleed chance.

nodes.name: Toxic Quiver
nodes.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants additional poison penetration and poison chance to your next bow attack.

nodes.name: Large Quiver
nodes.description: Additional {Black Arrows} are summoned, but the arrows are summoned at the same frequency causing {Dark Quiver} to have a longer duration.

nodes.name: Nature's Focus
nodes.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants increased elemental damage to your next bow attack.

nodes.name: Elemental Adept
nodes.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants a chance to freeze, shock or ignite enemies, depending on the element, to your next bow elemental attack.

nodes.name: Grand Detonation
nodes.description: Using a {Black Arrow} causes your next {Detonating Arrow} to deal damage in a significantly larger area.

nodes.name: Crippling Arrows
nodes.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} slows nearby enemies for a short duration.

nodes.name: Fend Off
nodes.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} knocks nearby enemies back 4 meters.

nodes.name: Accessible
nodes.description: {Black Arrows} are summoned more frequently. This does not cause more arrows to be summoned and also causes {Dark Quiver} to have a shorter duration.

nodes.name: Quickened Arrows
nodes.description: You instantly summon a number of {Black Arrows} on use. The rest are spread out over the normal duration.
nodes.altText: This does not increase the total number of Black Arrows summoned.

nodes.name: Until Dawn
nodes.description: Using a bow attack grants you a chance to summon a {Black Arrow} at a random nearby location. This effect has a 3 second cooldown.

stats.statName: Arrow On Bow Skill Use Chance

nodes.name: Tide of Darkness
nodes.description: Using a {Black Arrow} causes your next {Hail of Arrows} to deal increased damage over time equal to twice your critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Perfect Bolts
nodes.description:
Picking up a {Black Arrow} grants active {Ballistae} additional bow physical damage while they are alive.

This effect stacks up to 4 times.

nodes.name: Keen Shots
nodes.description:
Picking up a {Black Arrow} grants active {Ballistae} increased attack speed while they are alive.

This effect stacks up to 4 times.

nodes.name: Heavy Artillery
nodes.description: {Ballistae} that have been buffed by at least 4 {Black Arrows} always critically strike.

skills.name: Death Seal
skills.description:
Toggle to seal your health, preventing it from going above its current value for 3 seconds. While sealed you take less damage equal to half your percent missing health, and 90% of hit damage taken is dealt over 4 seconds. 

Reactivate to unleash a Wave of Death dealing damage based on how long Death Seal has been active and your current percent missing health.
skills.altText:
The Wave of Death deals up to 20% more damage per second Death Seal has been active and deal 1% more damage per 1% missing health. Both effects are multiplicative with other modifiers.

Added spell damage applies at 500% effectiveness to Wave of Death.

Hit damage that is dealt over 4 seconds cannot be altered after the hit and is unaffected by temporary immunity effects. It does not count as damage over time.

skills.name: Death Seal
skills.description: Releases a Wave of Death dealing damage based on how long Death Seal has been actve and your current percent missing health.

nodes.name: Death Seal
nodes.description:
Combo skill. Seals your health at your current amount of health, draining your ward to 0 and preventing you from gaining health or ward for up to 5 seconds. For that duration you gain more damage equal to your percent missing health.

Reactivate to release a wave of death dealing damage based on how long the seal has been active, and percent missing health.

nodes.name: Necrosis
nodes.description: For each point of ward consumed by Death Seal, the wave of death is granted a chance to shred enemy necrotic resistance.

nodes.name: Leper's Skin
nodes.description: You gain necrotic resistance and armour for each point of ward consumed by Death Seal. This effect has a maximum for armour.

nodes.name: Entreat The Damned
nodes.description: If {Wandering Spirits} is active when you activate Death Seal it is granted additional duration.
nodes.altText: This affects the duration for which new spirits are revealed not the duration of individual spirits.

nodes.name: Corrupted Consciousness
nodes.description: For the duration of Death Seal, you gain increased damage based on the health you were missing when Death Seal was activated.

nodes.name: Mortal Pulse
nodes.description: You release a wave of death each second while sealed, in addition to when you release Death Seal, but your waves of death deal less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Death Wave Cast Every Second While Sealed

nodes.name: Tachycardia
nodes.description: You release waves of death more frequently while sealed and your waves of death have increased critical strike chance.

stats.statName: Increased Wave of Death Crit Chance

nodes.name: Desperate Shroud
nodes.description: For the duration of Death Seal, you gain armor and stun avoidance for each 10 health you were missing when Death Seal was activated.

nodes.name: Life Tap
nodes.description: If you drop below 10% health while you are sealed, Death Seal is released automatically.
nodes.altText: This node does nothing when cast on a minion.

nodes.name: Grim Scale
nodes.description: Death Seal now drains health while sealed, and you have increased mana regeneration while sealed.

nodes.name: Deadlock
nodes.description: If your health is above 33% of your maximum when you activate Death Seal, it is reduced to 33% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Pustulent Presence
nodes.description: While sealed, your spells and attacks have a chance to poison enemies for each percent of health you are missing when Death Seal is activated.

stats.statName: Global Poison Chance Per 3% Missing Health

nodes.name: Cycle of Decay
nodes.description: Wave of death hits deal more damage against poisoned targets (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Death Wave Hit Damage To Poisoned Enemies

nodes.name: Curdled Flesh
nodes.description: Wave of death hits deal more damage per stack of poison up to a maximum (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: This effect is multiplicative with other modifiers

stats.statName: Death Wave Hit Damage Per Poison

nodes.name: Carrion Breath
nodes.description: Wave of death deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Lethal Release
nodes.description: Wave of death deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Sanguine Wave
nodes.description: Wave of death hits now leech a portion of the damage they deal .

nodes.name: Corporeal Cascade
nodes.description: Wave of death's base damage is converted to physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to necrotic damage.

nodes.name: Skeletal Sheath
nodes.description: When you release Death Seal, you are granted {Bone Armor} for the duration that Death Seal was active.

nodes.name: Condemnation
nodes.description: Death Seal's waves of death instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold.

nodes.name: Blood Bond
nodes.description: Minions hit by a wave of death deal more damage for 4 seconds (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Soul Stability
nodes.description: Death Seal prevents health loss from effects that continously drain a percentage of your current health.
nodes.altText: This does not affect health drain effects from abilities like Reaper Form.

nodes.name: The Quick And The Dead
nodes.description: When you release Death Seal, you are granted {Haste} for the duration that Death Seal was active.

nodes.name: Flesh Pact
nodes.description:
When you release Death Seal, you gain an amount of health for each second Death Seal was active.

Death Seal no longer releases waves of death.

nodes.name: Doomcall
