nodes.description: You gain a stack of {Damned} for each second you remain sealed. Waves of death hits now deal more damage per stack of Damned on you (multiplicative with other modifiers), and you are cleansed of all Damned stacks when you release Death Seal.
nodes.altText: This damage modifier for Wave of Death if multiplicative with other modifiers.

stats.statName: Death Wave Damage Per Damned Stack

nodes.name: Moratorium
nodes.description: Death Seal has a higher maximum duration.

nodes.name: Seal of Servitude
nodes.description: Death Seal now targets only minions.

nodes.name: Frenzied Accord
nodes.description: When used on a minion, Death Seal also grants it more damage and critical strike chance (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Death Stranded
nodes.description: Minions targeted by Death Seal are rooted in place for its duration. When Death Seal is released, the minion explodes in addition to releasing the wave of death at its location.

nodes.name: Devouring Release
nodes.description: You now repeatedly cast {Hungering Souls} while you are sealed. Hungering Souls cast this way has a 70% chance to have only 1 projectile.

nodes.name: Insatiable Soul
nodes.description: You release {Hungering Souls} more frequently.

skills.name: Decoy
skills.description: Throw a device to create a Decoy that taunts enemies around it for 2.5 seconds before exploding.
skills.altText:
Added throwing attack damage is applied at 600% effectiveness to the explosion.

The Decoy cannot be destroyed before it expires.

nodes.name: Decoy
nodes.description: Summon a decoy.

nodes.name: Boom
nodes.description: Decoy's final explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and explodes in a larger area.

nodes.name: Excessive Explosives
nodes.description: All explosions from Decoy deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Explosive Charges
nodes.description: Decoy has a chance to cause a small explosion when hit, up to a maximum of 2 explosions.

nodes.name: Frostfire Powder
nodes.description:
All explosions' base fire damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to fire damage. Explosions also gain a base freeze rate.

Ignite chance from all sources is converted to chill chance and effects related to ignite now depend on chill instead.

nodes.name: Remote Detonator
nodes.description:
Decoy becomes a combo ability. The first cast creates the decoy, and the second detonates it. The remote detonation costs mana.

Has no effect if Decoy has additional charges.

nodes.name: Rewired Detonator
nodes.description: Detonation costs less mana.

nodes.name: Freezing Blast
nodes.description: All explosions have a higher chance to freeze enemies.

nodes.name: Stuffed
nodes.description: Decoy can cause additional small explosions.

nodes.name: Lasting Presence
nodes.description: Decoy lasts longer, but has a longer cooldown.

nodes.name: Embedded Spikes
nodes.description: Decoy reflects a percentage of damage to attackers.

nodes.name: Into the Shadows
nodes.description: You have additional dodge chance while the decoy exists.

nodes.name: Ambush
nodes.description: When the decoy expires, for the next 4 seconds you have additional critical strike multiplier equal to your dodge chance while the decoy was active.

nodes.name: On Fire
nodes.description: The Decoy is on fire and ignites nearby enemies each second, but costs more mana.
nodes.altText: This is not affected by {Frostfire Powder}.

nodes.name: Kelthan Oil
nodes.description: The Decoy has increased ignite frequency.

nodes.name: Acid Fumes
nodes.description:
Small explosions are replaced by Acid Flask detonations. The final explosion is replaced by three Acid Flasks ejected from the decoy.
{On Fire} now inflicts poison instead of ignite.
nodes.altText: Acid Flasks cannot have extra projectiles when ejected from the Decoy.

nodes.name: Backup Buddy
nodes.description: Decoy can store an additional charge.

nodes.name: Efficient Construction
nodes.description: Decoy costs less mana.

nodes.name: Sonic Detonation
nodes.description: The Decoy emits a {Sonic Wave} when it appears, inflicting {Frailty} and armor shred to nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Warning Sound
nodes.description: {Sonic Wave} grants {Haste} to you and your allies hit for a duration.

nodes.name: Ear Shatter
nodes.description: {Sonic Wave} inflicts additional stacks of armor shred, and armor shred it applies lasts longer.

nodes.name: Harrowing Noise
nodes.description: {Sonic Wave} Fears enemies for a duration.
nodes.altText: Fear causes enemies to flee from you and your allies. Enemies can only be affected by Fear once.

nodes.name: Sound of Flames
nodes.description:
{Sonic Wave} inflicts fire resistance shred instead of armour shred.

If you have taken {Frostfire Powder} it instead inflicts cold resistance shred.

nodes.name: Short Fuse
nodes.description: Decoy's final explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Decoy has a shorter duration.

nodes.name: Shrouded Core
nodes.description: Decoy leaves a {Shadow} in its place after detonating.

nodes.name: Burning Oil
nodes.description: Decoy's final explosion ignites enemies.

nodes.name: Meticulous Construction
nodes.description: Decoy's final explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but costs more mana.

nodes.name: Grand Diversion
nodes.description: Throw additional Decoys near the target location. Decoy location is slightly randomised.

skills.name: Detonate Decoy
skills.description: Detonate your decoys instantly.

skills.name: Detonating Arrow
skills.description:
Requires a bow.

Fires an arrow that embeds itself in a target then explodes after 0.6 seconds.
skills.altText: Added bow damage applies to the arrow at 125% effectiveness and to the explosion at 200% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Detonating Arrow
nodes.description:
Requires a bow.

Fires an arrow that attatches itself in a target then explodes after 0.6 seconds. Added bow damage is converted to lightning damage.

nodes.name: Quick Detonation
nodes.description: Detonating Arrow has increased critical strike chance and it has reduced arming time.

nodes.name: Weak Spot
nodes.description: Detonating Arrow critical strikes deal more damage and it has a chance to apply {Critical Vulnerability} to enemies, making them easier to critically strike.

nodes.name: Barrage
nodes.description: Detonating Arrow now explodes on impact in a cone behind the target rather than a circle, but no longer has an arming time.

nodes.name: Dragon Arrow
nodes.description:
The explosion base lightning damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to lightning damage.

Shock chance from all sources is converted to ignite chance and effects related to shock now depend on ignite instead.

Swaps Detonating Arrow's {Lightning} tag for a {Fire} tag.

nodes.name: Outburst
nodes.description: The explosion deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Jolting Charge
nodes.description: Detonating Arrow has a chance to shock enemies, but the explosion hit deals less hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Infused Discharge
nodes.description: Detonating Arrow consumes a portion of your current mana to deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) equal to the mana consumed.
nodes.altText: As an example, if your current mana is 50 and you consume 10%, Detonating Arrow will deal 5% more damage.

nodes.name: Well Crafted
nodes.description: The explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

nodes.name: Thundersteel Arrow
nodes.description:
Detonating Arrow deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has an increased chance to stun, but now has a cooldown. 

The explosion deals damage in a significantly larger area (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Loaded Quiver
nodes.description: You can store an additional charge of Detonating Arrow.

nodes.name: Rapid Detonation
nodes.description: If an enemy has an attached Detonating Arrow and gets hit again, it explodes the first arrow immediately.

nodes.name: Frostfang Arrow
nodes.description:
Detonating Arrow's base lightning damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to lightning damage. It also gains a base freeze rate.

Shock chance from all sources is converted to chill chance.

Swaps Detonating Arrow's {Lightning} tag for a {Cold} tag. 

This has no effect if Detonating Arrow is converted to fire with {Dragon Arrow}.

nodes.name: Frozen Resonance
nodes.description: Detonating Arrow has a higher chance based on your uncapped Cold Resistance.

nodes.name: Arrow of Delay
nodes.description: Detonating Arrow causes enemies to have less movement speed (multiplicative with other modifiers) while they have an arrow attached.

nodes.name: Delayed Detonation
nodes.description: Detonating Arrow has a longer arming time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Beastslayer Arrow
nodes.description: Detonating Arrow deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a longer arming time. The explosion deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per second the arrow spent arming.

nodes.name: Copper Dust Arrow
nodes.description: Detonating Arrow causes enemies to have less elemental resistance while they have an arrow attached.

nodes.name: Lethal Blast
nodes.description: The explosion hit deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 5% health the enemy is missing.

stats.statName: Explosion Hit Damage per 5% Missing Health

nodes.name: Concentration
nodes.description: The explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but in a smaller area (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Aimed Shot
nodes.description: Detonating Arrow can now be charged up for up to 2 seconds, causing it to pierce a number of enemies (continue through targets it hits) per 0.5 seconds charged up.

nodes.name: Pinpoint
nodes.description: Detonating Arrow deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per second charged up.

nodes.name: Shock Arrow
nodes.description: Detonating Arrow has a chance to shock enemies.

nodes.name: Navigator's Shot
nodes.description: Detonating Arrow now slightly seeks out targets.

nodes.name: Suckerpunch Arrow
nodes.description:
When you hit an enemy with Detonating Arrow that already has an arrow attached to them, the explosion deals more damage in a larger area (multiplicative with other modifiers). 

{Suckerpunch Arrow} will not attach an additional Detonating Arrow.
nodes.altText: If Detonating Arrow's arming time is removed, this effect cannot occur.

nodes.name: Fastshot
nodes.description: Detonating Arrow has increased attack speed and shock applied by this skill last longer.

nodes.name: Arcing Blast
nodes.description:
The explosion causes {Lightning Tendrils} to chain out to nearby targets. 

This has no effect if Detonating Arrow's damage is converted.
nodes.altText: {Lightning Tendrils} scales with increases to lightning and bow damage.

nodes.name: Piercing Thunder
nodes.description: {Lightning Tendrils} penetrate a portion of enemy lightning resistance and have a chance to shock enemies.

nodes.name: Scorpion Arrow
nodes.description:
The explosion now poisons enemies on hit, but its hits deal less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Detonating Arrow's base damage is convered to Physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to lightning damage.

Shock chance from all sources is converted to poison chance.

Swaps Detonating Arrow's {Lightning} tag for {Poison} and {Physical} tags.

This has no effect if Detonating Arrow is converted to fire or cold with {Dragon Arrow} or {Frostfang Arrow}.

nodes.name: Mana Arrow
nodes.description: Detonating arrow no longer costs mana and instead restores mana when you directly use it and hit at least one enemy. However it now only has a small chance of exploding.
nodes.altText: Have no effect on mana consumed by effects such {Infused Discharge} node on the this tree.

nodes.name: Deadly Ailments
nodes.description: Ailments inflicted by Detonating Arrow deal more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

skills.name: Devouring Orb
skills.description:
Creates a devouring orb at the target location for 10 seconds that deals void damage over time to nearby enemies, and casts a void rift whenever something dies nearby, hitting nearby enemies to deal void damage.

Each successive rift has 12% more damage and area of effect, capped at an increase of 120%.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied to the damage over time area at 100% effectiveness per second, and to the Void Rifts at 75% effectiveness.

Devouring orb cannot cast more than one void rift every 0.1 seconds.

nodes.name: Devouring Orb
nodes.loreText: Look into the orb, watch closely. It's looking back at you too.

nodes.name: Dark Moon
nodes.description: Devouring Orb now orbits you, but has a much shorter duration (multiplicative with other duration modifiers).

nodes.name: Distant Satellite
nodes.description: Devouring Orb deals more damage and orbits you at a greater distance.

nodes.name: Abyssal Rush
nodes.description: You have increased attack speed, cast speed, and movement speed while a Devouring Orb is active.

nodes.name: Cosmic Impact
nodes.description: Devouring Orb now deals void damage to enemies it collides with.
nodes.altText: Added spell damage applies to the collision at 200% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Extinction
nodes.description:
Devouring Orb deals more hit damage to enemies it collides with (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This ONLY affects the damage that devouring orb deals when the orb itself collides with an enemy, not the damage dealt by its void rifts or other sub skills.

nodes.name: Void Adept
nodes.description:
You deal more global void damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have increased mana regen while a Devouring Orb is active.

These bonuses are doubled if you have at least 90 vitality.

nodes.name: Hollow Orb
nodes.description: Devouring Orb lasts longer, but a Devouring Orb's {Void Rifts} no longer increase in size or damage for each successive rift.
nodes.altText: This effect is multiplicative with other duration modifiers.

stats.statName: Successive Void Rifts Do Not Gain Damage
Successive Void Rifts Do Not Gain Area

nodes.name: Abyssal Emission
nodes.description: Every 3 seconds Devouring Orb releases an {Abyssal Orb}, a spell which seeks enemies and detonates, dealing void damage in an area.
nodes.altText: The area of the rifts created by Abyssal Orbs scale with void rift area modifiers from this tree and with Increased Area for Area Skills stats.

nodes.name: Chaotic Torrent
nodes.description: The rate at which Devouring Orbs cast {Abyssal Orb} is increased by a random amount.

nodes.name: Cataclysm
nodes.description:
Devouring Orb now erupts at the end of its duration, creating a {Void Eruption}.

Devouring Orb has a much shorter duration (multiplicative with other duration modifiers).
nodes.altText:
An enemy cannot be hit by more than once by a single Void Eruption.

The area of the rifts created by the Void Eruption scale with void rift area modifiers from this tree and with Increased Area for Area Skills stats.

nodes.name: Fleeting Orb
nodes.description: Devouring Orb costs less mana, but has a shorter duration (multiplicative with other duration modifiers).

nodes.name: Dust Channeller
nodes.description: Devouring Orb has increased cast speed and a shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: Orb Master
nodes.description: Devouring Orb has a shorter cooldown and {Void Eruption} deals more damage

nodes.name: Rift Caller
nodes.description: All damage from Devouring Orb penetrates enemy void resistance. This includes {Void Rifts} and other sub skills and sources of damage added by this tree, and any ailments they inflict

nodes.name: Soul Eater
nodes.description: The rate at which {Void Rift} hit damage increments when a nearby enemy dies is increased.
nodes.altText: This is multiplicative with the default increase, not additive.

nodes.name: Soul Gorger
nodes.description: The rate at which {Void Rifts'} area grows when a nearby enemy dies is increased.
nodes.altText: This is multiplicative with the default increase, not additive.

nodes.name: Abyssal Expanse
nodes.description: {Void Rifts} hit enemies in a larger area.

nodes.name: Devour the Weak
nodes.description: {Void Rift} hits deal more damage against stunned enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Void Rift HIt Damage Vs Stunned

nodes.name: World Rot
nodes.description: Devouring Orb lasts longer and {Void Rifts} have a chance to inflict {Time Rot}.
nodes.altText: This Devouring Orb duration increase is multiplicative with other duration modifiers.

nodes.name: Rotting Prey
nodes.description: {Void Rift} hits deal more damage against time rotted enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Void Rift Hit Damage Vs Time Rotted Enemies

nodes.name: Voidfire Rift
nodes.description: {Void Rift} hits have a chance to ignite enemies.

nodes.name: Burning Prey
nodes.description: {Void Rift} hits against ignited enemies deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Void Rift Hit Damage Vs Ignited Enemies

nodes.name: Sightless Star
nodes.description: Devouring Orb has increased cast speed and costs less mana.

nodes.name: Patient Hunger
nodes.description: Devouring orb gains additional charges.

nodes.name: Abyssal Juggernaut
nodes.description: You have additional void resistance while you have an active Devouring Orb.

skills.name: Dive
skills.description: Dash a short fixed distance in the target direction dealing damage to all enemies in your path.
skills.altText:
Dive's cooldown does not recover while you are using it.

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness

skills.name: Dive Bomb
skills.description: Your {Falcon} ascends high into the sky then dive bombs the target location at high speed, dealing a high amount of physical damage to enemies in the area.
skills.altText:
Your falcon's added damage applies at 500% effectiveness.
If Dive Bomb is interrupted before impact, 70% of the cooldown and mana cost are recovered.

nodes.name: Rush of the Hunt
nodes.description: Dive Bomb has a shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: United Assault
nodes.description: You reduce a portion of Dive Bomb's remaining cooldown when you use a throwing or bow attack and hit at least one enemy.

nodes.name: Featherfall
nodes.description:
Before your Falcon dives it now uses {Featherfall} that causes razorsharp feathers to strike a number of enemies in an area around the target location.

{Shadow Falcons} won't use {Featherfall}.

nodes.name: Hindering Beak Strike
nodes.description: Dive Bomb's hits slows enemies and it deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Expose their Defenses
nodes.description: Dive Bomb's hits apply {Critical Vulnerability} on enemies.

nodes.name: Talon Blades
nodes.description:
Dive Bomb and {Featherfall} hits grant you a stack of {Talon Blades} for 18 seconds.

You have increased critical strike chance and critical multiplier per stack.

All stacks of {Talon Blades} are lost if you directly use Dive Bomb again.

nodes.name: Gale of Blades
nodes.description: You move faster while you have at least 5 stacks of {Talon Blades}.

nodes.name: Explosive Dive
nodes.description:
If Dive Bomb hits your {Explosive Traps} they instantly explode dealing more damage in a larger area (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

Additionally, when you detonate an {Explosive Trap} this way you gain a stack of {Talon Blades}.

stats.statName: Explosive Traps Detonate From Dive Bomb

nodes.name: Flesh Tearing Talons
nodes.description: Dive Bomb's hits shred enemy physical resistance.

nodes.name: Red Wings
nodes.description: Dive Bomb's hits grant you a stack of {Crimson Shroud} per enemy hit, up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Exsanguinating Strike
nodes.description:
Dive Bomb's hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of bleed on the target up to a maximum.

Additionally, it causes all bleed stacks inflicted by you or your Falcon to be consumed to deal their remaining damage instantly.

nodes.name: Rushing Wings
nodes.description: Dive Bomb deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and it has a shorter delay before the Falcon dives.

nodes.name: Devastating Dive
nodes.description: Dive Bomb deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and stuns caused by it last longer, but it has a longer cooldown.

nodes.name: On Wings of Shadow
nodes.description:
Dive Bomb now creates a {Shadow Falcon} to strike the location of your own {Shadows} and it will prioritize your {Shadows} nearest the target location, but {Shadow Falcons} deal less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) than the real Falcon.

The number of {Shadow Falcons} cannot exceed the number of your own {Shadows}.
nodes.altText: Increases to your own {Shadow} damage also apply to your {Shadow Falcons}.

nodes.name: Flock of Crows
nodes.description: You gain a stack of {Dusk Shroud} for each {Shadow Falcon} that hit at least one enemy.

stats.statName: Dusk Shroud Stacks From Shadow Falcons

nodes.name: Birds Aren't Real
nodes.description: A {Shadow Falcon} takes your Falcon's place, that uses Dive Bomb. Your Falcon is able to attack and use other abilities during this.

nodes.name: Dancing Shadows
nodes.description: Your {Shadow Falcons} that land inside the area of your {Smoke Bomb} take off again after a short delay before diving again at a nearby enemy to deal damage around them.

nodes.name: Midnight Aviary
nodes.description: Your {Shadow Falcons} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modfiers) per {Umbral Blade} you have on the ground.
nodes.altText: This effect does not include Umbral Blades in flight, but it does include Blade Storms and Umbral blade waiting to explode.

stats.statName: Shadow Falcon Damage Per Umbral Blade

nodes.name: Valkyrie
nodes.description:
If you are wielding a spear you also leap to the target location when you use Dive Bomb. This deals damage in the area around the target.

Dive Bomb gains the {Traversal} tag.

nodes.name: Rending Impact
nodes.description: Dive Bomb's hits cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Talon Knives
nodes.description: If you are dual wielding, a portion of the damage specific stats from both of your weapons apply to your Falcon's Dive Bomb.
nodes.altText: This doesn't include unique effects.

nodes.name: Gaping Wounds
nodes.description: Dive Bomb deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 10% of your increased stun chance.

stats.statName: Ailment Damage Per 10% Increased Stun Chance

nodes.name: Rapid Pursuit
nodes.description: If Dive Bomb hits at least one boss or rare enemy you regain mana and recover a portion of your remaining traversal skills' cooldown.

stats.statName: Mana Gain On Boss Or Rare Hit

nodes.name: Incendiary Collision Bird Missile
nodes.description:
If Dive Bomb hits one of your {Decoy}, it detonates it, causing its explosion to deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

The effects from the {Rapid Pursuit} node are also gained when Dive Bomb hits one of your {Decoys}.

Dive Bomb cannot explode more than one {Decoy} per use.

nodes.name: Focused Hunter
nodes.description: Dive Bomb deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and costs less mana.

nodes.name: Cloud Gatherer
nodes.description: If your Falcon lands inside the area of your {Smoke Bomb} the smoke area lasts longer.

nodes.name: To Shreds
nodes.description: {Featherfall's} hits shred enemy armor.

skills.name: Drain Life
skills.description: Channelled spell that targets up to 3 enemies around the target location, dealing necrotic damage over time and leeching 30% of that damage back as health.
skills.altText: Added spell damage applies at 360% effectiveness per second.

nodes.name: Empowered Drain
nodes.description: Drain Life deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Soul Blast
nodes.description: When a target is killed by Drain Life you cast Soul Blast at their location, dealing spell necrotic damage to enemies in an area around them.

nodes.name: Malignant Discharge
nodes.description: {Soul Blast} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

nodes.name: Hecatomb
nodes.description: Drain Life can now target your minions. You gain 10 mana per second for each minion you are draining.

nodes.name: Necrotic Feast
nodes.description: Drain Life can now only target minions. Drain Life leeches a higher percentage of damage .

nodes.name: Lay Waste
nodes.description: Drain Life deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but the health leech from its base effect and nodes on this tree is removed.

nodes.name: Soul Bond
nodes.description: Drain Life has a chance to summon a {Soul Wisp} when it kills an enemy, a minion that deals necrotic damage to enemies.

nodes.name: Virulence
nodes.description:
Drain Life's base necrotic damage is converted to poison damage. Consequently this damage scales with increases to poison damage, but not increases to necrotic damage.

Swaps Drain Life's {Necrotic} tag for a {Poison} tag.
nodes.altText: This also converts the explosion from the {Soul Blast} node to poison.

nodes.name: Blood Pact
nodes.description: Drain Life no longer costs mana. Instead, you lose 10% of your current health per second while channelling. Nodes that modify mana drain now modify this health drain instead.
nodes.altText:
Does not affect the up-front mana cost added by the {Dark Shackles} node.

Does not cause your mana to regenerate while channelling.

nodes.name: Death's Barrier
nodes.description: You are granted ward when Drain Life kills an enemy.

nodes.name: Horrify
nodes.description: Drain Life has a chance to slow and fear its targets each second.

nodes.name: Shadowy Tendril
nodes.description: Drain Life can drain an additional target.

nodes.name: Contempt
nodes.description:
You gain a stack of {Contempt} when you have channelled on the same enemy for 2 seconds.

Contempt grants more armour (multiplicative with other modifiers) and adds to all resistances. All stacks of Contempt are lost when you stop channelling.
nodes.altText: You can only gain 1 stack of Contempt from each enemy.

nodes.name: Enduring Contempt
nodes.description: {Contempt} stacks last for a duration after you stop channelling Drain Life.

nodes.name: Stagger
nodes.description: When Drain Life has channelled on the same target for 2 seconds, it stuns them for 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Stupefy
nodes.description: The stun inflicted by {Stagger} lasts longer and Drain Life deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) against bosses and rare enemies.

nodes.name: Thoughtsteal
nodes.description: Drain Life costs less mana per second.

nodes.name: Condemnation
nodes.description: Drain Life applies stacks of {Damned} each second. {Damned} is an ailment that deals necrotic damage over time.

nodes.name: Word Of Conviction
nodes.description: {Damned} inflicted by Drain Life lasts longer.

nodes.name: Eternal Servitude
nodes.description: If {Wandering Spirits} is active when you start channeling Drain Life it does not expire until you stop channeling.
nodes.altText: Individual spirits still expire .

stats.statName: Wandering Spirits does not expire while channeling

nodes.name: Ravenous
nodes.description: Drain Life leeches a higher percentage of damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to targets that are on low health.
nodes.altText: Low health is defined % of maximum health.

nodes.name: Insatiable
nodes.description: Drain Life leeches a higher percentage of damage .

nodes.name: Dark Shackles
nodes.description: Drain Life is now cast instead of channelled. Lasts for 3 seconds. Adds an up-front mana cost, and this cost is affected by modifiers to mana drain, except for the {Blood Pact} node.

nodes.name: Enduring Night
nodes.description: {Dark Shackles} lasts longer, but Drain Life costs more mana.

nodes.name: Grasp Of The Damned
nodes.description: {Dark Shackles} can hit up to 10 additional targets, and slows enemies hit each second, but Drain Life costs significantly more mana.

nodes.name: Chilling Demise
nodes.description: When a target is killed by Drain Life, you chill enemies in an area around them for a duration.

nodes.name: Unholy Mass
nodes.description: Drain Life deals 3% more damage per stack of {Damned} on enemies affected by {Damned}, up to a cap (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Circle of Sacrifice
nodes.description:
You gain ward over time while channelling based on your maximum mana.

Drain Life can affect enemies in a wider area. This does not affect the maximum number of enemies you can drain from at a time.

nodes.name: Cloak of Solitude
nodes.description: Increased Area stats from this tree and other sources has no effect on Drain Life's area of effect, but instead grants you additional Ward Retention while channelling Drain Life.

stats.statName: Increased Area Stats no longer affect Area

skills.name: Dread Shade
skills.description: Your minion's health is drained for 3% of its max health per second for each second the shade has been active, but it and your minions around it deal +10 necrotic damage with spells and attacks and have 50% increased necrotic damage.
skills.altText:
Each minion only benefits from one Dread Shade aura. Max 4 active shades.

Your maximum number of shades is shared with Infernal Shade.

nodes.name: Dread Shade
nodes.description: Target minion takes 3% max health per second for each second the shade has been active, but it and minions around it deal 25% more damage. Each minion only benefits from one Dread Shade aura. Expires after 20 seconds. Max 4 active shades.

nodes.name: Wisdom of the Dead
nodes.description: Dread Shade costs less mana.

nodes.name: Martyrdom
nodes.description: Dread Shade now grants minions armor based on your vitality, but Dread Shade decays your minions faster.

nodes.name: Congregation of Shades
nodes.description: You can control one additional Dread Shade or Infernal Shade at once.

nodes.name: Frenzied Phantom
nodes.description: Dread Shade now grants frenzy to affected minions for a fixed duration after being cast.

nodes.name: Scorching Brand
nodes.description: Dread Shade now grants the targeted minion {Haste} while it persists, but it also applies a stack of ignite to the targeted minion each second.

nodes.name: Lingering Doom
nodes.description: Dread Shade drains your minions' health more slowly and all affected minions deal additional necrotic damage with spells and attacks.

nodes.name: Spectral Distance
nodes.description: Dread Shade affects a larger area, but buffs minions outside of the area instead.

nodes.name: Pernicious Pact
nodes.description: Dread Shade no longer decays your minions' health, but instead inflicts a stack of {Everlasting Poison} each second.
nodes.altText: Everlasting Poison is the same .

nodes.name: Doomed Wrath
nodes.description: When used on an {Abomination} or {Wraith}, Dread Shade grants that minion more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Egoism
nodes.description: The minion targeted by Dread Shade now always critically strikes, but Dread Shade now has a cooldown.

nodes.name: Deadlock
nodes.description: Dread Shade now roots the targeted minion and causes it to taunt enemies around it.

nodes.name: All For One
nodes.description: Dread Shade grants the targeted minion significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Dread Shade no longer buffs other minions.

nodes.name: Blind Fury
nodes.description: Dread Shade now increases the attack and cast speed of the targeted minion, but blinds it .
nodes.altText: Blinded halves critical strike chance and causes the minion to aim erratically, especially at range. Does not stack.

nodes.name: Dying Coven
nodes.description: Dread Shade grants affected minions increased attack and cast speed.

nodes.name: Duskheart
nodes.description: Minions affected by Dread Shade have a chance to inflict {Damned} to enemies they hit.

nodes.name: Dying Light
nodes.description: Dread Shade now inflicts {Damned} each second to all enemies and friendly minions in its area.

nodes.name: Spectral Presence
nodes.description: Dread Shade affects minions in a larger area.

nodes.name: Grim Fate
nodes.description: Dread Shade affects minions in a larger area and grants more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but the targeted minion's health decays more quickly.

nodes.name: Bane of Death
nodes.description:
Dread Shade applies {Mark for Death} to nearby enemies and minions when it expires.

Mark for Death is a curse that reduces all resistances by 25%. It cannot stack.

nodes.name: Final Grasp
nodes.description: When any of your minions targeted by Dread Shade dies, it casts {Sacrifice} on additional minions.

nodes.name: Enemy of My Enemies
nodes.description:
Dread Shade now attaches to enemies instead, still buffing your minions, but Dread Shade now has a shorter duration and this duration cannot be increased.

This does not buff or drain the health of enemies.

nodes.name: Symbiotic Apparition
nodes.description: You are affected by the beneficial buffs of Dread Shade's aura.
nodes.altText: For example you will not apply {Doom Brand} to yourself.

nodes.name: Doom Brand
nodes.description: Dread Shade now drains the health of other minions, and marks them with {Doom Brand}. When they die, the brand explodes dealing necrotic spell damage to surrounding enemies.
nodes.altText: Doom brand's explosion counts 's.

nodes.name: Dark Binding
nodes.description: {Doom Brand} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Flesh Harvest
nodes.description: Dread Shade grants increased effect of all its buffs for each 3% of missing minion health.

stats.statName: Increased Buff Effect Per 3% Missing Health

nodes.name: Infernal Dread
nodes.description: Casting Dread Shade refreshes the duration of your {Infernal Shades.}

stats.statName: Refresh Infernal Shade Duration On Cast

nodes.name: Dread Plague
nodes.description: Dread Shade applies {Spirit Plague} to a nearby enemy whenever it expires.

nodes.name: Beyond Death
nodes.description: When a minion targeted by a Dread Shade dies, you have a chance to summon a single {Volatile Zombie} from its corpse.

nodes.name: Lone Watcher
nodes.description: Dread Shade no longer drains the health of the minion it is attached to and lasts much longer, but you are a limited to one active Dread Shade. Increases to health drain from this tree instead increase damage taken by the minion.
nodes.altText: This does not affect your maximum number of infernal shades.

stats.statName: Health Drain Increases -> increased Damage Taken

nodes.name: Vile Ghast
nodes.description: Dread Shade now increases poison damage instead of necrotic damage, and converts added necrotic damage from the base skill and this tree to chance to poison on hit.

stats.statName: Poison Chance per 1 Added Necrotic Damage

skills.name: Earthquake
skills.description: Slam the ground with your weapon damaging enemies in a large area and creating 2 to 4 aftershocks nearby.
skills.altText: Added melee damage applies at 700% effectiveness.

skills.name: Entangling Roots
skills.description:
Call forth a wave of roots that grows outwards in a wide cone in front of you. The wave deals physical damage and roots enemies it hits for 1.5 seconds. Rooted enemies take physical damage over time until they are freed.

Added spell damage applies at 100% to the initial hit and 200% per second to the damage over time.

nodes.name: Entangling Roots
nodes.loreText: Roots burst from the earth to snare and hinder your foes

nodes.name: Toxic Envelopment
nodes.description: Root Wave hits have a chance to poison enemies.

nodes.name: Venomous Briar
nodes.description: Entangling Roots' base physical damage over time is converted to poison and it now has the poison tag. Consequently this damage scales with increases to poison damage, but not increases to physical damage.
nodes.altText: This has no effect if you have taken the {Winternid Thorns} node.

nodes.name: Kobra Vines
nodes.description: Rooted enemies are also blinded.

nodes.name: Poisonous Seeds
nodes.description:
Entangling Roots now creates seeds in the area. When an enemy draws too close to a seed it bursts, releasing a burst of spores that slow and poison enemies.

If you have taken the {Winternid Thorns} node, the seed bursts inflict {Frostbite} and {Chill} instead of slow and poison.

nodes.name: Renewing Pollen
nodes.description:
The spores from {Seeds} now heal you and your allies. 

This effect is tripled for minions.

nodes.name: Nectar of Rejuvenation
nodes.description: Seeds now burst when an ally draws close to them which grants you and your allies the {Haste} buff, granting you 30% increased movement speed.

nodes.name: Earthy Puffball
nodes.description: Seeds now burst when you hit them with {Upheaval} and deal damage in a larger area when detonated this way.

nodes.name: Rampant Growth
nodes.description: Seeds will now grow {Vines} when they burst.
nodes.altText: These vines scale with your {Spriggan Form} tree {Summon Vines} skill.

nodes.name: Entrapped
nodes.description: Root Wave immobilizes enemies for a longer duration.

nodes.name: Inescapable Thicket
nodes.description: Root Wave cannot be dodged.

nodes.name: Frenzying Thorns
nodes.description: Entanging Roots now wraps around your totems and vines for twice the duration .

stats.statName: Attack Speed To Totems And Vines
Cast Speed To Totems And Vines

nodes.name: Bramblewood Wardens
nodes.description: Entangling Roots now also wraps around your Spriggans for twice the duration {Frenzying Thorns} {Thorn Volley}.

nodes.name: Reclamation
nodes.description: Entangling Roots leeches a portion of the damage it deals .

nodes.name: Noxious Grasp
nodes.description: Entangling Roots deal more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: This also affects any damage over time ailments that Entangling Roots applies.

nodes.name: Lethal Spines
nodes.description: Entangling Roots damage accelerates over time, dealing more damage each second (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Overgrown Garden
nodes.description: You now cause Entangling Roots to expand in a circle around you rather than a cone in front, but it now has a cooldown.

nodes.name: Rooted System
nodes.description: Entangling Roots is now cast from the nearest totem to your cursor.

nodes.name: Briarthorn's Wrath
nodes.description:
When you are stunned, you now cast Entangling Roots. 

This effect has a 20 seconds cooldown, which doesn't affect Entangling Root's cooldown.

nodes.name: Shredding Vines
nodes.description: Root Wave hits shred enemy physical resistance.

nodes.name: Thick Growth
nodes.description: Root Wave's hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have a higher chance to stun enemiess.

nodes.name: Winternid Thorns
nodes.description:
Entangling Roots' base damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage. It also has a chance to freeze enemies.

Physical Resistance Shred from all sources is converted to Cold Resistance Shred chance and effects related to Physical Resistance Shred now depend on Cold Resistance Shred instead.

nodes.name: Iceshard Roots
nodes.description:
Root Wave has a chance to inflict {Frostbite}. 

Poison chance from all sources is converted to Frostbite for Root Wave and effects related to poison now depend on Frostbite instead.

nodes.name: Thicket of Frost
nodes.description: Root Wave gains additional freeze rate per character level.

nodes.name: Nourishment Surge
nodes.description:
Root Wave now heals other allies it hits. The amount of health gained is increased by healing effectiveness.

This effect is tripled for minions.

nodes.name: Wild Weapons
nodes.description: Root Wave causes your minions and other allies it hits to deal additional physical damage with spells and attacks for 8 seconds. This effect does not stack.

nodes.name: Blooming Magic
nodes.description: Root Wave causes your minions and other allies it hits to deal additional damage with spells for 8 seconds. This effect does not stack.

nodes.name: Bush Stalkers
nodes.description: Root Wave causes your Wolves and Bear it hits to have improved base critical strile chance and deal more damage with critical strikes for 8 seconds. This effect does not stack.

stats.statName: Wolves And Bear Base Crit Chance

nodes.name: Venomsting
nodes.description:
Root Wave causes your minions and other allies it hits to have additional chance to poison on hit. This buff lasts 8 seconds and does not stack.

The effect is tripled for Scorpions and Serpents.

skills.name: Erasing Strike
skills.description: A melee attack that hits all enemies in a large area in front of you. Enemies killed by the hit are erased from existence, replaced by void rifts.
skills.altText: Added melee damage has 600% effectiveness on the initial hit, but none on the void rifts, which are void spells.

nodes.name: Erasing Strike
nodes.loreText: Gone from reality in the blink of an eye and the fall of a blade

nodes.name: Dust To Wind
nodes.description: Erasing Strike and {Void Rifts} it creates deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Rifts of Decay
nodes.description: Erasing Strike hits have a chance to inflict enemies with {Time Rot}, an ailment that deals void damage over time, increases stun duration by 5%, lasts 3 seconds, and stacks up to 12 times.

nodes.name: Regicide
nodes.description: When Erasing Strike hits a boss or rare enemy you have a chance to cast {Void Beam} at their location, a spell that continuously damages surrounding enemies for 3 seconds.
nodes.altText: {Void Beam} scales with increased void and spell damage.

nodes.name: Rifts of Destruction
nodes.description: {Void Rifts} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: {Void Rift} is a spell which deals void damage in an area.

nodes.name: Iriesha's Fall
nodes.description: {Erasing Strike} has increased stun chance and {Void Rift} hits deal more damage against stunned enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Rift Hit Damage Vs Stunned Enemies

nodes.name: Mark of the End
nodes.description: Erasing Strike hits shred enemy void resistance.

nodes.name: Void Pyre
nodes.description: When Erasing Strike kills an enemy you have a chance to cast {Void Beam} at their location, a spell that continuously damages surrounding enemies for 3 seconds.
nodes.altText: {Void Beam} scales with increased void and spell damage.

nodes.name: Merciful
nodes.description: Erasing Strike has increased cooldown recovery speed and deals more melee damage to enemies that are already damaged (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Ruthless
nodes.description: Erasing Strike deals more melee damage to enemies at full health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Melee Damage Vs Full Health Enemies

nodes.name: Erasure of the Living
nodes.description: Erasing Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).
nodes.altText: If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

nodes.name: Void Lens
nodes.description: All {Void Beams} created by Erasing Strike deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: {Void Beam} scales with increased void and spell damage.

nodes.name: Time Loop
nodes.description: Erasing Strike consumes mana to cause additional echoes when used. Each echo will appear one second after the last. These additional echos cannot be created while you have negative mana.

nodes.name: Shattered Continuity
nodes.description: Erasing Strike no longer has a cooldown.

nodes.name: Chamber of Fate
nodes.description: Erasing Strike hits have a chance to slow and deals more melee damage to slowed enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Obliteration
nodes.description: Erasing Strike and the spells it triggers deal additional void damage. This bonus is doubled while wielding two handed weapon.

nodes.name: Prophet's Onslaught
nodes.description: Improves Erasing Strike's base critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Essence of the End
nodes.description:
Erasing Strike critical strikes have a chance to grant you a {Void Essence}, which grant 15% increased void damage, 15% increased melee damage, and 10% reduced stun duration. 

You can have a maximum of 3 void essences at once.

nodes.name: Certain Erasure
nodes.description: Erasing Strike critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Absorb the Remains
nodes.description: When Erasing Strike kills an enemy or hits a boss or rare enemy you regain health equal to a percentage of the target's maximum health.

stats.statName: Health Gained On Rare or Boss Hit

nodes.name: Moments Stolen
nodes.description: You gain the {Haste} buff for 1 second, granting 30% increased movement speed when Erasing Strike kills an enemy or hits a boss or rare enemy.
nodes.altText: {Haste} does not stack.

nodes.name: Ravenous Void
nodes.description: If you kill 5 or more enemies simultaneously with Erasing Strike, you create 4 {Void Beams} which travel at random, damaging surrounding enemies for 3 seconds.
nodes.altText: {Void Beams} scale with increased void and spell damage.

nodes.name: Void Bringer
nodes.description: The kills required to summon {Void Beams} via the {Ravenous Void} node require less kills to trigger, but Erasing Strike costs more mana.

nodes.name: Implements of Destruction
nodes.description:
Erasing Strike deals more void damage if you are using a two handed mace (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Erasing Strike has increased cooldown recovery speed if you are using a two handed sword.

Erasing Strike's melee hit and void rifts have a larger area of effect if you are using a two handed axe.

nodes.name: Final Hour
nodes.description:
Bleed chance from all sources is converted to {Time Rot} chance for Erasing Strike and effects related to bleed now depend on Time Rot instead. 

Erasing Strike deals more melee damage against targets with 12 stacks of Time Rot (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Melee Damage vs 12 stacks of Time Rot

nodes.name: Twin Cataclysms
nodes.description: You can store an additional charge of Erasing Strike.

nodes.name: Hastened Cataclysm
nodes.description: Erasing Strike has increased cooldown recovery speed, but also has a higher mana cost.

skills.name: Eterra's Blessing
skills.description: The nearest allied target is healed for 100 health. If the target is one of your minions then the healing is tripled and the minion is energised for 4 seconds, increasing its size by 20% and its damage by 100%.

skills.name: Evade
skills.description:
Rapidly move a short distance forwards.

Evading does not grant damage immunity or prevent abilities from hitting you.

Evade gains 0.5% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed per Character level.

skills.name: Evade
skills.description:
Rapidly move a short distance forwards.

Evading does not grant damage immunity or prevent abilities from hitting you.

Evade gains 0.5% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed per Character level.

skills.name: Evade
skills.description:
Rapidly move a short distance forwards.

Evading does not grant damage immunity or prevent abilities from hitting you.

Evade gains 0.5% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed per Character level.

skills.name: Evade
skills.description:
Rapidly move a short distance forwards.

Evading does not grant damage immunity or prevent abilities from hitting you.

Evade gains 0.5% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed per Character level.

skills.name: Evade
skills.description:
Rapidly move a short distance forwards.

Evading does not grant damage immunity or prevent abilities from hitting you.

Evade gains 0.5% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed per Character level.

skills.name: Explosive Trap
skills.description:
Throws a trap that explodes when triggered, dealing throwing fire damage. Traps take 0.4 seconds to arm and explode when enemies walk over them or after 30s. 

You can have a maximum of 6 active traps at a time.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 300% effectiveness to the explosion.

nodes.name: Ash Compartment
nodes.description: Explosive Trap deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and its hits shred enemy fire resistance.

nodes.name: Hold This
nodes.description:
Whenever you hit an enemy with any melee attack you attach an Explosive Trap to that enemy.

This effect has a 1.5 second cooldown and attached traps explode after 1 second ignoring arming time or when the enemy it's attached to dies. Enemies cannot have more than 1 trap attached.

nodes.name: Aspect of the Rabbit
nodes.description:
Attached traps deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

If the enemy that the Explosive Trap is attached to hits you, it now attaches to you instead (but will still only damage enemies). Hitting an enemy then attaches it back to them without changing the delay before exploding.

Additionally, when it explodes the trap deals 30% more damage for each time it has been passed.

nodes.name: Arrow Traps
nodes.description:
When an Explosive Trap detonates, all other Explosive Traps now also detonate in quick succession and fire {Detonating Arrows} at the original target trap's location.

This effect consumes mana equal to a portion of your {Detonating Arrow's} mana cost.
nodes.altText: This effect only works while you have positive mana.

nodes.name: Blasting Device
nodes.description: {Detonating Arrows} fired this way deal additional bow damage per 3 Dexterity.

nodes.name: Static Mines
nodes.description:
Explosive Trap's base fire damage is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to fire damage.

Fire resistance shred chance from all sources is converted to lightning resistance shred.

Swaps Explosive Trap's {Fire} tag for a {Lightning} tag.

nodes.name: Lightning Bomb
nodes.description: Explosive Trap's hits have a chance to shock enemies and inflict them with a {Spark Charge}.

nodes.name: Trapas
nodes.description:
When directly using Explosive Trap, an unconverted Explosive Trap and a trap corresponding to each conversion node you have taken are thrown at the same time. Traps thrown this way are thrown in a small area.

Additionally, Explosive Trap deals less damage in a smaller area (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Coldsnap Mines
nodes.description:
Explosive Trap's base fire damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to fire damage.

Fire resistance shred chance from all sources is converted to cold resistance shred.

Swaps Explosive Trap's {Fire} tag for a {Cold} tag.
nodes.altText: This effect conversion takes priority if you have converted Explosive Trap to lightning.

nodes.name: Flash Frozen
nodes.description:
Explosive Trap's hits have a chance to chill enemies.

Additionally, Explosive Trap has additional freeze rate per Intelligence.

nodes.name: Freezing Trap
nodes.description:
When you directly throw Explosive Trap, its hits always freeze enemies, but it now has a cooldown.

Whenever you freeze an enemy with any skill a portion of Explosive Trap's remaining cooldown is recovered.
nodes.altText: If Explosive Trap already has a cooldown, the highest cooldown is used.

nodes.name: Tinkerer's Design
nodes.description: Explosive Trap is now triggered from farther away and deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Adaptive Fuse
nodes.description:
Particularly fast enemies (with a movement speed above 6 meters per second) trigger Explosive Traps instantly, even if they haven't armed.

Additionally, Explosive Trap's hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to moving enemies.
nodes.altText: Base player movement speed is 5.28 meters per second.

nodes.name: Prepared Demolition
nodes.description: Explosive Trap deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area for each second it has existed before detonating up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Gadgeteer
nodes.description: Explosive Trap deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifeirs) if the arming time is not ignored, but it takes longer for it to arm before it can detonate.

nodes.name: Smoke Traps
nodes.description: Explosive Trap's hits have a chance to grant you a stack of {Dusk Shroud}. This chance increases for each second it spends arming.
nodes.altText: The chance has no benefit when above 100%.

stats.statName: Dusk Shroud chance gained per second

nodes.name: Umbral Saboteur
nodes.description: Explosive Trap deals additional throwing damage per stack of {Dusk Shroud} you have.

nodes.name: Jelkhor's Blueprint
nodes.description: Explosive Trap costs less mana and it has increased throwing attack speed.
nodes.loreText: Jelkhor taught a select few students how to build small intricate explosive contraptions.

nodes.name: Sky Signal
nodes.description:
Whenever one of your Explosive Traps detonate your {Falcon} gains physical and elemental penetration for a short duration.

This buff can stack an unlimited amount of times.

nodes.name: Free Lofting Bird
nodes.description: Whenever one of your Explosive Traps detonate your {Falcon's} skills recover a portion of their remaining cooldowns.

nodes.name: No Man's Land
nodes.description:
Whenever you directly throw Explosive Trap you now throw traps, up to your maximum number of traps, in a wide area around the target location.

Explosive Trap deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per maximum traps, but it now has a cooldown and costs more mana per maximum trap.
nodes.altText:
"Per maximum trap" bonuses do take your base 5 maximum traps into account, .

If Explosive Trap already has a cooldown, the highest cooldown is used.

nodes.name: Minefield
nodes.description: You can now have more active Explosive Traps.

nodes.name: Clustered Explosives
nodes.description: You now throw additional Explosive Traps per use, but Explosive Trap costs more mana.

nodes.name: Subtle Sabotage
nodes.description: Explosive Trap costs less mana, but deals less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a smaller area.

nodes.name: Blast Rain
nodes.description:
You now shoot arrows attached with Explosive Traps up into the air that then drop down around the target location.

Explosive Trap now scales with your bow damage instead of throwing damage and your bow attack speed instead of throwing attack speed.

This requires wielding a bow.

nodes.name: Impact Trigger
nodes.description:
Explosive Traps now instantly detonate when the arrows hit the ground via the {Blast Rain} node, ignoring the arming time.

Additionally, Explosive Trap has a higher chance to stun enemies.

nodes.name: Trap Sprinkler
nodes.description: Whenever an Explosive Trap detonates it has a chance to drop a fresh Explosive Trap at its location, .

nodes.name: Automated Bombardment
nodes.description:
Explosive Trap has an additional chance to drop a fresh Explosive Trap via the {Trap Sprinkler} node, but Explosive Trap costs more mana.

Traps dropped this way cannot drop more additional traps.

nodes.name: Siege Engineering
nodes.description:
Whenever an Explosive Trap detonates it now has a chance to create a {Ballista} for you.

This consumes mana equal to a portion of {Ballista's} mana cost.

nodes.name: Trapuchet
nodes.description:
Explosive Traps dropped by the {Trap Sprinkler} node are now instead flung at a nearby enemy within 12 meters, rather than being dropped.

Explosive Traps dropped by the {Trap Sprinkler} node can now drop Explosive Traps when there's an enemy within 12 meters even if there is not an enemy within 6 meters.

nodes.name: Instrument of the Alchemist
nodes.description:
When an Explosive Trap drops a trap by the {Trap Sprinkler} node it also flings an {Acid Flask} for you towards the target location.

This consumes mana equal to a portion of Acid Flask's mana cost.

skills.name: Falcon Strikes
skills.description: Your Falcon rapidly strike enemies within the target area.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 150% effectiveness.

skills.name: Falconry
skills.description:
Passive:
Summons a {Falcon} that fights with you.

Active:
{Falcon Strikes}: The {Falcon} rapidly hits many enemies in the target area.
skills.lore: The Dune Falcon is one of the most deadly hunters in all of Eterra. What it lacks in size it makes up in speed, precision, and intelligence. Fierce and independent, the Dune Falcon is known to maim those who attempt to train it. Only those it recognizes as an equal can hope to gain its trust and be accepted as a hunting partner.
skills.altText: The Falcon cannot take damage and is untargetable by enemies. Press {A} to give your minions an attack command.

nodes.name: Marking Strikes
nodes.description: Your Falcon's other hits now have a chance to inflict {Falconer's Mark}.

stats.statName: Falcon Chance to inflict Falconer's Mark

nodes.name: Falconer's Mark
nodes.description: Whenever the Falcon hits an enemy with {Falcon Strikes} it {Marks} them. Your next hit against a {Marked} target deals more damage and consumes the {Mark}.

nodes.name: Avian Arsenal
nodes.description:
When you consume a {Falconer's Mark} your Falcon gains additional melee damage equal to a portion of your added melee damage, throwing damage, bow damage, or spell damage depending on the type of ability used to consume the mark.

This effect lasts 10 seconds and it can stack up to 10 times.
nodes.altText: Stronger stacks can only be replaced by weaker stacks if their remaining duration is less than 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Toxic Airdrop
nodes.description:
Your Falcon now throws {Acid Flasks} for you. {Acid Flasks} thrown by the Falcon scale with your stats and your {Acid Flask} tree, but can apply {Falcon's Mark} from {Marking Strikes}.

This effect consumes mana equal to a portion of your {Acid Flask's} mana cost and has a 6 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Flask Satchel
nodes.description: Your Falcon has additional {Acid Flask} charges.

nodes.name: Parrotkin
nodes.description: When you directly use {Acid Flask} your Falcon has a chance to gain additional {Acid Flask} charges.
nodes.altText: If the chance goes above 100% it means there's a chance for an additional Acid Flask charge.

stats.statName: Chance to grant Falcon Acid Flask Charges

nodes.name: Falconer's Journey
nodes.description: Your Falcon deals more global damage per character level and per point of Dexterity (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Is it a bird?
nodes.description:
Your Falcon deals more global damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). 

This effect is tripled for {Falcon Strikes}.

nodes.name: Watchful Eye
nodes.description: Your Falcon now more heavily prioritizes enemies close to you during combat.
nodes.altText: By default your Falcon, like other minions, takes proximity to its own position and to your position into account when deciding which enemies to target.

nodes.name: Sidekick
nodes.description: Your Falcon now heavily prioritizes enemies close to the target location of your most recent melee, throwing or bow attack.
nodes.altText: By default your Falcon, like other minions, takes proximity to its own position and to your position into account when deciding which enemies to target.

stats.statName: Falcon Prioritizes close to Recent Target

nodes.name: Agile Prey
nodes.description:
Your Falcon deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This effect is tripled against moving targets.

nodes.name: Dark Plumage
nodes.description: When your Falcon hits an enemy it has a chance to drop a {Black Arrow} at its location.

stats.statName: Black Arrow chance on Falcon Hit

nodes.name: Rending Talons
nodes.description: A portion of your your chance to bleed, poison, shred armor, shred resistances, and slow on hit now also apply to your Falcon's hits.

nodes.name: Feather Knives
nodes.description:
Your Falcon now uses {Feather Knives} at nearby enemies. This effect has a 10 second cooldown.

Your Falcon also throws a single Feather Knife whenever you consume {Falconer's Mark}.

nodes.name: Sky Chaser
nodes.description: A portion of your global throwing attack speed now applies to the Falcon's {Feather Knives} ability .

stats.statName: Throwing Attack Speed -> Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed

nodes.name: Trained to Hunt
nodes.description: A portion of the highest of your global increased melee damage, increased throwing damage, and increased bow damage now apply to all your Falcon's damage.

nodes.name: Go For the Eyes!
nodes.description: A portion of the highest of your global melee crit chance, throwing crit chance, and bow crit chance now apply to your Falcon.

stats.statName: Highest Added Crit Chance -> Falcon Crit Chance

nodes.name: Exposed Weakness
nodes.description:
When you use a melee, throwing, or bow attack and critically strike at least one enemy, your Falcon gains a portion of your global melee, throwing, or bow critical strike multiplier respectively for 10 seconds.

This effect can occur at most twice every two second.

stats.statName: Crit Multi -> Falcon Crit Multi Buff after Attack

nodes.name: Side by Side
nodes.description: When you directly use a melee, throwing, or bow attack and hit at least one enemy, you reduce a portion of {Falconer Strike's} remaining cooldown.

stats.statName: Remaining Cooldown Reduction after skill use

nodes.name: Falcon Screech
nodes.description: After the first hit of {Falcon Strike} your Falcon lets out a {Screech} which slows and applies {Frailty} to enemies around it.

nodes.name: Frightful Feathers
nodes.description:
Your Falcon's {Screech} now also fears enemies it hits.

Additionally, your Falcon moves to you when a hit leaves you at low health, and this effect will interrupt any skill it is currently using.

This effect can occur at most every 10 seconds.

stats.statName: Falcon Screech on you at Low Health

nodes.name: Avian Stamina
nodes.description: {Falcon Strikes} hits addtional times and your {Falcon} has increased melee attack speed.

nodes.name: Bird of Prey
nodes.description:
{Falcon Strikes} instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

nodes.name: Razor Wings
nodes.description: {Falcon Strikes} now cause your Falcon to swoop down in a line in front of you attacking all enemies in that line rather than hitting enemies individually.

nodes.name: Wingspan
nodes.description:
A portion of your global increased area for area skills now applies to the width of {Falcon Strikes}.

Additionally, {Falcon Strikes} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) if you have directly used an area skill in the past 8 seconds.

stats.statName: Falcon Strikes Damage after Area skill use

nodes.name: The Blood Dance
nodes.description:
If {Falcon Strikes} kills an enemy it will hit an additional time.

Additionally, when {Falcon Strikes} hits a boss or rare enemy it has a chance to hit an additional time.

stats.statName: Additional Falcon Strikes hits on kill
10% chance for Additional hits on Boss or Rares

nodes.name: Hunter's Spoils
nodes.description: When your Falcon kills an enemy or hits a boss or rare enemy it restores health and mana to you based on your total attributes.

nodes.name: Wake of Wings
nodes.description:
When you consume {Falconer's Mark} you gain the {Falcon's Wake} buff for a short duration. 

This buff grants you increased movement speed, attack and cast speed.

nodes.name: Falcon's Gale
nodes.description: Consuming a {Falconer's Mark} instantly recovers {Falcon Strike's} cooldown, but it now also costs additional mana.

skills.name: Flay
skills.description:
Spirit Step up to 3 meters towards an enemy if not within range, then perform a narrow rending slash.
Each enemy killed by the melee attack will release a Blood Eruption, a spell dealing physical damage in an area.
Enemies can be hit by both Flay and all Blood Eruptions that occur.
skills.altText:
The melee attack has 200% effectiveness of added melee damage.
The Blood Eruption has 200% effectiveness of added spell damage.

skills.name: Flurry
skills.description: A bow or melee attack that performs 3 rapid strikes. The last strike can be cancelled by moving.
skills.altText:
Added damage applies at 80% effectiveness to each strike and each strike has a 40% reduced chance to apply ailments on hit.

Increased Area for Area skills stats only affect the melee version of Flurry.

nodes.name: Flurry
nodes.description: A bow or melee skill that performs 3 rapid attacks.

nodes.name: Alacrity
nodes.description: Flurry has increased attack speed.

nodes.name: Relentless
nodes.description: You have increased attack speed for each hit you dealt with your previous flurry, up to a maximum.
nodes.altText: Multiple stacks can be gained with each strike if you hit multiple enemies.

nodes.name: Kineticism
nodes.description: Enemies killed by Flurry have a chance to release a {Kinetic Burst} around the target, dealing physical damage.

stats.statName: Chance for Kinetic Burst on Kill

nodes.name: Deep Strikes
nodes.description: Flurry deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifers).

nodes.name: Blood Revelry
nodes.description: Flurry leeches a portion of the damage it deals .

nodes.name: Adrenaline Rush
nodes.description: Flurry strikes have a chance to grant you {Adrenaline Rush}, granting Flurry 5% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and 5% increased attack speed. This lasts for 4 seconds, can stack up to 4 times.

nodes.name: Bloodplay
nodes.description: Each stack of {Adrenaline Rush} grants a chance to bleed on hit.

nodes.name: Giant Slayer
nodes.description: Eack stack of {Adrenaline Rush} grants Flurry more hit damage against bosses and rare enemies.

stats.statName: More Damage to Bosses per Stack

nodes.name: Inexhaustible
nodes.description: {Adrenaline Rush} lasts longer.

nodes.name: Strained Reflexes
nodes.description: {Adrenaline Rush} can have multiple stacks.

nodes.name: Lethal Vector
nodes.description: Damaging ailments inflicted by Flurry deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Boundless Blows
nodes.description: Flurry is now a channelled ability that costs 5 mana per second to maintain. You do not regenerate mana while channelling.

nodes.name: Accelerating Impact
nodes.description: Flurry deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each second channelled up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Pavise
nodes.description: You have additional physical and elemental resistances while channelling Flurry.

nodes.name: Arrow Storm
nodes.description: If you are using a bow you fire arrows faster, but they are less accurate.

nodes.name: Vile Tactics
nodes.description:
Flurry's first strike has a chance to inflict poison.
Flurry's second strike has a chance to cause bleed.
Flurry's third strike has a chance to shred physical and poison resistance.
nodes.altText: These chances are not reduced by Flurry's penalty to ailment chances.

stats.statName: Third Strike Poison Res Shred Chance
Third Strike Physical Res Shred Chance

nodes.name: Reopened Wounds
nodes.description: Bleed inflicted by Flurry has additional Physical Penetration.

nodes.name: Compounding Toxin
nodes.description: Poison inflicted by Flurry has additional Poison Penetration.

nodes.name: Shockwave
nodes.description: If you are using a melee weapon Flurry now causes {Force Waves} to blast forward with each strike, dealing melee physical damage.

nodes.name: Billowing Waves
nodes.description: The {Force Waves} travel further.

nodes.name: Precision
nodes.description: Improves Flurry's base critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Incision
nodes.description: Flurry critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Stolen Endurance
nodes.description: Critical strikes restore health. The amount of health gained is increased by Dexterity.

nodes.name: Second Wind
nodes.description: Flurry grants health when hitting at least one enemy.

nodes.name: Sap Willpower
nodes.description: Flurry grants mana when hitting at least one enemy.

nodes.name: Hamstring
nodes.description: Flurry's third strike Slows enemies hit.

nodes.name: Crescendo
nodes.description: Flurry's first and second strike deal less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but the third strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Fusillade
nodes.description: If you are using a bow, every 6th arrow is replaced with {Multishot}.
nodes.altText:
For nodes that affect the 1st, 2nd, and 3rd arrow separately, this means that the 3rd arrow of every second rotation is replaced with Multishot.

Multishot cast this way benefits from Multishot's skill tree, but not from Flurry's skill tree.

skills.name: Forge Strike
skills.description:
A melee attack that hits all enemies in an area in front of you.

25% chance on hit to summon a Forged Weapon which lasts for 20 seconds and is affected by the stats and attack rate of your weapon. You can control up to 6 Forged Weapons at once.
skills.altText: Added melee damage applies at 600% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Ironbound
nodes.description: Improves Forge Strike's base critical chance, and critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Lightforge
nodes.description: Forge Strike has increased cooldown recovery speed and attack speed. The attack speed bonus also applies to your Forged Weapons.

nodes.name: Arcane Welding
nodes.description: You are granted ward when Forge Strike summons a {Forged Weapon}.
nodes.altText: {Forged Weapons} are melee minions who seek out enemies and attack them.

nodes.name: Rewarding Craft
nodes.description: {Forged Weapons} no longer move or attack, but generate ward when you are near them.
nodes.altText: {Forged Weapons} are melee minions who seek out enemies and attack them.

nodes.name: Singular Craft
nodes.description: Improves Forge Strike's base critical chance and its hits inflict bleeding on hit, but your maximum number of {Forged Weapons} is halved.
nodes.altText: If you have an odd number of maximum forged weapons the number is rounded up.

nodes.name: Put to the Sword
nodes.description:
Converts Forge Strike into a sword that falls from the sky instead. Forge Strike has more attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers), cannot crit, and critical strike multiplier from the tree is converted to additional Physical Penetration for Bleed.

Converts to a polearm if you also have the {Spear Forge} node.

stats.statName: Crit Multiplier -> Physical Penetration for Bleed

nodes.name: Spear Forge
nodes.description:
Converts Forge Strike into a spear that falls from the sky instead. Forge Strike critical strikes deal significantly more damage, but it hits in a smaller area.

Converts to a polearm if you also have the {Put To The Sword} node.

nodes.name: Heavy Strike
nodes.description: Forge Strike and {Forged Weapons} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have an increased chance to stun enemies.
nodes.altText: The bonuses from this node apply to Forged Weapons from all sources, not just from Forge Strike.

nodes.name: Rending Descent
nodes.description: Forge Strike hits reduce enemy armor.

nodes.name: Eagle Strike
nodes.description: Forge Strike can now be cast at your target instead of in front of you.

nodes.name: Reinforce Weapon
nodes.description: You deal additional melee damage if you have used Forge Strike recently (last 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Reinforce Armor
nodes.description: You have increased armor if you have used Forge Strike recently (last 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Goliath Strike
nodes.description: Forge Strike hits deal more damage against rare and boss enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: More Hit Damage Against Rares And Bosses

nodes.name: Engines of War
nodes.description: Forge Strike and {Forged Weapons'} hits deal damage in a larger area

nodes.name: Anvil Blow
nodes.description: Converts Forge Strike into an anvil that falls from the sky instead. Forge Strike has an increased chance to stun enemies, stuns it inflicts lasts longer, and it deals additional physical damage.
nodes.altText: The visual effect of this node will not apply if you have any other visual alterations in this tree. You will still gain the increased stun chance.

nodes.name: Temper
nodes.description: Forge Strike hits deal additional melee fire damage.

nodes.name: Detonating Ground
nodes.description: Forge Strike causes {Detonating Ground}, sending out cracks which erupt after 1.5 seconds, dealing melee fire damage and igniting enemies.

nodes.name: Lava Burn
nodes.description: {Detonating Ground} hits deal more damage.

nodes.name: Ignited Grounds
nodes.description: {Detonating Ground} has a chance to ignite enemies on hit.

nodes.name: Forged by Fire
nodes.description: {Forged Weapons} deal additional melee fire damage.
nodes.altText: The bonuses from this node apply to Forged Weapons from all sources, not just from Forge Strike.

nodes.name: Well Forged Weapons
nodes.description: {Forged Weapons} last longer and you can control more forged weapons at once.
nodes.altText: The bonuses from this node apply to Forged Weapons from all sources, not just from Forge Strike.

nodes.name: Forgemaster
nodes.description: {Forged Weapons} now have a chance to become a {Great Axe} on summon, which deal damage in a larger area.
nodes.altText: The bonuses from this node apply to Forged Weapons from all sources, not just from Forge Strike.

stats.statName: Chance To Convert To Great Axe

nodes.name: Mass Production
nodes.description: Forge Strike has a higher chance to summon {Forged Weapons}. This added chance is much higher against bosses and rare enemies.
nodes.altText: With 3 points invested in this node Forge Strike always summons a Forged Weapon on hit against bosses and rare enemies.

nodes.name: Shrapnel
nodes.description: {Forged Weapons} have a much shorter duration, but deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and explode when they expire, dealing fire and physical damage to nearby enemies.
nodes.altText: {Forged Weapons} are melee minions who seek out enemies and attack them.

nodes.name: Serrated Blade
nodes.description: Bleed inflicted by Forge Strike has additional Physical Penetration and lasts longer.

nodes.name: Beneath Solarum
nodes.description: Forge Strike has no cooldown, but costs additional mana.

nodes.name: Bellows
nodes.description: Ailments inflicted by Forge Strike deal increased damage over time equal to your increased stun chance.
nodes.altText: Includes increased stun chance from this tree

nodes.name: Fan The Flames
nodes.description: You have additional global Fire Penetration if you have used Forge Strike recently (last 4 seconds).

skills.name: Frigid Tempest
skills.description: Conjures a spear of frost that pierces enemies.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness.

skills.name: Fury Leap
skills.description: Leap to the target location, dealing damage to nearby enemies when you hit the ground.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied at 250% effectiveness.

Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

nodes.name: Fury Leap
nodes.loreText: The fury of nature crushes all

nodes.name: Brutal Impact
nodes.description: Fury Leap's critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Regain Stamina
nodes.description:
You have a chance to reset Fury Leap's cooldown whenever you kill an enemy with any other skill.

Fury Leap's cooldown can only be reset once every 5 seconds.

stats.statName: Chance To Reset Fury Leap Cooldown On Kill

nodes.name: Lagon's Wrath
nodes.description: Fury Leap creates {Storm Bolts} while you are leaping.
nodes.altText: {Storm Bolt} is affected by your Gathering Storm tree.

nodes.name: Storm Bringer
nodes.description: {Storm Bolts} occur with increased frequency.

nodes.name: Rejuvenating Storms
nodes.description:
You have additional spell damage per 2 Attunement while leaping, and kills with {Storm Bolt} have a chance to reset Fury Leap's cooldown.

Fury Leap's cooldown can only be reset once every 5 seconds.

stats.statName: Spell Damage Per 2 Attunement While Leaping
Chance For Storm Bolt To Reset Fury Leap's Cooldown

nodes.name: Warrior's Entrance
nodes.description: When you land, you and your minions gain additional melee damage and spell damage for 3 seconds. This buff can stack.

nodes.name: Frenzied Onslaught
nodes.description: When you land, you and your minions gain {Frenzy} for 3 seconds, which increases attack and cast speed. Frenzy cannot stack.

nodes.name: Pack Leader
nodes.description: Your Wolf, Sabertooth, and Raptor companions leap with you.

nodes.name: Crushing Impact
nodes.description: Fury Leap has an increased chance to stun enemies and stuns it inflicts last longer.

nodes.name: Gravity
nodes.description: Fury Leap pulls enemies when you land.

nodes.name: Rise
nodes.description: Fury Leap has a chance to cast {Summon Vines} where you leap from.
nodes.altText:
{Summon Vines} is an active skill in Spriggan Form and can be scaled via the Spriggan Form tree.

The vines are stationary melee minions whose attacks poison on hit.

The vines scale with your bonuses to minions, but not with other nodes on this tree.

stats.statName: Chance To Cast Summon Vines At Departure

nodes.name: Poisonous Thicket
nodes.description: Fury Leap has a chance to cast {Summon Vines} where you land.
nodes.altText:
{Summon Vines} is an active skill in Spriggan Form and can be scaled via the Spriggan Form tree.

The vines are stationary melee minions whose attacks poison on hit.

The vines scale with your bonuses to minions, but not with other nodes on this tree.

stats.statName: Chance To Cast Summon Vines At Arrival

nodes.name: Crater
nodes.description: Fury Leap's deals damage in a larger area and costs less mana.

nodes.name: Ambush Predator
nodes.description: Fury Leap hits deal more damage against enemies at full health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Hit Damage Against Enemies At Full Health

nodes.name: Savage Impact
nodes.description: Fury Leap deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and you leech a portion of the damage it deals .

nodes.name: Aspect of the Mantis
nodes.description:
Fury Leap's cooldown is reset when you kill an enemy with a short leap.

Fury Leap's cooldown can only be reset once every 5 seconds.
nodes.altText: A short leap is less than 10 meters.

stats.statName: Reset Fury Leap Cooldown On Short Leap Kill

nodes.name: Unshackled
nodes.description: While you are below half health, Fury Leap always critically strikes.

nodes.name: Panther Strike
nodes.description: Fury Leap deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: Violent Upheaval
