nodes.description: When you land with Fury Leap you cast Upheaval. This consumes Upheaval's mana cost and requires positive mana.

nodes.name: Heorot's Protection
nodes.description: You are immune to damage while leaping.

nodes.name: Wind Hammer
nodes.description: Fury Leap deals more damage based on how far you leap.

nodes.name: Wings of Endurance
nodes.description: When you land, you and your minions are healed.
nodes.altText: This is affected by your Increased Healing Effectiveness stat.

nodes.name: Battle Bloom
nodes.description: When you land you cleanse all ailments on you and your minions.

skills.name: Gathering Storm
skills.description: Create a burst of fire damage around a minion. Has 400% added damage effectiveness.

nodes.name: Looming Clouds
nodes.description: Whenever you expend a {Storm Stack} you have a chance to cast {Storm Bolt} at an additional enemy.

nodes.name: Concentrated Storm
nodes.description: Gathering Storm deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and you expend {Storm Stacks} more frequently, but {Storm Bolts} target enemies within a smaller area.

nodes.name: In the Eye of the Storm
nodes.description: Whenever you expend a {Storm Stack} you have a chance to cast {Maelstrom}.

nodes.name: A Storm Gathers
nodes.description: Whenever you expend a {Storm Stack} you have a chance to gain a stack instead of losing one.

nodes.name: Lightning Gale
nodes.description: Whenever you expend a {Storm Stack} you have a chance to gain {Haste}.

nodes.name: Whirlwind Tactics
nodes.description:
Whenever you use a companion ability you expend {Storm Stacks} over the next 0.3 seconds.

Storm Bolts triggered this way deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Expends Storm Stacks On Companion Use

nodes.name: Lightning Strikes Twice
nodes.description: Whenever you hit a boss or rare enemy with a {Storm Bolt} you have a chance to cast it again at the same enemy after 0.25 seconds.

nodes.name: Lagonian Diplomacy
nodes.description: While wielding a staff the melee attack of Gathering Storm is replaced by a direct ranged cast of {Storm Bolt}, but Gathering Storm costs additional mana.

nodes.name: Clouds on the Horizon
nodes.description: {Storm Bolts} target enemies from farther away.

nodes.name: Friends of the Tempest
nodes.description: If you have from 1 to 15 {Storm Stacks}, your minions' lightning skill hits have a chance to grant you a {Storm Stack}.
nodes.altText: If Gathering Storm is converted to physical or cold then this requires a physical or cold hit instead.

nodes.name: Thunderous Strikes
nodes.description: Gathering Storm penetrate enemy lightning resistance.
nodes.altText: If Gathering Storm is converted to physical or cold then this grants physical or cold penetration.

nodes.name: Excited Bolts
nodes.description: {Storm Bolts} now consume a portion of your current mana to deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 10 current mana.

nodes.name: Two Eyed Storm
nodes.description: Whenever you expend a {Storm Stack} while dual wielding you now cast {Storm Bolts} at two enemies instead of one.

stats.statName: Additional Storm Bolt While Dual Wielding

nodes.name: Windfury Blows
nodes.description: Gathering Storm has increased attack speed.

nodes.name: Manafused Storm
nodes.description: Whenever you directly use Gathering Storm you gain mana per active {Storm Stack} up to a maximum.

stats.statName: Mana Gain Per Storm Stack On Use

nodes.name: The Typhoon
nodes.description: You have increased global stun chance and additional freeze rate multiplier per active {Storm Stack} up to a maximum.

stats.statName: Increased Stun Chance Per Storm Stack
Freeze Rate Multiplier Per Storm Stack

nodes.name: Energized by the Skies
nodes.description: Gathering Storm's hits have a chance to consume mana to grant you additional {Storm Stacks}.
nodes.altText:
This has no effect if you have no current mana.

Mana consumption happens after the mana gain from the {Manafused Storm} node.

nodes.name: Island Cleaver
nodes.description: Gathering Storm's melee attack deals damage in a larger area and you have a chance to gain an additional {Storm Stack} if you hit at least 3 enemies with the same melee attack.

nodes.name: Wings of Lightning
nodes.description:
Whenever you use Gathering Storm's and hit at least one enemy you gain a stack of {Wings of Lightning}.

Each time one of your {Storm Crows} attack they consume a stack of Wings of Lightning causing their basic attack to chain 2 additional times.

nodes.name: Jolting Strikes
nodes.description:
{Storm Bolts'} hits have chance to shock enemies.

Gathering Storm deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to shocked enemies.
nodes.altText: If Gathering Storm is converted to cold or physical respectively this depends on frostbite or armor shred.

nodes.name: Tempest Weapon
nodes.description: Gathering Storm deals additional spell damage per 3 melee damage on your equipped axe or mace.

nodes.name: Earth Smasher
nodes.description:
Gathering Storm's and {Storm Bolt's} base lightning damage is converted to physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to lightning damage.

Shock chance on hit from all sources is converted to armor shred chance for Gathering Storm.

Swaps Gathering Storm's {Lightning} tag for a {Physical} tag.

nodes.name: Seismic Crash
nodes.description: Gathering Storm deals additional melee damage per Strength while wielding a 2 handed weapon.

nodes.name: Frostbringer
nodes.description:
Gathering Storm's and {Storm Bolt's} base lightning damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to lightning damage.

Shock chance on hit from all sources is converted to frostbite chance for Gathering Storm.

Swaps Gathering Storm's {Lightning} tag for a {Cold} tag.

nodes.name: Of Ice and Snow
nodes.description: Gathering Storm's hits have a chance to chill enemies and a higher chance to freeze enemies.

nodes.name: Winter Comes
nodes.description: Gathering Storm has a higher chance to freeze enemies per 2 Attunement and it also has additional cold penetration for frostbite per 2 Attunement.

nodes.name: Rending Vortex
nodes.description: Gathering Storm has improved base critical strike chance per stack of {Maelstrom} on you from any source.

skills.name: Gathering Storm
skills.description: Strike at your enemy with a mighty lightning powered storm. When you use Gathering Storm and hit at least one enemy, you gain a {Storm Stack}. Every second you expend a Storm Stack to cause a {Storm Bolt} to strike a nearby enemy. This interval is reduced by 2% for every stack you currently have.
skills.altText:
The attack deals melee lightning damage with added damage applying at 100% effectiveness, and the {Storm Bolt} deals spell lightning damage with added damage applying at 100% effectiveness.

Increased area for area skills stats apply to the melee attack and to the damage area of the {Storm Bolt}, but not to the area in which enemies are targeted by {Storm Bolts}.

skills.name: Gathering Storm
skills.description: Strike at your enemy with a mighty lightning powered storm. When you use Gathering Storm and hit at least one enemy, you gain a {Storm Stack}. Every second you expend a Storm Stack to cause a {Storm Bolt} to strike a nearby enemy. This interval is reduced by 2% for every stack you currently have.
skills.altText:
The attack deals melee lightning damage with added damage applying at 100% effectiveness, and the {Storm Bolt} deals spell lightning damage with added damage applying at 100% effectiveness.

Increased area for area skills stats apply to the melee attack and to the damage area of the {Storm Bolt}, but not to the area in which enemies are targeted by {Storm Bolts}.

skills.name: Ghostflame
skills.description: Channel to releases a continuous jet of horrid flames in front of you dealing fire and necrotic damage over time.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 600% effectiveness each second. Damage reduces while rotating.

nodes.name: Dread Furnace
nodes.description: Ghostflame has a chance to inflict damned and ignite enemies each second.

nodes.name: Arteries of Malice
nodes.description:
Ghostflames's base necrotic and fire damage is converted to physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to necrotic or fire damage.

Damned and ignite chance from all sources are converted to bleed chance per second.

Ghostflame now drains a portion of your health each second.

Swaps Ghostflames's {Necrotic} and {Fire} tags for a {Physical} tag.

nodes.name: Phantom Transfusion
nodes.description:
You leech a portion of the physical damage you deal .

A portion of your global bleed chance on hit now applies .

stats.statName: Bleed Chance -> Bleed Chance per second

nodes.name: Feast of Bones
nodes.description:
Damaging an enemy with Ghostflame causes you to cast {Marrow Shards} towards them.

This effect can occur a maximum number of times each second.

stats.statName: Max Marrow Shards per second against 1 target

nodes.name: Fuel of Anguish
nodes.description:
Increases the frequency of {Marrow Shards} per second from the {Feast of Bones} node.

Improves the {Marrow Shards'} base critical strike chance cast this way.

nodes.name: Occult Embers
nodes.description: Ghostflame has increased ignite and damned duration per point of Intelligence.

nodes.name: Flames of Misery
nodes.description:
A portion of your global ignite chance on hit now applies .

A portion of your global damned chance on hit now applies .

stats.statName: Ignite Chance -> Ignite Chance per second
Damned Chance -> Damned Chance per second

nodes.name: Decrepit Mortals
nodes.description:
After channelling Ghostflame for a short duration, the skull releases a terrible screech, cursing all nearby enemies with {Decrepify}.

Ghost Flame gains the {Curse} tag, but its direct damage still does not scale with increased curse damage.

nodes.name: Horrifying Shriek
nodes.description: The screech from the {Decrepit Mortals} node has a shorter delay before being released and a larger area.

nodes.name: Banshee
nodes.description: The screech from the {Decrepit Mortals} node now also fears enemies and Ghostflame deals more direct damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to feared enemies.
nodes.altText: Direct damage modifiers do not affect damage of ailments and subskills from Ghostflame.

nodes.name: Atrocity
nodes.description: Ghostflame deals more damage, but has a higher channel cost (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Disdain
nodes.description: You take less damage from ignited, damned or bleeding enemies while channeling Ghostflame.

nodes.name: Domain of Torment
nodes.description: Ghostflame deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

nodes.name: Enfeebled Prey
nodes.description:
You leech a portion of the damage you deal {Cursed} enemies while channeling Ghostflame.

Additionally, you take less damage from {Cursed} enemies while channeling Ghostflame.

nodes.name: Lingering Warmth
nodes.description:
When you stop channeling Ghostflame after having channeled for at least 1 second, you gain the {Haste} buff for a short duration.

Additionally, when you stop channeling you gain ward per {Cursed} enemy.

stats.statName: Ward Gain per Cursed enemy after Channeling

nodes.name: Memorial of Flames
nodes.description:
After channeling for 1.1 seconds Ghostflame detaches itself, and persists for short duration without you needing to channel.

This effect ends early if you start channeling Ghostflame again.

nodes.name: Unending Ruin
nodes.description: The duration from the {Memorial of Flames} node is longer, but Ghostflame now has an upfront mana cost.

nodes.name: The Burning Skull
nodes.description: The detached Ghostflame now slowly seeks out nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Silver Oblation
nodes.description: After channeling for 1 second, Ghostflame consumes a portion of your current ward, and it deals damage in a larger area per ward consumed.

nodes.name: Stygian Beams
nodes.description:
For each 200 ward consumed by the {Silver Oblation} node you now cast a {Stygian Beam} at a nearby enemy dealing spell necrotic damage.

Enemies cannot be hit by more than 1 beam.

nodes.name: Spirit Kindling
nodes.description:
All your {Wraiths}, {Spectres}, and {Revenants} gain a stack of {Spirit Kindling} every 0.5 seconds while they are inside Ghostflame's area of effect.

Each stack of {Spirit Kindling} lasts 5 seconds, drains health per second, and grants increased movement speed, melee attack speed, and ignite chance equal to a portion of your ignite chance.

stats.statName: Current Health Drain per second per stack
Ignite Chance -> Minion Ignite Chance per stack

nodes.name: Fiery Desecration
nodes.description: Ghostflame now deals damage in a full circle around you, but it has a higher channel cost.

nodes.name: Spirit of Dread
nodes.description: You now move towards the target location while channeling Ghostflame with increased movement speed, but it has a higher channel cost.

nodes.name: Harrowing Path
nodes.description: Ghostflame has a lower channel cost, but you move slower while channeling Ghostflame.

nodes.name: Doom Surge
nodes.description: You move faster while channeling Ghostflame.

nodes.name: Domain of Agony
nodes.description: Ghostflame deals more direct damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per second you spend channeling Ghostflame.
nodes.altText: Direct damage modifiers do not affect damage of ailments and subskills from Ghostflame.

nodes.name: Spectral Menace
nodes.description: Ghostflame has a lower channel cost and you gain a portion of your current mana .

stats.statName: Current Mana -> Ward Gain while Channeling

nodes.name: Wraith Form
nodes.description: You gain additional dodge rating per intelligence while channeling Ghostflame, (multiplicative with other modifiers) while channeling Ghostflame.

stats.statName: Dodge Rating per Intelligence while Channeling

nodes.name: Ethereal Blockade
nodes.description: All of your dodge rating is converted to armor while channeling Ghostflame.

skills.name: Hail of Arrows
skills.description:
Requires a bow.

Launch a hail of arrows into the sky that rain down on the target location over 3.5 seconds.
skills.altText: Added bow damage is applied at 325% effectiveness per second.

nodes.name: Volley
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows deals damage in a larger area

nodes.name: Blot Out the Sun
nodes.description: You have a chance to gain a stack of {Dusk Shroud} each second for 2 seconds while inside the area, granting you glancing blow chance and dodge rating. This effect can stack.

nodes.name: Fight in the Shade
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows now also grants a stack of {Dusk Shroud} to allies each second for 2 seconds while inside the area.

nodes.name: Skystrike
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows now also shoots a {Barrage of Arrows} on use dealing bow physical damage, but costs more mana. This does not scale with damage over time.

nodes.name: Silver Arrows
nodes.description: Improves {Barrage of Arrows'} base critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Condemn
nodes.description: {Barrage of Arrows} immobilizes enemies for a short duration. Rare enemies and bosses are slowed instead.

nodes.name: Blighted Arrows
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows has a chance to apply {Frailty} to enemies each second.

nodes.name: Sundering Rain
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows has a chance to shred enemy armour each second.

nodes.name: Lethality
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows has a chance to inflict enemies with {Crit Vulnerability} each second.

nodes.name: Arsonist
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows deals more bow damage to ignited enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Scorched Earth
nodes.description:
Hail of Arrows' base physical damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to ignite chance and effects related to bleed now depend on ignite instead.

Swaps Hail of Arrows' {Physical} tag for a {Fire} tag.

This has no effect if Hail of Arrows is converted to cold with {Crystal Arrows} or to poison with {Acid Rain}.

nodes.name: Pristine Fletcher
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but in a smaller area (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Soul Stealer Arrows
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows leeches a portion of the bow damage it deals .

nodes.name: Focus
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Quick Draw
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows costs less mana, but has a shorter duration (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Backup Volley
nodes.description: You can store additional charges of Hail of Arrows, but it has a shorter duration (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Deadly Draw
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows costs less mana and has a shorter cooldown, but has a longer delay before the arrows fall.

nodes.name: Tear Flesh
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows has a chance to cause enemies to bleed each second.

nodes.name: Aim for the Heart
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows deals more bow damage per stack of bleed on the enemy, up to a maximum. This does not affect ailment damage.

nodes.name: Arrow Spray
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows now fall in a forward advancing rectangle area rather than a circle.

nodes.name: Pin Down
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows has a chance to slow enemies each second.

nodes.name: Crystal Arrows
nodes.description:
Hail of Arrows' base physical damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage. It also has a chance to freeze enemies each second.

All slow chance from this tree is converted to chill chance and effects related to slow now depend on chill instead.

Swaps Hail of Arrows' {Physical} tag for a {Cold} tag.

This has no effect if Hail of Arrows is converted to poison with {Acid Rain}.

nodes.name: Frost Shots
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows has increased chance to freeze enemies each second and has increased chill duration.

nodes.name: Steady
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows lasts longer.

nodes.name: Nowhere to Hide
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows deals more bow damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) over its duration scaling up to a maximum. This does not affect damaging ailments.

nodes.name: The Hunt
nodes.description:
Hail of Arrows lasts significantly longer (multiplicative with other modifiers), but you can only have one Hail of Arrows active at a time. 

Using Hail of Arrows again causes the old instance to stop.

nodes.name: Endless Barrage
nodes.description:
Hail of Arrows is now channeled and can be retargeted while you are channelling. It costs less initial mana, but rapidly drains your mana. You do not regenerate mana while channelling. 

Channelled Hail of Arrows' delay is halved, and increases to its delay are halved.

nodes.name: Acid Rain
nodes.description:
Hail of Arrows' base physical damage is converted to poison. Consequently this damage scales with increases to poison damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Swaps Hail of Arrows' {Physical} tag for a {Poison} tag.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to poison chance.
nodes.altText: {Barrage of Arrows} is not converted to poison.

nodes.name: Venom Arrows
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows has a chance to poison enemies each second.

nodes.name: Headshot
nodes.description: Hail of Arrows deals more bow damage to stunned enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers). This does not affect ailment damage.

skills.name: Hammer Throw
skills.description:
Throws a hammer that returns to you after a short delay.

Added Throwing Damage is applied to each hit at 110% effectiveness.
skills.altText: This is a throwing attack that scales with throwing attack damage and throwing attack speed. It is not a melee attack or spell.

nodes.name: Hammer Throw
nodes.loreText: Swirling through the air, these hammers would be elegant were it not for the blood and broken bones they left behind them.

nodes.name: Rapid Throw
nodes.description: Hammer Throw has increased attack speed.

nodes.name: Weighted Hammers
nodes.description: Hammer Throw deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but hammers travels slower.

nodes.name: Enra's Technique
nodes.description:
Hammer Throw can no longer spiral, chain, or orbit.

If your hammers would spiral, they instead deal significantly more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

If your hammers would chain, they instead deal more critical damage for each time they would chain.

If your hammers would orbit you, they instead have additional base critical strike chance.

Hammer Throw hits deal increased damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Mana Starved Forging
nodes.description: When you are out of mana Hammer Throw is free.

nodes.name: Shattering Force
nodes.description: Hammer Throw hits have a chance to reduce enemy armor.

nodes.name: Disintegrating Aura
nodes.description: Your hammers gain a {Disintegrating Aura}, causing enemies nearby them to take void damage over time, but Hammer Throw costs more mana and has reduced attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText:
{Disintegrating Aura} scales with your increases to void damage, damage over time, and throwing attack damage, but not with other nodes on this tree unless specifically stated otherwise. Its area scales with Increased Area for Area skill stats.

Added damage applies to Disintegrating Aura at 125% effectiveness per second.

nodes.name: Rapid Disintegration
nodes.description: {Disintegrating Aura} deals more damage, and Hammer Throw costs less mana.

nodes.name: Force of Impact
nodes.description: Hammer Throw hits deal more damage, have a higher chance to stun enemies, and stun for a longer duration.

nodes.name: Collision
nodes.description: Hammer Throw hits have a higher chance to stun enemies, and the stuns they inflict last longer, but Hammer Throw hits no longer pierce (travel through enemies hit).

nodes.name: Ricochet
nodes.description: Hammers chain to nearby enemies instead of returning to you, but Hammer Throw hits deal less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have reduced chance to stun enemies.

nodes.name: Chaining Hammers
nodes.description: Hammers chain to additional enemies, but Hammer Throw has less attack speed and its hits deal less damage (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Overwhelm
nodes.description: Hammer Throw deals more hit damage against stunned enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers) and the stuns they inflict last longer

nodes.name: Battle Rouse
nodes.description: Hammer Throw has a chance to grant you health on hit.

nodes.name: Hammer of Want
nodes.description: Hammer Throw rips a {Dark Orb} from enemies on hit, which travels back to you and grants 6 health and mana. Hammer Throw has a 5 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Winged Hammers
nodes.description: Hammers travel faster.

nodes.name: Steadfast Path
nodes.description: Hammer Throw hits have a chance to deal double damage, but hammers no longer return to you.

nodes.name: Catapult
nodes.description:
Hammer Throw launches additional hammers, but Hammer Throw costs more mana.

Hammers from the same throw cannot hit the same enemy, unless they spiral.

nodes.name: Avatar of the Spire
nodes.description: Hammers are now thrown in a nova, with double the amount of additional hammers unless your hammers spiral. Hammer Throw hits deal additional throwing physical damage.

nodes.name: Iron Spiral
nodes.description: Hammers now travel in a spiral around you, but halves your amount of additional hammers and Hammer Throw costs more mana.
nodes.altText: Modifiers to projectile speed only affect the tangential velocity of spiralling hammers, not their radial velocity (i.e. they change the speed the hammers go around you, but not the speed at which they travel outwards).

nodes.name: Hammer Vortex
nodes.description: Your spiralling hammers now orbit you, but Hammer Throw costs more mana.

nodes.name: Ballista
nodes.description: Hammer Throw deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and costs less mana.

nodes.name: Zealot's Conviction
nodes.description: Hammer Throw hits have a higher chance to deal double damage.

nodes.name: Guardian's Zeal
nodes.description: Using Hammer Throw grants you a stack of {Zeal} for 4 seconds, which increases your damage and critical strike chance by 10% per stack.
nodes.altText: Buffs granted by {Zeal} are global. You can have a maximum of 3 stacks of {Zeal}.

stats.statName: Global Increased Damage Per Zeal Stack
Global Increased Crit Chance Per Zeal Stack

nodes.name: Rahyeh's Legacy
nodes.description: Each stack of {Zeal} also grants you added global ignite chance.

stats.statName: Global Ignite Chance Per Zeal Stack

skills.name: Harvest
skills.description: A melee attack that hits all enemies in an area in front of you, dealing double damage to those that are Cursed.
skills.altText: Unaffected by weapon range. Added damage applies at 70% effectiveness. Common curses include Marked for Death, Bone Curse and Spirit Plague.

nodes.name: Harvest
nodes.loreText: Reap the death mark

nodes.name: Harrowing Blade
nodes.description: Harvest hits have a chance to reduce enemy necrotic resistance.

nodes.name: Life Eater
nodes.description:
Harvest grants you health each time it hits a cursed enemy.

Health gained scales with your intelligence stat.

stats.statName: Health Gained Per Point Of Intelligence

nodes.name: Mark of the Locust
nodes.description: When Harvest hits a target afflicted by Spirit Plague, it applies Withering and has a chance to spread Spirit Plague to an additional target.

nodes.name: Great Scythe
nodes.description: Harvest deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Spectral Whetstone
nodes.description: Improves Harvest's base critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Learned Weakness
nodes.description: You have increased critical strike chance if you have hit a cursed enemy with Harvest recently (past 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Steal Youth
nodes.description: You have more movement speed if you have landed a critical strike with Harvest recently (past 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Symbol of Loss
nodes.description: Harvest hits deal more damage against Cursed enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Mind Harvest
nodes.description: Harvest grants you ward when it hits a Cursed enemy.

nodes.name: Mirror Soul
nodes.description: Harvest grants you ward based on your maximum health when it hits a Cursed enemy.

stats.statName: Percent Of Health Granted As Ward

nodes.name: Ghost Conduit
nodes.description: Ward granted by this skill tree is also granted to your minions.

nodes.name: Undead Veins
nodes.description: Your minions are granted more ward from Harvest.

nodes.name: Putrid Reaper
nodes.description: Harvest hits have a chance to poison enemies.

nodes.name: Death Inside
nodes.description: Harvest hits deal more damage per stack of poison on the target (multiplicative with other modifiers) up to a maximum

nodes.name: Crimson Death
nodes.description:
Harvest's base necrotic damage is converted to physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to necrotic damage.

Harvest now gains bleed chance per point of intelligence instead of added melee necrotic damage.

Swaps Harvest's {Necrotic} tag for a {Physical} tag.

nodes.name: Blood Bringer
nodes.description: Harvest has a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Double Edged Scythe
nodes.description:
When you hit an enemy with Harvest both you and the enemy are inflicted with bleed. Bleed stacks on enemies inflicted by Harvest have additional Physical Penetration.

The self-inflicted bleed does not scale with your stats.

nodes.name: Wraith Skin
nodes.description: Harvest consumes all of your remaining mana on use, and you gain ward equal to twice the mana consumed.

nodes.name: Iron Mouths
nodes.description: Improves Harvest's base critical strike chance., but also costs health to use.

nodes.name: Legion of the Lich
nodes.description: Minions have increased critical strike chance if you have landed a critical strike with Harvest recently (past 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Finality
nodes.description: Harvest hits instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).
nodes.altText: If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

nodes.name: Spirit Shards
nodes.description:
Each hit with Harvest grants a {Spirit Shard} up to a total of 13. When you have 13 Spirit Shards your next use of Harvest consumes them to deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and grant you mana.

Consuming Spirit Shards also grants your existing minions more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for 4 seconds. This buff does not stack.

nodes.name: Undead Harvest
nodes.description: Harvest hits leave a trace on enemies, causing enemies to take increased damage and be prioritized by your minions. Traces last for 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Blood Sculptor
nodes.description: Harvest has a chance to summon a {Blood Spectre} when it kills an enemy. You cannot summon more than one Blood Spectre every 2 seconds.
nodes.altText: {Blood Spectres} have a base of 100 health, decay over time, and use melee attacks.

nodes.name: Red Reapers
nodes.description: {Blood Spectres} summoned by Harvest have a significantly increased critical strike chance.
nodes.altText: {Blood Spectres} have a base of 100 health, decay over time, and use melee attacks.

nodes.name: Spectral Feast
nodes.description: {Blood Spectres} summoned by Harvest leech a signficant portion of the damage they deal .
nodes.altText: {Blood Spectres} have a base of 100 health, decay over time, and use melee attacks.

nodes.name: Necrotic Blood
nodes.description: {Blood Spectres} summoned by Harvest deal additional melee necrotic damage.
nodes.altText: {Blood Spectres} have a base of 100 health, decay over time, and use melee attacks.

skills.name: Healing Hands
skills.description: Heals all allies in a target area for 50 health and applies a lingering warmth which heals 80 health over the next 3 seconds. The lingering warmth cannot stack on the same target.

nodes.name: Searing Light
nodes.description: Healing Hands now hits enemies within its area of effect, dealing spell fire damage. Added spell damage applies to it at 200% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Bane of Evil
nodes.description: Healing hands deals additional spell damage based on your Increased Healing Effectiveness and on Increased Healing Effectiveness from this tree.

stats.statName: Spell Damage per 10% increased Healing Effectiveness

nodes.name: Halted Scourge
nodes.description:
Healing Hands {Immobilizes} void enemies for 1 second on hit and deals more damage to them (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Healing Hands grants allies 10% less void damage taken (multiplicative with other modifiers) for 10 seconds when cast on them. This buff does not stack.
nodes.altText:
You count .

Void Enemies include cultists, husks, pure voidforms, and voidfused enemies. They are encountered frequently in the Ruined Era.

nodes.name: Turn Undead
nodes.description:
Healing Hands fears Undead Enemies for 2 to 3 seconds on hit and deals more damage to them (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Healing Hands grants allies 10% less necrotic damage taken (multiplicative with other modifiers) for 10 seconds when cast on them. This buff does not stack.
nodes.altText:
Fear causes enemies to flee from you and your allies. Enemies can only be affected by Fear once.

You count .

Undead enemies include skeletons, wraiths, zombies, and most other enemies encountered in the Imperial Era.

nodes.name: Cleric's Wrath
nodes.description: Healing hands deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on the combined levels of your specialised Buff skills.
nodes.altText: Only Skills with the Buff tag are counted.

stats.statName: Damage per Level of Specialised Buff Skills

nodes.name: Consecrated Storm
nodes.description: Healing hands has a chance to {Electrify} on hit.

nodes.name: Holy Winds
nodes.description: Healing Hands deals more lightning damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) and when you hit an electrified enemy with Healing Hands it spreads all stacks of your stacks of electrify from that enemy to a number of other enemies within 5 metres.

nodes.name: Seraph Blade
nodes.description:
Healing Hands is converted into a melee attack that hits in a wide arc in front of you. It now scales with melee damage instead of spell damage and effects on this tree that granted spell damage now grant melee damage instead.

Healing Hands still heals you, .

nodes.name: Prayer of the Fallen
nodes.description: Healing Hands has increased healing effectiveness. This bonus is doubled if there is a dead player within 30 metres.

nodes.name: Blessed Parish
nodes.description: Healing Hands has an increased area of effect and a lower mana cost.

nodes.name: Purity of Thought
nodes.description: Healing Hands has a lower mana cost.

nodes.name: Divine Catalyst
nodes.description:
You cast {Divine Bolt} at nearby enemies when you directly cast healing hands and heal yourself or an ally.

Divine Bolt is affected by specific passives from the Paladin tree and if you take this node then Divine Bolt from all sources scales with nodes on this tree.

nodes.name: Divine Barrier
nodes.description:
Healing Hands also grants ward to allies based on your Attunement.

If the ally has an effect that causes them to gain ward per second based on their missing health, then all of healing hands' healing is converted to ward.
nodes.altText: You count .

nodes.name: Homeward
nodes.description:
If Healing Hands would not affect any allied players at the chosen target location, it is cast centred on you instead.

Healing hands has increased healing effectiveness.

stats.statName: Cast at self if not targeting ally

nodes.name: Synthesis of Light
nodes.description: Healing hands also grants ward to allies based on your Increased Healing Effectiveness and on Increased Healing Effectiveness from this tree.
nodes.altText: You count .

nodes.name: Unbroken Prayer
nodes.description: Healing Hands becomes a channeled ability, casting 4 times per second regardless of cast speed, and draining your mana. You do not regenerate mana while channelling.
nodes.altText:
If you have the {Seraph Blade} node, then the melee attacks occur in random directions while you channel.

If you have the {Rahyeh's Chariot} node then this node has no effect.

nodes.name: Guardian's Chant
nodes.description:
Healing Hands also grants ward per second for three seconds after being cast on an ally.

The ward per second is equal to a proportion of the ward granted up front by the other nodes on this tree and by items that cause you to grant ward with Healing Hands.

This effect cannot stack multiple times, casting again on the same ally just refreshes the duration.
nodes.altText: You count .

nodes.name: Urgent Healing
nodes.description: Healing Hands restores additional health up front.

nodes.name: Vow of Restoration
nodes.description: Healing Hands restores additional health over time. This lasts for three seconds just like Healing Hands' inherent healing over time effect.

nodes.name: Cleric's Hammer
nodes.description:
When you directly use a melee attack and hit at least one enemy, you have a chance to cast Healing Hands around the target. This consumes mana based on Healing Hands's mana cost.

Healing Hands restores less up front health when cast indirectly.

stats.statName: Healing Hands Chance on Melee Hit
Less Up Front Healing For Indirect Casts

nodes.name: Hand of Aurelus
nodes.description: When you directly cast Smite, you have a chance to cast Healing Hands around the target location. This consumes 70% of its mana cost.

stats.statName: Healing Hands Chance on Smite Cast

nodes.name: Rahyeh's Chariot
nodes.description:
When you directly use Healing Hands you dash to the target location first. However, Healing Hands now has a cooldown and counts a {Traversal} skill.

This does not affect indirect casts of Healing Hands.
nodes.altText: Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

nodes.name: Cloud Voyager
nodes.description: A portion of Healing Hands' remaining cooldown is recovered if you use it to heal an ally other than yourself. This effect can occur once per direct cast of Healing Hands.

nodes.name: Sacred Gift
nodes.description: When you cast Healing Hands, there is a chance it spawns a {Health Globe} at a random point inside the area of effect. When an ally walks over the globe, it is consumed, healing them for 70 health.

nodes.name: Sun Shroud
nodes.description: You are immune to damage while moving with Healing Hands.

nodes.name: Virtue of Patience
nodes.description: Healing Hands takes longer to cast, but deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has increased healing effectiveness and a larger area of effect.
nodes.altText: The cast speed modifier is also multiplicative with other modifiers and affects attack speed instead if Healing Hands is converted to a melee attack.

nodes.name: Font of Salvation
nodes.description:
If you heal an allied player other than yourself that was below half prior to healing, Healing Hands restores them to full health and grants them ward equal to 80% of their max health.

This has no effect on you, nor on minions, nor players that have an effect that causes them to gain ward per second based on their missing health.

nodes.name: Skyfall
nodes.description:
While channelling Healing Hands you also call down a beam from the sky that deals fire damage over time to enemies around the target area and heals allies within its area of effect.

Healing Hands costs additional mana per second while channelling.

skills.name: Heartseeker
skills.description:
Requires a bow.

Shoot an arrow that seeks the heart of a nearby target, passing harmlessly through other enemies. Whenever it hits its target it has a chance to continue through it and {Recurve} to strike it again. 

Subsequent {Recurve} chance is multiplied by 0.8 each time the arrow {Recurves}. If the target dies, it will choose a new target.
skills.altText:
Base recurve chance is 100%.

Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness.

skills.name: Holy Aura
skills.description: You and nearby allies passively gain 30% increased damage and +15% additional elemental resistance. Activating Holy Aura doubles the stat bonuses for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Holy Aura
nodes.loreText: Shine like a beacon in the darkness.

nodes.name: Flame Burst
nodes.description:
Your melee hits apply 10 stacks of {Fiery Inquisition} and the melee hits of other allies affected by the aura apply 1 stack. If an enemy reaches 60 stacks, the stacks are consumed to release a {Flame Burst}, dealing fire damage to surrounding enemies.

While Holy Aura is active twice .

The {Flame Burst} scales with the stats of the player or minion that triggers it.
nodes.altText: Modifiers to chance to apply ailments also modify the number of stacks applied. For example your {Warpath} hits apply 6 stacks, and allies' warpath hits have a 60% chance to apply 1 stack.

nodes.name: Improved Flame Burst
nodes.description: If you are the one to get the final hit to unleash {Flame Burst} on an enemy, it deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: {Flame Burst} deals fire damage to surrounding enemies, and is unleashed after successive melee attacks on the same enemy.

nodes.name: Fanaticism
nodes.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased attack and cast speed.

nodes.name: True Strike
nodes.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Extreme Zeal
nodes.description: Holy Aura causes you and your allies' critical strikes to deal more damage.

nodes.name: Burning Blows
nodes.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased fire damage.

nodes.name: Rahyeh's Devotion
nodes.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies a chance to ignite enemies.

nodes.name: Rahyeh's Fury
nodes.description: Holy Aura causes you and your allies to penetrate enemy fire resistance.

nodes.name: Call To Arms
nodes.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased physical damage.

nodes.name: Strength From Afar
nodes.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased throwing attack damage and increased stun chance with throwing attacks.

nodes.name: Shelter from the Storm
nodes.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies additional elemental resistance and endurance threshold.

nodes.name: Swiftness
nodes.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies additional dodge chance.

nodes.name: Redemption
nodes.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased healing effectiveness.

nodes.name: Concentration
nodes.description: Holy Aura's active duration lasts longer, but Holy Aura's cooldown lasts longer and its passive is disabled during its cooldown.

nodes.name: Purification
nodes.description:
Holy Aura grants you and your allies additional poison resistance.
Activating Holy Aura cleanses ailments for you and your allies.

nodes.name: Demoralizing Aura
nodes.description: Activating Holy Aura grants you a chance to slow surrounding enemies each second.

nodes.name: Expedite
nodes.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increasing throwing attack speed and a chance to gain {Haste} for 1 second on hit.

nodes.name: Vital Boon
nodes.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased health regeneration.

nodes.name: Faith
nodes.description: Holy Aura regenerates ward for you and nearby allies.

nodes.name: Shielded By Faith
nodes.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased ward retention.

nodes.name: Faith's Reward
nodes.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies a burst of ward when activated, but Holy Aura has a longer cooldown.

nodes.name: Mighty Shield
nodes.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies additional block effectiveness and health when blocking attacks.

nodes.name: Against The Odds
nodes.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies ward when blocking attacks.

nodes.name: Hope
nodes.description: When an enemy dies in Holy Aura's area of effect, there is a chance it spawns a {Health Globe}, healing for 70 health.
nodes.altText: {Health Globes} scale with increased healing effectiveness.

nodes.name: Inner Flame
nodes.description: Your melee hits apply an additional stack of {Fiery Inquisition} and if you are the one to get the final hit to unleash {Flame Burst} on an enemy, it deals damage in an increased area.
nodes.altText: {Flame Burst} deals fire damage to surrounding enemies, and is unleashed after successive melee attacks on the same enemy.

skills.name: Human Form
skills.description: Return back to human form, returning your original stats and abilities.

skills.name: Human Form
skills.description: Return back to human form, returning your original stats and abilities.

skills.name: Human Form
skills.description: Return back to human form, returning your original stats and abilities.

skills.name: Human Form
skills.description: Return back to human form, returning your original stats and abilities.

skills.name: Hungering Souls
skills.description:
Calls forth five hungering souls that seeks out enemies, on hit they deal necrotic damage and then possesses the target.

Possessed enemies take necrotic damage over time for 1.5 seconds. Enemies cannot be possessed by multiple souls at once.
skills.altText:
Possess's damage counts as spell damage and it is affected by modifiers to base spell damage.

Added spell damage applies to the initial hit at 45% effectiveness and to possess at 75% effectiveness over its full duration.

nodes.name: Hungering Souls
nodes.loreText: The souls of the dead hunger for flesh.

nodes.name: Forbidden Pact
nodes.description: Souls deal additional spell damage based on your maximum mana, but fewer Souls are created with each cast.

nodes.name: Isolation
nodes.description: Souls are significantly larger and deal more hit damage, but only one is created with each cast.

nodes.name: Piercing Gaze
nodes.description: Improves Hungering Souls' base critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Hungering Eyes
nodes.description: Souls' critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Great Soul
nodes.description: Souls are larger and deal more hit damage, but Hungering Souls costs more mana.

nodes.name: Soul Drain
nodes.description: Souls have a chance to grant you mana when they kill an enemy.

stats.statName: Chance To Grant Mana On Kill

nodes.name: Mind Harvest
nodes.description: Souls grant you more mana when they kill an enemy.

nodes.name: Focused Wrath
nodes.description: Hungering Souls fires projectiles in a narrower cone.

nodes.name: Caustic Wretches
nodes.description: Souls have a chance to poison enemies.

nodes.name: Decayed Mind
nodes.description: Souls have an increased chance to poison enemies, and they cost less mana.

nodes.name: Inspired Hunger
nodes.description: Directly casting Hungering Souls causes you to deal more damage over time against Possessed Enemies for 8 seconds. This effect does not stack.
nodes.altText: This grants more damage over time against enemies afflicted with Spreading Flames instead of Possessed Enemies if Hungering Souls is converted to Fire.

nodes.name: Risen Cemetery
nodes.description: Hungering Souls has a chance to fire additional projectiles.

nodes.name: Soul Swarm
nodes.description: Hungering Souls fires additional projectiles, but costs more mana.

nodes.name: Dominion Of Undeath
nodes.description: Hungering Souls costs less mana, and fires projectiles in a wider cone.

nodes.name: Life Hunt
nodes.description: Hungering Souls has increased cast speed and its souls travel faster, causing them to go further before they expire.

nodes.name: Reaper's Gaze
nodes.description:
Souls hits instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health). 

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

nodes.name: Ravenous
nodes.description: Souls deal additional necrotic damage on Hit.

nodes.name: Vengeful Souls
nodes.description: You have a chance to cast Hungering Souls when hit, but Souls cast this way have a 70% chance to only have one projectile.

stats.statName: Chance To Cast Hungering Souls When Hit
Chance for Single Projectile When Hit

nodes.name: Soul Catcher
nodes.description: Hungering Souls cost less mana and has a chance to grant ward on kill.

nodes.name: Lament
nodes.description:
You have a higher chance to cast Hungering Souls when hit.

When you directly cast Hungering Souls you gain Ward.

stats.statName: Chance To Cast Hungering Souls When Hit

nodes.name: Risen Hatred
nodes.description:
You have a higher chance to cast Hungering Souls when hit.

When you directly cast Hungering Souls you have a chance to cast it twice in quick succession.

stats.statName: Chance To Cast Hungering Souls When Hit

nodes.name: Grave Bond
nodes.description: Souls deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) if you have at least one minion.

nodes.name: Necromantic Emanation
nodes.description: Souls deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each minion you have.

nodes.name: Unholy Trinity
nodes.description: Souls deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) if you have exactly three minions.

nodes.name: Fire Skull
nodes.description:
Hungering Souls' base damage is increased and converted to fire and its hits ignite instead of possessing. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to necrotic damage.

Souls deal more hit damage.

nodes.name: Eternal Pyre
nodes.description: Ignites inflicted by Hungering Souls last longer and have additional Fire Penetration

nodes.name: Descent Into Madness
nodes.description: Souls deal more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

skills.name: Infernal Shade
skills.description: Target enemy and all nearby enemies take fire damage per second. Each enemy can only have one Infernal Shade attached at a time. Expires after 5 seconds. Max 4 active shades.
skills.altText:
Added spell damage applies at 250% effectiveness each second.

Your maximum number of shades is shared with Dread Shade.

nodes.name: Infernal Shade
nodes.description: Target enemy and all nearby enemies take fire damage per second . Each enemy can only have one Infernal Shade attached at a time. Expires after 5 seconds. Max 4 active shades.
nodes.altText:
Added spell damage applies at 100% effectiveness each second.

Your maximum number of shades is shared with Dread Shade.

nodes.name: Ignition
nodes.description: Infernal Shade costs less mana and has increased cast speed.

nodes.name: Blaze Shade
nodes.description: You have a chance to create a {Blaze Shade} which deals more damage in a significantly larger area (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Area of Effect with Blaze Shade

nodes.name: Fleeting Shade
nodes.description: {Blaze Shade} deals more damage, but has a shorter duration (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Fanning the Flames
nodes.description: Infernal Shade deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

nodes.name: Lingering Flames
nodes.description: If no target is within range of your target location the shade will wait up to 10 seconds for a target to come within range and then attach to it.
nodes.altText: This node has no effect if the Hellfire node is taken.

nodes.name: Purgatory
nodes.description: Infernal Shade gains 15% fire penetration each second that it is unattached to a target.
nodes.altText: If you have the Blood Shade node this grants physical penetration instead.

nodes.name: Legion
nodes.description:
When directly casting Infernal Shade you will create extra shades if there are nearby enemies.

Infernal Shade costs more mana to cast.

Has no effect if you have taken the Hellfire node.

nodes.name: Wildfires
nodes.description: Infernal Shade deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but has reduced duration.

nodes.name: Combustion
nodes.description: When Infernal Shade expires there is a large explosion which deals fire damage to nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Fiery Conclusion
nodes.description: The explosion which occurs when the Infernal Shade expires deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and affects a larger area.

nodes.name: Flame Burst
nodes.description: Infernal Shade has reduce duration and the explosion which occurs when the Infernal Shade expires has added critical strike chance.
nodes.altText: This duration reduction is additive wih the reduction from the Wildfires node.

nodes.name: Heart of Fire
nodes.description: Infernal Shade deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but in a smaller area.

nodes.name: Cackling Flames
nodes.description: Infernal Shade has increased duration.

nodes.name: Brimstone
nodes.description: Infernal Shade has a chance to slow nearby enemies each second.

nodes.name: Hellfire
nodes.description:
Infernal Shade is now ground targeted and cannot attach to any targets.

Infernal Shade applies a stack of Fire Resistance Shred each second but now has a cooldown.

Prevents additional Shades from the Legion node being created.

nodes.name: Fiend Hunter
nodes.description: Infernal Shade has a shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: Flight of Fire
nodes.description: You can cast an additional Infernal Shade or Dread Shade.

nodes.name: Shifting Doom
nodes.description: When Infernal Shade's target dies it has a chance to move to a new target.

nodes.name: Influence
nodes.description: Infernal Shade deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Devour in Flames
nodes.description: Infernal Shade can now only attach to your minions, but your minions are also damaged by Infernal Shade.

nodes.name: Burn Trail
nodes.description: Your minions gain {Haste} while they have an Infernal Shade attached to them.

nodes.name: Subjugation
nodes.description: Infernal Shade deals more direct damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each second it has been active, up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Soulfire
nodes.description: Infernal Shades which attach to minions have unlimited increased duration.

nodes.name: Manic Pyre
nodes.description: Minions which have an Infernal Shade attached to them gain increased movement, attack and cast speed each second up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Torment Beacon
nodes.description: Infernal Shade has a chance to ignite nearby enemies each second.

nodes.name: Baneful
nodes.description: Ignited inflicted by Infernal Shade has additional Fire Penetration

nodes.name: Blood Shade
nodes.description:
Infernal Shade's base fire damage is converted to physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to fire damage.

All ignite chance from this tree is converted to bleed chance and effects related to ignite now depend on bleed instead.

nodes.name: Corrosion
nodes.description: Infernal Shade has a chance to shred the armor of nearby enemies each second.

skills.name: Javelin
skills.description:
Hurl a javelin that pierces through every enemy in its path.

If you have a spear equipped added melee damage from the spear applies to Javelin as added throwing damage at 50% of its normal value. Added melee damage from other sources has no effect.

Added throwing damage applies at 250% effectiveness.
skills.altText:
This is a throwing attack that scales with throwing attack damage and throwing attack speed.

The 250% added throwing damage effectiveness applies to all added throwing damage, including added throwing damage that was converted from your spear's added melee damage. So, equipping a spear with +100 Melee Damage causes Javelin to deal 125 additional damage.

nodes.name: Go for the Legs
nodes.description: Javelin hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed and have a chance to slow.

nodes.name: Keen Outlook
nodes.description: Javelin hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to enemies the further away they are, up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Forceful Hurl
nodes.description: Javelin gains physical and lightning penetration for each second you have been standing still up to a maximum duration.
nodes.altText: Partial seconds are counted towards the maximum bonus. For examble standing still for half a second grants Javelin 6% physical and lightning penetration with one point allocated. This is counted when Javelin is thrown, not when you start throwing.

nodes.name: Strategic Patience
nodes.description: Javelin deals more damage, but has less attack speed (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Holy Spears
nodes.description: Javelin hits deal additional lightning damage.

nodes.name: Divine Throws
nodes.description:
Javelin's base physical damage is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Ignite and bleed chance from all sources is converted to {Electrify} and effects related to bleed or ignite now depend on Electrify instead.

Swaps Javelin's {Physical} tag for a {Lightning} tag.

nodes.name: Purifying Lightning
nodes.description: Javelin has a chance to {Electrify} enemies on hit. Electrify applied by Javelin has additional Lightning Penetration.

nodes.name: Divine Fury
nodes.description: When Javelin hits an enemy it now splits into additional piercing lightning spears which aim towards enemies close to the target, but Javelin itself can no longer pierce and it costs more mana.
nodes.altText: If there are no other enemies nearby the target, only 2 lightning spears will be created. This node does nothing if you have selected the Siege Barrage node.

nodes.name: Monster Piercer
nodes.description: Javelin hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to enemies on high health.
nodes.altText: Targets above 65% max health are considered to be at high health.

nodes.name: Horde Spiker
nodes.description: Javelin hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) up to a maximum, for each enemy pierced.

nodes.name: Beast Ender
nodes.description: Improves Javelin's base critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Serrated Javelin
nodes.description: Javelin hits have a chance to shred enemy armor.

nodes.name: Excellent Balance
nodes.description: Javelin costs less mana.

nodes.name: Perfect Setup
nodes.description: Directly using Javelin causes your next melee attack to costs less mana.

nodes.name: Sacred Forge
nodes.description: Directly using Javelin and hitting an enemy causes your next {Judgement} or {Forge Strike} to deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Mighty Delivery
nodes.description: Javelin deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has increased attack speed.

nodes.name: Burning Strength
nodes.description: Javelin hits have a chance to ignite enemies.

nodes.name: Siege Barrage
nodes.description: You now throw Javelin into the air causing 3 javelins to rain down at target location dealing damage in an area, but it costs more mana.
nodes.altText: This node causes Divine Fury to not function.

nodes.name: Battle Standard
nodes.description:
Now only 1 Javelin rains down at target location, it deals more damage and persists for 4 seconds, but has a cooldown.

It has a {Battle Standard} attached granting you and other allies in its radius increased damage and added endurance threshold based on your attunement.
nodes.altText:
You are limited to 1 standard.

If Javelin would echo, the echo instead throws down a Javelin similar to the {Siege Barrage} node, rather than another Battle Standard.

nodes.name: Banner of Restoration
nodes.description: The {Battle Standard} now heals allies around it each second. The amount of health gained is increased by healing effectiveness.

nodes.name: Ardent Symbol
nodes.description: The {Battle Standard} now lasts longer, but is still limited to one standard.

nodes.name: Capture the Flag
nodes.description: If an enemy walks over the {Battle Standard} it captures it and carries the flag until it expires.
nodes.altText: This just means the {Battle Standard} aura moves with the enemy, not that they gain the buffs.

nodes.name: Divine Intervention
nodes.description: The {Battle Standard} now casts {Smite} at targets nearby every 1.6 seconds.

nodes.name: Righteous Descend
nodes.description: The {Battle Standard} casts {Smite} more frequently and Smite cast this way has improved base critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Surprise Initiative
nodes.description:
Javelin is now a combo ability, the first part throws down the {Battle Standard} and the second part causes you to {Dash} to the flag.

Javelin's cooldown is now longer.
nodes.altText: This effect works even if the {Battle Standard} has been picked up by an enemy.

nodes.name: Spiked Bombardment
nodes.description: Additional Javelins rain down, but Javelin costs more mana.

nodes.name: Holy Trail
nodes.description: Javelin now leaves behind a {Holy Trail}, that deals fire and lightning damage to enemies each second, heals you and your allies each second and lasts for 6 seconds, but Javelin now has a cooldown. The amount of health gained is increased by healing effectiveness
nodes.altText: This has no effect if you have taken the {Siege Barrage} node.

nodes.name: Pilgrimage
nodes.description: Javelin deals more fire and lightning damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and you have a chance to ignite and electrify enemies with melee attacks while Javelin is on cooldown.

nodes.name: Spear to the Thigh
nodes.description: Javelin deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Path of Judgement
nodes.description: {Holy Trail} gains additional spell damage based on your increased healing effectiveness.

stats.statName: Spell Damage per 5% Increased Healing Effectivenes

skills.name: Judgement
skills.description:
A powerful melee attack that leaves an area of {Consecrated Ground} for 4 seconds.

Allies on the {Consecrated Ground} are healed for 50 health each second.

Enemies on Consecrate Ground take fire damage over time that scales with spell damage. Consecrate Ground gains 1 spell damage per 5% increased healing effectiveness.
skills.altText:
Added melee damage applies to the attack at 350% effectiveness.

Added spell damage applies to Consecrated Ground at 375% effectiveness per second.

The melee attack's damage does not scale with spell damage and Consecrated Ground's damage does not scale with melee damage.

nodes.name: Sanctified Serenity
nodes.description: {Consecrated Ground} has increased healing effectiveness.
nodes.altText: This stacks additively with other sources of increased healing effectiveness and is taken into account for Consecrated Ground's bonus spell damage per increased healing effectiveness.

nodes.name: Lingering Force
nodes.description: {Consecrated Ground} lasts longer.

nodes.name: Anointed
nodes.description: {Consecrated Ground} becomes a {Consecrating Aura} which surrounds you, but Judgement costs more mana and has a longer cooldown.

nodes.name: Destructive Impact
nodes.description: {Consecrated Ground} heals allies and deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Holy Eruption
nodes.description: When {Consecrated Ground} finishes, it casts {Holy Eruption}, dealing fire damage to all nearby enemies and heals you and all your nearby allies for 80 health.

nodes.name: Holy Blast
nodes.description: {Holy Eruption} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and restore more health.

nodes.name: Cleansing Light
nodes.description: {Holy Eruption} cleanses negative ailments, such .
nodes.altText: {Holy Eruption} deals 30 fire damage to all nearby enemies and heals all nearby allies for 50 health.

nodes.name: Expedite
nodes.description: {Consecrated Ground} restores more health, but has a shorter duration.

nodes.name: Sanctification
nodes.description: Judgement now pulls in enemies and slows them, but its initial hit no longer deals damage.

nodes.name: Flaming Soul
nodes.description: {Consecrated Ground} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Ashes To Dust
nodes.description: {Consecrated Ground} has a chance to shred enemy armor each second.

nodes.name: Divine Destruction
nodes.description: Judgement hits and {Conscrated Ground} deal more damage against enemies at high health (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: Targets above 65% max health are considered to be at high health.

stats.statName: Conscrated Ground Damage Against High Health

nodes.name: Scourgebane
nodes.description: Judgement hits deal more hit damage to rare and boss enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Hit Damage Against Rares And Bosses

nodes.name: Sigil of Sacrifice
nodes.description: Judgement consumes all of your {Sigils of Hope} to deal additional fire damage for each Sigil consumed.
nodes.altText: Consecrated Ground is affected by the spell fire damage gained per sigil.

nodes.name: Pious Offering
nodes.description: Judgement now also consumes a percentage of your current mana and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per mana consumed.

nodes.name: Ascendant Liturgy
nodes.description: Judgement gains significant physical and fire penetration, but no longer leaves behind {Consecrated Ground}.

nodes.name: Proclamation
nodes.description: Judgement deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has an increased chance to stun enemies.

nodes.name: Righteous Decree
nodes.description: Judgement also casts {Smite} at nearby enemies. Smite consumes mana equal to its mana cost for each cast.

nodes.name: Sacred Sword
nodes.description: Judgement hits have a chance to ignite enemies and ignites applied by Judgement have additional Fire Penetration.

nodes.name: Warrior's Tithe
nodes.description: Judgement's melee attack heals you and nearby allied players for each enemy it hits. This healing is affected by your increased healing effectiveness.
nodes.altText: All allied players within 15 metres are healed.

nodes.name: Purifying Flame
nodes.description: Judgement hits and {Consecrated Ground} deal more damage against ignited enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Conscrated Ground Damage Against Ignited Enemies

nodes.name: Fervent Impact
nodes.description: Judgement hits have more critical strike chance against ignited enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Punish
nodes.description: Judgement critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Swift Verdict
nodes.description: Judgement has a shorter cooldown and a lower mana cost.

nodes.name: Prophesied Immolation
nodes.description: Judgement's melee attack cannot be dodged and deals more fire damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on your increased healing effectiveness.
nodes.altText: This fire damage modifier also applies to any ailments Judgement's melee attack inflicts, such .

stats.statName: Fire Damage per 10% Increased Healing Effectiveness

nodes.name: Ensuing Fervour
nodes.description: You gain Frenzy for a duration after using Judgement if it hits at least one enemy.

nodes.name: Deliverance
nodes.description: If you hit at least one enemy with Judgement you gain the {Deliverance} buff, which drastically increases mana regen and health regen.

nodes.name: Holy War
nodes.description: While you have the {Deliverance} buff whenever you directly use Vengeance, Rive, or Multistrike and hit at least one enemy you regain additional mana.

nodes.name: Urgent Inquisition
nodes.description: Judgement no longer has a cooldown, but costs substantially more mana. Its mana cost now counts {Pious Offering} node.

skills.name: Lethal Mirage
skills.description: Become immune for a duration and rapidly strike nearby targets with 6 mirages.
skills.altText:
Mirages' added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

Increased Area for Area Skills stats apply to the attacks of individual mirages, but not to the maximum range at which mirages can be created.

nodes.name: Lethal Mirage
nodes.description: A circular attack that's also used by your shadow clones. Requires dual wielding.

nodes.name: Maj'elkan Blade
nodes.description: Lethal Mirage deals additional melee physical damage per equipped sword or dagger.

nodes.name: Wounding Ambush
nodes.description: Lethal Mirage penetrates enemy physical resistance.

nodes.name: Shocking Grasp
nodes.description:
Lethal Mirage deals additional melee lightning damage and its base physical damage is converted to Lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Physical penetration from this tree is converted to lightning penetration.

All bleed and poison chances are converted to shock chance.

Swaps Lethal Mirage's {Physical} tag for a {Lightning} tag.

nodes.name: Illusory Edge
nodes.description: Lethal Mirage has a chance to cause enemies to bleed, and bleed inflicted by Lethal Mirage has additional Physical Penetration.

nodes.name: Sundering Blows
nodes.description: Lethal Mirage hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of bleed on the target up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Rive
nodes.description: Lethal Mirage has more critical strike chance (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of stack of bleed on the target.

nodes.name: Rending Darkness
nodes.description: Lethal Mirage can now also hit allies granting them the {Mirage Form} buff for 4 seconds, granting bleed chance and additional dodge rating.
nodes.altText: Your Mirages do not hurt allies.

nodes.name: Gloomy Friendship
nodes.description: Lethal Mirage now targets allies rather than enemies.

nodes.name: Phantasmal Presence
nodes.description: When Lethal Mirage ends you gain {Mirage Form} for 1 second per critical strike landed. This can stack up to 6 seconds.

nodes.name: Consuming Darkness
nodes.description: You gain health and mana per kill with Lethal Mirage.

nodes.name: Unending Mirage
nodes.description: Lethal Mirage gains an additional Mirage, resulting in more hits.

nodes.name: Gloom and Doom
nodes.description: Mirages have a chance to leave behind a {Shadow}.

nodes.name: Blur
nodes.description: Mirages are created faster, causing Lethal Mirage to have a shorter duration.

nodes.name: Synchronize
nodes.description: Reduce Lethal Mirage's cooldown per enemy killed by Lethal Mirage up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Ravaging Mirage
nodes.description: Lethal Mirage deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and leeches a portion of the melee damage dealt .

nodes.name: Shadow Eater
nodes.description: Lethal Mirage consumes all active {Shadows} gaining additional Mirages per {Shadow} consumed, resulting in more hits.

nodes.name: Umbral Feast
nodes.description: Lethal Mirage deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per {Shadow} consumed.

nodes.name: Umbral Burst
nodes.description: When you reappear Lethal Mirage releases a burst of smoke blinding enemies and inflicts them with {Frailty}.

nodes.name: Smoke Cloud
nodes.description: The smoke from {Umbral Burst} persists {Frailty} each second.

nodes.name: Feebling Shadows
nodes.description: Allies within the smoke cloud avoid critical strikes.

nodes.name: Umbral Toxins
nodes.description: The smoke cloud is converted to a poison cloud causing enemies to be poisoned each second, but no longer inflicts {Frailty}.

nodes.name: Lingering Sickness
nodes.description: Poisons caused by Lethal Mirage last longer.
nodes.altText: This includes poison stacks from the poison cloud.

nodes.name: Umbral Traversal
nodes.description: You gain {Haste} when you reappear.

nodes.name: Umbral Expanse
nodes.description: Lethal Mirage gains an additional Mirage, resulting in more hits.

nodes.name: A Gloomy End
nodes.description: Mirages have a chance to use {Shadow Cascade} in addition to their normal attack.

nodes.name: Pact of the Desert
nodes.description:
Lethal Mirage creates a {Shadow} at the location you disappear from.

This {Shadow} is not consumed by the {Shadow Eater} node.
nodes.altText:
Shadows will repeat one skill you use before vanishing. Shadows can repeat Acid Flask, Shurikens or Shadow Cascade, and their damage scales with your damage stats. 

You can have 3 Shadows at once, and they will disappear after 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Without a Trace
nodes.description:
Lethal Mirage instantly kills enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health), but can no longer inflict bleed.

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

nodes.name: Backstab
nodes.description: Improves Lethal Mirage's base critical strike chance, but it has fewer Mirages, resulting in fewer hits.

skills.name: Lunge
skills.description: Dash to a nearby enemy and strike it with your weapon. Cannot be used without a target. Costs more mana the further away the target is.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

nodes.name: Lunge
nodes.loreText: Strike First!

nodes.name: Dawn Charge
nodes.description: You regain a percentage of your missing health when you use Lunge.

nodes.name: Broadside
nodes.description: Lunge deals damage in a wider area along its path.

nodes.name: Double Strike
nodes.description: Lunge gains an additional charge, but it has a longer cooldown.

nodes.name: Slipstream
nodes.description: Other allies caught in the path gain {Haste} for a short duration.

nodes.name: To Your Aid
nodes.description: You can now Lunge to other allies.
nodes.altText: You cannot Lunge to shields from {Ring of Shields}.

nodes.name: Healing Rush
nodes.description: You now heal allies you Lunge to. The amount of health gained is increased by healing effectiveness.

nodes.name: Blade Stream
nodes.description: Lunge now hits all enemies along its path to your target.
nodes.altText: Increased Area for Area Skills stats affect the width of the path

nodes.name: Rough Cuts
nodes.description: Lunge hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed along its path but not its final hit.

nodes.name: Visceral Path
nodes.description: Lunge deals more damage to enemies along its path and with its final hit.

nodes.name: Torchbearer
nodes.description:
Lunge's base physical damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical damage or other damage types.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to ignite chance.

Swaps Lunge's {Physical} tag for a {Fire} tag.

This has no effect if you have taken the {Voidbringer} node.

nodes.name: Juggernaut Dash
nodes.description: You have a high chance to block while Lunging.

nodes.name: Disarming Blow
nodes.description: Lunge's final hit has a chance to apply {Frailty} to enemies based on distance traveled up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Impairing Strike
nodes.description: Lunge's final hit now {Immobilizes} enemies for a short duration.

nodes.name: Deadly Stab
nodes.description: Improves Lunge's base critical strike chance when using a spear.

nodes.name: Initiate's Onslaught
nodes.description: Lunge's final hit deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area based on distance traveled up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Cull the Weak
nodes.description:
Lunge hits instantly kills enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health). The threshold is based on distance traveled up to a maximum.

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

nodes.name: Crusader's Fury
nodes.description: After using Lunge you gain additional physical penetration per enemy hit along the path. This buff lasts 4 seconds.
nodes.altText:
This buff can stack if you use Lunge multiple times within 4 seconds.

If Lunge is converted to Void then this buff grants Void Penetration instead.

If Lunge is converted to Fire then this buff grants Fire Penetration instead.

nodes.name: Holy Incursion
nodes.description: Lunge's final hit has a chance to cast {Smite} at up to 3 nearby targets based on distance traveled up to a maximum.
nodes.altText: If there are 3 available targets and this effect triggers it will always cast smite at all 3 targets. The cast chance is not rolled individually.

nodes.name: Unstoppable
nodes.description: You are invulnerable while Lunging.

nodes.name: Reckless Skirmish
nodes.description: Killing an enemy with Lunge grants you {Frenzy} for a short duration.

nodes.name: Voidbringer
nodes.description:
Lunge's base physical damage is converted to void. Consequently this damage scales with increases to void damage, but not increases to physical damage or other damage types.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to chance to inflict {Time Rot}.

Swaps Lunge's {Physical} tag for a {Void} tag.

nodes.name: Ready or Not
nodes.description: Killing an enemy with Lunge resets the cooldowns of {Void Cleave}, {Erasing Strike}, {Forge Strike} and {Judgement}

nodes.name: Art of the Spear
nodes.description: Lunge's final hit now deals damage in an extended rectangle instead of a circle when using a spear.

nodes.name: Pilum Assault
nodes.description:
Lunge's final hit now causes you to use {Javelin} when using a spear.

This consumes Javelin's mana cost.

nodes.name: Warrior's Renewal
nodes.description:
You reduce a portion of Lunge's remaining cooldown when you use a different melee attack and hit at least one enemy. 

This effect can only occur a limited number of times per use of Lunge.

nodes.name: Ambuscade
nodes.description: Lunge deals more melee damage to enemies at high health (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: Targets above 65% max health are considered to be at high health.

nodes.name: Lead the Charge
nodes.description: You grant other nearby allies {Haste} at the end of the charge for a short duration based on distance traveled, up to a maximum.
nodes.altText: This does not grant you Haste, but does affect your minions.

nodes.name: Endless Will
nodes.description: {Warrior's Renewal} recovers an additional amount of Lunge's cooldown and also grants you health when it triggers.

skills.name: Maelstrom
skills.description:
Surrounds you with a freezing Maelstrom that deals cold damage over time to nearby enemies.

Can be cast repeatedly to create multiple maelstroms at once. Each Maelstrom lasts 7 seconds.
skills.altText:
Each Maelstrom has a base freeze rate per second of 24.

Added spell damage applies to each Maelstrom at 80% effectiveness per second.

nodes.name: Turmoil
nodes.description: Maelstrom deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Storm's Aid
nodes.description: You can choose to cast Maelstrom on your minions instead of yourself.

nodes.name: Vortex
nodes.description: Maelstrom deals more damage when cast on a totem (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Grip of Chaos
nodes.description:
When your number of Maelstrom stacks reaches 0, you have a chance to summon 2 to 4 {Twisters,} a spell that deals physical damage each second to enemies they pass through.

The number of Twisters is random, and the chance to summon them is multiplied by the highest number of stacks you reached.

stats.statName: Chance To Summon Twisters Upon Reaching 0 Stacks

nodes.name: Arctic Chill
nodes.description: Maelstrom has a chance to chill enemies each second.

nodes.name: Tsunami
nodes.description: When your number of Maelstrom stacks reaches 0, you release a {Tsunami,} a cold spell that deals damage multiplied by your highest stack count.

nodes.name: Typhoon
nodes.description: Maelstrom and {Tsunami} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Maelstrom stacks have a shorter duration.

nodes.name: Healing Winds
nodes.description: Maelstrom also heals allies in its area of effect each second.

nodes.name: Violent Squall
nodes.description: Maelstrom deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has significantly increased healing effectiveness, but you can have only one maximum stack of Maelstrom.

nodes.name: Eye of the Storm
nodes.description: Maelstrom deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but in a smaller area.

nodes.name: Arctic Blast
nodes.description: Maelstrom has an increased chance to freeze enemies each second.

nodes.name: Beneath The Waves
nodes.description: If you go one second without directly casting Maelstrom you gain a stack of {Lagon's Slumber}. When you next cast Maelstrom directly, all stacks of {Lagon's Slumber} are consumed to cast Maelstrom an additional time per stack.

stats.statName: Extra Casts per Stack of Lagon's Slumber

nodes.name: Calm
nodes.description: Maelstrom costs less mana.

nodes.name: Sleet-Footed
