nodes.description: Each stack of Maelstrom grants you additional dodge chance.

nodes.name: Cyclone
nodes.description:
Maelstrom's base cold damage is converted to physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to cold damage.

Chill chance from this tree is converted to slow chance.

Maelstrom can no longer freeze, but each stack of Maelstrom grants increased physical damage.

stats.statName: Global Increased Physical Damage Per Maelstrom Stack

nodes.name: Whirlpool
nodes.description: Maelstrom stacks have a longer duration.

nodes.name: Power of the Storm
nodes.description: While you have 6 or more stacks, you cast {Storm Bolt} at a nearby enemy each second.
nodes.altText: Storm Bolt scales with increased spell damage and lightning damage, but not with other nodes on this tree.

stats.statName: Storm Bolt Cast Each Second At 6 Or More Stacks

nodes.name: Strong Tides
nodes.description: {Power of The Storm's} stack requirement is reduced.

nodes.name: Energized
nodes.description: {Storm Bolt} from the {Power of the Storm} node is cast at additional targets.
nodes.altText: Storm Bolt scales with increased spell damage and lightning damage, but not with other nodes on this tree.

nodes.name: Turbulence
nodes.description: Maelstrom deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). This bonus is doubled if you have at least 60 Attunement.

nodes.name: Gathering Storm
nodes.description: Killing an enemy has a chance to create a stack of Maelstrom. This effect has a 2 second cooldown.

stats.statName: Chance On Kill To Cast Maelstrom

nodes.name: Windswept
nodes.description: If you have 6 stacks of Maelstrom or more, you gain {Haste.}

nodes.name: Windfury
nodes.description: If you have 6 stacks of Maelstrom or more, you gain {Frenzy.}

nodes.name: Essence of Debris
nodes.description: Each stack of Maelstrom grants you an increased chance to stun enemies.
nodes.altText: Maelstrom itself cannot stun, .

stats.statName: Global Increased Stun Chance Per Stack

nodes.name: Frozen Abyss
nodes.description: Maelstrom deals more damage to chilled or frozen enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: If an enemy is chilled and frozen, both modifiers apply multiplicatively.

skills.name: Manifest Armor
skills.description:
Manifests an animated set of heavy armor, which attacks slowly.

Stats granted by your body armor, helmet, gloves and boots also apply to your Manifest Armor.
skills.altText:
Manifested Armors have 400 base health.

Manifest Armor has a 30% chance to retaliate with {Forge Nova} when hit. This effect deals 40 spell fire damage with added damage applying at 200% effectiveness, applies fire resistance shred to enemies hit and has a 2 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Platemail
nodes.description: Manifested Armor gains increased effect of stats from your body armor.

nodes.name: Force of Impact
nodes.description: Your Manifest Armor gains melee physical damage equal to a proportion of the armour on your body armour.

stats.statName: Melee Physical Damage per 10 Armor On Chest

nodes.name: Bulwark
nodes.description: Manifested Armor has more health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Shield-Bearer
nodes.description: Manifested Armor gains a shield which scales with the stats of your equipped shield.

nodes.name: Self Repair
nodes.description: Manifested Armor gains additional health regeneration.

nodes.name: Lambent Metal
nodes.description: Manifested Armor gains increased effect for health regeneration from all items that affect Manifest Armor.

nodes.name: Vengeful Guardian
nodes.description: Manifested Armor reflects a percentage of damage to attackers.

nodes.name: Thornmail
nodes.description: Manifested Armor reflects damage back to attackers for an amount equal to your attunement.

stats.statName: Damage Reflected Per Point Of Attunement

nodes.name: Great Helm
nodes.description: Manifested Armor gains increased effect of stats from your helmet.

nodes.name: Burning Armor
nodes.description: Manifested Armor deals additional melee and spell fire damage.

nodes.name: Blast Forge
nodes.description: Manifested Armor now also attacks with {Forgebreath}, a fire spell that deals 60 fire damage to all enemies in a cone in front of it. 3 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Bellow
nodes.description: {Forgebreath} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.
nodes.altText: {Forgebreath} is a spell that deals 60 fire damage to all enemies hit.

nodes.name: Forged Fire
nodes.description: {Forgebreath} has additional ignite chance and a shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: Heated Metal
nodes.description: Manifested Armor's melee attacks have a chance to ignite enemies.

nodes.name: Whirlwind
nodes.description:
Manifested Armor gains the ability to use {Whirlwind Strike}, a spinning attack which hits all nearby enemies multiple times and travels a short distance. 

It has a 10 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Steel Greaves
nodes.description: Manifested Armor gains increased effect of stats from your boots.

nodes.name: Warstomp
nodes.description: Manifested Armor has a chance to taunt nearby enemies each second.

nodes.name: Thick Padding
nodes.description: Manifested Armor cannot be stunned.

nodes.name: Dash Boots
nodes.description: Manifested Armor gains a charge ability, which deals physical damage and knocks back any enemy it passes through. 6 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Lethargy
nodes.description: Manifested Armor has a chance to slow attacking enemies when hit.

nodes.name: Iron Grasp
nodes.description: Manifested Armor gains increased effect of stats from your gloves.

nodes.name: Sharpened Metal
nodes.description: Manifested Armor's melee physical attacks have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Sharper Metal
nodes.description: Manifested Armor deals more physical damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Bladed Armour
nodes.description: Manifested Armor's melee attacks have a chance to reduce enemy armor.

nodes.name: Redistributed Steel
nodes.description: Manifested Armor deals more damage, but has less health and armor (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Titan Sword
nodes.description: Manifested Armor gains a sword which scales with your equipped weapon's stats.

skills.name: Marrow Shards
skills.description: Fires sharpened bones from your body. The bones pierce through enemies inflicting physical damage. Instead of mana, this spell costs 9% of your current health.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 125% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Marrow Shards
nodes.loreText: Any bones, any marrow, can be your tools, even your own.

nodes.name: Bone Knives
nodes.description: Marrow Shards and {Bone Splinters} hits deal significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Marrow Shards no longer pierces.

nodes.name: Marrow Hunger
nodes.description: You leech a portion of physical damage (past 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Splintering Impact
nodes.description: Marrow Shards creates {Bone Splinters} in a cone behind the enemy when destroyed, damaging other enemies, but Marrow Shards no longer pierces and costs more health.
nodes.altText: {Bone Splinters} scale with increases to physical damage and spell damage, but not with other nodes on this tree unless stated otherwise.

nodes.name: Carving
nodes.description: {Bone Splinters} deal more damage.

nodes.name: Ghost Splinters
nodes.description: {Bone Splinters} travel faster and further.
nodes.altText: {Bone Splinters} scale with increases to physical damage and spell damage, but not with other nodes on this tree unless stated otherwise.

nodes.name: Gouging Splinters
nodes.description: {Bone Splinters} have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Crimson Ivory
nodes.description: {Bone Splinters} hits deal more damage against bleeding enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Dark Precision
nodes.description: Improves {Bone Splinters'} base critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Ivory Obliteration
nodes.description: {Bone Splinters} critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Dead Weight
nodes.description: Marrow Shards and {Bone Splinters} hits deal more damage, but Marrow Shards travels less far.

nodes.name: Blood Assassin
nodes.description: Marrow Shards and {Bone Splinters} have improved base critical strike chance and critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Marrow Death
nodes.description: Marrow Shards and {Bone Splinters} deal more damage with critical strikes.

nodes.name: Femoral Offering
nodes.description: Marrow Shards and {Bone Splinters} critical strikes deal more damage, but you lose health when you critically strike with Marrow Shards.

nodes.name: Twin Malevolence
nodes.description:
If you have exactly two minions when you cast Marrow Shards, you have increased critical strike chance for 2 seconds. 

You cannot have multiple instances of this buff at once.

nodes.name: Bone Splinters
nodes.description: Marrow Shards creates {Bone Splinters} in a cone when destroyed, which damage enemies, but Marrow Shards travels less far and costs more health.
nodes.altText: {Bone Splinters} scale with increases to physical damage and spell damage, but not with other nodes on this tree unless stated otherwise.

nodes.name: Marrow Caster
nodes.description: Marrow Shards are destroyed at the location you target if it is within their maximum range. Marrow Shards costs more health.

nodes.name: Ossumancy
nodes.description: When you directly cast Marrow Shards, you have a chance to immediately cast a second instance of Marrow Shards. The additional cast does cost health.

nodes.name: Shredding Bones
nodes.description: Marrow Shards and {Bone Splinters} hits have a chance to shred enemy armor.

nodes.name: Apathy
nodes.description:
Marrow Shards and {Bone Splinters} deal more damage, but Marrow Shards can hit and damage your own minions. 

On hit effects, such .

nodes.name: Treachery
nodes.description: You gain health when you kill one of your own minions.

nodes.name: Dark Reverie
nodes.description: Grants you increased critical strike chance if you have killed with Marrow Shards or {Bone Splinters} recently (past 4 seconds).
nodes.altText: {Bone Splinters} scale with increases to physical damage and spell damage, but not with other nodes on this tree unless stated otherwise.

nodes.name: Blood Reverie
nodes.description: You leech a portion of physical damage (past 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Soul Blood
nodes.description: Marrow Shards and {Bone Splinters} have a chance to cause enemies to bleed, but Marrow Shards costs more health.

nodes.name: Bones Of The Follower
nodes.description: Marrow Shards hits deal significantly more damage, but consumes one of your minions when you cast it.
nodes.altText: The damage bonus is only gained if a minion is consumed.

nodes.name: Rip Marrow
nodes.description: Marrow Shards has a chance to create a {Marrow Orb} on hit that returns 15 health to you.
nodes.altText: {Marrow Orbs} are a bloody projectile which restores health upon returning to you.

nodes.name: Marrow Eater
nodes.description: {Marrow Orbs} return more health.
nodes.altText: {Marrow Orbs} are a bloody projectile which restores health upon returning to you.

nodes.name: Life Blood
nodes.description: Marrow Shards hits have a higher chance to create a {Marrow Orb}.
nodes.altText: {Marrow Orbs} are a bloody projectile which restores health upon returning to you.

nodes.name: Spirit Feast
nodes.description: {Marrow Orbs} have a chance to also replenish mana.
nodes.altText: {Marrow Orbs} are a bloody projectile which restores health upon returning to you.

stats.statName: Marrow Orb Chance To Gain Mana

nodes.name: Demise
nodes.description: Marrow Shards hits deal more damage against bleeding enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

skills.name: Maul
skills.description: Jump forward a short distance and slam into the ground dealing damage to nearby enemies.
skills.altText: Added melee damage applies at 250% effectiveness.

skills.name: Multishot
skills.description:
Requires a bow.

A bow attack that fires a cone of 5 arrows in the target direction. Aiming the cursor further from your character reduces the spread.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 120% effectiveness

nodes.name: Efficient Draw
nodes.description: Multishot costs less mana.

nodes.name: Strong Pull
nodes.description: Multishot deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Bodkin Points
nodes.description: Multishot has a chance to apply armor shred on hit.

nodes.name: Readied Arrows
nodes.description: Multishot has a chance to be shot when you use another bow attack with increased chance to stun, but it costs significantly more mana.

nodes.name: Hang Loose
nodes.description: Multishot has increased attack speed and chance to gain {Haste} when you use or proc Multishot.

nodes.name: Point Blank
nodes.description: Multishot deals more hit damage to close targets (multiplicative with other modifiers) falling off rapidly, but deals less hit damage to far away targets (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Less Hit Damage To Far Away Targets

nodes.name: Back to Back
nodes.description: Every 8 attacks with Multishot is a double shot.

nodes.name: Repeater Bow
nodes.description: Reduce the amount of attacks to double shoot with Multishot.

nodes.name: Quick Draw
nodes.description: Multishot has increased attack speed.

nodes.name: Piercing Shots
nodes.description: Multishot arrows pierce enemies (continue through enemies hit) up to a limit.

nodes.name: Critical Arrows
nodes.description: Multishot's critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Stand My Ground
nodes.description: Multishot deals more damage if you haven't moved in the past second (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Hit 'n' Run
nodes.description: You have a chance to gain {Haste} for 2 seconds when {Stand My Ground} is activated.

nodes.name: True Strikes
nodes.description: Multishot has increased critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Large Quiver
nodes.description: Multishot has additional arrows, but costs more mana.

nodes.name: Heavy Arrows
nodes.description: Multishot deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but hits in a smaller cone and can only shoot a maximum of 3 arrows.

nodes.name: Toxic Gift
nodes.description: Multishot has a chance to poison on hit, but can no longer cause slow.

nodes.name: Rain of Arrows
nodes.description: Multishot hits in a wider cone.

nodes.name: No Easy Way Out
nodes.description: Multishot has a chance to slow on hit.

nodes.name: Pinning Shots
nodes.description: Multishot deals more hit damage to slowed targets (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: The Maj'Elkan Grasp
nodes.description: Multishot has increased slow and bleed duration per point of Dexterity.

nodes.name: Pincushion
nodes.description: Multishot has a chance to reset slow and chill duration on hit.

stats.statName: Slow And Chill Duration Reset Chance

nodes.name: Keep Pushing 'em Around
nodes.description: Multishot has a chance to knock enemies on hit.

nodes.name: Won't Back Down
nodes.description: When you are out of mana Multishot is free to use, but you can only shoot a maximum of 1 arrow. Other bonuses still apply.

nodes.name: Sniping
nodes.description: Multishot deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and arrows travel faster.

nodes.name: Giant Slayer
nodes.description: Multishot arrows from the same attack can hit the same target and have an increased chance to stun enemies, but {Multishot} deals significantly less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Projectiles Can Hit The Same Target

skills.name: Multistrike
skills.description:
A melee attack that grants a stack of {Armament} if you hit at least one enemy.

Armament stacks up to 2 times and each stack lasts 3 seconds.

Each stack of {Armament} causes an additional sword to strike a nearby enemy when you use Multistrike.
skills.altText:
Additional swords cannot target the enemy you initially hit or enemies targeted by other swords.

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Way of the Sword
nodes.description: Armament stacks last longer and grant you additional melee physical damage per stack.

nodes.name: Guarding Stance
nodes.description: You have additional armor and block effectiveness per stack of Armament.

nodes.name: Bladed Focus
nodes.description: When you drop below 0 mana, you consume all stacks of Armament to restore mana per stack.

nodes.name: Flanking Strikes
nodes.description: When you have 0 stacks of Armament you have an additional sword when using Multistrike, .

nodes.name: Hallowed Arsenal
nodes.description:
Each additional sword is replaced with {Smite}.

Smite cast this way costs its full mana cost per cast.

nodes.name: Vengeful
nodes.description:
You have a chance to retaliate with Multistrike swords on block. 

This effect has a 3 second cooldown and doesn't include the initial strike.

nodes.name: Echoed Warfare
nodes.description: Multistrike attacks repeated by your {Echoes} have additional swords.
nodes.altText:
This only affects the echoed Multistrike, not the original use.

Echoing is a Void Knight mastery bonus. It grants you a chance for your attacks to repeat after a second. This node's echo bonus has no effect unless become a Void Knight.

nodes.name: Initiate
nodes.description: The initial strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Path of the Knight
nodes.description: Multistrike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 30 armor, up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Heated Forge
nodes.description: Directly using {Forge Strike} consumes all stacks of Armament to summon additional {Forged Weapons} per stack.

nodes.name: Forgemastery
nodes.description: Multistrike has a chance to consume a stack of Armament while at maximum stacks to summon a {Forged Weapon}.

nodes.name: Hack and Slash
nodes.description: You now strike twice with Multistrike, but the full attack takes significantly longer. Each additional sword is now replaced with an axe that strikes its target twice.
nodes.altText: This effect still counts .

nodes.name: Alpha Cuts
nodes.description: Improves Multistrike's base critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Bladestorm
nodes.description: Multistrike consumes mana per stack of Armament to refresh existing stacks and create an additional sword per stack.
nodes.altText: This effect only works while you are on positive mana.

nodes.name: Relentless Advance
nodes.description: Multistrike has increased attack speed.

nodes.name: Determination
nodes.description: Multistrike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) while you are at maximum stacks of Armament.

nodes.name: Blitz
nodes.description: Multistrike penetrates enemy physical resistance.

nodes.name: Decimate
nodes.description: Multistrike hits have a chance to bleed enemies per stack of Armament.

nodes.name: Guillotine
nodes.description: Multistrike deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of bleed up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Jousting
nodes.description:
Each additional sword is replaced with a spear, which stabs in an elongated area rather than a slash.

This has no effect if swords are already converted to axes.

nodes.name: Sweeping Blows
nodes.description: Created swords can strike enemies further away.

nodes.name: Victory Strikes
nodes.description:
If a sword kills an enemy it will create an additional sword to strike another enemy.

This effect cannot be triggered from additional swords created this way.

nodes.name: Perfect Steel
nodes.description: You can have an additional maximum stack of Armament.

nodes.name: Doctrine of the Anvil
nodes.description: You can have an additional maximum stack of Armament, but Multistrike has less attack speed per stack (multipicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Fiery Justice
nodes.description: While at maximum stacks of Armament and positive mana, attacking with Multistrike will consume all stacks and 40 mana to use {Forge Strike}.

nodes.name: Aggressive Cadence
nodes.description: Multistrike has an additional sword while you are at maximum stacks of Armament and wielding a two-handed weapon.

stats.statName: Additional Sword At Max Stacks With 2h

nodes.name: Nullifying Carve
nodes.description: {Void Cleave} consumes all stacks of Armament to gain more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and increased area per stack consumed.

skills.name: Net
skills.description: Leaps backwards and throws a net which snares enemies and deals physical damage. Netted bosses and rare enemies have 35% less movement speed, and other enemies are immobilized.
skills.altText:
Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness.
Nets last 3-5 seconds at random on each enemy.

nodes.name: Rending Wires
nodes.description: Net's hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Advanced Engineering
nodes.description: Net snares enemies in a larger area.

nodes.name: Surprise Snare
nodes.description: Net's hits cannot be dodged.

nodes.name: Tanglewire
nodes.description: Net's hits slows enemies.

nodes.name: Tangled and Prone
nodes.description: Netted enemies and enemies slowed by the {Tanglewire} node cannot dodge and cannot avoid critical strikes.
nodes.altText: This overrides enemies' chance to dodge or avoid crits.

nodes.name: Leading the Hunt
nodes.description: Using Net grants you the {Huntress Advantage} buff for a short duration, granting you more global damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) against slowed or immobilized enemies.

nodes.name: Quick Throws
nodes.description: While you have {Huntress Advantage} you now also have global increased throwing attack speed.

nodes.name: Barbed Net
nodes.description: Net causes enemies to take physical damage over time and caused them to bleed each second.

nodes.name: Voltaic Device
nodes.description:
Net's base physical damage is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Bleed chance on hit from all sources is converted to lightning resistance shred for Net.

Additionally, Net deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per global shock chance.

Swaps Net's {Physical} tag for a {Lightning} tag.

nodes.name: Trapper's Crescendo
nodes.description: Net deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 100 dodge rating.

nodes.name: Curved Hooks
nodes.description: Net deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and bleeds that it inflicts last longer.

nodes.name: Acid Snare
nodes.description:
Net's base physical damage is converted to poison. Consequently this damage scales with increases to poison damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Bleed chance on hit from all sources is converted to poison chance for Net.

Net gains the {Poison} tag.

nodes.name: Bold Throw
nodes.description: You no longer flip back when using Net.

nodes.name: Net Trap
nodes.description:
Net now throws a trap that releases a net at a nearby enemy when it triggers.

You can have a maximum of 6 Net Traps active at once and they last up to 30 seconds.
nodes.altText: If you reach your maximum number of active traps, throwing additional traps will destroy the oldest traps without detonating them.

nodes.name: Spear Trap
nodes.description:
Net Traps now also use {Puncture} for you when they are triggered. This will use the melee or bow version of Puncture depending on your equipped weapon.

This consumes mana equal to a portion of {Puncture's} mana cost.
nodes.altText: If Puncture has no mana cost this effect would still cost 0 mana. 115% of 0 is still 0.

nodes.name: Server of Tricks
nodes.description: You now throw additional Net traps with each throw, but Net costs additional mana.

nodes.name: Trickster Artist
nodes.description: When using Net you drop {Caltrops} at your starting location after jumping.

nodes.name: Zone of Control
nodes.description: {Caltrops} from all sources deal damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Silvered Spikes
nodes.description: Improves {Caltrops'} base critical strike chance from all sources per 10% global slow chance.

stats.statName: Caltrops Crit Chance Per 10% Slow Chance

nodes.name: Tinkerer's Combo
nodes.description:
If Net hits an enemy you now also throw {Caltrops} at your target location where the Net hits.

This effect can occur once per 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Agile Hunter
nodes.description: You jump further when using Net.

nodes.name: Assault of the Huntress
nodes.description: You now jump forwards when using Net instead of backwards and it is thrown behind you.

nodes.name: Into the Shadows
nodes.description: When directly using Net you now throw a {Smoke Bomb} after jumping.
nodes.altText: This effect only works if Smoke Bomb is off cooldown.

nodes.name: Strongly Woven
nodes.description: Net snares enemies for a longer duration.

nodes.name: Hunters of Heorot
nodes.description:
Net's hits chill bosses and rare enemies while other enemies are stunned for a short duration. Additionally, you gain mana for each moving enemy hit.

This effect adds a 10 second cooldown.

stats.statName: Chill Stacks On Bosses And Rares

nodes.name: Engineering Smarts
nodes.description: Net has a shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: Acrobatic
nodes.description:
You now jump further when using Net and it has a reduced cooldown.

Net gains the {Traversal} tag.

nodes.name: Entangled Weapons
nodes.description: Netted enemies deal less physical damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Exposed Bait
nodes.description: Your {Falcon} deals more global damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to netted enemies.

nodes.name: Weakening Threads
nodes.description: Net's hits apply frailty to enemies.

skills.name: Profane Veil
skills.description:
Channel to conceal yourself within a Profane Veil that deals necrotic damage over time to enemies around you. While concealed you dodge every Hit, but you can still take damage from damage over time effects, such as ailments, and you move more slowly.

Last for up to 2 seconds (also ends when you release the key). Cooldown does not recover during use.
skills.altText:
You have 40% less movement speed while channeling (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Added spell damage applies at 200% effectiveness per second.

nodes.name: Discourage
nodes.description: Profane Veil's area has a chance to slow enemies each second. Additionally, you leech a portion of the global damage you deal .

nodes.name: Heretic's Flame
nodes.description:
Profane Veil's base necrotic damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to necrotic damage.

Profane Form now has a chance to ignite enemies each second.

Swaps Profane Form's {Necrotic} tag for a {Fire} tag.

nodes.name: Hell Fire
nodes.description: While in Profane Veil you gain a percentage of your damned, bleed, poison, slow and ignite chance on hit .

nodes.name: Propane Form
nodes.description:
You move faster equal to a portion of your chance to ignite on hit up to a maximum, but Profane Veil has a shorter duration per chance to ignite on hit up to a maximum.

Profane Veil gains the {Traversal} tag.

nodes.name: Infernal Deliverance
nodes.description:
When you first damage an enemy with Profane Veil you have a chance to cast {Infernal Shade} on them.

This effect can occur a maximum amount of times per cast of Profane Veil.

nodes.name: Mire of Words
nodes.description: Profane Veil Immobilizes {Cursed} enemies for a short duration, but Bosses and Rare enemies will instead be chilled, rather than Immobilized.

stats.statName: Chill stacks on Cursed Rares and Bosses

nodes.name: Scorn
nodes.description: You deal more global damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to {Cursed} enemies while in Profane Veil.

nodes.name: Stream of Profanity
nodes.description:
Directly casting a {Curse} skill reduces Profane Veil's remaining cooldown.

This effect can occur a maximum number of times.

nodes.name: Sable Inquisition
nodes.description: Profane Veil affects a larger area.

nodes.name: Profane Instruments
nodes.description:
Profane Veil gains additional effects depending on the weapon type you are wielding. 

{Staff}: Increased area.
{Wand}: More damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
{Scepter}: Increased duration.
{Dagger}: Increased movement speed.
{Axe}: Kill threshold.

nodes.name: Visage of Terror
nodes.description: You now fear nearby enemies for a short duration when you exit Profane Veil. Additionally, Profane Veil deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to feared or slowed enemies for the same duration.

nodes.name: Spirit Plate
nodes.description: Damage reduction from armor now also applies to damage over time taken while in Profane Veil.

nodes.name: Seance
nodes.description:
When a {Wandering Spirit} is revealed inside Profane Veil's area the {Spirit} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area for the rest of the {Spirit's} duration. 

Additionally, for each {Spirit} revealed inside Profane Veil's area you gain ward per uncapped necrotic resistance.

stats.statName: Ward Gain per 5% Uncapped Necrotic Res

nodes.name: Derision
nodes.description: You gain ward per dexterity when you dodge while in Profane Veil.

stats.statName: Ward Gain on Dodge per Dex

nodes.name: Eternal Blasphemy
nodes.description: Profane Veil lasts longer and you move faster while in it.

nodes.name: Singleminded
nodes.description:
While in Profane Veil you move faster and it has a shorter cooldown, but you can no longer change direction while concealed and it has a shorter duration without being able to extend its duration.

Profane Veil gains the {Traversal} tag.

nodes.name: Vampiric Pool
nodes.description: Profane Veil's area now consumes your minions, and consuming minions this way grants you ward equal to a portion of their maximum health .

stats.statName: Portion of Minion health to Ward Gain

nodes.name: Apocalypse
nodes.description:
You now summon {Volatile Zombies} when you exit Profane Veil equal to the number of minions consumed up to a maximum from the {Vampiric Pool} node.

{Zombies} summoned deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area per Intelligence.

nodes.name: Omnivore
nodes.description:
The benefits from the {Vampiric Pool} and {Apocalypse} nodes now also trigger when you kill enemies with Profane Veil.

The limit from {Vampiric Pool} remains the same.

nodes.name: Lake of Blood
nodes.description:
Profane Veil's base necrotic damage is converted to physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to necrotic damage.

Profane Veil deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 10% global Bleed chance on hit.

Swaps Profane Veil's {Necrotic} tag for a {Physical} tag.

nodes.name: Desecrated Graves
nodes.description: You now cast {Bone Curse} when you enter and exit Profane Veil.
nodes.altText: If you have the {Forked Tongue} node then this also casts {Bone Curse} at the second area.

stats.statName: Bone Curse on you on Enter or Exit
Bone Curse at Target Location with Forked Tongue

nodes.name: Forked Tongue
nodes.description: You now create a secondary Profane Veil area that is detached from you and moves towards enemies, but Profane Veil now has a higher mana cost.
nodes.altText: The secondary area has the same movespeed .

nodes.name: Second Rites
nodes.description: The secondary area from {Forked Tongue} is now created at the target location, but Profane Veil costs additional mana.

nodes.name: Harsh Words
nodes.description: Profane Veil costs less mana and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Grave Circle
nodes.description: Profane Veil's area now applies {Mark for Death} to enemies, but entering Profane Veil applies {Mark for Death} to you.

nodes.name: Mark of the Rat
nodes.description: When you apply {Mark for Death} to an enemy or yourself by any method, all your stacks of damned and poison on them spread to a number of nearby enemies.

stats.statName: Damned Spreads with Mark for Death
Poison Spreads with Mark for Death

nodes.name: Profane Orbs
nodes.description: While in Profane Veil, you consume 6 mana to cast a {Profane Orb} each second that seek out enemies.
nodes.altText: The Orb is affected by damage conversion nodes.

nodes.name: Hex Flurry
nodes.description: Increases the frequency of {Profane Orb} per 1% increased cast speed for {Curses} you have. Additionally, {Profane Orb} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per {Curse} on the target.
nodes.altText: This includes global cast speed.

stats.statName: Profane Orb Frequency per 1% Cast Speed

nodes.name: Loose Tongue
nodes.description: Profane Veil costs less mana.

nodes.name: Penitent Tangent
nodes.description: Profane Veil's area inflicts {Penance} to enemies, which is a {Curse} that causes enemies to take fire damage when they hit a target. Additionally Penance deals more damage per 1% of Damage Reflected (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Penance Damage per 1% of Damage Refelcted

nodes.name: Unholy Renewal
nodes.description: You now cleanse all negative ailments on you when you enter Profane Veil.

skills.name: Puncture
skills.description: An extended melee stab or piercing bow attack that has a 30% chance to inflict bleed on hit. Bleeds inflicted by puncture have 30% increased duration.
skills.altText:
When using a bow, Puncture deals 5% less damage to each subsequent enemy hit up to 20% less damage.

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Puncture
nodes.description: An extended melee stab or piercing bow attack that causes enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Perforate
nodes.description: Puncture has a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Timing
nodes.description: Puncture deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Stay of Execution
nodes.description:
Puncture can be charged up, causing Puncture with a melee weapon to deal damage in a larger area and causes Puncture with a bow to deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per second charged.

After 1 second it releases automatically.

nodes.name: Splinter
nodes.description: Puncture has a chance to shred enemy physical resistance.

nodes.name: Thrill of Anticipation
nodes.description: Puncture deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per second charged.

nodes.name: Press The Attack
nodes.description: Attacking with Puncture and hitting at least one enemy grants {Frenzy} for a short duration.

nodes.name: Efficacious Toxin
nodes.description: Puncture has a chance to apply {Efficacious Toxin} on hit, causing them to take increased damage over time.

nodes.name: Toxic Delivery
nodes.description: Puncture has a chance to poison on hit.

nodes.name: Penumbral Ambush
nodes.description: Directly using Puncture causes several {Mirages} to briefly appear at either side of you, attacking in the same direction .

nodes.name: Bloodthirst
nodes.description: Directly using Puncture and hitting at least one enemy grants you {Bleeding Fury}, a buff that grants bleed chance and stacks up to 3 times. Each stack falls off after 3 seconds of not attacking.

nodes.name: Hunger
nodes.description: {Bleeding Fury} can have more maximum stacks.

nodes.name: Shatter
nodes.description:
Puncture has a chance to shred enemy armor. 

Armor Shred applied by Puncture has increased effect.

nodes.name: Death's Imprint
nodes.description: Puncture has a chance to apply a {Shadow Dagger} on hit.

nodes.name: Inescapable
nodes.description: Puncture deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of slow on the target.

nodes.name: Seized Prey
nodes.description: Puncture hits deal more damage against slowed and {Immobilized} targets (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: {Immobilized} targets are unable to move for 1 second.

nodes.name: Scalebane
nodes.description:
Converts bleed chance from all sources to poison chance.
Converts physical resistance shred from all sources to poison resistance shred. Poison applied by Puncture has increased duration.

nodes.name: Mind Piercer
nodes.description: Directly using Puncture and hitting at least one enemy restores mana. Puncture also has physical penetration based on your maximum mana.

nodes.name: Cross Forward
nodes.description: When used with a melee weapon Puncture has increased range.

nodes.name: Redouble
nodes.description: When used with a bow, Puncture deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per enemy pierced.

nodes.name: Debilitation
nodes.description: Puncture hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per unique negative ailment on the target.

nodes.name: Night's Descent
nodes.description: If you use Puncture with a bow while you have a {Black Arrow}, Puncture charges 100% faster and blinds on hit.
nodes.altText: If your maximum charge is 1 second, this will reduce the time it takes to reach maximum charge to 0.5 seconds, but you will still benefit .

nodes.name: Sealed Fate
nodes.description: Every 10 seconds, your next Puncture {Immobilizes} enemies on hit, causing them to be unable to move for 1 second.

nodes.name: Cadence of Death
nodes.description: Every third Puncture deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and in a larger area.

nodes.name: Sanguine Obsession
nodes.description:
Converts poison chance from all sources to bleed chance.

This has no effect if you have {Scalebane}.

nodes.name: Mutilate
nodes.description: Instead of applying bleed, the greater Puncture consumes all stacks of bleed on the target, causing them to deal damage immediately and restoring health per stack consumed.

nodes.name: Rapid Strikes
nodes.description: Every 4 seconds your first few direct uses of Puncture are rapid strikes, which have increased attack speed.
nodes.altText: The 4 second timer to reset your number of Rapid Strike starts after the first Rapid Strike.

skills.name: Rampage
skills.description:
The companion ability of your Primal Raptor.

Sends your Raptor into a rampage. Your raptor gains 40% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and 40% increased attack speed, cast speed, movement speed, and size for 4 seconds
skills.altText: Scales with your Raptor's stats rather than yours

skills.name: Rampage
skills.description: Charge towards a target location dealing damage and knocking back enemies in your path.
skills.altText: Rampage's cooldown does not recover while you are using it.

skills.name: Reap
skills.description: Dash a short distance in the target direction using your scythes to strike all enemies in your path. Restores 15 health for each enemy hit.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

skills.name: Rebuke
skills.description:
Hold ability key to channel for up to 2 seconds. You take 80% less damage while channelling.

When you stop channelling the barrier breaks dealing physical damage to all nearby enemies. This deals 20 additional physical damage for each hit you received while channelling.
skills.altText:
You cannot be stunned while channelling.

Added spell damage is applied at 200% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Rebuke
nodes.loreText: As they sow, so shall they reap.

nodes.name: Regenerative Shell
nodes.description: You have increased health regeneration while channelling Rebuke.

nodes.name: Mystic Aegis
nodes.description: Rebuke has a shorter cooldown, but costs more mana.

nodes.name: Brave the Elements
nodes.description: You take less elemental damage while channelling Rebuke (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Augmented Plating
nodes.description: You have more armor (multiplicative with other modifiers) while channelling Rebuke.

nodes.name: Bide
nodes.description: Rebuke's maximum duration is increased, allowing you to absorb more damage.

nodes.name: Burst of Speed
nodes.description: After you finish channelling Rebuke you gain the {Haste} buff, attack speed, and cast speed for a duration equal to half the duration you channelled Rebuke for.

nodes.name: Redemption
nodes.description: You heal yourself and nearby allies each second while channelling Rebuke.

nodes.name: Solemn Vow
nodes.description: Buffs via the {Burst of Speed} and {Protective Legacy} nodes last longer after you finish channelling Rebuke.

nodes.name: Battle Meditation
nodes.description: You have increased mana regeneration while channelling Rebuke.

nodes.name: Retaliation
nodes.description: Rebuke hits deal more damage, and Rebuke hits in a larger area.

nodes.name: Wildfire Shell
nodes.description: While channelling Rebuke, you have a chance to apply {Spreading Flames} to nearby enemies each second.
nodes.altText: This chance is rolled individually for each nearby enemy.

nodes.name: Singed Shield
nodes.description: You have a chance to ignite nearby enemies each second while channelling Rebuke.

nodes.name: Unforge
nodes.description: You have a chance to reduce nearby enemy armor each second while channelling Rebuke.

nodes.name: Lingering Ailments
nodes.description: Ignite, armor shred, and spreading flames applied to enemies while channelling Rebuke last longer.

nodes.name: Dark Thoughts
nodes.description: Rebuke hits deal additional base void damage.

nodes.name: Voidfused Barrier
nodes.description:
Rebuke hits have a chance to grant you a {Void Essence}.

Void Essences last 7 seconds and grant 15% increased void damage, 15% increased melee damage, and 10% reduced stun duration.

You can have a maximum of 3 Void Essences at once.

nodes.name: Infinite Guardian
nodes.description: Rebuke has an increased maximum duration, allowing you to absorb more damage, but has a longer cooldown.

nodes.name: Accelerated Healing
nodes.description: While channeling Rebuke the healing from the {Redemption} node increases each second.

nodes.name: War Priest
nodes.description: Healing via the {Redemption} node now also scales with your attunement.

stats.statName: Increased Healing Per Point Of Attunement

nodes.name: Protective Legacy
nodes.description: The buffs you are granted via the {Augmented Plating} and {Brave the Elements} nodes now persist after you finish channelling Rebuke. Their duration is equal to half the duration you channelled Rebuke for.

nodes.name: Inner Focus
nodes.description: Regenerate mana when you are hit while channelling Rebuke.

nodes.name: Reclaimed Refuge
nodes.description:
You reduce a portion of Rebuke's remaining cooldown when you use a different melee attack and hit at least one enemy.

This effect can only occur a limited number of times per use of Rebuke, and the effect is doubled while wielding a two handed weapon.

nodes.name: Stoic Challenge
nodes.description: Rebuke now has an additonal charge.

skills.name: Ring Of Shields
skills.description:
Manifests a ring of shields around you.

Each shield has 75 base health and lasts up to 10 seconds. Shields draw enemy aggression and block projectiles.

Stats on your equipped shield also apply to the shields created by Ring of Shields

nodes.name: Reinforcement
nodes.description: You summon additional shields.

nodes.name: Healing Shields
nodes.description: Every 6 seconds each Shield heals nearby allies.

nodes.name: Phalanx
nodes.description: When Shields heal allies, they also increase their armor for 4 seconds. This effect does not stack.

nodes.name: Sturdy Shields
nodes.description: When Shields heal allies, they also grant them a non stacking increased block effectiveness buff for 4 seconds.
nodes.altText: You can only receive buffs from a single shield at a time. Increasing the number of shields will not increase the stats received. Shields do also buff each other.

nodes.name: On the Path
nodes.description: While using {Warpath}, your Shields spin faster and take less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Aegis of Life
nodes.description: Shields have increased healing effectiveness.

nodes.name: Tempered Steel
nodes.description: Ring of Shields costs less mana, but Shields have reduced health.

nodes.name: Martyr Shields
nodes.description: You are healed any time one of your Shields dies.

nodes.name: Collateral Damage
nodes.description: Shields shatter into {Shrapnel} when they die, dealing physical damage to surrounding enemies.

nodes.name: Heavy Shrapnel
nodes.description: {Shrapnel} created by your dying Shields has a signficantly increased chance to stun enemies.
nodes.altText: {Shrapnel} deals physical damage to surrounding enemies.

nodes.name: Defensive Shields
nodes.description: You have additional chance to block and a higher block effectiveness if you have cast Ring of Shields recently (last 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Iron Form
nodes.description: You are invulnerable for 1 second after casting Ring of Shields, but you cannot move or use abilities.

nodes.name: Rush Wall
nodes.description: While using {Shield Rush}, your Shields form a wall in front of you, increasing the area you hit.

nodes.name: Heavy Burden
nodes.description: Shields have a chance to slow enemies that hit them.

nodes.name: Pulsing Shields
nodes.description: Shields push enemies away from you every 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Banding
nodes.description: Shields have increased health and additional physical resistance.

nodes.name: Enduring Defense
nodes.description: Ring of Shields lasts longer.

nodes.name: Coating
nodes.description: Consuming a potion also heals your Shields.

nodes.name: Shield Spike
nodes.description: Shields reflect a percentage of damage taken to attackers.

nodes.name: Molten Shields
nodes.description:
Shields take less fire damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and have a chance to ignite enemies that hit them. 

If you have the {Collateral Damage} node the base physical damage of the {Shrapnel} it creates is converted to fire damage.
nodes.altText: The only direct source of damage that Ring of Shields can do is with the Shrapnel node.

stats.statName: Chance To Ignite Enemy When Hit

nodes.name: Immolation
nodes.description: Shields now deal fire damage over time to surrounding enemies.
nodes.altText: Scales with the Shield's increases to spell damage and damage over time.

nodes.name: Fire Spin
nodes.description: Shields deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and shields rotate faster.

nodes.name: Touched by Fire
nodes.description: You deal additional fire damage with spells and attacks if you have cast Ring of Shields recently (last 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Bastion
nodes.description: Shields rotate around you at a greater distance.

nodes.name: Amass
nodes.description: Ring of Shields summons additional Shields, but costs more mana.

nodes.name: Displacement
nodes.description: Ring of Shields is cast at your target location instead, but Shields no longer follow you. Shields have more health (multiplicative with other modifiers) and last much longer.
nodes.altText: The health increase is multiplicative with other modifiers

nodes.name: Wreathed in Flame
nodes.description: You deal increased melee fire damage if you have cast Ring of Shields recently (last 4 seconds).

skills.name: Rip Blood
skills.description: Rips blood out of a target enemy dealing physical damage to it. An orb of the blood is drawn back to you, restoring 5 health when it reaches you.
skills.altText:
Affected by increases to Healing Effectiveness.

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Rip Blood
nodes.description: Rips blood out of a target enemy dealing physical damage to it. A {Blood Orb} is drawn back to you which restores 10 health when it reaches you.
nodes.loreText: The life blood of your foes need not be wasted

nodes.name: Splatter
nodes.description: Rip Blood hits have a chance to create a {Blood Splatter} at the target, dealing damage to other enemies around it, but not the original target.
nodes.altText:
Nodes on this tree do not apply to {Blood Splatter} unless stated otherwise.

Hitting or killing an enemy with {Blood Splatter} does not count .

If you have more than 100% chance to cause {Blood Splatter} you can cause multiple {Blood Splatters}.

nodes.name: Eviscerate
nodes.description:
Rip Blood has a significantly higher chance to make a {Blood Splatter}, but costs more mana.

This {Blood Splatter} can not occur if you are out of mana.
nodes.altText:
Nodes on this tree do not apply to {Blood Splatter} unless stated otherwise.

Hitting or killing an enemy with {Blood Splatter} does not count .

If you have more than 100% chance to cause {Blood Splatter} you can cause multiple {Blood Splatters}. The second {Blood Splatter} can hit the original target and targets hit by the first splatter.

nodes.name: Crimson Flood
nodes.description: {Blood Splatter} deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Revile
nodes.description: {Blood Splatter} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have an increased chance to stun enemies.

nodes.name: Coagulation
nodes.description: When a blood orb grants excess health above your maximum, you gain a stack of {Coagulated Blood}. Upon reaching 4 stacks, your next Rip Blood will consume all stacks to form a {Coagulated Blood Orb} that seeks out a nearby enemy, dealing spell physical damage in a small area.
nodes.altText:
This node has no effect if Rip Blood grants ward instead of health.
You can not have more than 4 stacks of Coagulated Blood.

nodes.name: Varicose Veins
nodes.description: The {Coagulated Blood Orb} deals more damage in a larger area (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Blood Infusion
nodes.description: {Blood Splatter} grants your minions {Blood Infusion} when it hits them. The {Blood Infusion} buff grants 15% more damage for 4 seconds (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Necrotic Unity
nodes.description: Blood Splatter has increased area for each minion you currently control.

nodes.name: Infused Frenzy
nodes.description: {Blood Infusion} grants increased attack and cast speed.
nodes.altText: {Blood Infusion} grants 15% more damage for 4 seconds (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Hemophagy
nodes.description: {Blood Infusion} causes your minions to leech a portion of the physical damage they deal .
nodes.altText: {Blood Infusion} grants 15% more damage for 4 seconds (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Hemomancer
nodes.description: Rip Blood has increased cast speed.

nodes.name: Thirst
nodes.description: Rip Blood costs less mana and has increased cast speed.

nodes.name: Carrion Hunger
nodes.description: When you are out of mana Rip Blood is free.

nodes.name: Quenching
nodes.description: {Blood Orbs} grant additional health and the {Blood Orb} returns faster.

nodes.name: Hematology
nodes.description: {Blood Orbs} restore more health based on your Intelligence stat.

nodes.name: Mana Feast
nodes.description: {Blood Orbs} now also grant you mana when you directly cast Rip Blood.

nodes.name: Marrow Drinker
nodes.description: Rip Blood can be cast on your minions, but no longer can be cast on enemies. {Blood Orbs} restore significantly more health.

nodes.name: Gushing Wound
nodes.description: Rip Blood hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Septic Wound
nodes.description: Bleed chance granted by the {Gushing Wounds} node is converted to poison chance.

nodes.name: Septic Blood
nodes.description: {Blood Splatter} has a chance to poison enemies.

nodes.name: Arcane Absorption
nodes.description: When you directly cast Rip Blood and hit at least one enemy you gain additional spell damage for 6 seconds. This effect can stack.

nodes.name: Run Dry
nodes.description: Rip Blood deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Necrotic Inspiration
nodes.description: Rip Blood deals more damage for each minion you currently control (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Blood Catalyst
nodes.description:
Rip Blood will automatically cast itself on a nearby enemy if it kills an enemy, but no longer creates {Blood Orbs}.

This effect can repeat and chain to other enemies. This effect cannot trigger if you are out of mana.

nodes.name: Rip Spirit
nodes.description: Rip Blood's and {Blood Splatter's} base physical damage is converted to necrotic damage. Consequently this damage scales with increases to necrotic damage, but not increases to physical damage.

nodes.name: Arcane Fortress
nodes.description:
{Blood Orbs} now grant ward instead of health, equal to half of the health they would have restored.

Being at or close to full health does not affect the amount of the ward the {Blood Orbs} grant.
nodes.altText: This ward gain is not affected by healing effectiveness.

nodes.name: Stench of Blood
nodes.description: Rip Blood has increased cast speed leaves a stench on the target enemy that causes your minions to prioritise attacking it.

skills.name: Rive
skills.description: A combo of three melee attacks. Every third consecutive attack with Rive slashes in a full circle around the character, dealing double damage.
skills.altText:
The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 3 seconds without using Rive.

Added melee damage applies to the first two hits at 125% effectiveness and to the third hit at 250% effectiveness.

skills.name: Rive
skills.description: A combo of three melee attacks. Every third consecutive attack with Rive slashes in a full circle around the character, dealing double damage.
skills.altText:
The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 3 seconds without using Rive.

Added melee damage applies to the first two hits at 125% effectiveness and to the third hit at 250% effectiveness.

skills.name: Rive
skills.description: A combo of three melee attacks. Every third consecutive attack with Rive slashes in a full circle around the character, dealing double damage.
skills.altText:
The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 3 seconds without using Rive.

Added melee damage applies to the first two hits at 125% effectiveness and to the third hit at 250% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Rive
nodes.loreText: Measure twice, cut thrice.

nodes.name: Champion
nodes.description: Rive deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has an increased chance to stun enemies.

nodes.name: Bound Weapon
nodes.description: When Rive kills an enemy or hits a boss or rare enemy, you have a chance to summon a {Forged Weapon}.

stats.statName: Forged Weapon chance on Hit vs Boss or Rare

nodes.name: Laceration
nodes.description:
Rive's third strike {lacerates} enemies on it.

Lacerated enemies take melee damage over time for 3 seconds, with base damage equal to 100% of your added melee damage. Laceration does not stack.
nodes.altText: Added melee damage of all types is taken into account for Lacerate, but added melee damage without a type is applied . For example if you have +20 Melee Damage and +10 Melee Fire Damage, Lacerate's base damage will be 20 Physical and 10 Fire.

nodes.name: Temporal Warrior
nodes.description: Rive deals more void damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and your chance to {Echo} with Rive is doubled.
nodes.altText: Echoing is a Void Knight mastery bonus. It grants you a chance for your attacks to repeat after a second. This node's echo bonus has no effect unless become a Void Knight.

nodes.name: Weapon Specialist
nodes.description:
Rive deals additional melee physical damage per point of Dexterity if you are using a Sword.

Rive deals additional melee void damage per point of Vitality if you are using an Axe.

Rive deals additional melee fire damage per point of Attunement if you are using a Mace.

stats.statName: Physical Damage per Dexterity with a Sword
Void Damage per Vitality with an Axe
Fire Damage per Attunement with a Mace

nodes.name: Azure Crescendo
nodes.description: Rive's third strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and restores mana if it hits at least one target.

nodes.name: Ripples of Oblivion
nodes.description: Rive deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). This effect is tripled for {Echoes}.
nodes.altText: Echoing is a Void Knight mastery bonus. It grants you a chance for your attacks to repeat after a second. This node's echo bonus has no effect unless become a Void Knight.

nodes.name: Sever
nodes.description: Rive's first strike has a chance to ignite enemies.

nodes.name: Twisting Fangs
nodes.description: Rive's second strike has a chance to ignite enemies.

nodes.name: Flame Drinker's Blade
nodes.description: Rive's third strike consumes all stacks of ignite you applied to enemies it hits, granting you a buff that grants physical penetration per stack consumed. You can have multiple instances of this buff at once.
nodes.altText: Ignite stacks applied by your minions or allies are not consumed.

nodes.name: Assassin's Sustenance
nodes.description: When you trigger {Flame Drinker's Blade's} effect you also gain an additional buff that causes you to leech a percentage of the damage you deal . Unlike the buff from Flame Drinker's Blade, this buff cannot stack.

nodes.name: Savagery
nodes.description: Rive hits deal more damage to ignited targets (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: More Hit Damage Vs Ignited Enemies

nodes.name: Scrap Metal
nodes.description: Whenever you would summon a {Forged Weapon} from any source, you instead gain a stack of Scrap Metal. Each stack grants more armour and more damage with Rive (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: Scrap Metal stacks have a base duration of 10 seconds, but modifiers to Forged Weapon duration now apply to Scrap Metal duration .

nodes.name: Flurry
nodes.description: Rive's first and second strike have increased attack speed.

stats.statName: First And Second Strike Attack Speed

nodes.name: Concentration
nodes.description: Improves Rive's base critical strike chance. This bonus is doubled for Rive's third strike.

stats.statName: First And Second Strike Base Crit Chance

nodes.name: Adrenaline
nodes.description: Rive's first strike grants you increased critical strike chance on hit for 4 seconds. Stacks up to 4 times.

nodes.name: Focused Strike
nodes.description: Rive's third strike always crits, but strikes one and two can no longer critically strike.

stats.statName: First And Second Strike Never Crit

nodes.name: Rending
nodes.description: Rive's first and second strike have a chance to reduce enemy armor.

stats.statName: First And Second Strike Armour Shred Chance

nodes.name: Indomitable
nodes.description: If you are at high health and have positive mana, Rive's first strike releases a wave of energy that passes through enemies.
nodes.altText: Targets above 65% max health are considered to be at high health.

stats.statName: First Strike Wave Of Energy At High Health

nodes.name: Cadence
nodes.description: Changes Rive's sequence of strikes to {1, 2, 1, 2, 3.}

nodes.name: Triple Threat
nodes.description: Rive's third strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and hits in a larger area, and has increased chance to stun enemies.

nodes.name: Double Slash
nodes.description: Rive skips its third strike.

nodes.name: Foe Cleaver
nodes.description: If you are using a two handed weapon, stats on that weapon that directly add damage, increase damage or add a chance to apply an ailment on hit, have double effect for Rive.

stats.statName: Effect of Damage Stats on a 2h Weapon
Effect of Ailment Chance Stats on a 2h Weapon

nodes.name: Iron Reach
nodes.description: Rive's second strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

nodes.name: Challenge
nodes.description: If you have positive mana, Rive's second strike pulls enemies, but costs more mana.
nodes.altText: The area in which enemies are pulled is affected by Increased Area for Area Skills stats.

nodes.name: Outburst
nodes.description: Rive's third strike deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Reclamation
nodes.description: Rive's third strike leeches damage dealt .

nodes.name: Brutality
nodes.description: Rive's third strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Massacre
nodes.description: Rive's third strike has a chance to detonate enemies it kills, dealing fire damage to nearby enemies.

stats.statName: Third Strike Detonate On Kill Chance

nodes.name: Coup de Grace
nodes.description: Rive's third strike instantly kills enemies below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).
nodes.altText: If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

skills.name: Roar
skills.description:
Unleash a thunderous roar which knocks enemies back and stuns them for 1.5 seconds. Rares and bosses are stunned for half as long.. All effects from your Warcry Skill Tree are applied to Roar.

20% of remaining cooldown recovered whenever you stun (or freeze if Warcry is converted to cold) an enemy, including with Roar itself. This effect can occur a maximum of two times each second.

skills.name: Sacrifice
skills.description: Rips apart an allied minion, dealing physical damage to enemies around it.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 400% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Sacrifice
nodes.loreText: Your minions are created to serve you one way or another

nodes.name: Soul Shatter
nodes.description: Sacrifice deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Sacrifice costs more mana.

nodes.name: Great Sacrifice
nodes.description: Sacrifice deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) if the sacrificed minion has more current health than you.
nodes.altText: You monster.

nodes.name: Last Sacrifice
nodes.description: Sacrifice deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) if the minion you sacrifice is your only active minion.

nodes.name: Altar of Flames
nodes.description: Sacrifice deals additional fire damage.

nodes.name: Infernal Vindication
nodes.description: Sacrifice costs less mana and if you cast Sacrifice while you control at least one minion you gain a buff that grants you more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers). This buff does not stack.

nodes.name: Burning Offering
nodes.description: Sacrifice has a chance to ignite enemies and ignite it inflicts has additional fire penetration.

nodes.name: Punishment
nodes.description: Sacrifice deals more damage against bleeding enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Pontifex
nodes.description: Sacrifice deals more damage for each minion your currently control (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Blood Spectre
nodes.description:
When you sacrifice a minion you have a chance to assemble a {Blood Spectre} from the remains. 15 mana is consumed when you summon a Blood Spectre. 

You cannot summon a Blood Spectre by sacrificing a Blood Spectre or when your mana is negative and below -100.
nodes.altText: {Blood Spectres} have a base of 100 health, decay over time, and use melee attacks.

nodes.name: Blood Weaver
nodes.description: {Blood Spectres} have a chance to cause enemies to bleed. Blood Spectres consume less mana when summoned.
nodes.altText: {Blood Spectres} have a base of 100 health, decay over time, and use melee attacks.

nodes.name: From Blood
nodes.description: {Blood Spectres} summoned by Sacrifice have more maximum health and deal more damage (both multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: {Blood Spectres} have a base of 100 health, decay over time, and use melee attacks.

nodes.name: Crimson Horror
nodes.description:
Sacrificing a minion always creates a {Blood Spectre}.

Blood Spectres summoned by Sacrifice have significantly more maximum health and damage (both multiplicative with other modifiers), and are larger, but consume more mana when summoned.

nodes.name: Hemophage
nodes.description: {Blood Spectres} leech a portion of the damage they deal . Sacrifice has a greater chance to summon a Blood Spectre.
nodes.altText: {Blood Spectres} have a base of 100 health, decay over time, and use melee attacks.

nodes.name: Bone Nova
nodes.description: Sacrificing a minion creates a {Bone Nova} around it, but Sacrifice costs more mana.

nodes.name: Bone Missiles
nodes.description: {Bone Nova} projectiles travel faster, causing them to travel further.

nodes.name: Impaling
nodes.description: {Bone Nova} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Ivory Ballista
nodes.description: {Bone Nova} projectiles pierce (continue through targets they hit).

nodes.name: Lacerating Bones
nodes.description: {Bone Nova} hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Avatar of Decay
nodes.description: You deal increased damage over time if you have cast Sacrifice recently (past 4 seconds). You cannot have multiple instances of this buff at once.

nodes.name: Temple of Awe
nodes.description: Sacrifice deals damage in a larger area and has an increased chance to stun enemies.

nodes.name: Necrotic Audience
nodes.description: Sacrifice deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area if you have three or more minions active when you cast Sacrifice.

nodes.name: Catalyst of Horror
nodes.description: Sacrifice is recast onto other minions within its area of effect, which can happen multiple times. Sacrifice costs more mana.

nodes.name: Sanguine Libation
nodes.description: Sacrifice is recast onto other minions within its area of effect up to one additional time. It also has additional Bleed Chance.

nodes.name: Flickering Shadows
nodes.description: If you cast Sacrifice while you control at least one minion all your active {Infernal Shades} have their remaining duration reduced to 2 seconds, but deal significantly more damage for their remaining duration.
nodes.altText:
This damage bonus stacks. The stacks are not multiplicative with each other, but are multiplicative with other modifiers.

This only affects Infernal Shades' regular damage over time effect, not any ailments they apply or sub skills they trigger.

Infernal Shades that have less than 2 seconds remaining duration do not have their duration changed, but still gain the damage bonus.

skills.name: Serpent Strike
skills.description:
Requires a spear.

A melee attack with 140% poison chance.

Poisons inflicted by serpent strike last 40% longer.
skills.altText:
Poison chance above 100% gives a chance to apply additional stacks of poison (this mechanic applies to all hits, not just Serpent Strike).

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Serpent Strike
nodes.loreText: The strength of the python and the venom of the cobra are yours to channel

nodes.name: Primal Serpent
nodes.description: When Serpent Strike kills an enemy or hits a rare or boss enemy, you have a chance to summon a {Primal Serpent}.

stats.statName: Summon Chance on Rare or Boss Hit

nodes.name: Culling Point
nodes.description: Serpent Strike hits have a chance to instantly kill enemies that are below a threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).
nodes.altText: If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node, then the highest threshold is used.

nodes.name: Coldfang
nodes.description: Serpent Strike hits have a higher chance to freeze enemies.

nodes.name: Serpent Venom
nodes.description: Serpent Strike hits have a chance to inflict {Serpent Venom}, an ailment that deals poison damage over time and prevents enemies from landing critical strikes. It lasts 3 seconds and cannot stack.

nodes.name: Spirit Viper
nodes.description: Serpent Venom deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on your Vitality, and if you have 50 Vitality you regain mana when you inflict an enemy with Serpent Venom or refresh its duration.

stats.statName: Mana Gain with at least 50 Vitality

nodes.name: Poison Tipped
nodes.description: Serpent Strike hits have a higher chance to poison on hit and they deal more melee damage per stack of poison on the target, up to a limit.

nodes.name: Venemous Union
nodes.description:
When you lunge forwards with Serpent Strike, if you have a {Primal Scorpion} it casts its companion ability, {Venom Nova}, twice, once centred on itself, and once centred on you.

This effect has a 12 second cooldown, but ignores Venom Nova's regular cooldown and does not put it on cooldown.

stats.statName: Venom Novas on Lunge (12 Second Cooldown)

nodes.name: Cobra Lunge
nodes.description: When you attempt to use Serpent Strike against a target that is slightly out of range you will lunge forwards before attacking.

stats.statName: Lunge if Slightly Out of Range

nodes.name: Constrictor
nodes.description: You gain a stack of {Constrictor} every 0.5 seconds, up to a maximum of 4. When you use Serpent Strike all stacks are consumed causing the attack to deal more damage per stack (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: The stacks are not multiplicative with each other.

nodes.name: Mussurana
nodes.description: Each stack of {Constrictor} also grants Serpent Strike additional poison chance and increased poison duration when consumed

nodes.name: Sapping Coils
nodes.description: You regain mana when you consume a stack of {Constrictor}.

nodes.name: Slither
nodes.description: You have more dodge rating (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each time you have used Serpent Strike in the last 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Gouging Spear
nodes.description: Serpent Strike hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Hydra Strikes
nodes.description: Serpent Strike has increased attack speed.

nodes.name: Corrosive Venom
nodes.description: Serpent Strike hits have a chance to shred enemy armor and posion resistance.

nodes.name: Devour Prey
nodes.description: You regain health when Serpent Strikes kills or critically strikes an enemy.

nodes.name: Eye of the Viper
nodes.description: Serpent Strike's critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Frostwyrm's Fury
nodes.description:
Serpent Strike now has a chance to freeze and its base physical damage is converted to cold damage. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to Frostbite chance.

nodes.name: Vicious Strikes
nodes.description: {Primal Serpents} have increased melee attack speed and are granted health when they hit enemies with a melee attack.

stats.statName: Primal Serpent Health Granted On Melee Hit

nodes.name: Iron Scales
nodes.description: {Primal Serpents} have more health (multiplicative with other modifiers) and additional armour

nodes.name: Emerald Fangs
nodes.description: {Primal Serpents}'s hits have an additional chance to poison enemies and inflict {frailty}.

nodes.name: Guardian Spear
nodes.description: Instead of summoning a new serpent when the {Primal Serpent} node's effect triggers, you heal your current serpent to full health and it deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for 10 seconds. This damage buff can stack.
nodes.altText: This effect triggers when you kill an enemy and roll to summon.

nodes.name: Biting Winds
nodes.description: Frosbite inflicted by Serpent Strike lasts longer and has additional cold penetration

nodes.name: Shroud of Winter
nodes.description: When you use Serpent Strike you gain additional dodge rating based on your uncapped cold resistance for four seconds. This buff can stack an unlimited number of times.
nodes.altText: Uncapped cold resistance includes cold resistance below the cap

stats.statName: Dodge Rating on Use per 10% Cold Resistance

nodes.name: Swirling Carnage
nodes.description: Each active stack of {Maelstrom} grants Serpent Strike additional Chance to Bleed on Hit and more damage damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Steel Eater
nodes.description: Armour Shred inflicted by Serpent Strike has an increased effect based on your Dexterity.

nodes.name: Shattered Immunity
nodes.description: Serpent Venom deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to high health enemies based on the number of poison and frostbite stacks on them.

stats.statName: Serpent Venom Damage per Poison vs High Health
Serpent Venom Damage per Frostbite vs High Health

nodes.name: Fast Acting Toxins
nodes.description:
Serpent Venom deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on your melee critical strike chance.

If your melee crit chance is above 50% then Serpent Venom deals its damage twice . This does not increase the total damage it deals over its full duration, but rather halves its duration and doubles its damage per second.

stats.statName: Serpent Venom Damage per Melee Crit Chance
Serpent Venom Speed with >50% Melee Crit Chance

nodes.name: Dread Fang
nodes.description: Ailments applied by Serpent Strike and {Primal Serpents} have additional poison penetration.

skills.name: Shadow Cascade
skills.description:
Requires dual wielding.

A circular attack that's also used by your shadow clones.
skills.altText: Added damages is applied at 200% effectiveness. Base critical strike chance is 10%, instead of the normal 5%.

nodes.name: Shadow Cascade
nodes.description:
Requires dual wielding.

A circular attack that's also used by your  {Shadows}.

nodes.name: Shadow Torrent
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per active {Shadow}.

nodes.name: Battle Trance
nodes.description: You have a higher chance to dodge while directly using Shadow Cascade (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Incapacitate
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade has a chance to apply {Frailty} to enemies hit, causing them to deal less damage.

nodes.name: Shadow Flourish
nodes.description:
If you hit at least 4 enemies with Shadow Cascade, you deal increased physical damage for a short duration.

This effect can be triggered by daggers from {Dagger Dance} .

nodes.name: Maiming
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade slows enemies for a short duration.

nodes.name: Rending
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade has a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Toxic Whirl
nodes.description: Bleed chance from all sources is converted to poison when using Shadow Cascade.

nodes.name: Rapid Expanse
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Leveraged Momentum
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 1% of increased melee attack speed you have.

nodes.name: Blade Rush
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade has more melee critical strike chance (multiplicative with other modifiers) against bleeding and poisoned enemies.

stats.statName: More Melee Crit Chance vs Bleeding
More Melee Crit Chance vs Poisoned

nodes.name: Precision
nodes.description: Improves Shadow Cascade's base critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Carnage
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade's critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Gloomstalker
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade has a chance to create a {Shadow} on kill.

nodes.name: Fight In The Shadows
nodes.description: You gain mana on use with Shadow Cascade per active {Shadow}.

nodes.name: Onslaught
nodes.description: A portion of Shadow Cascade's mana cost is refunded if used when you have at least one {Shadow}

nodes.name: Dismantle
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade has a chance to shred enemy armor.

nodes.name: Excecution
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade deals more melee damage to enemies on low health (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: Targets below 35% max health are considered to be at low health.

nodes.name: Careful Assault
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) if you have a specific number of {Shadows}.

nodes.name: Crushing Darkness
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but no longer scales with attack speed.

nodes.name: Dagger Dance
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade now also throws piercing daggers at nearby targets, dealing throwing physical damage.

nodes.name: Daggerflow
nodes.description: Daggers from {Dagger Dance} last longer causing them to travel further.

nodes.name: Fray
nodes.description: Daggers from {Dagger Dance} have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Porcupine's Wrath
nodes.description: {Dagger Dance} throws more daggers which deal significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Shadow Cascade no longer includes a melee attack.

nodes.name: Hurricane of Blades
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade is now channeled and throws daggers 3 times a second. It rapidly drains your mana. You do not regenerate mana while channelling.

nodes.name: Shadow Elegance
nodes.description: Daggers from {Dagger Dance} inflict enemies with {Shadow Dagger}. This chance is much lower when {Dagger Dance} is used by a {Shadow}.

stats.statName: Shadow Dagger Chance from Shadow Casts
Shadow Dagger Chance from Other Casts

nodes.name: Flow State
nodes.description: Shadow Cascade deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per sword or dagger you are wielding.

nodes.name: Shadow Step
nodes.description:
When you directly use Shadow Cascade while targeting a {Shadow} you swap places with the Shadow.

This effect consumes mana based on how many times you have swapped places with a Shadow in the past 5 seconds.
nodes.altText:
This effect does not occur if the target shadow is in an inaccessible location.

If you have not swapped place with a Shadow in the past 5 seconds, this effect consumes no mana.

skills.name: Shield Bash
skills.description:
Requires a shield.

A melee directional attack that stuns enemies for 1 second. 100% increased stun duration against non-boss enemies.

1.5% more damage per 1% block chance (up to 150%, multiplicative with other modifiers).

20% of remaining cooldown recovered whenever you stun an enemy, including with Shield Bash itself. This effect can occur a maximum of two times each second.
skills.altText:
Increased attack speed has no effect for Shield Bash.

Added damage is applied at 150% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Shield Bash
nodes.description:
A melee directional attack that that stuns enemies for 1 second. 100% increased stun chance against non-boss enemies.

1% more damage per 1% block chance (up to 100%, multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Dazed
nodes.description: Stuns caused by Shield Bash last longer.

nodes.name: Wall of Shields
nodes.description: If Shield Bash is used while Ring of Shields is active, the shields form a wall which increases the width of Shield Bash, based on the number of active shields.
nodes.altText: The wall can be up to a maximum of 7 shields wide.

nodes.name: Refreshing Smash
nodes.description: You are granted health when you stun an enemy with Shield Bash.

nodes.name: Splintering Blow
nodes.description:
If Shield Bash is used while you have a shield equipped, it fires shield fragments in a cone in front of you.

While Shield Bash is on cooldown you cannot block.

Only works if Shield Bash has a cooldown.
nodes.altText: Shield Fragments deal melee damage, and added melee damage applies to them at 150% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Survival of the Fittest
