nodes.description: You are granted health per point of Strength, when you stun an enemy with Shield Bash.

stats.statName: Health Gain On Stun Per Strength

nodes.name: Broadened Shield
nodes.description: Shield Bash deals damage in a wider area.

nodes.name: Disarming Blows
nodes.description: Shield Bash now applies {Frailty} to enemies hit.

nodes.name: Flame Coating
nodes.description:
Shield Bash deals additional melee fire damage.

If Shield Bash has a cooldown, it also deals more fire damage per block chance (multiplicative with other modifiers) up to 100%.

stats.statName: Max Fire Damage Bonus From Block Chance

nodes.name: Kindling
nodes.description:
Shield Bash causes your next melee or throwing attack to have additional ignite chance and critical strike chance. Excludes channelled skills.

This effect is significantly reduced if Shield Bash does not have a cooldown.

nodes.name: Incinerating Blows
nodes.description:
Shield Bash no longer has a guaranteed stun, but instead applies additional stacks of ignite. All stun duration modifiers from this tree are converted to affect ignite duration instead.

Shield Bash's base physical damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical damage. 

Swaps Shield Bash's {Physical} tag for a {Fire} tag.

nodes.name: Protective Impact
nodes.description: Shield Bash grant you additional block chance and block effectiveness for a short duration after use.

nodes.name: Power Rush
nodes.description:
After you use Shield Rush or Lunge, you Shield Bash in the direction you traveled.

Shield Bash must have a cooldown, be charged and on your action bar for this effect to work.

stats.statName: Shield Bash After Shield Rush Or Lunge

nodes.name: Perfect Bulwark
nodes.description:
For 4 seconds after using Shield Bash, you are guaranteed to block a limited number of hits.

Only works if Shield Bash has a cooldown.

nodes.name: Block Out
nodes.description: Shield Bash now also blinds enemies hit.

nodes.name: Rebounding
nodes.description: Your next {Shield Throw} can ricochet 5 additional times, after using Shield Bash.

nodes.name: Hindrance
nodes.description: Shield Bash now also slows enemies.

nodes.name: Breadth
nodes.description: Shield Bash deals damage in a longer area.

nodes.name: Conjurer
nodes.description: Shield Bash has a chance to cause one enemy to drop a potion, if Shield Bash has a cooldown.

nodes.name: Impeded Movement
nodes.description: Slows caused by Shield Bash last longer.

nodes.name: Staggering Punch
nodes.description: Shield Bash now also knocks enemies back, if Shield Bash has a cooldown.

nodes.name: Double Bash
nodes.description: You gain an additional charge of Shield Bash, but it has a longer cooldown.

nodes.name: Fusillade
nodes.description: Using Shield Bash consumes all charges and deals significantly more damage per extra charge consumed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Steel Coating
nodes.description: Shield Bash deals additional melee physical damage.

nodes.name: Juggernaut
nodes.description: Shield Bash no longer requires a shield to use, but costs more mana.

nodes.name: Cutting Edge
nodes.description: Shield Bash reduces enemy armor and costs less mana.

nodes.name: Serrating Strikes
nodes.description: Shield Bash causes enemies to bleed, but costs more mana.

nodes.name: Iron Arms
nodes.description: Shield Bash deals increased physical damage per point of Strength, but costs more mana.

nodes.name: Flurry of Blows
nodes.description: Shield Bash no longer has a cooldown, but costs significantly more mana and no longer has a guaranteed stun or ignite.

nodes.name: Invigoration
nodes.description: If Shield Bash hits 3 or less targets it refunds mana.

nodes.name: Concussive Attacks
nodes.description: Shield Bash has an increased chance to stun and stuns it inflicts last longer.

skills.name: Shield Rush
skills.description:
Requires a shield.

Charge through enemies in the target direction until you release the ability key. You hit enemies in your path and in a wider area at the end of the movement. You do not regenerate mana while rushing.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

nodes.name: Shield Rush
nodes.loreText: Lead the charge

nodes.name: Consuming Path
nodes.description: Shield Rush deals more damage.

nodes.name: Will Breaker
nodes.description: Shield Rush hits deal more damage to enemies at full health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Hit Damage Vs Full Health Enemies

nodes.name: Descent of the Void
nodes.description: When you cast Shield Rush you create a {Void Beam} that travels with you, which is a spell that deals void damage over time in a small area. Shield Rush costs more mana.

nodes.name: Dark Regression
nodes.description: When Shield Rush ends it creates a {Void Beam} that travels back in the direction you came from. Shield Rush costs more mana.
nodes.altText: {Void Beam} is a spell which deals void damage over time in its area of effect.

nodes.name: Dark Rush
nodes.description: Shield Rush no longer requires a shield and hits deal additional base void damage, but Shield Rush costs more mana.

nodes.name: Void Breaker
nodes.description: Shield Rush's final hit deals additional melee void damage.

nodes.name: Temporal Strike
nodes.description: Shield Rush hits deal additional void damage, but this damage is reduced by your increased attack speed.

stats.statName: Damage Reduced By Increased Attack Speed %

nodes.name: Rush Mastery
nodes.description: Shield Rush costs less mana.

nodes.name: Protective Speed
nodes.description: You take less damage while using Shield Rush (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Unstoppable Charge
nodes.description: Shield Rush hits have an increased chance to stun enemies.

nodes.name: Desynchronous Charge
nodes.description: When Shield Rush ends, you return to the position you used it from.

nodes.name: Mana Memory
nodes.description: When Shield Rush ends, your mana is restored to the amount you had when it started, but Shield Rush now has a 10 second cooldown.

stats.statName: Mana Restored When Shield Rush Ends

nodes.name: Endless Cycle
nodes.description: Shield Rush gains additional charges, but you take more damage while using Shield Rush (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: The Rush of Sacrifice
nodes.description: Shield Rush no longer has a cooldown, but costs health in addition to mana to use.

nodes.name: Warrior's Entrance
nodes.description: Shield Rush's final attack deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

nodes.name: Splintering Impact
nodes.description: Shield Rush's final hit deals more damage.

nodes.name: Critical Rush
nodes.description: Improves the base critical strike chance of Shield Rush's final hit.

nodes.name: Obliterating Rush
nodes.description: Critical strikes from Shield Rush's final hit deal more damage.

nodes.name: Echoes of the Charge
nodes.description: Shield Rush's final hit strikes a second time after a 0.5s delay, but Shield Rush hits deal less damage.

nodes.name: Stretched Time
nodes.description: Shield Rush's final hit echo deals significantly more damage, but the delay between the final hits is longer.

nodes.name: Critical Echo
nodes.description: Improves the base critical strike chance of Shield Rush's final hit echo.

stats.statName: Final Hit Echo Base Crit Chance

nodes.name: Obliterating Echo
nodes.description: Critical strikes from Shield Rush's final hit echo deal more damage.

skills.name: Shield Throw
skills.description:
Throws a shield at a target enemy. The shield ricochets to up to 2 additional targets before returning to you.

You cannot throw a new shield until the current shield has returned to you.
skills.altText:
The shield hits all enemies in its path, even those it does not ricochet from.

Added throwing attack damage is applied at 225% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Shield Throw
nodes.loreText: The best defense...

nodes.name: Ricochet
nodes.description: Shield Throw has increased attack speed and ricochets to additional targets, but Shield Throw costs more mana.

nodes.name: Aegis
nodes.description: Shield Throw can target and ricochet to allies other than yourself. Allies are granted armor for 4 seconds when Shield Throw hits them.

nodes.name: Manifest Inspiration
nodes.description:
If your {Manifest Armor} is hit by the shield, it performs a sweeping melee attack.
This attack cannot be triggered when the shield has no ricochets remaining.
nodes.altText: The attack scales with the Manifest Armor's stats.

stats.statName: Manifest Armor Casts Sweeping Melee Attack When Hit

nodes.name: Faithguard
nodes.description: {Aegis} also grants allies stun avoidance when Shield Throw hits them. The amount granted is equal to the armor Aegis provides.
nodes.altText: The amount of elemental and poison protection granted is the same .

nodes.name: Testament of Light
nodes.description: The benefits granted by {Aegis} are increased for each point of attunement you have.

stats.statName: Increased Aegis Effect Per Point Of Attunement

nodes.name: Eruption
nodes.description: Whenever Shield Throw ricochets on an enemy it casts {Lava Burst,} a spell dealing fire damage to all enemies near the impact.
nodes.altText: Lava burst's damage scales with attunement and increases to fire damage and spell damage.

nodes.name: Forceful Breaking
nodes.description: {Lava Burst} deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Magma Rage
nodes.description: {Lava Burst} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Forgeborn
nodes.description: Thrown shields travel faster, and Shield Throw deals additional throwing fire damage.
nodes.altText: Not affected by Shield Throw's increased effectiveness of added throwing attack damage

nodes.name: Molten Shield
nodes.description:
Shield Throw's base physical damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical damage.

All increased stun chance from this tree is converted to added ignite chance.

stats.statName: Increased Stun Chance -> Added Ignite Chance

nodes.name: Molten Toss
nodes.description: Shield Throw deals more fire damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Burning Crusade
nodes.description: Shield Throw and {Lava Burst} hits have a chance to ignite enemies.

nodes.name: Polished Steel
nodes.description: Shield Throw costs less mana.

nodes.name: Focused Campaign
nodes.description: Shield Throw's cooldown is immediately reset when your shield returns to you, but the number of Shield Throw ricochets is halved (rounded down).

nodes.name: Armoring Aegis
nodes.description: Shield Throw grants you armor for 4 seconds when it ricochets.

nodes.name: Colossus
nodes.description: You have increased armor while Shield Throw is on cooldown.

nodes.name: Vampiric Shield
nodes.description: You gain health when Shield Throw ricochets.

nodes.name: Iron Monger
nodes.description: Shield Throw steals 10 armor on hit for 4 seconds.
nodes.altText: Armour stolen is added to your armour and removed from the target's armour.

nodes.name: Hemrin's Technique
nodes.description: Shield Throw ricochets to additional targets.

nodes.name: Heavy Shield
nodes.description: Shield Throw deals additional throwing damage.
nodes.altText: Not affected by Shield Throw's increased effectiveness of added throwing attack damage

nodes.name: Sharpened Rim
nodes.description: Improves Shield Throw's base critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Spiked Plates
nodes.description: Shield Throw deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) equal to 50% of your block chance.

nodes.name: Rygar's Fury
nodes.description: Shield Throw deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) equal to 100% of your block chance, but you cannot block while Shield Throw is released.
nodes.altText: This stacks with {Spiked Plates} for a total of 150% of your block chance .

stats.statName: Cannot Block While Shield Throw Is Released

nodes.name: Crippling Throw
nodes.description: Shield Throw has a chance to slow and increased chance to stun enemies.

nodes.name: Throwing Arm
nodes.description: You are granted global increased throwing attack damage if you have used Shield Throw recently (last 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Fleet of Foot
nodes.description: When you cast Shield Throw, you are granted {Haste} for a duration.

nodes.name: Shield Barrage
nodes.description: Shield Throw no longer has a cooldown and costs less mana, but shields are smaller and deal less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Avenger's Wrath
nodes.description: Shield Throw critical hits deal more damage based on your block effectiveness.

skills.name: Shift
skills.description: Dash a short fixed distance in the target direction.
skills.altText: Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

nodes.name: Shift
nodes.description: Teleport a short fixed distance in the target direction.

nodes.name: Shadow Recuperation
nodes.description: Shifting heals you. The amount of health gained is increased by healing effectiveness.

nodes.name: Vault
nodes.description: You travel farther with Shift, but it has a longer cooldown.

nodes.name: Elusive
nodes.description: You have additional dodge chance per point of Dexterity for 1 second after Shifting.

nodes.name: Breathing Technique
nodes.description: Shifting heals you for a portion equal to your Dexterity. The amount of health gained is increased by healing effectiveness.

nodes.name: Molting
nodes.description: Shifting cleanses all negative ailments on you.

nodes.name: Rebound
nodes.description: If a single hit deals at least 50% of your health, Shift's cooldown is reset. This can only occur once every 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Deadly Ambush
nodes.description: You deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) with your next damaging non-channelled skill after Shifting.
nodes.altText: This damage modifier is additive with other damage modifiers on this tree, but multiplicative with other modifiers.

nodes.name: Momentum
nodes.description: You gain 50% increased movement speed for a brief moment after Shifting.

nodes.name: Hypovolemia
nodes.description: You have a chance to cause bleeding with your next damaging non-channelled skill after Shifting.

nodes.name: Jagged Cuts
nodes.description: After Shifting your next damaging non-channelled skill has increased bleed duration and bleed it inflicts has additional Physical Penetration.

nodes.name: Jade Quiver
nodes.description:
Using Shift grants you {Jade Arrows.} 

Using a bow attack consumes a {Jade Arrow} to have increased critical strike chance and a chance to poison enemies.

stats.statName: Jade Arrow Increased Critical Strike Chance

nodes.name: Jagged Arrows
nodes.description: Consuming a {Jade Arrow} also causes your next bow attack's critical strikes to deal more damage.

nodes.name: Venom Tipped Arrows
nodes.description: Consuming a {Jade Arrow} also grants your next bow attack increased damage over time.

nodes.name: Swift Recovery
nodes.description: Shift restores mana on use. This amount is tripled when below half health.

nodes.name: Shadowslip
nodes.description: You are invulnerable while Shifting.

nodes.name: Emergency Flask
nodes.description: Shift consumes a health potion on use if you are below 50% health.

nodes.name: Critical Opening
nodes.description: The next damaging non-channelled skill you use after Shifting is always a critical strike.

stats.statName: Always Crit With Next Non-Channelled Skill

nodes.name: Unseen Strike
nodes.description: If using a melee weapon, when Shifting you perform an {Unseen Strike}, hitting enemies along your path.
nodes.altText: Deals melee physical damage, with 100% added damage effectiveness.

nodes.name: Sleight of Hand
nodes.description: You throw {Shurikens} at nearby enemies after Shifting.
nodes.altText: This will grant {Chakram} 10% more damage per point (multiplicative with other modifiers) if you have the {Keen Throw} node.

nodes.name: Broad Sweep
nodes.description: {Unseen Strike} hits in a wider area.

nodes.name: Lasting Presence
nodes.description: You leave behind a {Shadow} at the place you Shifted from.

nodes.name: Through the Shadows
nodes.description: When the {Shadow} created by Shift is consumed, you return to its location.

nodes.name: Dancing Shadows
nodes.description: After using Shift you use {Shadow Cascade}.

nodes.name: Arrival Gift
nodes.description: You have a chance to drop an {Acid Flask} on arrival.
nodes.altText: Acid Flask can not have extra projectiles when thrown from Shift.

nodes.name: Parting Gift
nodes.description: You have a chance to drop an {Acid Flask} on departure.
nodes.altText: Acid Flask can not have extra projectiles when thrown from Shift.

nodes.name: Velocity
nodes.description: Shift has a shorter cooldown and costs less mana.

nodes.name: Hidden Blades
nodes.description: {Unseen Strike} has a chance to inflict {Shadow Dagger} to enemies hit.

nodes.name: Low Blow
nodes.description: {Unseen Strike} slows enemies it hits.

nodes.name: Consumed by Shadow
nodes.description:
{Unseen Strike} instantly kills enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

nodes.name: Braskula's Hesitation
nodes.description: You deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) with your next damaging non-channelled skill after Shifting, but travel a shorter distance with Shift.
nodes.altText: This damage modifier is additive with other damage modifiers on this tree, but multiplicative with other modifiers.

skills.name: Shocking Impact
skills.description: Call a meteor from the sky that deals a large amount of damage upon landing. Added damage is applied at five times its normal value.

skills.name: Shurikens
skills.description: Throw 3 shurikens in a cone.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 125% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Toxic Tips
nodes.description: Shurikens has a chance to poison enemies.

nodes.name: Weighted Projectiles
nodes.description: Shurikens penetrates enemy physical resistance.

nodes.name: Deep Cuts
nodes.description: Shurikens has a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Flip of a Coin
nodes.description: You have a chance to throw many additional Shurikens with each throw.
nodes.altText: For calculating the damage bonus of the {Keen Throw} node this effect counts .

nodes.name: Entry Points
nodes.description: Shurikens hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of bleed or poison on the target up to a maximum.

nodes.name: Throwing Star
nodes.description: Shurikens are now be thrown at enemies all around you rather than in a cone in front of you.

nodes.name: Scintillant Steel
nodes.description: Shurikens deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and costs less mana.

nodes.name: Keen Throw
nodes.description: {Chakram} hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each projectile you would release with Shurikens.

nodes.name: Behind the Veil
nodes.description: Shurikens has a chance to {Blind} enemies.

nodes.name: Acrobatics
nodes.description: You backflip away from target direction when you use Shurikens, but it now has a cooldown.

nodes.name: Exuberance
nodes.description: Shurikens has a shorter cooldown and you gain {Haste} for a short duration if it hits at least one enemy.

nodes.name: Stagger
nodes.description: Shurikens {Immobilizes} enemies on hit, causing them to be unable to move for a short duration.

nodes.name: Alacrity
nodes.description: Shurikens has increased attack speed.

nodes.name: Charged Steel
nodes.description:
Shurikens deals additional lightning damage and a percentage of its base physical damage is converted to Lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Shurikens gains a {Lightning} tag. If all its base damage is converted it loses its {Physical} tag.
nodes.altText: Conversion above 100% has no effect

nodes.name: Shuriken Storm
nodes.description: Shurikens shocks enemies on hit.

nodes.name: Abrasive Arsenal
nodes.description: Shurikens has a chance to shred enemy physical and poison resistance.

nodes.name: Ricochet
nodes.description:
Shurikens ricochets to different targets up to a maximum number of times, but costs more mana.

Pierce chance is converted to additional critical strike multiplier.
nodes.altText: This does not enable Chakrams to ricochet.

nodes.name: Fan of Blades
nodes.description: You throw additional Shurikens with each throw.

nodes.name: Blade Shield
nodes.description: You now summon your Shurikens in a shield around you for 3 seconds. This effect does not stack.
nodes.altText: Granting Shurikens pierce, such {Ethereal Blades}, will not allow each Shuriken to hit an individual enemy more than once.

nodes.name: Bladed Armor
nodes.description: You have increased armor per Shuriken spinning around you.

nodes.name: Floating Blades
nodes.description: {Blade Shield} lasts longer.

nodes.name: Aerodynamic
nodes.description:
Shurikens travel faster and farther.

This does not affect {Chakram.}

nodes.name: Deadly Aim
nodes.description:
Shurikens are now thrown in a straight line and they can hit the same target, but you throw half (rounded up).

This has no effect if you have the {Blade Shield} node.

nodes.name: Ethereal Blades
nodes.description: Shurikens has a chance to pierce enemies (continue through targets they hit).

nodes.name: Jagged Edges
nodes.description: Improves Shurikens' base critical strike chance and Shurikens deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Massacre
nodes.description: Shurikens' critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Chakram
nodes.description:
You now throw a single returning {Chakram} instead of multiple Shurikens. 

Chakram has significant increased size and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

skills.name: Smelter's Wrath
skills.description:
Channel to charge a powerful frontal cone attack, dealing fire and physical damage to all enemies hit. Charging for longer increases its range and power. 2 second maximum charge time.

Your armor is doubled while channelling Smelter's Wrath.
skills.altText:
Deals up to 100% more damage at maximum charge.

Added damage is applied at 600% effectiveness.

Increased Area for Area Skills stats increase Smelter's Wrath's charge speed instead of its area.

skills.name: Smite
skills.description:
Smites a target enemy with a bolt of holy fire that descends from the sky, healing allies around the target for 60 health. If you are in the area you are also healed.

Cannot be used without a target.
skills.altText: Added spell damage applies at 150% effectiveness

nodes.name: Smite
nodes.loreText: Rahyeh's wrath can fall on anyone.

nodes.name: Fissure
nodes.description:
Smite causes a {Fissure} underneath the target, dealing fire damage to enemies who stand on it.

{Fissure} costs 10 mana, last 3 seconds and has a 0.5 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Epicenter
nodes.description: {Fissure} deals damage in a larger area.
nodes.altText: {Fissures} are summoned at Smite targets, dealing fire damage in an area to enemies who stand on it.

nodes.name: Heavy Impact
nodes.description: {Fissure} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: {Fissures} are created at Smite targets, dealing fire damage in an area to enemies who stand on it.

nodes.name: Six Feet Under
nodes.description: {Fissure} instantly kills enemies that are below a health threshold (percentage of their maximum health).
nodes.altText: If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node, then the highest threshold is used.

nodes.name: Aftershock
nodes.description: {Fissures} last longer, but Smite costs more mana.
nodes.altText: {Fissures} are summoned at Smite targets, dealing fire damage in an area to enemies who stand on it.

nodes.name: Descend
nodes.description: You appear at Smite's targeted location, dealing physical damage to surrounding enemies. Smite costs more mana, has a cooldown, and counts {Traversal} skill.
nodes.altText:
Descends damage scales with modifiers to spell damage.

Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

nodes.name: Forceful Impact
nodes.description: Smite hits knock enemies back.

nodes.name: Holy Wave
nodes.description: Smite heals in a larger area.

nodes.name: Righteous Fury
nodes.description: You deal additional melee fire damage if you have hit an enemy with Smite recently (last 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Righteous Flurry
nodes.description: You have increased attack and cast speed if you have hit an enemy with Smite recently (last 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Panacea
nodes.description: Being healed by Smite has a chance to cleanse all negative ailments, such .

nodes.name: Desperate Measures
nodes.description: When you are out of mana Smite is free, but cannot heal, cleanse, or create {Fissures}.

nodes.name: Soothing Balm
nodes.description: Being healed by Smite grants you or your allies increased health and mana regeneration for 4 seconds (does not stack).

nodes.name: Pillars of Light
nodes.description: When you directly cast smite, you have a chance to double cast. The additional cast does not incur a mana cost and cannot teleport you if you have the Descend node.

nodes.name: Holy Fire
nodes.description: Smite hits have a chance to ignite enemies.

nodes.name: Conflagration
nodes.description: Smite hits deal more damage to ignited enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: Deals more Hit Damage to Electrified or Slowed enemies if converted to Lightning or Void respectively.

nodes.name: Immolate
nodes.description: Smite hits have a chance to apply {Spreading Flames}

nodes.name: Righteous Overload
nodes.description: Enemies killed by Smite have a chance to explode, dealing fire damage to nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Blinding Flash
nodes.description: Smite hits have a chance to blind enemies and deal more damage to blinded enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Order of Lagon
nodes.description:
Smite's base fire damage is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to fire damage.

Ignite chance from all sources is converted to electrify chance for Smite and effects related to ignite now depend on electrify instead.
nodes.altText: Secondary effects like Fissure and Spreading Flames are unaffected.

nodes.name: Unbalanced Scale
nodes.description: Smite hits also cast a {Lightning Bolt} at 3 nearby enemies, dealing lightning damage. Smite costs more mana.

nodes.name: Charged Hand
nodes.description: Electrify applied by Smite has increased duration and additional Lightning Penetration

nodes.name: Wandering Bolts
nodes.description: {Lightning Bolts} created by Smite hit additional enemies.

nodes.name: Conviction
nodes.description: Improves Smite's base critical strike chance, but Smite has reduced cast speed.

nodes.name: Deep Impact
nodes.description: Smite critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Grace
nodes.description: Smite heals allies for more health.

nodes.name: Atonement
nodes.description: The {Sacrifice} node costs less health.

nodes.name: Sacrifice
nodes.description: Smite deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Smite consumes a percent of your current health on cast.

nodes.name: Piety
nodes.description: Smite has a chance to {Electrify} on hit.

skills.name: Smoke Bomb
skills.description: Drop a Smoke Bomb at your feet that blinds enemies and grants you haste while you remain inside it. The Smoke Bomb grows in size over its duration. Lasts 4 seconds.
skills.altText: You can have a maximum of 2 smoke bombs active at once.

nodes.name: Thick Smoke
nodes.description: Applies slow to enemies within the smoke cloud each second.

nodes.name: Eroding Fumes
nodes.description: Applies armor shred to enemies within the smoke cloud each second.

nodes.name: Toxic Cloud
nodes.description: Armor shred applied by Smoke Bomb is converted to poison resistance shred.

nodes.name: Venom Infusion
nodes.description: You have a chance to poison enemies with bow attacks while inside the smoke cloud.

nodes.name: Smokescreen Arrow
nodes.description: While using a bow you now shoot an arrow that detonates the Smoke Bomb at the target location.

nodes.name: Swirling Fog
nodes.description: Smoke Bomb has a chance to shred enemy armor each second within the smoke cloud.

nodes.name: Knives in the Dark
nodes.description: Smoke Bomb has a chance to inflict a stack of {Shadow Dagger} whenever it applies slow.

nodes.name: Lingering Fumes
nodes.description: The smoke cloud lasts longer.

nodes.name: Shadow Hunter
nodes.description: Your bow attacks have improved base critcal strike chance and blind enemies while you are inside the smoke cloud.

nodes.name: Smoke Blades
nodes.description: You and allies are granted {Smoke Blades} each second for 4 seconds while inside the smoke cloud, granting you additional melee and throwing damage. This effect can stack.

nodes.name: Blood Bandit
nodes.description: {Smoke Blades} now also causes melee and throwing attacks to leech a portion of the damage you deal .

nodes.name: Umbral Assault
nodes.description: The smoke cloud has a chance to create a {Shadow} each second at a random location inside the smoke cloud.

nodes.name: Concealed in Carnage
nodes.description: You are granted a stack of {Crimson Shroud} on kill while inside the smoke cloud, granting you bleed chance and less damage over time taken for 4 seconds. This stacks up to 3 times.

stats.statName: Damage Over Time Taken per Crimson Shroud

nodes.name: Cloaked Incursion
nodes.description:
You leap to the target location when you use Smoke Bomb, instead of backflipping away.

Smoke Bomb now has a much shorter cooldown, but counts {Traversal} skill.
nodes.altText: Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

nodes.name: Generosity
nodes.description: The smoke cloud covers a larger area.
nodes.altText: This affects starting area and maximum area, but not how long it takes to reach maximum area.

nodes.name: Escape Tactics
nodes.description:
You backflip away from target direction when you use Smoke Bomb. Smoke Bomb now counts .

During Smoke Bomb's movement you are immune to Damage.

nodes.name: Enfeeblement
nodes.description: The initial burst applies {Frailty} to enemies, causing them to deal less damage.

nodes.name: Moonlight Bomb
nodes.description: The initial burst grants you a stack of {Silver Shroud}, causing you to dodge the next hit and gain ward per stack.

nodes.name: Cleansing Steam
nodes.description: The initial burst cleanses negative ailments on you.

nodes.name: Purging Fumes
nodes.description: The initial burst also cleanses negative ailments on allies.

nodes.name: Invigorating Darkness
nodes.description: The initial burst consumes all {Shadows} inside the smoke to grant you and allies health per {Shadow} consumed this way.

nodes.name: Refreshment
nodes.description: The initial burst consumes all {Shadows} inside the smoke to grant you and allies mana per {Shadow} consumed this way.

nodes.name: Engulfed in Flames
nodes.description: The smoke cloud catches fire at the end of its duration, igniting enemies inside the cloud.

nodes.name: Hasty Combustion
nodes.description: Leaving the smoke cloud early causes it to immediately catch fire and end.

nodes.name: Cleaving Shadows
nodes.description: You use {Shadow Cascade} when the smoke cloud ends.

nodes.name: Trapped Shadows
nodes.description: Your {Decoys} inside the smoke cloud automatically explode when the smoke cloud ends.

nodes.name: Shrouded in Darkness
nodes.description: You are granted a stack of {Dusk Shroud} each second for 2 seconds while you are in the smoke cloud, granting you glancing blow chance and dodge rating. This effect can stack.

nodes.name: Rapid Concealment
nodes.description: The smoke cloud grants stacks of {Dusk Shroud} more frequently.

nodes.name: Shared Concealment
nodes.description: The smoke cloud now also grants {Dusk Shroud} to allies for 2 seconds while inside the smoke cloud.

nodes.name: Impending Gloom
nodes.description: The smoke cloud has a larger area and grows faster.
nodes.altText: This affects starting area and maximum area, and reduces how long it takes to reach maximum area.

nodes.name: Hidden Blows
nodes.description: {Puncture} and {Shurikens} have a chance cause enemies to bleed if used inside the smoke cloud.

skills.name: Soul Feast
skills.description:
Feasts on the souls of {Cursed} enemies, dealing necrotic damage to them, and drawing fragments of their souls back to you. The soul fragments each grant 3 ward when they reach you.

Feasts on up to 13 enemies, prioritising those closest to you.
skills.altText: Added spell damage is applied at 250% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Hunger
nodes.description: Soul Feast has increased cast speed and costs less mana.

nodes.name: Grand Imprint
nodes.description: Soul Feast no longer requires targets to be {Cursed} and no longer has a target limit, but now hits all enemies a small cone in front of you.

nodes.name: Winds of Affliction
nodes.description: Soul Feast deals damage in a larger area and has a chance to apply {Frailty} on hit.

nodes.name: Grim Affliction
nodes.description: Soul Feast deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but {Soul Fragments} grant less ward.

nodes.name: Infernal Hunger
nodes.description: If you go 2 seconds without directly casting Soul Feast you gain a stack of {Infernal Hunger}. When you next cast Soul Feast directly, all stacks of {Infernal Hunger} are consumed to cast Soul Feast an additional time per stack.
nodes.altText: Average number of recasts is equal to the number of points in the node.

stats.statName: Extra Casts per Stack of Infernal Hunger

nodes.name: Waning Life
nodes.description: Damned inflicted by Soul Feast has additional necrotic penetration.
nodes.altText: This increases both the damage of Damned and its reduction to health regen.

nodes.name: Sharpened Influence
nodes.description: Soul Feast costs less mana and can hit more targets.

nodes.name: Poisoned Husks
nodes.description: Soul Feast's hits have a chance to poison enemies on hit.

nodes.name: Diseased Soul
nodes.description: Casting Soul Feast grant you a chance to poison enemies with all hits for 4 seconds, but also inflicts you with poison. This buff cannot stack.

nodes.name: Toxic Craving
nodes.description:
Soul Feast consumes poison stacks you applied on the target, granting you more armor (multiplicative with other modifiers) and additional poison resistance per stack.

This buff lasts 6 seconds and can stack an unlimited number of times.

Poison stacks applied by minions or other party members are not cleansed and are not counted for the buff.
nodes.altText: The armour modifiers from individual stacks are not multiplicative with each other, just with all armour modifiers from other sources.

nodes.name: Soul Seeker
nodes.description: {Soul Fragments} grant additional ward based on your intelligence.
nodes.altText: The effect of this node is not rounded. If it granted you 1 ward additional ward per 25 intelligence, but you only had 10 intelligence, it would grant 0.4 additional ward.

nodes.name: Blood Feast
nodes.description:
Soul Feast's base necrotic damage is converted to physical damage. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to necrotic damage.

{Soul Fragments} now restore health instead of granting ward. The health restored is equal to the ward you would have been granted.

nodes.name: Incision
nodes.description:
Soul Feast has a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

Physical ailments inflicted by Soul Feast deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on your missing health.

stats.statName: Physical Ailment Damage per 100 Missing Health

nodes.name: Blood Tethers
nodes.description: Soul Feast has a chance to cast {Blood Tether} on enemies it hits.
nodes.altText:
{Blood Tether} is a spell that attaches to an enemy, drawing blood from them to deal physical damage over time. 25% of the damage dealt is leeched .

An enemy cannot have more than one tether at a time. Tethers last 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Blood from Souls
nodes.description: When you kill an enemy with Soul Feast it has a chance to create a {Blood Splatter} around the target.

nodes.name: Hellmind
nodes.description: Soul Feast has additional chance to inflict damned on hit based on your Intelligence.

nodes.name: No Rest for the Wicked
nodes.description: When you kill a damned enemy with Soul Feast, you have a chance to grant your minions {Frenzy} for 3 seconds.

stats.statName: Minion Frenzy Chance On Damned Kills

nodes.name: Original Sin
nodes.description: If the number of cursed enemies within 15 meters is at or below a threshold shortly after you cast Soul Feast, then a number of enemies within that range are {Marked for Death} to reach that threshold of cursed enemies.
nodes.altText: For example if the threshold is 6 and only 2 cursed enemies remain in the area after casting Soul Feast up to 4 other enemies in the area will be Marked for Death.

stats.statName: Marks For Death to reach threshold

nodes.name: Bones of the Accursed
nodes.description: For each {Curse} on the target, Soul Feast hits grant more ward and deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Wrest
nodes.description: {Soul Fragments} from bosses or rare enemies grant significantly more ward.

stats.statName: Ward Granted From Rares Or Bosses

nodes.name: Usurp
nodes.description: {Soul Fragments} from rare or boss enemies also grant you mana. Modifiers to the amount of ward granted by Soul Fragments also apply to the amount of mana gained from this node.

stats.statName: Mana Granted From Rares Or Bosses

nodes.name: Queen of Flies
nodes.description:
When you hit a poisoned enemy with Soul Feast it spreads all stacks of your stacks of poison from that enemy to a number of other enemies within 5 metres.

Has no effect if you have the {Toxic Craving} node.

nodes.name: Engorged
nodes.description: Soul Feast costs less mana and has a chance based on your current mana to draw back {Greater Soul Fragments}, which grant more ward (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Greater Fragment Chance per 10 Current Mana

nodes.name: Another Strife
nodes.description: When Soul Feast hits an enemy {Cursed} with {Spirit Plague}, {Decrepify}, {Marked for Death}, or {Penance} it spreads those {Cursed} from that enemy to a number of other enemies within 5 metres.
nodes.altText: This does not spread {Curses} that the enemy hit by Soul Feast is not afflicted by.

nodes.name: Celerity
nodes.description: {Soul Fragments} return to you faster and Soul Feast has a chance to grant you {Haste} for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Crimson Bounty
nodes.description: Soul Feast can hit more targets.

nodes.name: Withering Maw
nodes.description: Soul Feast inflicts {Withering} on hit, an ailment which increases the curse damage taken.

nodes.name: Thought Corrosion
nodes.description:
Poison Chance from all sources is converted to armor shred for Soul Feast and armor shred applied by Soul Feast has increased effect.

The {Diseased Soul} node now inflicts you with armor shred on cast instead of poison.

stats.statName: Poison Self on Cast -> Armor Shred

skills.name: Spirit Plague
skills.description: Curses a target with a powerful necrotic damage over time effect which lasts 3 seconds. Spreads to a single nearby target on target death.
skills.altText: Added spell damage applies at 150% effectiveness per second.

nodes.name: Spirit Plague
nodes.description: Curses a target with a powerful necrotic damage over time effect. Spreads to a single nearby target on target death.

nodes.name: Hindering Affliction
nodes.description: Enemies afflicted by Spirit Plague are now also slowed.

nodes.name: Plague Burst
nodes.description: You have a chance to spread Spirit Plague when you hit an afflicted enemy.

stats.statName: Chance To Spread On Hitting Afflicted Enemy

nodes.name: Putrid Recovery
nodes.description: You gain ward when hitting an enemy afflicted by Spirit Plague.

nodes.name: Agonizing Expanse
nodes.description: Spirit Plague spreads when you critically strike an afflicted target.

stats.statName: Plague Spreads On Crit Against Afflicted Target

nodes.name: Enfeeblement
nodes.description: Enemies you inflict with Spirit Plague are also inflicted with Frailty.

nodes.name: Contagion
nodes.description: Spirit Plague is now cast in an area around the target, but costs more mana.

nodes.name: Plague's Purview
nodes.description: Spirit Plague is cast in a larger area.

nodes.name: Scourge
nodes.description: Spirit Plague deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but no longer spreads.

nodes.name: Plague of Eyes
nodes.description: Spirit Plague has additional spell necrotic damage for each point of Intelligence

nodes.name: Toxic Transmission
nodes.description: Enemies you inflict with Spirit Plague are also inflicted with poison for the same duration.

nodes.name: Gift of Death
nodes.description: Spirit Plague has a chance to summon a {Poison Wisp} when it kills an enemy, a minion which lasts for 15 seconds and poisons nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Efficacious Application
nodes.description: Spirit Plague costs less mana and lasts longer.

nodes.name: Discharge
nodes.description: Spirit Plague spreads after a duration. (This does not affect the maximum number of spreads.)

nodes.name: Perpetuity
nodes.description: Spirit Plague has increased cast speed and lasts longer.

nodes.name: Anguish
nodes.description: Enemies afflicted by Spirit Plague are also feared.

nodes.name: Conductor of Plagues
nodes.description: Spirit Plague is now a combo skill. Directly recasting Spirit Plague within 2 seconds will cause up to 3 inflicted enemies to spread Spirit Plague to other enemies around them.

nodes.name: Pestilence
nodes.description: You gain increased global damage over time when you afflict an enemy with Spirit Plague. This effect lasts 4 seconds and can stack up to 13 times.

nodes.name: Plague Bearer
nodes.description: Enemies you inflict with Spirit Plague are also inflicted by {Plague} for the same duration. {Plague} is an ailment that deals poison damage over time, spreads between enemies, and does not stack.

nodes.name: Queen of Plagues
nodes.description: {Plague} inflicted by Spirit Plague has additional Poison Penetration.

nodes.name: Endless Decay
nodes.description: You gain increased poison damage when you afflict an enemy with Spirit Plague. This effect lasts 4 seconds and can stack up to 13 times.

nodes.name: Rotten to the Core
nodes.description: Spirit Plague deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Concentrated Rot
nodes.description: Spirit Plague deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but spreads in a smaller area.

nodes.name: Calamitous
nodes.description: Spirit Plague spreads to additional targets, but costs more mana.

nodes.name: Hemorrhage
nodes.description: Enemies you inflict with Spirit Plague are also inflicted with bleeding for the same duration.
nodes.altText: Bleed applied this way cannot be converted to a different ailment

nodes.name: Exsanguination
nodes.description: Bleed inflicted by Spirit Plague has additional Bleed Penetration, but you are now also inflicted with bleeding.

nodes.name: Defilement
nodes.description: You gain mana when Spirit Plague kills an enemy.

nodes.name: Laceration
nodes.description: You have a chance to apply bleed when you hit an enemy afflicted by Spirit Plague.

stats.statName: Chance To Bleed Afflicted Enemies On Hit

skills.name: Spirit Thorns
skills.description: Releases a burst of thorns towards enemies in the target direction. Thorns deal physical damage on hit and multiple thorns can hit the same target.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 60% effectiveness. 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit.

skills.name: Spriggan Form
skills.description:
Transform into a forest spriggan, increasing your spell casting capabilities, and gaining 4 new abilities.

Your mana is replaced with Rage while in spriggan form. When your Rage reaches 0 you automatically transform back into your human form. Your starting Rage is equal to your maximum mana. Rage slowly decays over time at a constant rate.
skills.altText:
The four new abilities are: Spirit Thorns, Thorn Shield, Summon Vine and Summon Healing Totem.

While in spriggan form you have 50% increased spell damage and +300 armor.

nodes.name: Overgrowth
nodes.description: {Vines} deal more damage and have more health (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Creeping Underbrush
nodes.description: You now have a chance to summon a new Vine next to a nearby enemy when a {Vine} dies. Vines have increased attack and cast speed.

stats.statName: Summon Vine Chance On Vine Death

nodes.name: Blades of the Forest
nodes.description:
After using Summon Vine, Human Form is now replaced with {Infestation}, which converts your 2 nearest {Vines} into {Hives} and transforms you to {Swarmblade Form}.

This requires you to have Swarmblade Form unlocked.

nodes.name: Garden of Rage
nodes.description:
Your {Vines} have a chance to grant you {Rage} on hit. Melee hits have a higher chance to grant Rage than spell hits.

If you have the {Great Vine} node the rage gained is 200% higher.

stats.statName: Chance to Gain Rage on Vine Melee Hit
Chance to Gain Rage on Vine Spell Hit

nodes.name: Great Vine
nodes.description:
You can now only summon 1 {Vine} at a time up to a maximum of 6, but they have significantly more health, size, threat generation and their melee attacks deal significantly more damage in a larger area (all multiplicative with other modifiers).

Indirect casts only create a vine on every third cast.

nodes.name: Barbed Thicket
nodes.description: You now have a chance to also cast Thorn Shield on the nearest {Vine} when you cast Thorn Shield. Other allies with Thorn Shield deal global increased physical damage and have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

stats.statName: Chance To Cast Thorn Shield On Nearest Vine

nodes.name: Spikeburst
nodes.description: {Thorn Burst} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

nodes.name: Stinging Bramble
nodes.description: {Thorn Burst} and Spirit Thorn hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Glacial Grove
nodes.description: You now also have a chance to cast {Maelstrom} when you directly cast Thorn Shield.

stats.statName: Chance To Cast Maelstrom On Thorn Shield

nodes.name: Ironbark
nodes.description: You have additional armor and increased armor while in Spriggan Form.

nodes.name: Deep Roots
nodes.description: Thorn Shield lasts longer.

nodes.name: Eterra's Bulwark
nodes.description: Thorn Shield grants additional armor and increased armor.

nodes.name: Introspection
nodes.description: Thorn Shield can now only target you and can no longer attach to other allies.
nodes.altText: This doesn't affect the Thorn Shield cast on other allies from the {Voice of the Thicket} node in the {Werebear} skill tree.

stats.statName: Thorn Shield Can Only Target You

nodes.name: Bulb Growth
nodes.description: Thorn Shield has a chance to recast itself on the same target when it expires.

nodes.name: Briar Shell
nodes.description: Thorn Shield reflects additional flat damage to attackers.

nodes.name: Roar of the Woodland
nodes.description:
After directly casting Thorn Shield, Human Form is now replaced with {Bark Skin}, which adds 4 seconds to the duration of every Thorn Shield on you and transforms you to {Werebear Form}.

This requires you to have Werebear Form unlocked.

nodes.name: Leaf Barrier
nodes.description: You gain ward equal to your armor when you enter Spriggan Form.

nodes.name: Friend of the Forest
nodes.description:
You summon an additional {Spriggan} when you enter Spriggan Form which doesn't count towards your Spriggan limit, but does count towards your companion limit.

You will not summon an additional Spriggan if you are already at your maximum companion limit.
nodes.altText: Spriggan summoned this way disappears when you exit Spriggan Form.

nodes.name: Totem Warden
nodes.description: Your {Healing Totems} have more health and duration (both multiplicative with other modifiers) and you have increased summoning speed while in Spriggan Form.

nodes.name: Spiked Totems
nodes.description: Healing Totems directly cast from this tree now also shoot thorns. {Thorn Totem's} skill tree, mana cost, cooldown and totem limit also apply to Healing Totems.

stats.statName: Thorn Totem Tree Benefits Healing Totems

nodes.name: Unbound Garden
nodes.description: You now always summon 3 Healing Totems and you can have additional maximum Healing Totems.

nodes.name: Guardian of Nature
nodes.description: Healing Totems have increased healing effectiveness.

nodes.name: Ire of Trees
nodes.description: Healing Totems are converted to Fury Totems and now restore {Rage} instead of healing, but can only affect you.
nodes.altText: This effect is affected by increased healing effectiveness.

nodes.name: Wrath of the Glade
nodes.description: You now have a chance to cast Spirit Thorns from each of your Healing Totems when you directly cast Spirit Thorns.

nodes.name: Rose Meadow
nodes.description: Spirit Thorns and Thorn Shield deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Ancestral Call
nodes.description: You gain {Rage} and ward when you directly cast Spirit Thorns and hit at least 1 enemy.

nodes.name: Branch Storm
nodes.description: Spirit Thorns has a chance to pierce enemies (continue through targets they hit) and they penetrate enemy physical and cold resistance.

stats.statName: Spirit Thorns Physical And Cold Penetration

nodes.name: Spiritwhisperer
nodes.description: You now summon a {Vale Spirit} every 5 direct casts with Spirit Thorns, up to a maximum.

stats.statName: Vale Spirit Every 5 Spirit Thorn Casts

nodes.name: Cycle of Life
nodes.description: Your Healing Totems have a chance to summon a {Vale Spirit} when they die.

stats.statName: Vale Spirit Chance On Healing Totem Death

nodes.name: Valetide
nodes.description:
You can have additional maximum {Vale Spirits} and when you directly cast Spirit Thorns, while at maximum Vale Spirits, you consume them to cast {Entangling Roots} at the target area and you regain {Rage}, which deals more damage when cast this way (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This consumes Entangling Roots' mana cost.

stats.statName: Cast Entangling Roots With Spirit Thorns

nodes.name: Spirit Vortex
nodes.description: You have a chance to cast {Maelstrom} on you when you directly cast Spirit Thorns.

nodes.name: Nightshade
nodes.description: Your hits have a chance to poison enemies while in Spriggan Form and your Vines have a chance to poison enemies.

nodes.name: Ice Branch
nodes.description:
Spirit Thorns, Summon Vines and Thorn Shield's base physical damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage. They also have a chance to freeze enemies.

Poison chance from all sources, for all three skills, is converted to {Frostbite} and effects related to poison now depend on Frostbite instead.

nodes.name: Huntersbane
nodes.description: Your {Vines} now cast thorns from range, instead of using a melee attack. This is affected by nodes on this tree that affects Spirit Thorns, but they only fire 1 projectile and {Great Vine} fires 3 projectiles.

stats.statName: Melee Attack -> Ranged Thorns For Vines

skills.name: Summon Bear
skills.description:
Summons a primal bear that follows you into combat. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The bear counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: Primals bears have 300 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

nodes.name: Summon Bear
nodes.loreText: The primal strength of a bear is unmatched

nodes.name: Lacerating Claws
nodes.description: Your Bear deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Thorn Bear
nodes.description: Your Bear now cast {Briar Thorn,} a ranged spell that deals physical damage.

nodes.name: Barbed Thorns
nodes.description: {Briar Thorns} cast by your Bear has a chance to deal double damage.

nodes.name: Shredding Thorns
nodes.description: {Briar Thorns} cast by your Bear has a chance to reduce enemy armor.

nodes.name: Rapid Thorns
nodes.description: Your Bear have increased cast speed.

nodes.name: Retaliatory Thorns
nodes.description:
Your Bear retaliate with {Thorn Burst} when they take 75 damage.

This effect has a 1 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Nightshade Bear
nodes.description: {Briar Thorns} and {Ice Thorns} cast by your Bear have a chance to poison enemies.

nodes.name: Tearing Thorns
nodes.description: {Thorn Burst} cast by your Bear deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has additional chance to bleed on hit and.

nodes.name: Winged Thorns
nodes.description: Thorns from {Thorn Burst} cast by your Bear travel faster and farther.

nodes.name: Forceful Swipes
nodes.description: Your Bear can use {Swipe} with a 5 second cooldown. Your bear's swipes scale with its own stats, but are affected by your Swipe Tree.

nodes.name: Rapid Swipes
nodes.description: Your Bear's {Swipe} has a shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: Vicious Strikes
nodes.description: Your Bear deal more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and its melee attacks have a higher chance to stun enemies.

nodes.name: Thick Hide
nodes.description: Your Bear has more health and takes less damage at low health.
nodes.altText:
Both of these effects are multiplicative with other modifiers.

Low health is defined % of maximum health.

nodes.name: Claw Totems
nodes.description: You have a chance to summon a {Claw Totem} when your bear kills an enemy.
nodes.altText:
Claw totems do not scale with other nodes on this tree, but are affected by your Swipe Tree.

Claw Totems count 's minions.

stats.statName: Chance To Summon Claw Totem On Kill

nodes.name: Primal Precision
nodes.description: Your Bear has additional critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Unstoppable Force
nodes.description: Your Bear takes less damage from critical strikes and its own critical strikes deal more damage.
nodes.altText: Both of these effects are multiplicative with other modifiers

nodes.name: Armoured Bears
nodes.description: Your Bear has additional armor based on your Strength

nodes.name: Piercing Thorns
nodes.description: {Briar Thorns} cast by your Bear pierces enemies (continue through targets it hits), but your Bear has reduced cast speed.

nodes.name: Ursine Endurance
nodes.description: Your Bear has more health (multiplicative with other modifiers), but {Briar Thorns} now has a cooldown.

nodes.name: Wounded Prey
nodes.description: Your Bear has increased movement speed and deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of bleed on the target (up to 30).

nodes.name: Ursine Dominion
nodes.description: Your Bear's melee attacks and roar have increased area of effect.

nodes.name: Bellowing Roar
nodes.description: Your Bear's roar has increased area and healing effectiveness

nodes.name: Endless Rampage
nodes.description: Your Bear has increased movement speed and cannot be stunned

skills.name: Summon Bone Golem
skills.description: Summons a bone golem, which attacks slowly, but has a 15% chance to retaliate with Bone Shatter when hit.
skills.altText: Bone golems have 400 base health.

nodes.name: Summon Bone Golem
nodes.loreText: The bones of many: divided in life, united in death.

nodes.name: Amalgam of Rogues
nodes.description: Your Golem moves and attacks faster.

nodes.name: Twinned Golems
nodes.description: You summon an additional Golem, but each Golem has reduced maximum health, is smaller, and deals less damage (all multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: This node's modifiers to health and damage are multiplicative with other modifiers

nodes.name: Ivory Twin
nodes.description: Your Golems deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). If Bone Golems have been replaced by another type of Golem, you now have an equal chance to summon a Bone Golem.

stats.statName: Golem Summons Also Summon A Bone Golem

nodes.name: Burning Bones
nodes.description: Your Golem has a chance to ignite enemies, it also has additional fire resistance and deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Charred Bones
nodes.description: Your Golem deals additional fire damage with spells and melee attacks.

nodes.name: Pyre Golem
nodes.description:
You now summon a {Pyre Golem} instead of a Bone Golem.

The base physical damage of Pyre Golems' melee attacks is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to minion fire damage, but not increases to minion physical damage.

Pyre Golems also cast {Infernal Aura}, a spell that deals a burst of fire damage on cast and fire damage over time afterwards.
nodes.altText: If you have multiple golem type nodes, you will summon a random golem.

nodes.name: World Pyre
nodes.description: Your Golem deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers), and {Pyre Golems}’ {Infernal Aura} deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Unnatural Speed
nodes.description: Your Golem causes all nearby minions to move faster, including themselves. This bonus is doubled for the Golems themselves.

nodes.name: Infected Remains
nodes.description: Your Golem has a chance to grant you a stack of {Putrid Coating} when it is hit. Each stack lasts for 8 seconds and grants you a chance to poison enemies.

stats.statName: Chance To Grant Putrid Coating When Hit

nodes.name: Cold Vengeance
nodes.description: Your Golem deals additional melee cold damage and it has a chance to chill attackers when hit.

nodes.name: Deathchill Golem
nodes.description:
You now summon a {Deathchill Golem} instead of a Bone Golem. 

The base physical damage of Deathchill Golems' melee attacks is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to minion cold damage, but not increases to minion physical damage. Death Chill Golems' melee attacks gain a Freeze Rate equal to twice their base damage.

Deathchill Golem also casts Freezing Grasp, a spell that deals cold damage and has high freeze rate. Bosses cannot be frozen by this.
nodes.altText: If you have multiple golem type nodes, you will summon a random golem.

nodes.name: Amalgam of Sentinels
nodes.description: Your Golem has additional health and armor, (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Bladed Fists
nodes.description: Your Golem deals more damage with melee attacks (multiplicative with other modifers), and has an increased chance to stun with melee attacks.

nodes.name: Tower of Bones
nodes.description: Your Golem is larger (multiplicative with other modifiers) and generates more threat, which increases the likelihood of enemies targeting it.

nodes.name: Fragments of the Fallen
nodes.description:
Your Golems have increased size and deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) if you have no other living golems when you summon them.

Your Golems have significantly higher armor for the first 15 seconds of their life when summoned near the corpse of another Golem.

stats.statName: Size if no other living Golems
Damage if no other living Golems

nodes.name: Amalgam of Primalists
nodes.description: Your Golem grants additional armor to nearby minions, including itself.

nodes.name: Hunger
nodes.description: Your Golem's hits restore health to you and itself. This effect restores additional health per 2 Vitality.

nodes.name: Blood Golem
nodes.description:
You now summon a {Blood Golem} instead of a Bone Golem. 

Blood Golems can also cast {Sanguine Orb}, a spell that deals physical damage to nearby enemies over 2 seconds.
nodes.altText: If you have multiple golem type nodes, you will summon a random golem.

nodes.name: Amalgam of Mages
nodes.description: Your Golem deals more spell damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and has an increased chance to stun.

nodes.name: Bone Hail
nodes.description: Your Golem has a higher chance to retaliate with {Bone Shatter} when hit and its Bone Shatter deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Flight of the Femurs
nodes.description: Your Golem's {Bone Shatter} projectiles pierce (continue through targets they hit) and travel faster, causing them to also travel further.

nodes.name: Bone Growth
nodes.description: Your Golem has additional health regeneration based on your total amount of health regeneration.

nodes.name: Marrow Eater
nodes.description: Your Golem gains significantly more armor for 8 seconds whenever a skeleton minion dies nearby.

nodes.name: Betrayal
nodes.description: If you only control one Golem, it has a much higher chance to retaliate with {Bone Shatter} when damaged by hits from allies.
nodes.altText:
This effect only applies to hits that damage the Bone Golem.

The default chance (without taking this node) for an ally's hit to cause a {Bone Shatter} is the same .

stats.statName: Triple Bone Shatter Chance From Ally Hits

nodes.name: Breath of Formosus
nodes.description: Your Golem's {Freezing Grasp} spell now has additional spell damage and base freeze rate per point of Vitality.

stats.statName: Freezing Grasp Freeze Rate per Vitality

nodes.name: Bone Kindling
nodes.description: {Pyre Golems}’ {Infernal Aura} consumes {Skeletons} and {Skeletal Mages} that it hits to deal more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) per minion it consumed.

stats.statName: Infernal Aura Damage Per Skeletal Mage

skills.name: Summon Cryomancer
skills.description: Summons a skeleton mage to assist you. You are limited to 2 mages at a time.
skills.altText:
Skeleton mages have 100 base health. Press A to give your minions an attack command.

You will always summon the skeleton type you have the fewest of.

skills.name: Summon Death Knight
skills.description: Summons a Skeleton Death Knight to assist you.
skills.altText: Skeleton Death Knights have 200 base health and 15% base critical strike chance. Press A to give your minions an attack command.

skills.name: Summon Forged Weapon
skills.description:
Summons a Forged Weapon which lasts for 20 seconds and is affected by the stats and attack rate of your weapon. You can control up to 6 Forged Weapons at once.

Forged Weapons have 220 based health.
skills.altText: Press A to give your minions an attack command.

skills.name: Summon Frenzy Totem
skills.description: Summons a totem that grants Frenzy to all nearby allies. Frenzy increases attack and cast speed by 20%.
skills.altText: Frenzy totems have 120 base health and last 6 seconds.

nodes.name: Reinforced Totem
nodes.description: Frenzy Totem has more health (multiplicative with other modifiers) and lasts longer.

nodes.name: Reach
nodes.description: Frenzy Totem affects allies or enemies in a larger area.

nodes.name: Healing Pulse
nodes.description: While in range of your Frenzy Totem, you have a chance to cast {Eterra's Blessing} on a random ally each second.

stats.statName: Chance To Cast Eterra's Blessing While In Range

nodes.name: Thorn Idol
nodes.description: Frenzy Totem stores a portion of the damage it receives, releasing it .
nodes.altText: The damage is scaled by your increased minion damage.

stats.statName: Percentage Of Max Health Taken Before Releasing

nodes.name: Improved Thorn Idol
nodes.description: Frenzy Totem also stores a percentage of the damage taken by you.

stats.statName: Percent Of Player Damage Taken Stored By Totem

nodes.name: Lash Out
nodes.description: Frenzy Totem has a chance to cast {Ice Thorns} when hit by enemies.
nodes.altText: This is not affected by your ice thorns tree

nodes.name: Sloth Totem
nodes.description:
Frenzy Totem is now {Sloth Totem,} which will now slow and reduce the armor of enemies instead of granting Frenzy.

Increased effect of frenzy is converted to increased effect of armor shred.

nodes.name: Grounded
nodes.description:
Frenzy Totem is no longer summoned at your cursor; instead it is always placed 1 meter in the direction you're facing.

Frenzy Totem costs less mana and grants additional melee damage.

stats.statName: Frenzy Totem Summoned 1m In Front Of Player

nodes.name: Dig In
nodes.description: You are tethered to the totem while you remain within 5 meters of it, and while tethered you deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: The range of the tether is not affected by Increased Area for Area Skills stats.

nodes.name: Totemic Reach
nodes.description: Frenzy Totem's tether has a higher range.

nodes.name: Dig Deep
nodes.description: You have additional critical strike multiplier while tethered.

nodes.name: Revitalizing Totem
nodes.description: Allies affected by Frenzy Totem are granted increased health regeneration.

nodes.name: Symbol of Haste
nodes.description: When you summon Frenzy Totem, you and your companions are granted {Haste} for a duration (doubled for companions).

nodes.name: Symbol of Selflessness
nodes.description: Frenzy Totem's buffs are more effective, but Frenzy Totem now affects only companions.

nodes.name: Warding Totem
nodes.description: Companions affected by Frenzy Totem have higher physical and elemental resistance.

nodes.name: Mortuary Totem
nodes.description: While affected by Frenzy Totem, you revive downed companions faster.

nodes.name: Invigorated Renewal
nodes.description: Whenever you revive a downed companion, Frenzy Totem casts {Healing Nova.}
nodes.altText: The area of the Healing Nova is affected by Increased Area for Area Skills stats.

stats.statName: Healing Nova Cast When Companion Is Revived

nodes.name: Venomous Intent
nodes.description: Allies affected by Frenzy Totem are granted a chance to poison enemies.

nodes.name: Rabidity
nodes.description: Frenzy Totem's Frenzy buff is more effective.

nodes.name: Reckless Frenzy
nodes.description: When you summon Frenzy Totem you gain a temporary buff that grants you more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and increased melee attack speed, but also increases the damage you take.

nodes.name: Bestial Frenzy
nodes.description: When you summon Frenzy Totem, your companions are granted additional melee physical damage for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Furious Cry
nodes.description: Summoning Frenzy Totem refreshes companion ability cooldowns.

nodes.name: Maim
nodes.description: While Frenzy Totem is active, your Sabertooth's {Flurry Swipes} casts an additional time when used.

nodes.name: Lead The Pack
nodes.description: While Frenzy Totem is active, your Wolves' howls also grant increased critical strike chance to you and your allies.

stats.statName: Increased Critical Strike Chance Granted By Wolf Howl

nodes.name: Venom Spray
nodes.description: While Frenzy Totem is active, your Scorpion's {Venom Nova} hits in a larger area.

skills.name: Summon Healing Totem
skills.description: Summons a totem that heals nearby allies. Healing totems have 100 base health and last 6 seconds.

skills.name: Summon Hive
skills.description:
Summons a Hive that releases Locusts while enemies are nearby. You can have a maximum of three Hives by default and each Hive contains 12 Locusts.

You are limited to 12 active Locusts and each Locust lasts up to 12 seconds.
skills.altText: The rate at which it summons Locusts scales with minion cast speed. Locusts scale with your minion stats.

skills.name: Summon Pyromancer
skills.description: Summons a skeleton mage to assist you. You are limited to 2 mages at a time.
skills.altText:
Skeleton mages have 100 base health. Press A to give your minions an attack command.

You will always summon the skeleton type you have the fewest of.

skills.name: Summon Raptor
skills.description:
Summons a primal raptor that ferociously attacks your enemies. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The raptor counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: The raptor has 240 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

nodes.name: Iridescent Plumage
nodes.description: Your Raptor has additional elemental resistance and have additional dodge chance.

nodes.name: Screech
nodes.description: Your Raptor gains the ability to {Screech} at enemies, shredding their physical resistance. Screech has a 10 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Earsplitting Roar
nodes.description: {Screech} has increased cooldown recovery speed and causes enemies it hits to {Bleed}.

nodes.name: Brilliant Display
nodes.description: Your Raptor automatically reduces the cooldown of your other companions' activatable abilities by 3 seconds. This effect has an 8 second cooldown.

stats.statName: Raptor Reduces Other Minion Cooldowns Every 8 Seconds

nodes.name: Razor Wings
nodes.description: Your Raptor deals additional melee physical damage.

nodes.name: Thrill of the Hunt
nodes.description: When your Raptor kills an enemy, it gains {Haste} for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Adaptation
nodes.description: If your Raptor has 10 kills in this zone it evolves, gaining 15% more size and damage while you remain in the zone (damage multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: Using a town portal will reset this buff even if you return to the same zone.

nodes.name: Taste for Flesh
nodes.description: Your Raptor gains more damage for 10 seconds when it kills an enemy (multiplicative with other modifiers). This effect can stack.

nodes.name: Scent of Blood
nodes.description: Your Raptor deals more damage to bleeding targets (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: In for the Kill
nodes.description: Your Raptor gains more melee damage for each nearby bleeding enemy (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: Nearby is 6 meters.

stats.statName: Melee Damage Per Nearby Bleeding Enemy

nodes.name: Ravage
nodes.description: Raptor deals more critical strike damage and has a higher chance to critically strike against bleeding targets (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Tear Flesh
nodes.description: Your Raptor's melee attacks have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Sharp Claws
nodes.description: Your Raptor deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Acidic Bile
nodes.description: Your Raptor gains the ability to cast {Poison Spit,} blinding the enemy and applying stacks of poison. 8 second cooldown.
nodes.altText: Blinded enemies have 50% less critical hit chance and are less accurate at range. Does not stack.

nodes.name: Infected Wounds
nodes.description: Whenever your Raptor hits a bleeding enemy with a melee attack, its next melee attack has additional slow chance based on the number of bleed stacks on that enemy.
nodes.altText: At 2 points invested, your Raptor gains 100% melee slow chance when hitting an enemy with 2 stacks of bleed.

nodes.name: Dripping Blood
nodes.description: When you Raptor hits an enemy, bleeds on that enemy have a 25% chance to double in speed.

stats.statName: Chance On Hit To Double Bleed Speed

nodes.name: Cornered
nodes.description: Your Raptor deals more damage for each percent of its missing health (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: At 2 points, this node gives the Raptor 198% more damage while it is at 1% health.

stats.statName: Damage For Each % Of Missing Health

nodes.name: Broken Tooth
nodes.description: Your Raptor has increased melee attack speed, but has a 10% chance to lose 10% of its current health on melee attack.

stats.statName: Chance To Lose 10% Of Current Health On Melee Attack

nodes.name: Vicious Rampage
nodes.description: Your Raptor gains increased effect from {Rampage.}
nodes.altText: Does not increase the size gain from Rampage.

nodes.name: Predator
nodes.description: Your Raptor has increased chance to critically strike.
nodes.altText: Base critical strike chance is 5%

nodes.name: Vexation
nodes.description: {Rampage} lasts longer.

nodes.name: Eager
nodes.description: {Rampage} costs less mana.

nodes.name: Challenger
nodes.description: Your Raptor uses {Rampage} if it encounters a rare or boss minion, if it is able to.

stats.statName: Raptor Rampages Near Rares And Bosses

nodes.name: Primal Rage
nodes.description: {Rampage} fears enemies when it is activated.

nodes.name: Menacing Aura
nodes.description: While your Raptor is {Rampaging,} enemies within 5 meters of it have a chance to be slowed each second.

skills.name: Summon Sabertooth
skills.description:
Summons a primal sabertooth cat that leaps into combat. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The sabertooth cat counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: The sabertooth has 240 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

nodes.name: Summon Sabertooth
nodes.loreText: The quick hunter catches the prey

nodes.name: Prowling Juggernaut
nodes.description: Your sabertooth has more health (multiplicative with other modifiers) and recovers a percentage of its maximum health when it leaps.

nodes.name: Frozen Fur
nodes.description: Your Sabertooth has additional cold resistance and it has a chance to chill attackers that hit it.

nodes.name: Shatterhide
nodes.description: All physical damage dealt to your Sabertooth is converted to cold damage. Consequently it is reduced by cold resistance, but not by physical resistance.

nodes.name: Constitution
nodes.description: Your Sabertooth has more health (multiplicative with other modifiers) and increased health regeneration.

nodes.name: Camouflage
nodes.description: Your Sabertooth has additional dodge chance, and it gains more dodge rating (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each point of Dexterity you have.
nodes.altText: This scales with your dexterity, not the dexterity of your sabertooth.

nodes.name: Savage Catalyst
nodes.description: When your Sabertooth directly uses a melee attack and hits at least one target it has a chance to use {Flurry Swipes}

nodes.name: Sabermaw
nodes.description: Your Sabertooth deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and its melee attacks have increased area.

nodes.name: Keen Senses
nodes.description: Your Sabertooth has increased critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Opportunistic Hunter
nodes.description: Your Sabertooth's critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Gauging Claws
nodes.description: Your Sabertooth's hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Agile and Deadly
nodes.description: Your Sabertooth has increased attack speed.

nodes.name: Frenzy
nodes.description: Your Sabertooth has increased melee attack speed and has a chance to cause enemies to bleed, but your Sabertooth takes more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: From the Brink
nodes.description: While your Sabertooth is on low health it deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and leeches a portion of the melee damage it deals .
nodes.altText: Low health is defined % of maximum health.

nodes.name: Patient Predator
nodes.description: Your sabertooth deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Frost Fang
nodes.description: Your Sabertooth deals additional cold damage with spells and melee attacks.

nodes.name: Ice Tiger
nodes.description:
Your Sabertooth becomes an {Ice Tiger,} converting 100% of its base melee physical damage to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not with increases to physical damage.

The Ice Tiger's melee attacks have a Freeze Rate equal to twice their base damage.

The Ice Tiger's melee attacks' {Physical} tags are swapped for {Cold} tags.

nodes.name: Rhyme Heart
nodes.description: Your Sabertooth gains the ability to cast {Frost Nova,} a cold spell that hits all nearby enemies and has a freeze rate of 30. Frost Nova has a 10 second cooldown.
nodes.altText: {Frost Nova} scales with your minion's stats.

nodes.name: Ice Bringer
nodes.description:
Your sabertooth retaliates with {Ice Vortex} when it takes 70 or more damage.

Ice Vortex is a spell that deals cold damage over time in an area, and scales with your Sabertooth's increases to cold damage, spell damage, and damage over time.
nodes.altText: {Ice Vortex} scales with your minion's stats.

nodes.name: King of the Tundra
nodes.description: Your sabertooth has additional Freeze Rate Multiplier and it has more Freeze Rate per stack of Chill on the target (multiplicative with other modifiers)

nodes.name: Northwind
nodes.description: Your Sabertooth's cooldowns for all of its abilities are shorter.
nodes.altText: This includes abilities granted from this tree.

nodes.name: Heavy Paws
nodes.description: Your Sabertooth deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have an increased chance to stun enemies, but your Sabertooth can no longer leap.

nodes.name: Pounce
nodes.description: When your sabertooth leaps it uses {Flurry Swipes} when it lands.

nodes.name: Cornered Beast
nodes.description: Your Sabertooth's {Flurry Swipes} inflict Bleed on hit and if you or your Sabertoth are below half health it always crits.

stats.statName: Flurry Swipes Crit Chance if You or Your Sabertooth are below 50% Health

nodes.name: Hunter's Trail
nodes.description: When your sabertooth leaps you gain {Haste} for a duration

stats.statName: You gain Haste when your Sabertooth Leaps

nodes.name: Snow Stalker
nodes.description: Your Sabertooth deals more damage (mutliplicative with other modifiers) per stack of {Chill} on the target.

skills.name: Summon Scorpion
skills.description:
Summons a scorpion that follows you into combat. Its attacks with its tails inflict a long lasting poison. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The scorpion counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: The scorpion has 400 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

nodes.name: Summon Scorpion
nodes.loreText: Fierce and lethal, with a penchant for the weak.

nodes.name: Steel Carapace
nodes.description: Your Scorpion is larger and has additional physical and poison resistance

nodes.name: Venomous Maw
nodes.description: Your scorpion's attacks grant health on hit, and have a higher chance to poison on hit.

nodes.name: Envenomed Prey
nodes.description: Your Scorpion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of Poison on the target (up to 30).

nodes.name: Pinches and Pokes
