nodes.description: Your Scorpion's melee attacks deal damage in a larger area, and your Scorpion is larger.

nodes.name: Blood Poisoning
nodes.description: Your Scorpion's has a chance to cause enemies to bleed, and it deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers)

nodes.name: Ironclad
nodes.description: Your Scorpion deals additional melee damage, and its Poison Chance from all sources is converted to Armour Shred Chance.

nodes.name: Maternal Instinct
nodes.description: Your Scorpion spawns a number of {Baby Scorpions} every 10 seconds. Baby Scorpions have an unlimited duration but can be killed.
nodes.altText:
Baby Scorpions count .

Whenever your Scorpion summons baby scorpions it summons the maximum amount it can control.

nodes.name: Temper Tantrum
nodes.description: {Baby Scorpions} deal more damage (damage is multiplicative with other modifiers) and their attacks have a chance to poison enemies.

nodes.name: Sweet Release
nodes.description: Activating your Scorpion's ability summons additional {Baby Scorpions.}
nodes.altText: This cannot exceed your maximum number of Baby Scorpions.

nodes.name: Fertility Rites
nodes.description: {Baby Scorpions} are summoned more frequently.

nodes.name: Scurry
nodes.description: {Baby Scorpions} have increased attack and movement speed.

nodes.name: Chromatic Carapace
nodes.description: Your Scorpion has additional elemental resistance.

nodes.name: Cold-Blooded
nodes.description:
Your scorpion takes less cold damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

The base physical damage of your scorpion's melee attacks is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to minion cold damage, but not with increases to minion physical damage. These melee attacks now have a {Cold} tag instead of a {Physical} tag.

Your scorpion's melee attacks also gain a chance to freeze, with a freeze rate equal to twice their base damage.

nodes.name: Ice Sting
nodes.description: Your Scorpion deals more cold damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a higher chance to freeze enemies.

nodes.name: Get Over Here
nodes.description: Your Scorpion now has the ability to pull an enemy that is out of range into melee range every 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Thunder Stinger
nodes.description:
Your Scorpion's activated ability is now {Shock Nova}, a spell that deals lightning damage and applies 3 stacks of {Shock} on hit.

If you do not have the {Cold-Blooded} node the base physical damage of your scorpion's melee attacks is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to physical damage. These melee attacks now have a {Lightning} tag instead of a {Physical} tag.

nodes.name: Shock and Claw
nodes.description: Your Scorpion has a chance to {Shock} on hit and deals more lightning damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of shock on the target.

nodes.name: Rest for the Wicked
nodes.description: Whenever your Scorpion kills an enemy, it heals for a percentage of its maximum health.

nodes.name: Frost Thorns
nodes.description: Your Scorpion can cast {Frost Thorns}, a cold spell with seeking projectiles.
nodes.altText: Frost Thorns are not affected by your Ice Thorns tree.

nodes.name: Noxious Carapace
nodes.description: Your Scorpion deals more poison damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Acid Lob
nodes.description: Your Scorpion casts {Acid Lob,} a ranged spell that explodes on impact, poisoning enemies and reducing their armor. Acid Lob has a 6 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Miasma
nodes.description: Your scorpion's {Venom Nova} deals damage in a larger area, and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: Increased poison effect multiplies poison's damage and its reduction to poison resistance.

nodes.name: Deeper Puddle
nodes.description: {Venom Nova} leaves behind a {Poison Pool} for a duration, which applies a stack of poison each second to enemies standing in the pool.

nodes.name: Pus Sacks
nodes.description: Your Scorpion has a chance when it is hit to create a {Poison Pool.} This effect has a 10 second cooldown.
nodes.altText: Poison Pool applies a stack of poison to enemies standing in it each second.

stats.statName: Chance To Create Poison Pool When Hit

nodes.name: Brood Invigoration
nodes.description: {Poison Pools} grant you and your minions increased attack speed and cast speed and a chance to poison enemies.

nodes.name: Winternid Jaws
nodes.description: Your scorpion has a chance to inflict {Frostbite} on hit and its Bleed Chance from all sources is converted to Frostbite Chance.

skills.name: Summon Skeletal Mage
skills.description:
Summons a Skeletal Mage to assist you. You are limited to 2 Skeletal Mages at a time.
Skeletal Mages cast Dread Bolt, which has 150% added damage effectiveness and has a 50% chance to apply Damned on hit.
skills.altText:
Skeletal Mages have 100 base health.

You will always summon the Skeletal Mage type you have the fewest of.

skills.name: Summon Skeleton
skills.description: Summons a skeleton warrior or skeleton archer to guard you. You are limited to 3 skeletons at a time.
skills.altText:
Skeletons have 100 base health.

You will always summon the skeleton type you have the fewest of.

Increased Area for Minion Area Skills stats affect summoned skeletons' melee attacks.

nodes.name: Summon Skeleton
nodes.loreText: An army of the dead awaits your command
nodes.altText: Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Necrotic Conviction
nodes.description: Skeleton Warriors have more maximum health, while Skeleton Rogues and Archers deal more damage (all multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Aegis of Death
nodes.description: When one of your Skeletons dies, another Skeleton is healed to full health.
nodes.altText: Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Unbound Necromancy
nodes.description: Summon Skeletons costs less mana, and your Skeletons have improved base critical strike chance.
nodes.altText: Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Soul Catcher
nodes.description: You gain ward whenever one of your Skeletons dies.
nodes.altText:
Skeletons that are unsummoned do not trigger this effect.

Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Mind Catcher
nodes.description: You gain mana whenever one of your Skeletons dies.
nodes.altText:
Skeletons that are unsummoned do not trigger this effect.

Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Memory Catcher
nodes.description: You have increased spell damage if one of your Skeletons has died recently (past 4 seconds).
nodes.altText:
Skeletons that are unsummoned do not trigger this effect.

Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Unholy Rage
nodes.description: Skeletons have increased attack speed, cast speed, and movement speed.
nodes.altText: Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Lone Guardian
nodes.description: Your Skeletons have increased critical strike chance, but you can only have one Skeleton Warrior summoned at once.
nodes.altText:
This does not affect your overall Skeleton limit.

Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Mightier than the Sword
nodes.description: Skeleton Warriors are removed from the pool of Skeletons that can be summoned.

nodes.name: Marrow Walkers
nodes.description: You can summon more Skeletons.
nodes.altText: Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Hollow Walkers
nodes.description: You can summon more Skeletons.
nodes.altText: Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Grave Walkers
nodes.description: You can summon more Skeletons.
nodes.altText: Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Shambling Steel
nodes.description: Skeleton Archers are removed from the pool of Skeletons that can be summoned.

nodes.name: Fire Arrow
nodes.description: Skeleton Archers use {Fire Arrow}, which is a bow attack that deals physical and fire damage and ignites on hit. Fire Arrow has a 6 second cooldown by default.

nodes.name: Multishot
nodes.description: {Fire Arrow} shoots more arrows that deal more bow damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but has a longer cooldown.
nodes.altText: {Fire Arrow} has a 6 second cooldown by default.

nodes.name: Ice Arrow
nodes.description: Converts {Fire Arrow} into {Ice Arrow}, converting its base fire damage to cold damage. Ice Arrow cannot ignite, but has a chance to freeze.
nodes.altText: The freeze rate of {Ice Arrow} increases by 6% per point of intelligence. All nodes which affect Fire Arrow affect Ice Arrow instead.

nodes.name: Dread Phalanx
nodes.description: Skeletons deal more damage and have more health (both multiplicative with other modifiers) and are larger, but you can only summon half (rounded up).
nodes.altText:
More damage is multiplicative with other modifiers.

Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Bone Armor
nodes.description: Skeleton Warriors can now cast {Bone Armor}, which reduces damage taken by 40% for 4 seconds and has a 10 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Impatience
nodes.description: Skeletons are able to use their abilities more frequently, and {Bone Armor} cast by Skeletons lasts longer.
nodes.altText:
Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

{Bone Armor} grants armor and reduces damage taken. 10 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Bone Share
nodes.description: Skeleton Warriors can target allies with {Bone Armor}.  Bone Armor has 75% reduced effect on non-minions.
nodes.altText:
Allies refers to you, your minions, and your party members and their minions.

{Bone Armor} grants armor and reduces damage taken. 10 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Marrow Tap
nodes.description: Skeletons leech a portion of the damage they deal .
nodes.altText: Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Empty the Graves
nodes.description: You summon multiple Skeletons in a single cast, but Summon Skeleton costs more mana. This does not affect your maximum number of Skeletons.
nodes.altText:
This does not increase your maximum number of total Skeletons that you can have active at one time. This allows you to summon them simultaniously.

Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Sweeping Strikes
nodes.description: Skeletons have an increased area of effect with melee attacks, and your Skeletons deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Skeleton Rogue
nodes.description: Adds Skeleton Rogues to the pool of Skeletons that can be summoned. Rogues teleport to distant enemies, throw shurikens, and use melee attacks.
nodes.altText:
Teleport has an 8 second cooldown by default.

Shurikens has a 4 second cooldown by default, and can store 2 charges.

nodes.name: Immortal
nodes.description: When a Skeleton dies, there is a chance to summon a random new one at the same location after 3 seconds.
nodes.altText:
The new Skeleton will be a random one of the types active on this tree.

Skeletons refers to Skeleton Archers, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Warriors.

nodes.name: Acid Flask
nodes.description: Skeleton Rogues throw {Acid Flasks}, which inflict poison and armor shred on hit. Acid Flask has a 5 second cooldown.
nodes.altText:
Acid Flask has a 5 second cooldown by default.

The area of effect of Skeleton Rogues' Acid Flask is affected by Increased Area for Minion Area Skills stats.

nodes.name: Individual Operator
nodes.description: Skeleton Rogues gain more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and increased cooldown recovery speed, but the amount is divided by your maximum number of summonable Skeleton Rogues.
nodes.altText:
Your limit for each type of Skeleton is equal to your maximum number of Skeletons divided by how many types of Skeletons you have enabled, rounded up.

For example if you can summon just Skeleton Warriors and Skeleton Rogues and can summon up to 7 skeletons, then your maximum number of Skeleton Rogues is 7/2 which is 3.5 which is rounded up to 4.

skills.name: Summon Skeleton Rogue
skills.description: Summon a primal wolf to guard you and attack your enemies

skills.name: Summon Spriggan
skills.description:
Summon a spriggan that casts spells to attack your enemies and has a passive Healing Aura that restores 10 health per second. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The spriggan counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: The spriggan has 160 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

nodes.name: Summon Spriggan
nodes.loreText: Eterra will guide you, and her avatars will keep you safe.

nodes.name: Briar Summoner
nodes.description:
Your Spriggan can now use {Summon Vine}, melee minions that poison enemies they hit, up to a maximum of 6 Vines.

These Vines are not affected by your Vine limit or nodes on the {Spriggan Form} tree.

nodes.name: Vine Mastery
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's Summon Vine ability has a shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: Deadly Thicket
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's summoned {Vines} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Forest Raiser
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's {Summon Vine} ability now summons three vines at a time, but has a significantly longer cooldown (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Attuned Vines
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's summoned {Vines} have more health (multiplicative with other modifiers) and additional poison resistance.

nodes.name: Floral Ascendance
nodes.description: Your Spriggan deals more spell damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Thorn Barrage
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's {Thorn Volley} has a chance to fire 2 extra Thorns.

nodes.name: Barbed Assault
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's {Thorn Volley} always fires 1 extra Thorn and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Brutal Mire
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's {Thorn Volley} hits deal more damage to immobilized, stunned or frozen enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Thorn Hit Damage To Immobilized Enemies
Thorn Hit Damage To Stunned Enemies
Thorn Hit Damage To Frozen Enemies

nodes.name: Vile Bramble
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's {Thorn Volley} hits deal more damage to poisoned enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Thorn Hit Damage To Poisoned Enemies

nodes.name: Aura of Life
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's {Healing Aura} and {Rejuvenating Wind} restore more health.

nodes.name: Aura of Kinship
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's {Healing Aura} now also grants allies additional spell damage.

nodes.name: Aura of Retribution
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's {Healing Aura} now also grants allies additional base critical chance and critical strike avoidance.

nodes.name: Arboreal Vitality
nodes.description: Your Spriggan has more health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Warding Bark
nodes.description: Your Spriggan has additional armor and physical resistance.

nodes.name: Creeping Roots
nodes.description: Your Spriggan can now cast {Ensnaring Roots}, a wave of roots deals physical damage and roots enemies it hits for 1.5 seconds. Rooted enemies take physical damage over time until they are freed.

nodes.name: Barbed Roots
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's {Ensnaring Roots} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Branches of Winter
nodes.description:
Thorn Volley's and Ensnaring Roots' base physical damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage. They also have a chance to freeze enemies.

Poison chance from all sources, for both skills, is converted to {Frostbite} and effects related to poison now depend on Frostbite instead.

nodes.name: Protective Roots
nodes.description: Your Spriggan now casts {Ensnaring Roots} towards you whenever there are enemies around you, rather than it casting towards enemies near itself.

nodes.name: Nature’s Reach
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's {Ensnaring Roots} has a shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: Lasting Roots
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's {Ensnaring Roots} lasts longer.

nodes.name: Aura of Loyalty
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's {Healing Aura} restores significantly more health to minions.

nodes.name: Frostleaf
nodes.description: Your Spriggan has a higher chance to freeze enemies. Your Spriggans Aura grants its allies a higher chance to freeze enemies.

nodes.name: Aura of Evasion
nodes.description:
Your Spriggan's {Healing Aura} now also grants allies additional dodge rating per point of your Attunement.

This effect is doubled on minions.

nodes.name: Garden of Nourishment
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's {Ensnaring Roots} now heals allies it hits.

nodes.name: Invading Underbrush
nodes.description: Your Spriggan's {Ensnaring Roots} can no longer be dodged.

nodes.name: Thorny Stalks
nodes.description: While you control a Spriggan, you and your Spriggans reflect flat damage to attackers per point of Vitality.

skills.name: Summon Squirrel
skills.description:
Summons a primal wolf that follows you into combat. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The wolf counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: The Wolf has 160 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks. Press A to give your minions an attack command.

skills.name: Summon Storm Crows
skills.description:
Summons Storm Crows up to your companion limit. The Storm Crow casts spells from a distance. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The Storm Crow counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: The crow has 200 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

skills.name: Summon Storm Totem
skills.description:
Summons a totem that casts lightning storms around nearby enemies.

Storm totems last 8 seconds, and you cannot control more than 1 at once.
skills.altText: Storm totems have 120 base health

nodes.name: Storm Totem
nodes.loreText: Harness the storm

nodes.name: Static Field
nodes.description: Storm Totem attacks have a chance to shock enemies.

nodes.name: Exploit Weaknesses
nodes.description: Storm Totem hits deal more damage to shocked enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Press Your Advantage
nodes.description: Storm Totem has more critical strike chance against shocked enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: More Crit Chance Against Shocked Enemies

nodes.name: Fulgurite Core
nodes.description: Storm Totem has additional Spell Lightning Damage based on your Shock Chance
nodes.altText: The totem's shock chance and your shock chance for minions are not taken into account, just your own shock chance.

stats.statName: Spell Lightning Damage per 10% Shock Chance

nodes.name: Overstimulation
nodes.description: Enemies hit by Storm Totem recently have reduced movement speed.

nodes.name: Stormrider
nodes.description: You have increased movement speed if Storm Totem has hit a shocked an enemy recently (last 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Grounding Conduit
nodes.description: You deal increased lightning damage if a Storm Totem has hit a shocked an enemy recently.

nodes.name: Shielding Totem
nodes.description: Allies near your Storm Totem have additional lightning resistance.

nodes.name: Steel Plating
nodes.description: Storm Totem has increased health.

nodes.name: Heavy Impact
nodes.description: Storm Totem hits have an increased chance to stun enemies and the stuns they inflict last longer.

nodes.name: Limited Resistance
nodes.description: Storm Totem costs less mana to summon.

nodes.name: Lightning Raider
nodes.description: Storm Totem has increased cast speed.

nodes.name: Direct Current
nodes.description: Improves Storm Totem's base critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Power Shunt
nodes.description: Storm Totem critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Blizzard
nodes.description:
Storm Totem now creates a {Blizzard} around itself; enemies caught in the blizzard take cold damage over time and have a 25% chance to be chilled each second.

All shock chance is converted to chill chance. All effects which are conditional on shock are conditional on chill instead.

nodes.name: Icicles
nodes.description: Storm Totem deals additional cold spell damage.

nodes.name: Chill to the Bone
nodes.description: Storm Totem hits have a chance to chill enemies.

nodes.name: Frostbite
nodes.description: {Blizzard} has a chance to inflict enemies with {Frostbite} each second.

nodes.name: Piercing Winds
nodes.description: {Frostbite} inflicted by {Blizzard} has additional Cold Penetration.

nodes.name: Storm's Reach
nodes.description: Storm Totem's individual lightning strikes damage enemies in a larger area
nodes.altText: If you have the {Blizzard} node this affects the area of the blizzard.

nodes.name: Shockfury
nodes.description: Allies near your Storm Totem are granted additional melee lightning damage.

nodes.name: Discharge
nodes.description: Storm Totem casts {Lightning Nova} when it dies.
nodes.altText: {Lightning Nova} scales with your minion's stats.

nodes.name: Intensity
nodes.description: Storm Totem deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but cost more mana.

nodes.name: Thunder Totem
nodes.description: When you cast Storm Totem, you have a 25% chance to instead cast {Thunder Totem,} which deals increased damage, and has increased duration, health, and critical strike chance.
nodes.altText: Visuals for this node are not yet implemented

stats.statName: Increased Damage, Duration, Health, Critical Strike Chance

skills.name: Summon Thorn Totem
skills.description: Summons a totem that fires thorns at nearby enemies. You can have a maximum of two thorn totems by default.
skills.altText:
Totems scale with your minion or totem stats, not your stats.
Added minion spell damage applies at 75% effectiveness for the Thorns fired by the Thorn Totem.

Thorn totems have 120 base health and last 6 seconds by default.

nodes.name: Summon Thorn Totem
nodes.loreText: The forest will go to war to keep its inhabitants safe

nodes.name: Forested Expanse
nodes.description: You can have additional Thorn Totems active, but Summon Thorn Totem costs more mana.

nodes.name: Grove Mind
nodes.description: You summon your maximum number of Thorn Totems at once in a ring around the target location, but your maximum number of Thorn Totems is reduced and Summon Thorn Totem costs additional mana per additional totem summoned.
nodes.altText: Thorn totems that would be created in innaccessible locations are not created at all, but still increase the mana cost.

stats.statName: Totems Summoned In Ring At Location
Mana Cost Per Additional Totem Summoned

nodes.name: Memories of Eterra
nodes.description: You regain mana when a Thorn Totem dies or is unsummoned.
nodes.altText: You can only regain mana from Thorn Totems that were summoned directly.

nodes.name: Totemic Wisdom
nodes.description: Summon Thorn Totem costs less mana.

nodes.name: Venom Tipped Thorns
nodes.description: Thorn Totem hits have a chance to poison enemies.

nodes.name: Rotten Core
nodes.description:
When Thorn Totems die or are unsummoned they release a {Poison Burst}, which deals a small amount of physical spell damage on hit and inflicts poison.

Thorn Totem gains a {Poison} tag, but this does not affect the damage type of Thorn Totems' other abilities.
nodes.altText: If you have the {Pillars of Heorot} node, 100% of Poison Burst's hit damage is converted to cold.

nodes.name: Lasting Affliction
nodes.description: Poison and Frostbite inflicted by Thorn Totem last longer.

nodes.name: Pillars of Heorot
nodes.description:
Thorn Totem's thorns gain a chance to freeze and 100% of their base physical damage is converted to cold damage. Consequently its damage now scales with your totems' increases to cold damage instead of physical damage.

All poison chance is converted to frostbite chance for Thorn Totems.

Thorn Totems have additional cold resistance.
nodes.altText: Freeze rate grants a chance to freeze based on the enemy's health.

nodes.name: Frost Attunement
nodes.description: Thorn Totem has a higher chance to freeze enemies, and a greater chance to freeze enemies for each point of Attunement you have.
nodes.altText: This scales with your attunement, not the attunement of your totems.

stats.statName: Freeze Rate Multiplier Per Point Of Attunement

nodes.name: Winterwood
nodes.description: Thorn Totem deals additional spell cold damage, including its own thorns.

nodes.name: On Astral Winds
nodes.description: Thorn Totems deal more spell damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but their projectiles travel more slowly.

nodes.name: Torrent of Thorns
nodes.description: Thorn Totems have a chance to release twice .

nodes.name: Titan's Bane
nodes.description: Thorn Totems fire only one thorn with each burst, but they have massively increased cast speed, are more accurate with their thorns, and their thorns' hits deal more damage to rare enemies and bosses (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: {Torrent of Thorns} can still double the number of thorns in each burst to 2.

stats.statName: Thorn Hit Damage vs Rares and Bosses

nodes.name: Spriggans' Wrath
nodes.description: Thorn Totem's thorns can pierce enemies up to a maximum

nodes.name: Ancient Power
nodes.description: Thorn Totem deals more damage, but has less cast speed (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Impale
nodes.description: Thorn Totem's thorns have a chance to deal double damage on hit.

nodes.name: Shred Armour
nodes.description: Thorn Totem hits have a chance to shred enemy armor.

nodes.name: Winged Thorns
nodes.description: Thorn Totem's thorns travel faster and farther.

nodes.name: Frenetic Attunement
nodes.description: You summon Thorn Totem faster and all Thorn Totems have increased cast speed.

nodes.name: Oaken Protection
nodes.description: Thorn Totems have more health (multiplicative with other modifiers) and additional physical resistance.

nodes.name: Guided Thorns
nodes.description: Thorn Totem's thorns now seek nearby targets, but Thorn Totem has less cast speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: This doesn't change the fact that multiple thorns cannot hit the same target

nodes.name: Eternal Forest
nodes.description: Thorn Totems last longer and have more health (multiplicative with other modifiers)

nodes.name: Lethal Thicket
nodes.description: Thorn Totems have an increased critical strike chance and deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Nightshade Briar
nodes.description: Thorn Totem's thorn hits deal more damage per stack of poison on the target (multiplicative with other modifiers) up to a maximum.
nodes.altText:
At 20 or more stacks this grants 80% more hit damage.

If you have taken the {Pillars of Heorot} node, this node's effect depends on the number of Frostbite stacks on the target instead of the number of poison stacks.

skills.name: Summon Vine
skills.description:
Summons 1 poisonous vine.

Vines are melee minions that inflict poison on hit. You can have up to 12 vines.

skills.name: Summon Vines
skills.description:
Summon 3 poisonous vines for 8 seconds.

Each vine has 50 base health.

skills.name: Summon Volatile Zombie
skills.description: Summons a Volatile Zombie which trudges towards the nearest enemy. When it reaches an enemy or dies, it explodes dealing physical and fire damage to surrounding enemies.
skills.altText:
You are limited to 6 active zombies. Summoning more will cause older ones to explode.

Volatile Zombies' have 200 base health and their health decays at an accelerating rate.

nodes.name: Volatile Zombie
nodes.description: Summons a Volatile Zombie which shambles towards an enemy and explodes.

nodes.name: Leap Attack
nodes.description: Zombies now leap towards their targets, up to a maximum distance.

nodes.name: Fervor
nodes.description: Zombies deal more damage and have more movement speed (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Grave Attunement
nodes.description: Zombies deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and the Zombies' health decays slower, but they also move slower.

nodes.name: Giant Zombie
nodes.description: You now summon a single large zombie with more health, that deals more damage in a larger area (all multiplicative with other modifiers), but Volatile Zombie costs more mana.
nodes.altText: Both the area and damage modifiers also affect {Repulsive Vomit}.

stats.statName: Chance to Summon from Indirect Casts

nodes.name: Corrosive Guts
nodes.description: {Vomit} has a chance to shred enemy armor each second.

nodes.name: Bone Pact
nodes.description:
When a Zombie dies you have a chance to cast {Marrow Shards} from the Zombie towards a nearby enemy.

Marrow Shards does not cost health when cast this way.

stats.statName: No Health Cost For Marrow Shards

nodes.name: Repulsive Vomit
nodes.description: Zombies will now {Vomit} on enemies before exploding, dealing physical and poison damage over time. Zombies lose 33% of their maximum health per second while vomiting.
nodes.altText:
The damage of the vomit can be converted by the {Flammable Vitae} and {Horrific Vessels} nodes.

The area of effect of the vomit is not affected by Increased Area for Minion Area Skills stats.

nodes.name: Corpse Bane
nodes.description: The explosion applies {Mark for Death} to enemies hit, but Volatile Zombie costs more mana.

stats.statName: Mark For Death On Explosion Hit

nodes.name: Dreadful Horde
nodes.description: You summon additional Zombies per cast, but Volatile Zombie costs more mana and has additional cooldown duration.

stats.statName: Chance to For Additional Zombies from Indirect Casts

nodes.name: Wretched Innards
nodes.description: {Vomit} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Army of Rot
nodes.description: The explosion has a chance to poison enemies.

nodes.name: Path of Destruction
nodes.description: The explosion deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Shepherd of Thralls
nodes.description: The explosion deals damage in a larger area and when a Zombie dies it creates a {Skeleton Vanguard}, but Volatile Zombie costs more mana.

nodes.name: Putridity
nodes.description: {Vomit} has a chance to poison enemies each second.

nodes.name: Vile Force
nodes.description: When a Zombie dies it creates {Corpse Parasites} for 4 seconds, but Volatile Zombie costs more mana.

nodes.name: Rite of the Grave
nodes.description: The explosion deals damage in a larger area, but Zombies no longer move.

nodes.name: Grand Sacrifice
nodes.description:
When a Zombie dies you have a chance to cast {Sacrifice} on another nearby minion.

Sacrifice cast this way costs less mana.

nodes.name: Forceful Commander
nodes.description: You summon Zombies faster and Volatile Zombie costs less mana.

nodes.name: Necromantic Fervor
nodes.description:
You are healed for a portion of the Zombies' maximum health when they explode. 

The amount healed is affected by your increased healing effectiveness.
nodes.altText: As an example, if the Zombie has 1000 max health, you are healed for 10 health when it explodes.

nodes.name: Flammable Vitae
nodes.description:
The explosion's base physical damage and {Vomit}'s base physical and poison damage are converted to fire. Consequently their damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical or poison damage.

Poison chance from all sources is converted to ignite chance and effects related to poison now depend on ignite instead.
nodes.altText: No effect if you have taken {Horrific Vessels}.

nodes.name: Horrific Vessels
nodes.description: The explosion's base physical and fire damage and {Vomit}'s base physical damage are converted to necrotic. Consequently their damage scales with increases to necrotic damage, but not increases to physical or fire damage.

nodes.name: Pull of the Grave
nodes.description:
Zombies instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

nodes.name: Army of Nightmares
nodes.description: The explosion now fears enemies for a short duration.
nodes.altText: Fear causes enemies to flee from you and your allies. Enemies can only be affected by Fear once.

nodes.name: Effigy of Combustion
nodes.description:
When a Zombie dies you have a chance to cast {Infernal Shade} on an enemy near the zombie.

Infernal Shade cast this way costs less mana.
nodes.altText: Infernal Shade is a spell that causes the target enemy and all nearby enemies take fire damage per second.

nodes.name: Ferocious Horde
nodes.description: Zombies have increased movement speed per point of missing health, but their health decays faster.

nodes.name: Ravenous
nodes.description: The explosion's hit deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) against bosses and rare enemies.

stats.statName: Hit Damage to Bosses And Rare Enemies

nodes.name: Daunting Blast
nodes.description: The explosion has an increased chance to stun enemies.

nodes.name: Awakening Presence
nodes.description: When a minion dies you have a chance to cast Volatile Zombie at its location, expending its mana cost.
nodes.altText:
This cannot be triggered by Zombies or Corpse Parasites.
This cannot summon more than 1 Zombie.

stats.statName: Chance to Cast Volatile Zombie On Minion Death

nodes.name: Vital Ward
nodes.description: {Necromantic Fervor} now grants ward rather than health. The amount of ward gained is not affected by increased healing effectiveness.

stats.statName: Health -> Ward From Zombie Max Health

skills.name: Summon Wolf
skills.description:
Summons a primal wolf that follows you into combat. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

While you have your maximum number of wolves, the ability is replaced with {Howl}.

The wolf counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: The Wolf has 220 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

nodes.name: Summon Wolf
nodes.loreText: Call to the forest and it will call back to you in the howls of the wolves

nodes.name: Canine Agility
nodes.description: Your Wolves have additional dodge chance, and have increased dodge rating for each point of strength you have.

nodes.name: Leap Attack
nodes.description: Your Wolves gain a {Leap Attack} to close the gap on distant enemies. Leap Attack has a 10 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Victory Howl
nodes.description: Wolves have a chance to {Howl} on kill. This does not expend Howl's mana cost or put it on cooldown.

nodes.name: Serrated Claws
nodes.description: Wolves have a chance to cause enemies to bleed with their melee attacks.

nodes.name: Patient Hunters
nodes.description: Wolves deal more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) and bleed they inflict has additional Physical Penetration.

nodes.name: Snarl
nodes.description:
When you kill an enemy one of your Wolves has a chance to {Howl}. This does not expend Howl's mana cost or put it on cooldown.

Howl also grants more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and increased melee attack speed to all affected allies.

nodes.name: On the Hunt
nodes.description: Wolves have increased attack and move speed.

nodes.name: Savage Hunters
nodes.description: Wolves deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Legendary Bite
nodes.description: Your Wolves' melee hits deal more damage, have a greater chance to stun (both multiplicative with other modifiers) and it has improved base critical strike enemies, but has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Pack Hunters
nodes.description:
You can have an additional Wolf active at once.

You can have an additional companion active at once.

The extra wolf counts towards your companion limit.

nodes.name: Earthborn
nodes.description: Wolves have additional armor, and their attacks leech a portion of the physical damage they deal .

nodes.name: Winterborn
nodes.description: Wolves have a chance to chill enemies on hit.

nodes.name: Tundra Stalkers
nodes.description: Wolves deal additional cold damage with attacks, and have an increased chance to stun enemies.

nodes.name: Wolfen Recovery
nodes.description: Wolves have additional base health regeneration and increased health regeneration.

nodes.name: Safety In Numbers
nodes.description: You can summon Wolves up to your maximum number of companions.
nodes.altText: When you cast Summon Wolf, you will summon wolves up to your companion limit.

nodes.name: Stormborn
nodes.description: Your Wolves have a chance to retaliate with {Storm Bolt} when hit or when they hit an enemy.
nodes.altText: {Storm Bolts} cast by your Wolves are affected by your {Gathering Storm} tree and scale with minion damage.

nodes.name: Lupine Endurance
nodes.description: Your Wolves have more health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Storm Caller's Reprisal
nodes.description: Your Wolves have a chance to retaliate with {Storm Bolt} when hit, and deal more spell damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: {Storm Bolts} cast by your Wolves are affected by your {Gathering Storm} tree and scale with minion damage.

nodes.name: Cloud Runners
nodes.description: Your Wolves deal more lightning damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Storm Jaws
nodes.description: Your Wolves' melee attacks deal additional lightning damage.

nodes.name: Shaman's Bond
nodes.description: Your Wolves now deal increase damage and have increased health for each point of Attunement you have.
nodes.altText: This scales with your attunement, not the attunement of your wolves.

nodes.name: Howl of Might
nodes.description: Wolves have more damage and dodge rating (multiplicative with other modifiers). This bonus is tripled for Wolves that have used {Howl} recently.
nodes.altText: Recently refers to the past 4 seconds

nodes.name: Relentless
nodes.description: Your Wolves cannot be stunned.

nodes.name: Battlecry
nodes.description: The buffs granted by {Howl} last longer and wolves have a chance to Howl when they hit a rare or boss enemy. This does not expend Howl's mana cost or put it on cooldown.

nodes.name: Call of the Wind
nodes.description: Your Wolves' {Howl} also grant {Haste} for a short duration.

nodes.name: Crippling Wounds
nodes.description: Bleed inflicted by Wolves lasts longer and wolves have a chance to slow on hit and when hit.

nodes.name: Frozen Fangs
nodes.description:
Your Wolves gain the {Ice Bite} ability, which deals higher damage in a larger area, with a 6 second cooldown. 20% of the remaining cooldown is recovered every time the Wolf hits with an ability other than Ice Bite, including their basic attack.

Ice Bite deals melee cold damage. Consequently this damage scales with your wolves' increases to melee and cold damage, but not increases to their physical damage.
nodes.altText: Ice Bite has 100% increased radius relative to the wolves' basic attack.

skills.name: Summon Wraith
skills.description: Summons a wraith that rapidly fades from this world, but will seek and attack your foes while it remains.
skills.altText:
You are limited to 6 active wraiths.

Wraiths have 60 base health.

nodes.name: Summon Wraith
nodes.loreText: Unleash the echoes of the dead

nodes.name: Locus Of Resurrection
nodes.description: {Wraiths} appear at the target location, but Summon Wraith costs more mana.

nodes.name: Locus Of Death
nodes.description: {Wraiths} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have increased melee attack speed, but are unable to move.

nodes.name: Dark Scythe
nodes.description: {Wraiths} have more melee attack speed (multiplicative with other modifers).

nodes.name: Echoes Inside
nodes.description: Summon Wraith summons three additional {Wraiths} with each cast, but Summon Wraith also costs more mana and now has a cooldown.

nodes.name: Stygian River
nodes.description: Summon Wraith has a shorter cooldown, and there is a shorter delay between each {Wraith} being summoned.

nodes.name: Army of Wraiths
nodes.description: Summon Wraith summons additional {Wraiths} per cast, but costs more mana.

nodes.name: Spectral Ambush
nodes.description: Removes the delay between each {Wraith} being summoned, but fewer Wraiths are summoned per cast (rounded up).

nodes.name: Haunting
nodes.description: {Wraiths} have more maximum health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Twin Spirits
nodes.description: {Wraiths'} health no longer decays, but you are limited to only 2 wraiths.
nodes.altText: Effects which increase your maximum wraiths do not apply if you have this node.

nodes.name: Sanguine Spirits
nodes.description: Bleed inflicted by {Wraiths} has increased effect and duration.
nodes.altText: Increased bleed effect increases the damage of bleed multiplicatively with other modifiers, but additively with other sources of increased bleed effect.

nodes.name: Sequel of Avarice
nodes.description: {Wraiths} are larger, deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and hit a larger area with their melee attacks.

nodes.name: Covenant of Souls
nodes.description: You can control more {Wraiths} at once.
nodes.altText: This node has no effect if you have the Twin Spirits node.

nodes.name: Reapers
nodes.description: {Wraiths} deal additional necrotic damage with attacks and spells.

nodes.name: Wraith Bringer
nodes.description: Summon Wraith has increased cast speed and costs less mana.

nodes.name: Fallen Reclamation
nodes.description: {Wraiths} move faster.

nodes.name: Flame Wraith
nodes.description: You have a chance to instead summon a {Flame Wraith}, which casts fireballs. Additionally all {Wraiths} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Spirit Link
nodes.description: {Wraiths} have more additional strike chance, and when you cast Summon Wraith you gain increased critical strike chance equal to its mana cost for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Dawn of the Fall
nodes.description: {Wraiths} have additional critical strike chance and leech a portion of the damage they deal with crits

nodes.name: Dusk of the Living
nodes.description: {Wraiths'} critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Necrotic Hunger
nodes.description: {Wraiths} deal more necrotic damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and leech a portion of the necrotic damage they deal .

nodes.name: Grave Reality
nodes.description: {Wraiths} have more maximum health (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Summon Wraith costs more mana and has reduced cast speed.
nodes.altText: The health bonus is multiplicative with other modifiers.

nodes.name: Noxious Blades
nodes.description: {Wraiths}' have additional posion penetration and their melee attacks have a chance to poison enemies on hit.

nodes.name: Putrid Wraith
nodes.description: You have a chance to instead summon a {Putrid Wraith}, which Poisons enemies from a distance. Additionally all {Wraiths} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Delay the End
nodes.description: {Wraiths}' health decays more slowly.

nodes.name: Wraith Feast
nodes.description: Your critical strikes restore health to your {Wraiths}.

nodes.name: Serrated Scythes
nodes.description: {Wraiths} have a chance to cause enemies to bleed on hit.

nodes.name: Spectre of Death
nodes.description: {Wraiths} have a chance to apply {Damned} to nearby enemies on death.
nodes.altText: Damned is a stacking ailment that lasts for 3 seconds, deals 25 base Necrotic damage and reduces targets health regeneration by 20% per stack.

nodes.name: One Foot in the Grave
nodes.description: Gain ward for each {Wraith} summoned, but their health decays more quickly.

skills.name: Swarm Strike
skills.description: A circular attack which deals damage to all nearby enemies, then gathers nearby locusts to create a Swarm around you which deals damage over time to nearby enemies.
skills.altText:
For each Locust consumed the Swarm gains +15 melee physical, +15 melee poison damage, 15% increased duration, and 15% increased area.

Added melee damage applies at 350% effectiveness to the initial hit and at 300% per second to the Swarm.

skills.name: Swarmblade Form
skills.description:
Transform into an agile Swarmblade, increasing your melee capabilities, and gaining 4 new abilities.

Your mana is replaced with Rage while in swarmblade form. When your Rage reaches 0 you automatically transform back into your human form. Your starting Rage is equal to your maximum mana. Rage slowly decays over time at a constant rate.
skills.altText:
The four new abilities are: Armblade Slashes, Swarm Strike, Dash and Summon Hive.

While in Swarmblade Form you have 10% increased melee attack speed and movement speed.

nodes.name: Death by a Thousand Wings
nodes.description: Your Armblade Slash, Dive and {Locust} hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Bloodlust Swarm
nodes.description:
When you create a {Locust Swarm} with Swarm Strike you consume all stacks of bleed from enemies hit by it, causing the {Swarm} to deal increased damage in a larger area per stack of bleed consumed.

The increased area scales up to a maximum.

stats.statName: Locust Swarm Increased Damage Per Bleed

nodes.name: Feverous Stings
nodes.description: Yours and your {Locusts'} hits have a chance to poison enemies.

nodes.name: Grand Colony
nodes.description: You can control additional {Locusts} and your Hives contain additional {Locusts}.

nodes.name: Hive Mind
nodes.description: Hives release {Locusts} more frequently and if you have an active {Locust Swarm} it also releases Locusts every second.
nodes.altText: A Locust Swarm does not lose damage or otherwise change .

stats.statName: Locusts per 3 seconds from Locust Swarm

nodes.name: Swarmkeeper's Call
nodes.description:
After using Summon Hive, Human Form is now replaced with {Cleanse Hives}, which releases all {Locusts} from up to 2 Hives, replaces them with {Healing Totems} and transforms you to {Spriggan Form}.

This requires you to have Spriggan Form unlocked.

nodes.name: Bountiful Hibernacula
nodes.description: When a {Hive} releases a {Locust} you regain health and {Rage}.

nodes.name: Release the Horde
nodes.description: Your Armblade Slash can now hit your own Hives which causes them to release {Locusts}.

nodes.name: Frost Bites
nodes.description:
The base damage of Swarm Strike, {Locust Swarm}, and Dive is converted to cold, and {Locusts'} base melee damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage. These attack all also gain a chance to freeze enemies.

Poison chance from all sources is converted to {Frostbite} chance while in Swarmblade Form.

Your {Locusts'} Poison chance from all sources is converted to {Frostbite} chance.

nodes.name: Chitin Sleet Storm
nodes.description: You and your {Locusts} have a higher chance of freezing enemies per point of Attunement.

nodes.name: Spiked Vespiary
nodes.description: Your Hives now cast {Thorns} {Thorn Totems}, rather than releasing {Locusts}. They can cast thorns a limited number of times equal to the number of Locusts they would have released.
nodes.altText: If you have the {Release the Horde} node, hitting a Hive will release thorns.

nodes.name: Locust Agility
nodes.description: You and your {Locusts} have a higher chance to dodge and additional armor while in Swarmblade Form.

nodes.name: Water Strider
nodes.description:
You cast {Maelstrom} a number of times when you Dive. 

This consumes a portion of Maelstrom's mana cost as {Rage}.

nodes.name: Springer's Fury
nodes.description: You gain {Rage} when you dodge.

nodes.name: Ironclad Beetle
nodes.description: All of your dodge rating is converted to armor while in Swarmblade Form.

nodes.name: Slashing Spiral
nodes.description: Your Swarm Strike, {Locust Swarm} and your {Locusts'} melee attacks all deal damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Vampiric Mandibles
nodes.description: Your {Locust Swarm} leeches a portion of the damage it deals .

nodes.name: Neverending Drove
nodes.description: {Locust Swarm} lasts longer and Swarm Strike hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Swarm's Fury
nodes.description:
After using Swarm Strike, Human Form is now replaced with {Angered Swarm}, which adds 4 seconds to the duration of your {Locust Swarm} and transforms you to {Werebear Form}.

This requires you to have Werebear Form unlocked.

nodes.name: Inspiring Swarm
nodes.description: A random active companion uses its active ability after you directly use Swarm Strike.

stats.statName: Random Companion Ability After Swarm Strike

nodes.name: Plague of Locusts
nodes.description: Your {Locust Swarm} deals more damage per {Locust} consumed (multiplicative with other modifiers) and while the Locust Swarm is active you have additional chance to poison on hit per {Locust} consumed.

stats.statName: Poison Chance Per Locust While Swarm Active

nodes.name: Earth Stinger
nodes.description: You and your {Locusts} deal additional melee physical damage while in Swarmblade Form and your {Locust Swarm} deals additional melee physical damage per active {Locust} consumed when you use Swarm Strike.

stats.statName: Swarm Melee Physical Damage Per Locust

nodes.name: Needle-Like Sting
nodes.description: You and your {Locusts} have improved base critical strike chance while in Swarmblade Form.

nodes.name: Hornet Nest
nodes.description: You can only control half {Locusts}, but they have significantly more health, deal significantly more damage in a larger area (all multiplicative with other modifiers) and are larger.
nodes.altText: The maximum number of locusts is rounded up.

nodes.name: Grasshopper's Frenzy
nodes.description: You regain {Rage} when you or your {Locusts} critically hit.

stats.statName: Rage Gain When You Or Locusts Crit

nodes.name: Viper's Call
nodes.description:
Your {Serpent Strike} tree now applies to Armblade Slashes, and it does not require a spear.

This effect does not include the base additional poison chance or increased poison duration from Serpent Strike.

stats.statName: Serpent Strike Tree Affects Armblade Slashes

nodes.name: Endless Pressure
nodes.description: You regain health and {Rage} when you or your {Locusts} kill an enemy or when you hit a rare enemy or boss.

stats.statName: Health And Rage Gain On Kill
Health And Rage Gain On Boss or Rare Hit

nodes.name: Windfury Strikes
nodes.description:
You gain a stack of {Howling Cascade} when you use Armblade Slash and hit at least one enemy. Reaching 6 stacks consumes them to cast {Tornado}.

This consumes Tornado's mana cost.

stats.statName: Gain Howling Cascade Stacks On Hit With Slash

nodes.name: Army of the Tempest
nodes.description: Reduce the maximum stacks of {Howling Cascade} required to cast {Tornado}, and tornadoes cast via Howling Cascade deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Howling Cascade Stacks To Proc Tornado

nodes.name: Locust Master
nodes.description:
The first part of the Armblade Slashes combo now has a cooldown. While it is on cooldown Slashes are replaced with {Summon Locust}.

Additionally when you use Armblade Slashes and hit at least one enemy, all existing Locusts gain additional melee physical damage. This buff stacks and does not expire.

nodes.name: Wasp Flight
nodes.description: You have increased attack and cast speed while in Swarmblade form.

nodes.name: Soaring Scourge
nodes.description: {Locust Swarm} now scales with your minion damage rather than your damage.

nodes.name: Carnage
nodes.description: Swarm Strike and Dive deal more damage and you regain {Rage} on hit with both skills.

stats.statName: Rage On Hit With Swarm Strike And Dive

skills.name: Swipe
skills.description: A melee attack that hits all enemies in an area in front of you. Unaffected by weapon range.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Swipe
nodes.loreText: A primalist should wield his weapon like the claws of a bear, like the talons of an eagle.

nodes.name: Claws of the Bear
nodes.description: Swipe deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and slows enemies, but has a cooldown.
nodes.loreText: A bear need only strike once to claim its prey

nodes.name: Twin Fangs
nodes.description: While you have {Aspect of the Panther} you have additional critical strike multiplier per Stack. This bonus is doubled if you are dual wielding.

nodes.name: Blood Beast
nodes.description: Swipe hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Rending
nodes.description: Swipe has a chance to shred physical resistance on hit.

nodes.name: Duality of Nature
nodes.description: When you attack with Swipe and hit at least one enemy you gain health if you are transformed, or mana if you are not transformed.
nodes.altText: This effect cannot be triggered by Claw Totems or other minions using Swipe.

nodes.name: Culling
nodes.description:
Swipe hits instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health). 

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

nodes.name: Sabertooth's Endurance
nodes.description:
Each stack of {Aspect of the Panther} lasts longer and grants increased health regen.

Aspect of the Panther also applies to your {Sabertooth} if you have one.
nodes.altText: This effect does not apply to your Sabertooth if triggered by Claw Totem or other minion using Swipe.

stats.statName: Aspect of the Panther affects Sabertooth

nodes.name: Storm Claw
nodes.description:
Swipe deals more lightning damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Every 3 seconds, your next Swipe deals damage in a larger area and has its base damage converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not with increases to physical damage.

Swipe gains a {Lightning} tag.

nodes.name: Lagon's Fury
nodes.description: The cooldown for the effect of the {Storm Claw} node is reset if you summon a Totem.

stats.statName: Storm Claw Cooldown Reset on Totem Summon

nodes.name: Umjol's Guidance
nodes.description:
Swipe has a chance to shock on hit and a portion of Swipe's base damage is converted to Lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not with increases to physical damage.

If you have 5 points in this node, Swipe loses its {Physical} tag.
nodes.loreText: Umjol the Shaman taught his followers how to draw the power of lightning from the sky, even while Lagon rested.

nodes.name: Storm Scour
nodes.description: Swipe has additional lightning penetration based on your Attunement

nodes.name: Way of the Hunt
nodes.description: Swipe deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and leeches a portion of damage dealt .

nodes.name: Claws of Stone
nodes.description: You have a chance to summon a {Claw Totem} when Swipe kills an enemy.

stats.statName: Chance To Summon Claw Totem On Kill

nodes.name: Aspect of the Panther
nodes.description: When you attack with Swipe and hit at least one enemy you gain a stack of Aspect of the Panther. Each stack lasts 4 seconds and grants you more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: Stacks are not multiplicative with each other, i.e. 2 stacks gives 10% more damage, not 10.25%.

nodes.name: Lion's Strength
nodes.description: Aspect of the Panther can have more stacks and each stack grants you additional melee damage.

stats.statName: Maximum Aspect of the Panther Stacks

nodes.name: Wild Calling
nodes.description: When you attack with Swipe and hit at least one enemy you have a chance to call forth a {Spirit Wolf} from each of your summoned wolves.
nodes.altText: This effect cannot be triggered by Claw Totems or other minions using Swipe.

nodes.name: Lupine Attunement
nodes.description: When you attack with Swipe and hit at least one enemy you call forth a {Spirit Wolf} from each of your summoned wolves.
nodes.altText: This effect cannot be triggered by Claw Totems or other minions using Swipe.

nodes.name: Feline Hunter
nodes.description: While you have {Aspect of the Panther} you have increased attack and cast speed. This does not scale with the number of stacks.

nodes.name: Wrath of the Wild
nodes.description: Swipe deals more Lightning Damage per stack of Shock on the target and more Cold Damage per stack of Chill on the target.
nodes.altText: These effects are multiplicative with each other and with other modifiers.

nodes.name: Wengarian Reach
nodes.description: Swipe deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

nodes.name: Primal Resonance
nodes.description: When you use Swipe and hit at least one enemy your nearest companion uses its companion ability and is restored to full health.
nodes.altText:
This does not require the companion's ability to be off cooldown and does not put it on cooldown or invoke its mana cost.

Downed companions are excluded.

This effect cannot be triggered by Claw Totems or other minions using Swipe.

stats.statName: Nearest Companion Health Restored on Hit

nodes.name: Avatar of Stone
nodes.description: When you use Swipe and hit at least one enemy, all your totems gain +1 Melee Damage and +1 Spell Damage. This buff stacks and lasts until the totems expire.
nodes.altText: This effect cannot be triggered by Claw Totems or other minions using Swipe.

nodes.name: Trapper
nodes.description: Swipe hits deal more damage against slowed enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers)

skills.name: Symbols of Hope
skills.description:
Every 2 seconds, summons a symbol that orbits you, causing you and your allies' attacks and spells to deal 3 additional fire damage and increasing health regeneration by 20%.

Activate to consume the symbols, granting 100 ward and 5% less damage taken per symbol for 3 seconds.

You can have up to 3 symbols at a time.

skills.name: Synchronized Strike
skills.description:
Requires a melee weapon.

Jump forward and strike in an area in front of you while shadows appear and simultaneously strike on either side of you.

nodes.name: Synchronized Strike
nodes.description:
Requires a melee weapon.

Jump forward and strike in an area in front of you while shadows appear and simultaneously strike on either side of you.

nodes.name: Growing Darkness
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Foreshadowing
nodes.description: {Shadows} created within 4 seconds of using Synchronized Strike deal increased damage.

nodes.name: Dark Allies
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike creates 2 additional {Shadows}, but costs significantly more mana. This can exceed your normal maximum number of {Shadows}.
nodes.altText: This effect is not cumulative with other sources of additional maximum {Shadows}.

nodes.name: Razor Strikes
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike has a chance to cause enemies to bleed and a chance to shred enemy physical resistance.

nodes.name: Crimson Storm
nodes.description: Using Synchronized Strike grants you {Crimson Shroud} for a short duration, granting you bleed chance and less damage over time taken. This stacks up to 3 times for a short duration.

stats.statName: Damage Over Time Taken per Crimson Shroud

nodes.name: Shadow Dancing
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but {Shadows} from Synchronized Strike expire after attacking. They also do not cause existing {Shadows} to expire and do not trigger {on shadow creation} or {on shadow expiration} effects.

nodes.name: Shadow Fang
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Last Call
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike deals more damage to enemies on low health.
nodes.altText: Targets below 35% of max health are considered to be at low health.

nodes.name: Lust for Carnage
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike leeches a portion of the damage it deals .

nodes.name: Escape Artist
nodes.description: You gain {Haste} for a short duration when you kill an enemy with Synchronized Strike.

nodes.name: Umbral Execution
nodes.description:
Synchronized Strike instantly kills enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

nodes.name: Thrill of the Kill
nodes.description: You are granted increased critical strike chance for 4 seconds on kill with Synchronized Strike. This effect can stack.

nodes.name: Blade Prowess
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per equipped sword and has a chance to poison enemies per equipped dagger.

nodes.name: Lethality
nodes.description: Improves Synchronized Strike's base critical strike chance.

nodes.name: True Strikes
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike deals more critical strike damage.

nodes.name: Harmony of Death
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike has a chance to inflict enemies with {Critical Vulnerability}.

nodes.name: Coordinated Cuts
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike has a chance to shred enemy armor. Armor shred applied by Synchronized Strike has increased effectiveness.

nodes.name: Umbral Assassination
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike inflicts enemies with a {Shadow Dagger}.

nodes.name: Shadow Infusion
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike consumes existing {Shadows} to deal damage in a larger area and grant you ward per {Shadow} consumed.

nodes.name: Wave of Darkness
nodes.description:
Synchronized Strike causes existing {Shadows} to use {Shadow Cascade} on use, rather than being consumed immediately. 

This effect consumes a portion of mana per active Shadow.

nodes.name: Dynamics
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike costs less mana.

nodes.name: Art of the Blade
nodes.description: You are granted increased attack speed for 3 seconds if Synchronized Strike hits at least one enemy.

nodes.name: Perfect Coordination
nodes.description: The {Shadows} now jump inward towards the target rather than outward, but Synchronized Strike costs more mana.

nodes.name: Divergence
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike deals more damage, but the {Shadows} now attack from where you teleport from, rather than where you arrive.

nodes.name: Shadow Rush
nodes.description: {Shadows} created within 4 seconds of using Synchronized Strike restore health on creation.

nodes.name: Retreat Into Shadow
nodes.description: You now disappear instead of teleporting to the target and a {Shadow} is created in your place, but Synchronized Strike has a longer cooldown.

nodes.name: Dark Passage
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but will no longer generate any {Shadows} other than the one created by {Dark Passage}.

nodes.name: Cutthroat
nodes.description: Synchronized Strike always critically hits enemies on high health.
nodes.altText: Targets above 65% max health are considered to be at high health.

skills.name: Teleport
skills.description: Teleport to target location.

skills.name: Teleport
skills.description: Teleport to target location.

nodes.name: Teleport
nodes.loreText: Now you see me...

nodes.name: Unstable Arrival
nodes.description: Teleport knocks enemies back from your destination once you arrive.

nodes.name: Frigid Departure
nodes.description: You have have a higher chance to freeze enemies if you have cast Teleport recently (past 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Mana Tunnel
nodes.description: After casting Teleport your next direct spell cast refunds its mana cost, but Teleport has a longer cooldown.

nodes.name: Tunnel Finder
nodes.description: Teleport has a shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: Crystaline Passage
nodes.description: You have higher cold resistance and armor if you have cast Teleport recently (past 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Time Dilation
nodes.description: Stat buffs granted by having cast Teleport recently (past 4 seconds) last longer.

nodes.name: Decoy Position
nodes.description: Teleport creates a {Mirror Image} where you depart. Mirror Images count . Teleport costs more mana.
nodes.altText: {Mirror Image} health scales with intelligence and level.

nodes.name: Unexpected Copy
nodes.description: Teleport creates a {Mirror Image} where you arrive. Mirror Images count . Teleport costs more mana.
nodes.altText: {Mirror Image} health scales with intelligence and level.

nodes.name: Uncontrolled Duplication
nodes.description: Teleport creates additional {Mirror Images} on arrival. Mirror images have a shorter duration.
nodes.altText: {Mirror Image} health scales with intelligence and level.

nodes.name: Stable Duplicants
nodes.description: {Mirror Images} last longer.
nodes.altText: {Mirror Image} health scales with intelligence and level.

nodes.name: Ether Barrier
nodes.description: Teleport grants ward on cast.

nodes.name: Out of Mind
nodes.description: When you use Teleport, you are granted ward equal to your intelligence stat.

stats.statName: Ward Gained Per Point Of Intelligence

nodes.name: Stable Bubble
nodes.description: You have increased ward retention if you have cast Teleport recently (past 4 seconds).
nodes.altText: Recently refers to the past 4 seconds

nodes.name: Resonant Plasma
nodes.description: You have higher lightning resistance, fire resistance, and stun avoidance if you have cast Teleport recently (past 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Intense Arrival
nodes.description: Teleport knocks enemies further back.

nodes.name: Flicker
nodes.description: Teleport costs less mana.

nodes.name: Wormhole
nodes.description: Your other skills recover more quickly if you have cast Teleport recently (past 4 seconds).
nodes.altText: Recently refers to the past 4 seconds

nodes.name: Elemental Affinity
nodes.description: You deal increased elemental damage if you have cast Teleport recently (past 4 seconds).
nodes.altText: Recently refers to the past 4 seconds

nodes.name: Elemental Dawn
nodes.description:
Teleport casts Elemental Nova where you arrive.

This node does not work if Elemental Nova has a cooldown.

nodes.name: Elemental Dusk
nodes.description:
Teleport casts Elemental Nova where you depart.

This node does not work if Elemental Nova has a cooldown.

nodes.name: Elemental Midnight
nodes.description:
Teleport casts Elemental Nova halfway between your arrival and departure points.

This node does not work if Elemental Nova has a cooldown.

nodes.name: Out of Body
nodes.description: Casting Teleport converts a percentage of your current health into twice .
nodes.altText: For example if you have three points in this node, and 100 current health, you will lose 9 health and gain 18 ward.

nodes.name: Rock Phase
nodes.description: You cannot be stunned if you have cast Teleport recently (past 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Comet Rush
nodes.description: Teleport has a shorter cooldown and if you have {Haste} when you cast Teleport its duration is reset.
nodes.altText: This cannot reduce the duration of Haste on you, only increase it or leave it unchanged.

skills.name: Tempest Strike
skills.description:
A melee combo attack that cycles through a cold strike, a physical strike, and a lightning strike that trigger elemental {Tempest} spells of the same damage type if the strikes hit at least one enemy.

Cold strike: Triggers a {Frigid Tempest}, which is a cold projectile that pierces through enemies.
Physical strike: Triggers a {Wind Tempest}, which is a small twister that lasts a short duration dealing physical damage per over time.
Lightning strike: Triggers a {Thunder Tempest}, which is an expanding storm of lightning bolts.
skills.altText:
Added damage for the melee strikes apply at 100% effectiveness.

{Frigid Tempest}: Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness.
{Wind Tempest}: Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness per second.
{Thunder Tempest}: Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Lagonian Shamanism
nodes.description: You now have a chance to gain a stack of {Gladiator of Lagon} when you cast a {Tempest}.
nodes.altText: This effect can still only trigger a maximum of 3 times per second.

nodes.name: Tempestuous Legend
nodes.description:
{Frigid Tempest} has a higher chance to freeze enemies.
{Thunder Tempest} has a chance to shock enemies.
{Wind Tempest} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Thunderous Storm
nodes.description: You have a chance to also cast {Thunder Tempest} when you attack with cold or physical Tempest Strike.

nodes.name: Grand Cyclone
nodes.description: You have a chance to also cast {Wind Tempest} when you attack with lightning or cold Tempest Strike.

nodes.name: Nature's Storm
nodes.description: If Tempest Strike's melee attack does not hit an enemy you consume a stack of {Gladiator of Lagon} to cast a {Tempest} of the respective type.

nodes.name: Scheme of the Architect
nodes.description: {Gladiator of Lagon} has double the effect on your totems and {Storm Crows} if you have at least 50 Intelligence.

nodes.name: Stormriding Companions
nodes.description: Tempest Strike penetrates enemy physical resistance per active physical minion, penetrates cold resistance per cold minion and penetrates lightning resistance per lightning minion.
nodes.altText: For example Wolves are a physical minion by default but can be specialized into being either a cold or lightning minion.

nodes.name: Bulwark of Nature
nodes.description: Whenever you cast a {Tempest} you also regain a portion of your Endurance Threshold .

nodes.name: Druid's Call
nodes.description:
While transformed and you use any melee attack and hit at least one enemy you have a chance to cast each {Tempest} of a matching damage type.

This consumes mana equal to a portion of Tempest Strike's mana cost.
nodes.altText: For example if you use {Swipe} while transformed {Werebear}, you have a chance to cast a {Wind Tempest} on hit.

nodes.name: Attuned Slam
nodes.description: Tempest Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 1 mana cost, but it also costs additional mana.

nodes.name: Looming Gale
nodes.description: You now create a {Tempest Totem} that casts a {Tempest} of the corresponding strike that created the totem. You are limited to 1 of each type of totem.
nodes.altText:
Disabling a type of {Tempest} causes the respective totem to cast cold projectiles instead.

Attack speed modifiers from this tree affect the summoning speed, but not the totem's cast speed.

nodes.name: Rousing Symbols
nodes.description: Your {Tempest Totems} gain a random amount of more cast speed (multiplicative with other modifiers) when summoned.

nodes.name: Sky Opener
nodes.description:
You now expend {Storm Stacks} when you use Tempest Strike and hit at least one enemy with the melee attack.

{Storm Bolts} cast this way deal more damage.

nodes.name: Windfury Force
nodes.description: Tempest Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

nodes.name: Heorot's Arsenal
nodes.description: Tempest Strike deals additional melee damage per equipped axe or mace and additional spell damage while wielding a 2 handed weapon.

stats.statName: Melee Damage With Axe Or Mace

nodes.name: Firm Grip
nodes.description:
Tempest Strike deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

These effects are doubled while wielding a 2 handed weapon.

nodes.name: Calm Seas
nodes.description:
Tempest Strike can no longer cast {Wind Tempest}, but it does not remove the physical strike from the combo.

Additioanlly, Tempest Strike has increased attack speed and costs less mana.

nodes.name: Crashing Waves
nodes.description:
Tempest Strike deals additional melee damage per 2 Attunement.

All the melee strikes have a higher chance to freeze enemies.

nodes.name: Grounded Refuge
nodes.description:
Tempest Strike can no longer cast {Thunder Tempest}, but it does not remove the lightning strike from the combo.

Additioanlly, Tempest Strike has increased attack speed and costs less mana.

nodes.name: Gladiator of Lagon
nodes.description:
The melee hits grant you a stack of {Gladiator of Lagon} for 8 seconds which grants you and your minions additional spell damage.

This effect can trigger a maximum of 3 times per second.

nodes.name: Resurgence of the Land
nodes.description: You recover mana if whenever you use Tempest Strike and it hits an enemy and it doesn't cast a {Tempest}.

stats.statName: Mana Gain On Hit With No Tempest

nodes.name: Warm Shelter
nodes.description:
Tempest Strike can no longer cast {Frigid Tempest}, but it does not remove the cold strike from the combo.

Additioanlly, Tempest Strike has increased attack speed and costs less mana.

nodes.name: Ancestral Swiftness
nodes.description: Tempest Strike has increased attack speed and costs less mana.

nodes.name: Soaring Blows
nodes.description: Tempest Strike penetrates enemy resistances per your uncapped resistances corresponding to a specific type.

stats.statName: Physical Pen Per 5% Uncapped Physical Res
Cold Pen Per 5% Uncapped Cold Res
Lighting Pen Per 5% Uncapped Lighting Res

nodes.name: Wind Booster
nodes.description:
Whenever you cast {Wind Tempest} you and your other allies it touches gain {Haste} for a short duration.

Additionally, Tempest Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) while you have Haste.

nodes.name: Ceaseless Tyhoon
nodes.description:
Whenever you cast {Wind Tempest} you have a chance to also cast {Tornado}.

This consumes mana equal to a portion of Tornados mana cost.

nodes.name: Devastating Whirlwind
nodes.description: {Tornados} cast from {Wind Tempest} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

nodes.name: Blizzard's Wrath
nodes.description: You have a chance to also cast {Frigid Tempest} when you attack with lightning or physical Tempest Strike.

nodes.name: Coldest Night
nodes.description:
{Frigid Tempest} chills on enemies it hits.

Additionally, Tempest Strike has a higher chance to freeze enemies.

nodes.name: Wrath of the Mountain
nodes.description: While channeling {Avalanche} you now also cast {Frigid Tempest} every second.

stats.statName: Frigid Tempest Each Second During Avalanche

nodes.name: Fulminating Strikes
nodes.description:
{Thunder Tempest} shocks enemies it hits.

Additionally, Tempest Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to shocked enemies.

nodes.name: Cloudburst Conduit
nodes.description: Whenever you cast {Thunder Tempest} you also cast it around your nearest {Storm Totem}.

skills.name: Thorn Shield
skills.description: Form a protective barrier of thorns around yourself or an ally that grants 30 armor and reflects 50 damage to attackers. When the shield expires, a burst of thorns shoots out and damages all nearby enemies.

skills.name: Tornado
skills.description: Conjures a tornado that moves at random, pulling in nearby enemies and dealing physical damage to them.
skills.altText: Added damage applies to the damage over time at 125% effectiveness per second.

nodes.name: Tornado
nodes.loreText: As they sow, so shall they reap.

nodes.name: Lasting Storm
nodes.description: Tornado lasts longer.

nodes.name: Strength of Air
nodes.description: Tornado has increased pull strength.

nodes.name: Hurricane
nodes.description: When you use Tornado, you have a chance to create an additional Tornado, but Tornadoes have reduced pull strength.

nodes.name: Charged Storm
nodes.description: Tornado casts {Storm Bolt} at a nearby enemy every 2 seconds.
nodes.altText: Storm Bolt scales with increased spell damage and lightning damage, but not with other nodes on this tree.

nodes.name: Frequent Lightning
nodes.description: Tornado casts {Storm Bolt} more frequently.
nodes.altText: Storm Bolt scales with increased spell damage and lightning damage, but not with other nodes on this tree.

nodes.name: Debris
nodes.description: Tornado deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but costs more mana.

nodes.name: Fire Tornado
nodes.description:
Tornados' base physical damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Tornado deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: Fire tornado scales with increases to fire damage, not physical damage.

nodes.name: Druidic Control
nodes.description: Tornado is now stationary, but deals less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Eye of the Storm
nodes.description: Tornado deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and attach to you wherever you move, but you can no longer cast additional Tornadoes at once.

stats.statName: Can No Longer Cast Additional Tornadoes

nodes.name: Overcast Skies
nodes.description: {Storm Bolts} target enemies from further away.
nodes.altText: Storm Bolt scales with increased spell damage and lightning damage, but not with other nodes on this tree.

nodes.name: Churning Orbs
nodes.description: Tornado now create a {Storm Orb} every second, but Tornado has less cast speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: Storm orbs explode after one second dealing physical damage to nearby enemies.\n\nStorm orbs scale with increases to physical damage and spell damage, but not with other nodes on this tree.

nodes.name: Trail of Storms
nodes.description: Tornadoes cast {Storm Orbs} more frequently.

nodes.name: Igniting Swirl
nodes.description: Tornado ignites nearby enemies every 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Inferno
nodes.description: Tornado ignites nearby enemies more frequently.

nodes.name: Stormbringer
nodes.description: Tornado has an increased cast speed.

nodes.name: Aspect of the Storm
nodes.description: Casting Tornado grants {Aspect of the Storm} for 2 seconds, which grants 10% increased movespeed.
nodes.altText: You can only have one instance of Aspect of the Storm at once.

nodes.name: Storm Dervish
nodes.description: {Aspect of the Storm} now also grants increased attack and cast speed.

stats.statName: Aspect of the Storm Attack Speed
Aspect of the Storm Cast Speed

nodes.name: Gust of Renewal
nodes.description: Tornado costs less mana, and {Aspect of the Storm} grants increased mana regeneration.

stats.statName: Aspect of the Storm Mana Regen

nodes.name: Swift Wings
nodes.description: {Aspect of the Storm} lasts longer.

nodes.name: Snap Gale
