nodes.description: Tornado is now instant cast and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but now has a 4 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Storm Soul
nodes.description: Tornado has a shorter cooldown and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

skills.name: Transplant
skills.description:
Creates a new body for you at the target location, then detonates your old body to deal physical damage to enemies around it.

Instead of mana, this spell costs 13% of your current health.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied at 250% effectiveness.

Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

nodes.name: Transplant
nodes.loreText: Flesh unbound by space and time... for a price.

nodes.name: Bone Armor
nodes.description:
When you use Transplant you are granted {Bone Armor} for 4 seconds, which grants armor and less damage taken (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This effect has a 10 second cooldown.
nodes.altText: {Bone Armor} grants armor and reduces damage taken.

nodes.name: Plated Bone
nodes.description: {Bone Armor} is more effective.
nodes.altText:
{Bone Armor} grants armor and reduces damage taken. Lasts 4 seconds. 10 second cooldown.

This node increases the stats that bone armour grants.

nodes.name: Fleeting Form
nodes.description: Transplant .

nodes.name: Apostasy
nodes.description: {Bone Armor} lasts longer.
nodes.altText: {Bone Armor} grants armor and reduces damage taken. Lasts 4 seconds. 10 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Drink Deep
nodes.description: Transplant's health cost is regenerated over 4 seconds, but costs significantly more health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Marrow Blades
nodes.description: Your minions deal additional melee damage for 4 seconds after you cast Transplant.

nodes.name: Simulacrum
nodes.description: You leave behind a {Bone Minion}, which is a temporary melee minion, when you use Transplant, but your previous body no longer detonates. Other detonations still behave normally.
nodes.altText: {Bone Minions} last for 20 seconds.

nodes.name: Transfusion
nodes.description: You may Transplant to minions, which sacrifices the minion. Sacrifice cast this way uses your Sacrifice Tree and deals more damage than usual (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Purgatory
nodes.description: {Bone Minions} last until killed, but you may have only 1 active at a time.
nodes.altText: {Bone Minions} are additional Melee Skeletal Minions that are spawned when you Transplant.

nodes.name: Ivory Court
nodes.description: You can summon more {Bone Minions}.
nodes.altText: {Bone Minions} are additional Melee Skeletal Minions that are spawned when you Transplant.

nodes.name: Scarlet Rain
nodes.description: Transplant’s detonations deal damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Cursed Exile
nodes.description: Transplant deals more hit damage to cursed enemies. Transplant hits against enemies afflicted with Bone Curse restore health. Transplant hits against enemies afflicted with Spirit Plague grant ward.

nodes.name: Ethereal Body
nodes.description: Transplant's base physical damage is converted to necrotic damage. Consequently this damage scales with increases to necrotic damage, but not increases to physical damage.

nodes.name: Squeamish
nodes.description: Transplant inflicts surrounding enemies with {Fear} on departure.

nodes.name: Thanatophobia
nodes.description: Transplant inflicts surrounding enemies with {Fear} on arrival.

nodes.name: Reign of Blood
nodes.description: Transplant creates an additional body that detonates on arrival.

nodes.name: Acolyte's Fervor
nodes.description: Casting Transplant grants you {Haste} and {Frenzy} for a short duration.

nodes.name: Doom Bringer
nodes.description: You cast Bone Curse around the target location after you arrive.

nodes.name: Hemophilia
nodes.description: Explosions cause enemies to bleed, but using Transplant also causes you to bleed.

nodes.name: Sticky Blood
nodes.description: Transplant detonations leave a {Pool of Blood} for 3 seconds that slows enemies.
nodes.altText: {Pools of Blood} are patches of blood left behind by certain skills which slow enemy movement.

nodes.name: Anemia
nodes.description: Transplant costs less health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Siphon
nodes.description: {Pools of Blood} heal you for a percentage of your total health when you walk on them.
nodes.altText: {Pools of Blood} are patches of blood left behind by certain skills which slow enemy movement.

stats.statName: Pool of Blood Maximum Health Heal

nodes.name: Dance of Blood
nodes.description: You automatically cast {Rip Blood} at enemies nearby where you depart, but Transplant costs more health (multiplicative with other modifiers). An enemy cannot be hit by multiple instances of Rip Blood created this way.
nodes.altText: Your Rip Blood tree does affect Rip Blood cast by your Transplant skill.

nodes.name: Azure Veins
nodes.description: When you hit an enemy with Transplant you regain mana, but lose a portion of your current health and ward.

nodes.name: Pale Blood
nodes.description: Transplant restores mana, but has a longer cooldown.

nodes.name: Flesh Marquis
nodes.description: Transplant detonation hits deal more damage, especially to bleeding enemies.
nodes.altText: These effects are multiplicative with each other and with other modifiers.

nodes.name: Forced Fruition
nodes.description: When you are out of mana, Transplant detonations deal more damage.

nodes.name: Violent Emergence
nodes.description:
Transplant explosions instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health). 

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node, then the highest threshold is used.

skills.name: Umbral Blades
skills.description:
A combo ability that throws 2 blades, then 4 blades, then recalls all blades in the ground back to you, hitting enemies along the way.

An enemy can be hit by multiple blades from the same throw and by multiple blades from the recall.

Shadows using Umbral Blades always throw a single Shadow Blade that deals 300% more damage and has 100% increased radius.

Only the first part of the combo costs mana.
skills.altText:
Added damage applies at 60% effectiveness. 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit.

Umbral Blades can persist in the ground for up to 6 seconds.

skills.name: Umbral Blades
skills.description: Recall all Umbral Blades to you, hitting enemies along the way.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 60% effectiveness. 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit.

nodes.name: Dawnfall
nodes.description: You have a chance to gain {Dusk Shroud} when you use Umbral Blades and hit at least one enemy.

nodes.name: Sword Thrower
nodes.description: You now throw just one large Umbral Blade with each throw that deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has increased radius.
nodes.altText: For subskills that scale with area such as {Bladestorm} and {Blade Explosion} the effect of this node's radius increase on the skills' area is additive with sources of increased area.

nodes.name: Cacophony of Steel
nodes.description:
Blades in the ground now create a {Bladestorm} that hovers and spins in midair at the target location for 4 seconds, hitting nearby enemies 3 times per second.

You can have up to 3 active Bladestorms, but each enemy can only take damage from one at a time.
nodes.altText: Attack speed modifiers do not affect the rate at which Blade Storms hit enemies.

nodes.name: Steel Torrent
nodes.description: {Bladestorms} last longer and deal damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Loathing
nodes.description: {Bladestorms} slowly seek out enemies.

nodes.name: Lethal Darkness
nodes.description: Umbral Blades hits inflict a stack of {Shadow Dagger} on hit, while using a dagger.
nodes.altText: This is not affected by Umbral Blades' reduction to ailment application chance.

nodes.name: Edge of Obscurity
nodes.description:
Umbral Blades deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of {Dusk Shroud} on you. 

This effect is doubled while inside the area of {Smoke Bomb}.

nodes.name: Umbral Remnant
nodes.description: Whenever one of your {Shadows} expire they now also leave behind an Umbral Blade.
nodes.altText: {Shadows} using Umbral Blades always throw a single Shadow Blade that deals 300% more damage.

nodes.name: Soul Thief
nodes.description: Umbral Blades has increased attack speed and you gain ward on hit with recalled blades.

stats.statName: Ward Gain On Hit On Recall

nodes.name: Stabbing Blast
nodes.description: Recalling the blades now sends each blade toward a different nearby enemy instead of to you, but recalled blades no longer pierce.
nodes.altText: If there are fewer enemies than blades, the remaining blades will go in random directions.

nodes.name: Shredding Daggers
nodes.description: Recalled blades now have a chance to pierce enemies (pass through enemies it hits).

nodes.name: Nightmare Dash
nodes.description:
You can now only recall blades by using {Shift}, rather than the combo itself.

You regain mana for each blade recalled.

nodes.name: Backstab
nodes.description: Recalled blades deal more damage, but blades thrown out deal less damage (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Slice the Legs
nodes.description: Recalled blade hits have a chance to slow enemies and a chance to cause them to bleed.
nodes.altText: These chances are not affected by Umbral Blades' reduction to ailment application chance.

nodes.name: Bloody Trail
nodes.description: Recalled blade hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of slow on the target and per bleed on the target, up to a maximum.

stats.statName: Recalled Blades Hit Damage Per Slow
Recalled Blades Hit Damage Per Bleed

nodes.name: Cut and Leave
nodes.description:
Umbral Blades hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed. 

When your blades are recalled you have a chance to gain {Haste} for 1 second.
nodes.altText: This bleed chance is not affected by Umbral Blades' reduction to ailment application chance.

nodes.name: Emerald Cutlass
nodes.description:
Converts bleed chance from all sources to poison chance for Umbral Blades and effects related to bleed now depend on poison instead. 

If you have the {Explosive Blades}, the explosion hit poisons enemies, but deals 80% less damage and it no longer deals any fire damage.

nodes.name: Kunai Belt
nodes.description: You now throw additional blades with Umbral Blades on the second throw.

nodes.name: Hidden Blades
nodes.description: Every 2 seconds you throw additional blades with Umbral Blades on the next throw.

stats.statName: Extra Blades On Next Throw Every 2 Seconds

nodes.name: Jagged Carvings
nodes.description: Umbral Blades deals additional throwing physical damage.

nodes.name: Twilight Assault
nodes.description: You now throw a third time with Umbral Blades with 4 blades before recalling the blades.

nodes.name: Duskhunter
nodes.description: You now throw additional blades with Umbral Blades on the third throw.

nodes.name: Subzero Intrusion
nodes.description:
Umbral Blades base physical damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage. It also has a chance to freeze enemies.

Swaps Umbral Blades' {Physical} tag for a {Cold} tag.

nodes.name: Coldsnap Strike
nodes.description: Umbral Blades hits have additional freeze rate and have a chance to chill enemies.
nodes.altText: This chill chance is not affected by Umbral Blades' reduction to ailment application chance.

nodes.name: Precision Cuts
nodes.description: Umbral Blades now stop if they reach the target location, and you have increased attack speed with Umbral Blades.

nodes.name: Explosive Blades
nodes.description:
Blades in the ground now arm after 0.5 seconds, but can no longer be recalled and Umbral Blades has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers). If enemies walk over them the blades will cause a {Shard Explosion}, a subskill dealing physical and fire damage in an area.

Blades expire and explode after 3 seconds if no enemies walk over them.

nodes.name: Burst of Agony
nodes.description: The {Shard Explosion} deals damage in a larger area and deals more damage per second the blade has remained on the ground (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: More Explosion Area Per Second On Ground
Explosion Damage Per Second On Ground

skills.name: Upheaval
skills.description: Sunders the ground in a line in front of you, dealing damage to enemies along the path.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 150% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Upheaval
nodes.description: Sunders the ground in a line in front of you, dealing damage to enemies along the path.

nodes.name: Tremblor
nodes.description: When you directly use Upheaval and hit at least one enemy you gain a stack of {Earth Shattering} up to a maximum, causing your next {Fury Leap} or {Earthquake} to consume all stacks to gain additional physical penetration and increased area per stack consumed.
nodes.altText: This has no effect if Upheaval is used by a totem.

stats.statName: Buff To Next Fury Leap Or Earthquake

nodes.name: Excavating Blow
nodes.description:
Upheaval now splits up into 3 fault lines in front of you, but Upheaval costs additional mana. Enemies can only be hit by 1 Fault Line at a time.

Upheaval Totems now have 50% less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Erupting Earth
nodes.description: Upheaval now travels in 5 fault lines in a star around you.

nodes.name: Glacial Cascade
nodes.description:
Upheaval's base physical damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Upheaval has a chance to freeze enemies on hit.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to {Frostbite} chance and slow chance from all sources is converted to chill chance.

nodes.name: Sundering Strike
nodes.description: When Upheaval hits an enemy it has a chance to release a {Shockwave}, a melee physical subskill. The Shockwave cannot hit enemies already hit by Upheaval and vice versa.
nodes.altText: Enemies hit by a Shockwave can not create a Shockwave, even if hit by Upheaval.

nodes.name: Inexhaustible
nodes.description: Upheaval costs less mana and has a chance to shred enemy armor.

nodes.name: Mantle Strike
nodes.description: Improves Upheaval's base critical strike chance and it cannot be dodged.

nodes.name: Crust Rupture
nodes.description: Upheaval critical strikes deal more damage.

nodes.name: Stonethorn Pillars
nodes.description: Creating an Upheaval Totem consumes all active {Thorn Totems} to grant it more damage per totem consumed (multiplicative with other modifiers). You can now create an additional maximum Upheaval totem and you have an additional charge.

stats.statName: Upheaval Totem Damage Per Totem Consumed

nodes.name: Mountain Fortress
nodes.description: You can now create an additional maximum Upheaval Totem and you have an additional charge.

nodes.name: Frozen Collision
nodes.description: Upheaval deals additional melee cold damage, and also deals more melee damage to frozen enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Cold Front
nodes.description: Upheaval has additional freeze rate.

nodes.name: Sublimation
nodes.description: You cast {Shatter} on enemies you kill with Upheaval, a spell subskill dealing cold damage in an area.

nodes.name: Quarry Maker
nodes.description: Upheaval now creates additional fault lines, but costs more mana.

nodes.name: Maiming Rubble
nodes.description:
Upheaval hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed and have a chance to slow them.

This effect is doubled while using a two handed weapon.

nodes.name: Terrain Delving
nodes.description: Upheaval deals damage in a wider area.
nodes.altText: This does not cause Upheaval to travel further.

nodes.name: Primal Bulwark
nodes.description: When you use Upheaval and hit at least one enemy you gain a stack of {Earth Armor} for 6 seconds up to a maximum amount of stacks, granting you additional armor and endurance threshold per stack of Attunement.
nodes.altText: This has no effect if Upheaval is used by a totem.

stats.statName: Endurance Threshold Per Attunement Per Stack

nodes.name: Through Muck and Clay
nodes.description: While you have {Earth Armor}, if you fall below 6 stacks of {Maelstrom} you consume all stacks of Earth Armor to cast Maelstrom once per stack consumed.

stats.statName: Consume Earth Armor Falling Below 6 Maelstroms

nodes.name: Terraforming Clash
nodes.description: Upheaval travels further.

nodes.name: Earthbreaker
nodes.description: Upheaval deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but no longer scales with increases to attack speed.

nodes.name: Glacial Crash
nodes.description:
Upheaval penetrates enemy physical and cold resistance.

This effect is doubled while using a two handed weapon.

nodes.name: Natural Weapons
nodes.description: Upheaval has increased area while using a mace, additional bleed chance while using an axe and additional cold penetration while using a staff.

nodes.name: Unstoppable Strength
nodes.description: Upheaval deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a higher chance to stun enemies.

nodes.name: Brutish Engagement
nodes.description: Upheaval deals more melee damage to enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on how close they are to you, up to a maximum.
nodes.altText: This is fully effective within 2 meters and has no effect after 6 meters.

nodes.name: Hindering Tremors
nodes.description: Upheaval hits have a chance to apply {Frailty} to enemies and it penetrates enemy physical resistance, but travels a shorter distance.

nodes.name: Rock Upsurge
nodes.description: When Upheaval hits your totems it has a chance to release a {Shockwave} from the totem.
nodes.altText: Totems hit by a Shockwave can create a Shockwave when hit by Upheaval.

nodes.name: Master of the Totem
nodes.description: Upheaval hits grant your totems increased armor and more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for 4 seconds. This effect can stack an unlimited about of times.

nodes.name: Rejuvenating Splinters
nodes.description: Upheaval and {Shockwave} hits from the {Sundering Strikes} node now {Shatter} totems, releasing shards of rock and debris dealing spell physical damage and heals you per point of Attunement.
nodes.altText: Upheaval Totems cannot be shattered this way.

nodes.name: Upheaval Totems
nodes.description: You now create an {Upheaval Totem} that attacks with Upheaval from it rather than yourself. You are limited to 1 of these totems. Upheaval now has a cooldown and costs significantly more mana.

skills.name: Vengeance
skills.description:
A melee attack that also prepares you to riposte incoming hits.

If vengeance successfully hits an enemy and you take a hit in the next 2 seconds you will riposte, taking 25% less damage and striking at a nearby enemy.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 125% effectiveness to the initial hit and 150% effectiveness to the riposte.

nodes.name: Vengeance
nodes.loreText: Might through retribution

nodes.name: Double Riposte
nodes.description: You can {Riposte} an additional time after Vengeance hits an enemy, but Riposte mitigates less damage.

nodes.name: Dark Duellist
nodes.description: You deal more global damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) while preparing to riposte.

nodes.name: Zealot's Technique
nodes.description: You can {Riposte} an additional time after Vengeance hits an enemy.

nodes.name: Rapid Strikes
nodes.description: Vengeance has increased attack speed.

nodes.name: Vengeful Fighter
nodes.description: Vengeance deals more damage if you are below half health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Blade Assault
nodes.description: When you hit an enemy with Vengeance you have a chance to attack with {Iron Blade}.
nodes.altText: {Iron Blade} is a melee attack that releases a sword that pierces through enemies, dealing physical damage. Its damage does not scale with nodes on this tree unless stated otherwise.

nodes.name: Combo Riposte
nodes.description: When you hit an enemy with {Riposte} you have a chance to also attack with {Iron Blade}.
nodes.altText: {Iron Blade} is a melee attack that releases a sword that pierces through enemies, dealing physical damage. Its damage does not scale with nodes on this tree unless stated otherwise.

nodes.name: Vital Puncture
nodes.description: {Iron Blade} has a chance to deal double damage.
nodes.altText: {Iron Blade} is a melee attack that releases a sword that pierces through enemies, dealing physical damage. Its damage does not scale with nodes on this tree unless stated otherwise.

nodes.name: Shattering Blade
nodes.description: {Iron Blade} has a chance to reduce enemy armor.
nodes.altText: {Iron Blade} is a melee attack that releases a sword that pierces through enemies, dealing physical damage. Its damage does not scale with nodes on this tree unless stated otherwise.

nodes.name: Winged Steel
nodes.description: {Iron Blade} travels faster, causing it to also travel further.
nodes.altText: {Iron Blade} is a melee attack that releases a sword that pierces through enemies, dealing physical damage. Its damage does not scale with nodes on this tree unless stated otherwise.

nodes.name: Deflection
nodes.description: {Iron Blade} ricochets to another enemy on hit, but Iron Blade deals less hit damage and no longer pierces (travels through enemies it hits).
nodes.altText: {Iron Blade} is a melee attack that releases a sword that pierces through enemies, dealing physical damage. Its damage does not scale with nodes on this tree unless stated otherwise.

nodes.name: Forge Chains
nodes.description: {Iron Blade} ricochets to additional enemies, but travels more slowly.
nodes.altText: {Iron Blade} is a melee attack that releases a sword that pierces through enemies, dealing physical damage. Its damage does not scale with nodes on this tree unless stated otherwise.

nodes.name: Vindicator
nodes.description: You have a chance to attack with {Iron Blade} when you kill an enemy with {Riposte}.
nodes.altText: {Iron Blade} is a melee attack that releases a sword that pierces through enemies, dealing physical damage. Its damage does not scale with nodes on this tree unless stated otherwise.

stats.statName: Iron Blade Chance On Riposte Kill

nodes.name: Vengeful Slayer
nodes.description: You have a chance to attack with {Iron Blade} when you kill an enemy with Vengeance.
nodes.altText: {Iron Blade} is a melee attack that releases a sword that pierces through enemies, dealing physical damage. Its damage does not scale with nodes on this tree unless stated otherwise.

stats.statName: Iron Blade Chance On Vengeance Kill

nodes.name: Executioner
nodes.description: Vengeance hits deal more damage against enemies that are already damaged (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Faint Strike
nodes.description: Vengeance deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but has a lower chance to stun enemies.

nodes.name: Punishment
nodes.description: You have a chance to also retaliate with {Iron Blade} when you {Riposte}.
nodes.altText: {Iron Blade} is a melee attack that releases a sword that pierces through enemies, dealing physical damage. Its damage does not scale with nodes on this tree unless stated otherwise.

nodes.name: Bolster
nodes.description: You take less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have increased armor if you've hit an enemy with Vengeance in the past 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Essence of Revenge
nodes.description:
{Riposte} has a chance to grant a {Void Essence} on hit. 

Void Essences last 7 seconds and grant 15% increased void damage, 15% increased melee damage, and 10% reduced stun duration.

You can have a maximum of 3 Void Essences at once.

stats.statName: Void Essence Chance On Riposte Hit

nodes.name: Essence of Vindication
nodes.description: Kills with Vengeance have a chance to grant you a {Void Essence}.
nodes.altText: {Void Essence} grant 15% increased void damage, 15% increased melee damage, and 10% reduced stun duration. You can have a maximum of 3 essences at once.

stats.statName: Void Essence Chance On Vengeance Kill

nodes.name: Smelter's Vengeance
nodes.description: Vengeance has a chance to shred enemy armor and fire resistance.

nodes.name: Molten Riposte
nodes.description: The armor and fire resistance shred chance from the {Smelter's Vengeance} node also apply on {Riposte} hits.

stats.statName: Fire Resistance Shred Applies To Riposte

nodes.name: Eviscerating Blades
nodes.description: Increases the effectiveness of all armor shred applied by Vengeance and {Riposte}.
nodes.altText:
Does not affect fire resistance shred effectiveness

With a total of 50% increased effect each stack of Armour Shred reduces armour by 150 instead of 100.

nodes.name: Blade Paladin
nodes.description: The damage increase from the {Vengeful Fighter} node applies when above half health, instead of when below half health.

nodes.name: Cooling Anvil
nodes.description: Fire resistance shred granted by this tree is converted to physical resistance shred.

nodes.name: Perfect Riposte
nodes.description: Hits that you {Riposte} cannot critically strike you.
nodes.altText: Hits that you riposte that would have crit are downgraded to regular hits and do not deal additional damage.

skills.name: Void Cleave
skills.description:
Requires a 2-handed sword or axe.

A melee attack that hits all enemies in an area in front of you. Can be echoed by Void Knights. Unaffected by weapon range.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 400% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Riftflame
nodes.description:
Void Cleave hits ignite enemies and half of its base damage is converted to fire, meaning that this half of the damage scales with increases to fire damage but not with increases to void damage.

Ignite inflicted by Void Cleave gains additional fire penetration based on your increased void damage.

Void Cleave gains the {fire} tag.
nodes.altText: Generic increased damage is not taken into account for adding fire penetration for ignite. Neither is more void damage or increased melee void damage. Only increased void damage has any effect.

stats.statName: Fire Penetration with Ignite per 10% increased Void Damage

nodes.name: Hellish Chasm
nodes.description:
All of Void Cleave's base void damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to void damage.

Additionally your next non-channeled fire attack or spell after Void Cleave deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Void resistance shred chance from all sources is converted to fire resistance shred and effects related to void resistance shred now depend on fire resistance shred instead.

Void Cleave loses the {void} tag.

stats.statName: Void Res -> Fire Res Shred Chance
Damage On Next Fire Attack Or Spell

nodes.name: Molten Blades
nodes.description: When you use Void Cleave and hit at least one enemy, your minions gain a stack of {Molten Infusion} for 4 seconds, granting them additional melee fire damage and a chance to ignite enemies.

nodes.name: Scorching Path
nodes.description: Minions only gain a stack of {Molten Infusion} when you directly hit them with Void Cleave, but {Molten Infusion} has significantly increased effect.

stats.statName: Molten Infusion Only On Minion Hit

nodes.name: Abyssal Walker
nodes.description: You can travel farther with Void Cleave and it deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Momentum
nodes.description: After channelling {Warpath} for at least 2 seconds your next Void Cleave within 1 second deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Into the Depths
nodes.description: Void Cleave deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in an increased area.

nodes.name: Precognition
nodes.description: Improves Void Cleave's base critical strike chance and it cannot be dodged.

nodes.name: Deadly Omen
nodes.description: Void Cleave deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to enemies on high health.
nodes.altText: Targets above 65% max health are considered to be at high health.

nodes.name: Rift Maker
nodes.description: Void Cleave hits apply {Critical Vulnerability} and Void Cleave has increased critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Champion of the Void
nodes.description: Void Cleave critical strikes deal more damage and you gain mana with Void Cleave critical strikes.

nodes.name: Obliterator
nodes.description: If Void Cleave hits at least one enemy your next {Erasing Strike} is always a critical strike.

nodes.name: Crushing Echo
nodes.description:
Void Cleave deals additional melee void damage. 

This effect is tripled for echoed Void Cleaves.

nodes.name: Abolisher
nodes.description: Void Cleave deals significantly more melee void damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to enemies on low health.
nodes.altText: Targets below 35% max health are considered to be at low health.

stats.statName: Melee Void Damage To Low Health

nodes.name: Ruining Sweep
nodes.description: Void Cleave hits slow enemies, have increased stun chance and increased stun duration.

nodes.name: Dark Pathway
nodes.description: Void Cleave has a shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: Fraying Strikes
nodes.description: Void Cleave hits shred enemy void resistance.

nodes.name: Resonating Cleave
nodes.description:
You cast {Abyssal Echoes} after using Void Cleave.

Abyssal Echoes cast this way uses its mana cost.

nodes.name: Warped Decay
nodes.description: Void Cleave hits inflict enemies with {Time Rot}.

nodes.name: Ravager
nodes.description: When you use Void Cleave you gain {Ravaging Aura} for a short duration scaling with the amount of enemies hit up to 10.

nodes.name: Annuling Presence
nodes.description: {Ravaging Aura} deals additional spell void damage and has an increased area of effect.

nodes.name: Endless Hunger
nodes.description: {Ravaging Aura} leeches a portion of the damage it deals .

nodes.name: Dismantling Throws
nodes.description: If Void Cleave hits at least one enemy your next throwing attack inflicts enemies with {Time Rot}.

stats.statName: Time Rot Stacks For Next Throwing

nodes.name: Entropic Blows
nodes.description: Void Cleave deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of {Time Rot} on the target.

nodes.name: Armor Sunderer
nodes.description: Void Cleave hits shred enemy armor and {Armor Shred} applied by Void Cleave has increased effect and duration.

nodes.name: Voidfused Projectiles
nodes.description: If Void Cleave hits at least one enemy your next throwing attack deals additional void damage.

nodes.name: Nether Charge
nodes.description: You can store an additional charge of Void Cleave, but Void Cleave costs more mana.

nodes.name: Vorpal Force
nodes.description: Void Cleave deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of bleed up to a maximum.
nodes.altText: This effect is based on ignite rather than bleed if you have the [Riftflame] node.

nodes.name: Blazing Steel
nodes.description: Your increases to physical damage also apply to fire damage for Void Cleave.

nodes.name: Gravity's Edge
nodes.description: You can travel much further with Void Cleave (multiplicative with other modifiers), but it has a longer cooldown and now counts {Traversal} skill.
nodes.altText: Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

skills.name: Volatile Reversal
skills.description: A combo ability that jumps forwards in time to a target location and performs a melee attack on arrival. Recast within 3 seconds to jump backwards in time to your original location and perform a melee attack on arrival.
skills.altText:
Added damage applies to the melee attacks at 200% effectiveness.

Volatile Reversal's cooldown continues recovering while the recast is available.

nodes.name: Volatile Reversal
nodes.loreText: Time is your anvil and you may bend reality upon it

nodes.name: Incipient Void Rift
nodes.description: When you cast Volatile Reversal you leave behind a {Void Rift}, a spell which deals void damage in an area.

nodes.name: Disintegration
nodes.description: Volatile Reversal's {Void Rifts} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: {Void Rift} is a spell which deals void damage in an area.

nodes.name: Time Rifts
nodes.description: Enemies hit by Volatile Reversal's {Void Rifts} take increased damage over time for 4 seconds.
nodes.altText: {Void Rift} is a spell which deals void damage in an area.

nodes.name: Shifting Power
nodes.description:
Volatile Reversal's {Void Rifts} have an increased chance to stun enemies.

After casting Volatile Reversal you gain a buff that causes you to deal more void damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to stunned enemies. The duration of this buff is equal to the length of time you travelled back.

nodes.name: Terminal Void Rift
nodes.description: When you cast Volatile Reversal you create a {Void Rift} where you arrive.
nodes.altText: {Void Rift} is a spell which deals void damage in an area.

nodes.name: Dark Expanse
nodes.description: Volatile Reversal's {Void Rifts} deal damage in a larger area.
nodes.altText: {Void Rift} is a spell which deals void damage in an area.

nodes.name: Harbinger of Dust
nodes.description: Enemies hit by Volatile Reversal's {Void Rifts} take increased damage for 4 seconds.
nodes.altText: {Void Rift} is a spell which deals void damage in an area.

nodes.name: Food for Wyrms
nodes.description:
Volatile Reversal's {Void Rift} hits have a chance to inflict {Time Rot} on enemies.

After casting Volatile Reversal you gain a buff that causes you to deal more void damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of Time Rot on the target. The duration of this buff is equal to the length of time you travelled back.

stats.statName: Global Void Damage per Time Rot

nodes.name: Time Sap
nodes.description: You have a chance to recover a percentage of Volatile Reversal's remaining cooldown when you kill an enemy and when you hit a boss or rare enemy.

stats.statName: Chance to Recover Cooldown on Kill
Chance to Recover Cooldown on Boss Hit

nodes.name: Catching Up
nodes.description: You gain movement speed after casting Volatile Reversal. The duration of this buff is equal to the length of time you travelled back.

nodes.name: Warped Time
nodes.description: You gain increased attack and cast speed after casting Volatile Reversal. The duration of this buff is equal to the length of time you travelled back.

nodes.name: Timelost Vitality
nodes.description: Volatile Reversal has a significantly shorter cooldown, but no longer restores health.

nodes.name: Volatile Travel
nodes.description: When you cast Volatile Reversal, you have an 80% chance to regain some of your missing health, but a 20% chance to lose some of your current health.

nodes.name: Traveller's Fatigue
nodes.description: Volatile Reversal has a shorter cooldown, but you have reduced health regeneration while Volatile Reversal is on cooldown.

nodes.name: Ancient Reversal
nodes.description: Volatile Reversal allows you to travel back further in time.

nodes.name: Traveller's Frailty
nodes.description: Volatile Reversal has a shorter cooldown, but you take increased damage while Volatile Reversal is on cooldown.

nodes.name: Timelost Wisdom
nodes.description: Volatile Reversal has a significantly shorter cooldown, but no longer restores mana.

nodes.name: Phased Reality
nodes.description: You gain dodge rating while Volatile Reversal is on cooldown.

skills.name: Wandering Spirits
skills.description:
Reveals wandering spirits around you for 6 seconds. The spirits wander at random dealing necrotic damage over time to enemies they pass through.

4 spirits are revealed immediately after casting the skill and 17 more are revealed over the next 6 seconds.

The spirits individually last up to 4 seconds, but all remaining spirits fade once the reveal duration ends.
skills.altText:
Added spell damage applies to each spirit's damage at 200% effectiveness per second.

Increased Area stats affect the area of effect of each individual spirit, but not the area in which spirits are revealed.

nodes.name: Wandering Spirits
nodes.loreText: What lurks behind the veil?

nodes.name: Thin Veil
nodes.description: Wandering Spirits reveals Spirits more frequently.

nodes.name: Tethered Existence
nodes.description: Spirits deal more damage when they pass through enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers), but move slower.

nodes.name: Drifting Spirits
nodes.description: Spirits are revealed in a larger radius around you.

nodes.name: Infectious Dead
nodes.description: The base necrotic damage dealt by Wandering Spirits is converted to poison damage. Consequently this damage scales with increases to poison damage, but not increases to necrotic damage.

nodes.name: Familiar Souls
nodes.description: Spirits are revealed in a smaller radius around the player and deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Lingering Souls
nodes.description: Spirits last longer when they are revealed.

nodes.name: Drained Will
nodes.description: Wandering Spirits shred the necrotic resistance of enemies near them.

stats.statName: Necrotic Resistance Shred Chance Per Second

nodes.name: Terrifying Presence
nodes.description: Enemies near Spirits are {Feared} for 0.5 to 0.9 seconds, causing them to flee from the spirit that feared them.
nodes.altText: Enemies can only be affected by Fear once.

nodes.name: Harrowing Aura
nodes.description: Spirits can Fear enemies in a larger radius. If spirits inflict {Necrotic Resistance Shred} or {Damned} those ailments are also inflicted in a larger radius.

nodes.name: False Courage
nodes.description: Spirits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but the fear they apply to enemies via the {Terrifying Presence} node has a shorter duration.

nodes.name: Haunting
nodes.description: Fear applied to enemies via the {Terrifying Presence} node lasts longer, but affects a smaller area.

nodes.name: Prey On Fear
nodes.description: Spirits deal more damage to feared enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Medium
nodes.description: Wandering Spirits has increased cast speed and costs less mana.
nodes.altText: Does not affect how frequently spirits are created once Wandering Spirits has been cast.

nodes.name: Eternal Haunt
nodes.description: Wandering Spirits continues to reveal Spirits for a longer duration, but has a longer cooldown.

nodes.name: Daunting Presence
nodes.description:
Each Spirit is larger and deals damage in a larger area.

If you have {Terrifying Presence}, the area for inflicting fear is also increased.

nodes.name: Sheltering Spirits
nodes.description: You gain Ward whenever a Spirit expires.

nodes.name: Infusing Souls
nodes.description: You have a chance to gain mana whenever a Spirit expires.

nodes.name: Souls of Rage
nodes.description: Spirits move faster and deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Poisoned Minds
nodes.description: Spirits deal more damage to poisoned enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Spectral Putrescence
nodes.description: Spirits have a chance to cast {Spectral Putrescence} at nearby enemies each second. Spectral Putrescence is a projectile with 100% chance to poison on hit.

nodes.name: Spectral Scorn
nodes.description: Spirits cast {Spectral Putrescence} at enemies from further away.
nodes.altText: {Spectral Putrescence} is a ranged attack which inflicts poison on enemies hit.

nodes.name: Soul Of Filth
nodes.description: Spirits can cast {Spectral Putrescence} more frequently.
nodes.altText: {Spectral Putrescence} is a ranged attack which inflicts poison on enemies hit.

nodes.name: Locus Mortis
nodes.description: Spirits are now revealed around a target location, rather than around you. Spirits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: Does not affect the total number of wandering spirits revealed

nodes.name: Reap the Damned
nodes.description: Spirits deal more damage to cursed enemies and damned enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Song of the Lost Chantry
nodes.description: Wandering Spirits is now a channelled skill, has a much shorter cooldown, and creates Spirits much more frequently. You can regenerate mana while channelling this skill.
nodes.altText: Does not affect the total number of wandering spirits revealed.

nodes.name: Spirit Swarm
nodes.description: Wandering Spirits has a shorter cooldown

nodes.name: Sins of the Forgotten
nodes.description: Wandering Spirits inflict enemies around them with {Damned}.
nodes.altText: Damned is a stacking ailment that lasts for 3 seconds, deals 25 base Necrotic damage and reduces targets health regeneration by 20% per stack.

skills.name: Warcry
skills.description:
Unleash a mighty roar that knocks back nearby enemies and stuns them for 1.5 seconds. Rares and bosses are stunned for half as long.

20% of remaining cooldown recovered whenever you stun (or freeze if Warcry is converted to cold) an enemy, including with Warcry itself. This effect can occur a maximum of two times each second.

nodes.name: Warcry
nodes.description: Unleash a mighty roar that stuns and knocks back nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Deep Roar
nodes.description: Warcry affects a larger area.

nodes.name: Battle Cry
nodes.description: You and allies affected by Warcry gain increased crit chance for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Ferocity
nodes.description:
While Warcry is on cooldown, your critical strikes have a chance to use Warcry for you. 

This effect can only happen once per direct Warcry use, and it will reset the cooldown.

nodes.name: Jormun's Wrath
nodes.description:
Warcry now freezes enemies instead of stunning them, but it no longer knocks enemies back.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to {Frostbite} chance and effects related to bleed now depend on Frostbite instead.
nodes.altText: Physical damage from {Kinetic Scream} is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage.

nodes.name: Frost Claw
nodes.description: You and allies affected by Warcry deal increased cold damage for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Bringer of Winter
nodes.description: You and your cold minions affected by Warcry gain increased crit chance and additional chill chance for 4 seconds.
nodes.altText: As an example if you take the {Tundra Stalkers} on your {Summon Wolf's} tree, it would gain the cold tag and be considered a cold minion.

nodes.name: Heart of Rime
nodes.description: Warcry inflicts stacks of {Frostbite} to affected enemies.

nodes.name: Frigid Breath
nodes.description: Enemies frozen by Warcry take increased damage from hits.

nodes.name: Debilitating Shout
nodes.description: Warcry applies one stack of {Frailty} to affected enemies for a short duration.

nodes.name: Toxic Companions
nodes.description: For 4 seconds after using Warcry, your {Wolves} have a chance to cause enemies to bleed and your {Scorpion} has a chance to poison enemies.

nodes.name: Juggernaut
nodes.description: You are invulnerable for 1 second after using Warcry.

nodes.name: Breath of Eterra
nodes.description:
Warcry now also restores your health. 

The amount of healing is increased by healing effectiveness and is doubled if used while on low health.

nodes.name: Whirlpool
nodes.description:
You now cast {Maelstrom} when you use Warcry. 

Maelstrom cast this way costs less mana.

nodes.name: Purging Shout
nodes.description: Warcry now cleanses negative ailments on you.

nodes.name: Invigorate
nodes.description:
Warcry now also restores ally health for the same amount {Breath of Eterra}. 

The amount of healing is increased by healing effectiveness and is doubled if used while on low health.

nodes.name: Hastily Advance
nodes.description: If Warcry hits at least one enemy, you gain {Haste} for 1 second.

nodes.name: Energized Charge
nodes.description: Warcry costs less mana and {Haste} gained from {Hastily Advance} lasts longer.

nodes.name: Raging Frenzy
nodes.description: You gain {Frenzy} for the same duration {Hastily Advance}.

nodes.name: Frightful Presence
nodes.description: Warcry now fears enemies for 2 seconds instead of stunning them.
nodes.altText:
Fear causes enemies to flee from you and your allies. Enemies can only be affected by Fear once.

This has no effect if you have {Jormun's Wrath}.

nodes.name: Horrifying Cry
nodes.description: Fear inflicted by Warcry lasts longer and each stack of the {Berserk} buff from the Berserker node now also causes you to deal more damage to Feared enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.statName: Damage to Feared per Berserk Stack

nodes.name: Berserker
nodes.description:
You gain the {Berserk} buff for 1 second when you use Warcry, granting you additional melee damage.

While you have Berserk, you gain additional stacks of Berserk on melee hit up to a maximum, and melee hits refresh all stacks.
nodes.altText: With {Totemic Heart} you gain Berserk when you place the totem.

stats.statName: Berserk Stacks On Hit While Berserk

nodes.name: Brutality
nodes.description: {Berserk} has increased duration and additional maximum stacks.
nodes.altText: While you have Berserk, you gain additional stacks of Berserk on melee hit up to a maximum, and melee hits refresh all stacks.

nodes.name: Bloodthirst
nodes.description: {Berserk} now also affects your Raptor and Bear.
nodes.altText: While you have Berserk, you gain additional stacks of Berserk on melee hit up to a maximum, and melee hits refresh all stacks.

nodes.name: Fury Strikes
nodes.description: {Berserk} now also grants you increased attack speed per stack of Berserk up to a maximum.
nodes.altText: While you have Berserk, you gain additional stacks of Berserk on melee hit up to a maximum, and melee hits refresh all stacks.

nodes.name: Staggering Roar
nodes.description: Warcry knocks enemies further back.

nodes.name: Apprehend
nodes.description: Warcry now pulls enemies instead of knocking them back.
nodes.altText: Modifiers to knockback distance now affect pull distance.

nodes.name: Challenging Might
nodes.description: Warcry now also taunts affected enemies for a short duration.
nodes.altText: This effect does not work if Warcry is used by a totem.

nodes.name: Kinetic Scream
nodes.description: Warcry now hits enemies and deals spell physical damage.
nodes.altText: Added spell damage now applies to Warcry at 200% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Eviscerating Howl
nodes.description: Warcry causes enemies to bleed.

nodes.name: Shallow Breath
nodes.description: Warcry has a significantly shorter cooldown, but no longer has a guaranteed stun, freeze, or fear.

nodes.name: Totemic Heart
nodes.description: You now place down a totem for 3 seconds that repeatedly uses Warcry instead of you, but Warcry costs more mana.
nodes.altText:
Warcry cannot taunt if used by a totem.

When used by a totem Warcry benefits from your minion and totem stats rather than your own stats.

skills.name: Warpath
skills.description: Spin towards the mouse while you hold down the ability key, striking nearby enemies as you move.
skills.altText:
You have 20% less movement speed while spinning (multiplicative with other modifiers). Hits at twice your attack rate, but added damage applies at 60% effectiveness and there is a 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit. 

You cannot be stunned while spinning.

Not affected by weapon range.

nodes.name: Warpath
nodes.loreText: All shall fall before swirling path of war

nodes.name: Void Spiral
nodes.description:
Warpath deals additional melee void damage. 

This effect is doubled while wielding a 2 handed weapon.

nodes.name: Apocalypse Whirl
nodes.description:
Warpath's base physical damage is converted to void. Consequently this damage scales with increases to void damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Warpath has a chance to inflict {Time Rot}. Bleed and ignite chance from all sources are converted to Time Rot chance for Warpath.

Swaps Warpath's {Physical} tag for a {Void} tag.
nodes.altText: The added chance is not affected by Warpath's reduction to ailment application chance, the converted chance is affected .

stats.statName: Bleed And Ignite -> Time Rot Chance

nodes.name: Maw of the Deep
nodes.description: Warpath hits deal more damage against enemies per stack of {Time Rot} on them (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: {Time Rot} is an aliment that deals 45 void damage over time, increases stun duration by 5%, lasts 3 seconds, and stacks up to 12 times.

nodes.name: Juggernaut Stance
nodes.description: While spinning, you have additional block chance and block effectiveness.
nodes.altText: You can block without wielding a shield.

nodes.name: Battlemaster's Blade
nodes.description: Warpath deals damage in a larger area while wielding a two handed weapon.

nodes.name: Dark Nexus
nodes.description: While spinning, you gain mana every three seconds while wielding a two handed weapon.

nodes.name: Gorebringer
nodes.description: Warpath hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed and bleed stacks inflicted by Warpath have increased duration.
nodes.altText: The chance is not affected by Warpath's reduction to ailment application chance.

nodes.name: Earthscorcher
nodes.description:
Warpath's base physical damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to ignite for Warpath.

Swaps Warpath's {Physical} tag for a {Fire} tag.
nodes.altText: This node has no effect if you have taken the {Apoclypse Whirl} node.

nodes.name: Path of Fire
nodes.description: While spinning, you leave behind a burning trail that ignites enemies each second. If ignite has been converted to {Time Rot} with {Apoclypse Whirl} this trail inflicts Time Rot instead.
nodes.altText: The width of the trail does not scale with area modifiers.

stats.statName: Ignite Stacks In Trail Each Second

nodes.name: Iron Reach
nodes.description: Warpath deals damage in a larger area.

nodes.name: Quicksilver Wind
nodes.description: While spinning, you have increased movement speed.

nodes.name: Whirling Steel
nodes.description:
Warpath deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This effect is doubled while using a two handed weapon or dual wielding.

nodes.name: Path of Heavens
nodes.description: While spinning, you have additional spell damage.

nodes.name: Way of the Cleric
nodes.description: While spinning, you and your allies are healed each second within Warpath's area of effect. The amount of health gained is increased by healing effectiveness.

nodes.name: Winds of Justice
nodes.description:
While spinning, you have a chance to cast {Smite} each second on a nearby enemy.

This consumes Smite's mana cost.

nodes.name: Arsenal of Flame
nodes.description: Warpath hits deal more melee fire damage to ignited enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers) and ignite it inflicts has additional Fire Penetration

nodes.name: Warrior's Fury
nodes.description: For each second you continuously spin, Warpath deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area, but costs more mana per second.

nodes.name: Giant Splitter
nodes.description: After spinning for at least 2 seconds you do a {Warslash} when you stop spinning. This deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area for each second you spent spinning, up to a maximum duration.

nodes.name: Way of the Executioner
nodes.description: Warpath deals more melee damage to enemies on low health (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.altText: Targets below 35% max health are considered to be at low health.

nodes.name: Unchained
nodes.description: Warpath costs less mana per second.

nodes.name: Cyclone of War
nodes.description: While spinning, you have additional melee leech while wielding an axe, additional base crit chance while wielding a sword, additional physical penetration while wielding a mace and additional fire penetration while wielding a sceptre.

stats.statName: Global Melee Health Leech With Axe
Global Base Critical Chance With Sword

nodes.name: Reckless Spin
nodes.description: Warpath costs significantly less mana per second, but you have reduced elemental resistance while spinning.
nodes.altText: You can add resistances through other means to mitigate this reduction.

nodes.name: Molten Path
nodes.description: Warpath hits shred enemy armor.
nodes.altText: The chance is not affected by Warpath's reduction to ailment application chance.

nodes.name: Forgemaster Stance
nodes.description: While spinning, you summon {Forged Weapons} every 5 seconds {Forge Strike}.

nodes.name: Moving Forge
nodes.description: While spinning, you summon {Forged Weapons} more frequently.

nodes.name: Echo Knight
nodes.description:
While spinning, you deal increased void damage and you have a chance each second to create an {Echo} at a recent location that uses Warpath on the spot for 2 seconds. This chance is equal to twice your chance for skills to echo.

You can only create a Warpath echo if you have been spinning for at least 2 seconds and have travelled at least 4 metres in the past 2 seconds.
nodes.altText: Echoing is a Void Knight mastery bonus. It grants you a chance for your attacks to repeat after a second. This node's echo bonus has no effect unless become a Void Knight.

nodes.name: Abyssal Tempest
nodes.description:
While spinning, you cast {Abyssal Echoes} every 5 seconds.

This consumes Abyssal Echoes' mana cost.

skills.name: Wave of Death
skills.description: Releases a Wave of Death dealing damage based on how long Death Seal has been actve and your current percent missing health.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 500% effectiveness.

skills.name: Werebear Form
skills.description:
Transform into a ferocious werebear, increasing your physical capabilities and gaining 4 new abilities. 

Your mana is replaced with Rage while in werebear form. When your Rage reaches 0 you automatically transform back into your human form. Your starting Rage is equal to your maximum mana. Rage slowly decays over time at a constant rate.
skills.altText:
The four new abilities are: Rampage, Swipe, Maul and Roar. Swipe and Roar inherit all bonuses from your Swipe and Warcry skill trees.

While in bear form you have 50% increased melee damage and 15% increased health.

nodes.name: Werebear Form
nodes.loreText: Never fear, the bear is here.

nodes.name: Ursine Heart
nodes.description: You have additional endurance and endurance threshold while in Werebear Form.

nodes.name: Frenzied Strikes
nodes.description: You regain additional {Rage} if you hit at least one enemy with {Swipe}.

nodes.name: Relentless Thunder
nodes.description: For 6 seconds after you enter Werebear Form, you deal more Lightning Damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and 100% of Swipe's Base Damage is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with lightning damage instead of physical damage.

nodes.name: Wisened Claws
nodes.description: You gain additional spell damage per point of Strength while in Werebear Form.

nodes.name: Ursine Storm
nodes.description:
You have a chance to cast {Maelstrom} when you use Swipe or Maul and hit at least one enemy.

This consumes Maelstrom's mana cost .

stats.statName: Chance To Cast Maelstrom On Use

nodes.name: Rip and Tear
nodes.description: Maul and Rampage deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Dauntless
nodes.description: Rampage has increased movement speed, a higher chance to stun enemies and stuns inflicted by Rampage last longer.

nodes.name: Apex Predator
nodes.description: Rampage deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and you have global increased damage while Rampaging.

nodes.name: Eterra's Renewal
nodes.description: When you leave Werebear Form you cleanse all negative ailments and gain {Haste} for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Voice of the Thicket
nodes.description:
After using Rampage, Human Form is now replaced with {Arboreal Protection}, which casts {Thorn Shield} on you and up to 5 nearby allies and transforms you to {Spriggan Form}.

This requires you to have Spriggan Form unlocked.

nodes.name: Intimidating Cry
nodes.description:
After using Rampage, you now {Roar}.

This consumes Warcry's mana cost .
nodes.altText: This uses {Warcry's} skill tree.

nodes.name: Army Sunderer
nodes.description: Rampage and Maul hits shred enemy armor.
nodes.altText: Armour Shred reduces armour by 100, lasts 4 seconds, and can stack.

nodes.name: Unending Storm
nodes.description:
Rampage has no cooldown.

While using Rampage you move more slowly, but deal more lightning damage. Both of these effects are multiplicative with other modifiers.

nodes.name: Insatiable
nodes.description: Maul and Rampage have improve base critical strike chance and you have global increased critical strike chance while in Werebear Form.

stats.statName: Base Crit Chance For Maul And Rampage

nodes.name: Crackling Assault
nodes.description: You cast {Storm Bolts} from the sky a number of times each second while Rampaging.

stats.statName: Lightning Strikes Per Second While Rampaging

nodes.name: Invigoration
nodes.description: You regain health and {Rage} on kill or when you hit a rare or boss enemy.

stats.statName: Health Gained On Kill Or Hit
Rage Gained On Kill Or Hit

nodes.name: Bloodthirst
nodes.description:
Your hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed while in Werebear Form.

This chance is doubled for Maul.

nodes.name: Territorial
nodes.description: Maul and Roar affects a larger area.

nodes.name: Fury of the Maul
nodes.description: Maul has a shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: Wild Command
nodes.description: When you use Maul and hit at least one enemy, your minions deal increased damage for 8 seconds. This effect can stack.

nodes.name: Enrage
nodes.description: You regain {Rage} and health with Roar per enemy hit, up to a maximum number of enemies.

stats.statName: Rage Gain On Roar Per Enemy
Health Gain On Roar Per Enemy

nodes.name: Bringer of Storms
nodes.description:
Maul and Rampage's base physical damage is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Armor Shred and bleed chance from all sources is converted to shock and effects related to armor shred or bleed now depend on shock instead for Maul and Rampage.

stats.statName: Armor Shred And Bleed -> Shock Chance

nodes.name: Pummel and Bash
nodes.description: Maul deals more melee damage to stunned enemies and you regain {Rage} when you hit a stunned enemy with Maul.

stats.statName: Rage Gained With Maul To Stunned

nodes.name: Ruthless
nodes.description: Your {Rage} decays slower while in Werebear Form.

nodes.name: Skull Crusher
nodes.description:
Your {Fury Leap} tree now applies to Maul. 

This consumes Fury Leap's mana cost .
nodes.altText: You still use Maul's travel distance.

stats.statName: Consumes Fury Leap's Mana Cost As Rage

nodes.name: Tremor Slam
nodes.description:
After using Maul, you now use {Upheaval} towards your target.

This consumes Upheaval's mana cost.
nodes.altText: If you have the {Skull Crusher} node that makes {Fury Leap}'s tree apply to Maul and you have the {Violent Upheaval} node that tree causes it to cast {Upheaval} then instead of Upheaval being cast twice, it is cast once but that cast deals 30% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

nodes.name: Barrage of the Swarm
nodes.description:
After directly using Roar, Human Form is now replaced with {Swarm Call}, which summons a {Locust} for each nearby stunned enemy up to 6 and transforms you to {Swarmblade Form}.

This requires you to have Swarmblade Form unlocked.

nodes.name: Woodland Bear
nodes.description:
After using Maul, you now cast {Entangling Roots}.

This consumes Entangling Roots' mana cost .
